nodes.full_description: Rock Lee kicks the enemy, and then Guy tackles the enemy to launch them into the air. They both grab the enemy and crash them into the ground with the use of Front Lotus at the same time on the same opponent.

nodes.label: Front Lotus
nodes.description: The user delivers an upward kick to their opponent, sending them high into the air. The user follows the opponent along their upward trajectory, taking tight hold of them so that they can't move or escape; Rock Lee wraps opponents with the bandages h...
nodes.full_description: The user delivers an upward kick to their opponent, sending them high into the air. The user follows the opponent along their upward trajectory, taking tight hold of them so that they can't move or escape; Rock Lee wraps opponents with the bandages he wears to help in this regard. Once they've reached the peak of the initial kick's arc, the user begins a spinning motion and propels them headfirst towards the ground.[1] The user releases the opponent right before impact and retreats to safety, leaving the opponent to collide with the ground alone. Because the Front Lotus requires at least one of the Eight Gates be opened, users are likely to be fatigued afterwards and thus vulnerable to attack. For this reason, Might Guy mandates that Lee only use the Front Lotus to protect something or someone important.[2]

nodes.label: Frog Strike
nodes.description: While performing the Frog Kata, Naruto delivers a powerful open-handed strike, sending ripples of senjutsu chakra that emanate through the struck target from the initial point of contact, causing massive damage from the inside.[2] This makes the tech...
nodes.full_description: While performing the Frog Kata, Naruto delivers a powerful open-handed strike, sending ripples of senjutsu chakra that emanate through the struck target from the initial point of contact, causing massive damage from the inside.[2] This makes the technique extremely useful against the targets with strong defences.[1]

nodes.label: Frog Kata: Roaring Attack
nodes.description: Naruto lands a series of kicks and punches using a few shadow clones. The penultimate attack hits the opponent in the air, throwing them towards the ground, but the original Naruto intercepts the opponent half-way, extending the reach of his punch wi...
nodes.full_description: Naruto lands a series of kicks and punches using a few shadow clones. The penultimate attack hits the opponent in the air, throwing them towards the ground, but the original Naruto intercepts the opponent half-way, extending the reach of his punch with natural energy, sending his opponent flying.

nodes.label: Frog Kata: Heaven Return
nodes.description: Naruto lands a series of punches and kicks using shadow clones, some of which extended with natural energy. One of these attacks sends his opponent up in the air, where the original Naruto follows and delivers an upwards spinning kick, sending his op...
nodes.full_description: Naruto lands a series of punches and kicks using shadow clones, some of which extended with natural energy. One of these attacks sends his opponent up in the air, where the original Naruto follows and delivers an upwards spinning kick, sending his opponent even higher.

nodes.label: Frog Kata
nodes.description: The Frog Kata is a fighting style used exclusively by those who have mastered Sage Mode and trained with the toads of Mount Myōboku. The senjutsu chakra used during Sage Mode "activates" the body in various ways, enhancing the user's speed, reflexes,...
nodes.full_description:
The Frog Kata is a fighting style used exclusively by those who have mastered Sage Mode and trained with the toads of Mount Myōboku. The senjutsu chakra used during Sage Mode "activates" the body in various ways, enhancing the user's speed, reflexes, strength, stamina and durability. This allows a sage to achieve incredible feats which include leaping great distances, shattering sharp materials with their bare hands, as well as lifting massive objects. It is said to be a flawless taijutsu that has no openings in either attack or defence.[1]
When using Frog Kata, the natural energy used by the practitioner to create senjutsu chakra also surrounds the user in an aura of that same natural energy. This aura can act as an extension of their body and cannot be seen by anyone other than those who have trained in senjutsu. By utilising the aura, the user can extend the range and force of their physical attacks. Strikes that seemingly or would normally miss will actually make contact with the target. Only users of Sage Mode can see or sense this aura's extension. Nothing else, not even the Rinnegan can see it. One punch has been shown to have enough force to cripple and completely finish off an opponent, not unlike Chakra Enhanced Strength.
In addition, the enhanced speed, reflexes and heightened chakra-sensing from Sage Mode, combined with the skilful body movements of Frog Kata, allows the practitioner to not only evade enemy strikes at the last possible moment, but accurately counterattack an opponent.[2]

nodes.label: Frog Kata: Frog Throw

nodes.full_description: Naruto and two shadow clones punch and kick the opponent towards each other's direction, before kicking them up in the air, and punching them down to the ground, where Naruto grabs and throws them aside.

After a streak of hits throwing the opponent up in the air, Lee uses the Reverse Lotus sending them down. Before they can reach the ground, Guy performs the Morning Peacock and the Daytime Tiger, causing the tiger to consume the peacock's flames. Lee and Guy both rush through the combined jutsu, punching through their opponent, before the tiger explodes, spreading the peacock's flames.

As the insects' irregular distribution and grouping together result in the creation of numerous chakra signals, it makes it more difficult to distinguish the user's actual location.

nodes.description: An Aburame has thousands of their kikaichū gather together until they've taken on the size and appearance of the Aburame, to be used either as a decoy or a diversion. The insect clone can be created anywhere that the kikaichū are positioned or sent t...
nodes.full_description:
An Aburame has thousands of their kikaichū gather together until they've taken on the size and appearance of the Aburame, to be used either as a decoy or a diversion. The insect clone can be created anywhere that the kikaichū are positioned or sent to, making it more useful for certain tasks than a shadow clone.[1] When the insect clone is struck, it disperses back into a swarm of kikaichū.[2] In the anime, the insect clones take a solid enough form to coordinate with the user for joint attacks.[3]

References[]

↑ 1.0 1.1 Tō no Sho, page 278

↑ Naruto chapter 126

↑ Naruto Shippūden episode 236

nodes.label: Inner Sakura
nodes.description:
Inner Sakura (内なるサクラ, Uchi Naru Sakura) broadly refers to a range of techniques performed by Sakura Haruno with her inner self in the Naruto video games.

Overview[]
Inner Sakura is a manifestation of Sakura Haruno's inner emotions, representing Saku...
nodes.full_description:
Inner Sakura (内なるサクラ, Uchi Naru Sakura) broadly refers to a range of techniques performed by Sakura Haruno with her inner self in the Naruto video games.

Overview[]
Inner Sakura is a manifestation of Sakura Haruno's inner emotions, representing Sakura's actual opinion on things when she outwardly displays something completely different. Inner Sakura has the habit of saying "Shānnarō!" (しゃーんなろー). The phrase has no literal meaning, but is usually translated as "Hell yeah!", "Hell no!", or "Damn it!", depending on the situation. The English anime translates it as a forceful "Cha!" Inner Sakura is unique as it is in a way a second will within Sakura's mind.
Although she appeared quite frequently at the start of the series, Inner Sakura all but disappeared midway through Part I, and rarely appears in Part II. The reason behind this is that she no longer needs to hide her true feelings or reactions behind a fake smile, finally allowing herself to truly say what is on her mind. However, because Inner Sakura usually possessed somewhat violent reactions to things, Sakura is now prone to violent outbursts, which is not helped by her chakra-enhanced strength, making her very scary if one upsets her, similar to her teacher Tsunade.

Usage[]
During the Chūnin Exams, Inner Sakura was strong enough to repel Ino from Sakura's body when she used the Mind Body Switch Technique on her. In many video games, Inner Sakura was made into a technique for Sakura due to her lack of techniques of her own early self in the series. In most appearances, Inner Sakura is a taijutsu where Sakura's inner feelings burst out and she unleashes all her strength on the target with one or more punches. However, Inner Sakura may also interact with Sakura or the opponent(s) as a clone or genjutsu, as shown with the Clone Combo, The Great Sakura, and the Twinkling Maiden's Heart.

Jinchūriki Usage[]
Killer B has made use of the ink by ejecting it from his mouth to blind an...
nodes.full_description:
This is an unique ability of Gyūki that allows it to produce ink. Though Gyūki is the sole inheritor of the ability, it can be passed on to its jinchūriki.

Jinchūriki Usage[]
Killer B has made use of the ink by ejecting it from his mouth to blind an opponent or to create ink clones that can be used to seal targets. Killer B has also made a more practical use of the ink by placing some of it on his finger to use as a makeshift pencil.
Naruto Uzumaki has made use of the ink by mixing it into his Wind Release: Rasenshuriken while in Six Paths Sage Mode. Whether the ink is ejected from his mouth or formed from thin air is unknown.

Forms[]

Killer B's clones, available through th...

The Infinite Tsukuyomi is an extremely powerful genjutsu that traps the entire world in an illusion, enslaving the human and animal populations in a dream so that their chakra may be drawn upon by the God Tree.

nodes.full_description:
Rasa causes a considerable quantity of Gold Dust to erupt from beneath the surface, by placing both of his palms onto the ground directly in front of him, before manipulating the resulting substance into a wave of tidal proportions. The amount of dust produced by this ability is comparable to that of the sand used during Gaara's Quicksand Waterfall Flow technique, but as gold is the heavier of the two, the former was capable of nullifying the latter when they clashed.[2]

References[]

↑ Fourth Databook, page 256

↑ Naruto chapter 546, pages 11-12

nodes.label: Majestic Attire: Susanoo
nodes.description: The user shapes their Susanoo into an armour for Kurama, enhancing its defence and preventing its chakra from being suppressed. Kurama can wield Susanoo's bladed weaponry as well as combine it with its own Tailed Beast Balls to give the latter cuttin...
nodes.full_description: The user shapes their Susanoo into an armour for Kurama, enhancing its defence and preventing its chakra from being suppressed. Kurama can wield Susanoo's bladed weaponry as well as combine it with its own Tailed Beast Balls to give the latter cutting power, making them impossible to catch.[2]

nodes.label: Magnet Release: Lightning God Self
nodes.description: The user uses electromagnetic powers to absorb the iron sand around themselves and expand their body's size to that of a giant. Due to their size, their footsteps then crush the graphite in the earth and cause electric discharge. Kankurō described it...
nodes.full_description:
The user uses electromagnetic powers to absorb the iron sand around themselves and expand their body's size to that of a giant. Due to their size, their footsteps then crush the graphite in the earth and cause electric discharge. Kankurō described it as an absolute defence (絶対防御, zettai bōgyo) technique.

See Also[]
Multi-Size Technique
Black Iron Fist

nodes.label: Magnet Release: Spiral Jet Black
nodes.description: Naruto forms a Magnet Release Rasengan while Sasuke uses an enhanced Chidori to strike the opponent from both sides, sealing their movements from the Rasengan's cursed seal markings.
nodes.full_description: Naruto forms a Magnet Release Rasengan while Sasuke uses an enhanced Chidori to strike the opponent from both sides, sealing their movements from the Rasengan's cursed seal markings.

nodes.label: Magnet Ninja Art: Electromagnetic Vision
nodes.description: This technique unleashes a wave of iron sand that stops the brainwaves of anyone who is caught in its vicinity. By disrupting the electrical waves in the brain, the opponent is rendered unable to think or move.
nodes.full_description: This technique unleashes a wave of iron sand that stops the brainwaves of anyone who is caught in its vicinity. By disrupting the electrical waves in the brain, the opponent is rendered unable to think or move.

nodes.label: Magnet Release: Conserving Bee Twin Blades
nodes.description: Through the Magnet Release kekkei genkai, the user is able to magnetise anything they touch, and then subsequently anything that touches something they have already magnetised, and so on. However, the magnetic force weakens from object to object. Onc...
nodes.full_description:
Through the Magnet Release kekkei genkai, the user is able to magnetise anything they touch, and then subsequently anything that touches something they have already magnetised, and so on. However, the magnetic force weakens from object to object. Once a person has been magnetised, the user can manipulate the magnetic field in such a manner as to make any subsequent attack using a metallic weapon impossible to evade.
Toroi uses his Magnet Release to magnetise a large quantity of shuriken, which he then throws in the direction of his opponents. Any individual that comes into direct contact with these shuriken themselves are magnetised; as such, it is crucial that the opponent avoids all of them as even a single deflection will result in the production of a powerful magnetic field around their body. 

See Also[]
Object Manipulation Technique
References[]

↑ Fourth Databook, page 319

nodes.label: Magnet Ninja Art: Infinite Meteors
nodes.description: Jiga uses this technique, after magnetising the rock walls of a deep pit, to give him the ability to attack a target with many rocks. Once magnetised, Jiga can completely manipulate the rocks' shape and form at his discretion. He also made use of thi...
nodes.full_description: Jiga uses this technique, after magnetising the rock walls of a deep pit, to give him the ability to attack a target with many rocks. Once magnetised, Jiga can completely manipulate the rocks' shape and form at his discretion. He also made use of this technique in order to bury his brother Ruiga alive.

nodes.label: Magic Lantern Body Technique
nodes.description: The Akatsuki members sit down and send out "thought waves" (思念波, shinenha), converted into chakra. These thought waves are then picked up by Pain, acting as a kind of control tower. This technique amplifies the thought waves and broadcasts them to a ...
nodes.full_description:
The Akatsuki members sit down and send out "thought waves" (思念波, shinenha), converted into chakra. These thought waves are then picked up by Pain, acting as a kind of control tower. This technique amplifies the thought waves and broadcasts them to a specific location through illusionary bodies. The illusionary bodies differ from being mere reflections. While Pain is relaying the members' thoughts, they can have conversation and use varying techniques. 
These virtual images looked like the member they represented, the only difference being that they are standing up with their hands in a seal. The images were also transparent, except for the eyes. The anime depicted the images refracting an array of spectral colours, much like a rainbow. Their bodies distort and flicker, as if receiving electronic interference, and the members' voices are altered the same way.

nodes.label: Magnet Ninja Art
nodes.description: This technique enables Jiga to magnetise anything he touches, thus fully manipulating objects at his discretion and allowing him a variety of attacks against his enemies, in areas with large quantities of Iron ore, Jiga was even able to change direct...
nodes.full_description: This technique enables Jiga to magnetise anything he touches, thus fully manipulating objects at his discretion and allowing him a variety of attacks against his enemies, in areas with large quantities of Iron ore, Jiga was even able to change direction in mid-air aswell as float momentarily. Jiga claims to be able to do this because of the great amount of iron he ingests. He can activate or deactivate his own body's magnetism, ensuring that he is not affected by his technique. The potential risk of his technique is exploited when Hinata Hyūga introduces an interfering electric current into his chakra, causing he himself to become a powerful magnet. In this state, he attracts a large quantity of iron sand to himself, and is forced into a vortex of sand and killed.

nodes.full_description: Kaguya sends Black Zetsu out of her sleeve to cover the enemy, contracting and then exploding in the process.

nodes.full_description: Mecha-Kurama pulls a large boomerang from its back and throws it at the opponent.

nodes.full_description: Kabuto burrows underground to strike the opponent at their feet with his chakra scalpels.

nodes.label: Love Roar
nodes.description: Iruka yells at the opponent producing a sound wave that knocks the back and then teleports himself near the opponent. Then he slams his fist onto their head, creating a shockwave and leaving a large bump on the opponent's head.
nodes.full_description: Iruka yells at the opponent producing a sound wave that knocks the back and then teleports himself near the opponent. Then he slams his fist onto their head, creating a shockwave and leaving a large bump on the opponent's head.

nodes.label: Lorentz Gun
nodes.description: The user erects a field of lightning to connect two points. Any metallic object (such as a kunai) that enters the field will rapidly accelerate from one point to the other, quickly surpassing the speed of sound. This makes the metallic object incredi...
nodes.full_description:
The user erects a field of lightning to connect two points. Any metallic object (such as a kunai) that enters the field will rapidly accelerate from one point to the other, quickly surpassing the speed of sound. This makes the metallic object incredibly destructive as it moves towards its destination, such that a single kunai will topple trees that get in its way and decimate a cliffside that it impacts with. Once mastered, users can strike targets from far greater distances than they could if simply throwing a kunai. Any metallic object can be fired in this way assuming the current of lightning is big enough: a ship's anchor caught in such a field will shoot into the sky, the rest of the ship being dragged through the air behind it.
When Sarada Uchiha and Mitsuki are learning to use the Lorentz Gun, they encounter three different hurdles: getting their thrown kunai into the electric field at all, keeping the field active long enough for the kunai to reach its destination, and furthermore accurately designating the target they want the kunai to hit. Their teacher, Sasuke Uchiha, can do all of these things instinctively and doesn't have enough experience with teaching to articulate how he does any of these things. They have more success using the Lorentz Gun in tandem, with Sarada throwing the kunai and Mitsuki maintaining the electric field, but even then still struggle with accuracy.

nodes.label: Longsword Ninja Art: Massacre Method Formation
nodes.description: Using Nuibari and wire strings, the user strings their opponents in a way that leaves their bodies looking as though they were crucified. The final blow is given by piercing them with Nuibari, leaving the opponents to die a slow, painful death.
nodes.full_description: Using Nuibari and wire strings, the user strings their opponents in a way that leaves their bodies looking as though they were crucified. The final blow is given by piercing them with Nuibari, leaving the opponents to die a slow, painful death.

nodes.label: Long-Distance Bombing
nodes.description: Tobi reveals two bombs and throws them at his opponent, the first one knocking them far back.
nodes.full_description: Tobi reveals two bombs and throws them at his opponent, the first one knocking them far back.

nodes.label: Longsword Ninja Art — Earth Spider Sewing
nodes.description: Using the Nuibari, the user buries the sword's attached razor sharp wire string underground. Once a person stumbles into the area, they pull the string to trap their feet in a formation of wire, cutting them off. The power and force behind the wires ...
nodes.full_description:
Using the Nuibari, the user buries the sword's attached razor sharp wire string underground. Once a person stumbles into the area, they pull the string to trap their feet in a formation of wire, cutting them off. The power and force behind the wires can be controlled by the user by applying additional strength. 
Kakashi was able to counter the technique by landing atop the wires instead of between them. Might Guy was also able to counter the technique by using a kunai to stop the wires from converging.

nodes.label: Long Range Mind's Eye of the Kagura
nodes.description:
Karin uses her Mind's Eye of the Kagura to sense her opponent at a long range, alerting her whenever her opponent uses projectile attacks. This prevents her from being hit by their projectile attacks.

See Also[]

nodes.label: Localised Reincarnation Explosion
nodes.description:
The Localised Reincarnation Explosion is one of the powerful techniques utilised by Toneri Ōtsutsuki.

Usage[]
Toneri focuses his chakra cloak into one hand and creates a green orb that passes through the target's body, absorbing their chakra and lea...
nodes.full_description:
The Localised Reincarnation Explosion is one of the powerful techniques utilised by Toneri Ōtsutsuki.

Usage[]
Toneri focuses his chakra cloak into one hand and creates a green orb that passes through the target's body, absorbing their chakra and leaving them unconscious. This attack was able to reach the moon's surface, creating an explosion and causing massive damage to the moon, which resulted in a formation of large meteoroids moving towards Earth. This technique was also able to engulf Naruto's Rasengan.

nodes.label: Lion Flame Bullet
nodes.description: Sasuke stuns his opponent with his electrified sword, sending them up in the air, where he slashes them with it, lands physical attacks, and ultimately delivers a fireball.
nodes.full_description: Sasuke stuns his opponent with his electrified sword, sending them up in the air, where he slashes them with it, lands physical attacks, and ultimately delivers a fireball.

nodes.label: Living Corpse Reincarnation
nodes.description: The Living Corpse Reincarnation is a technique that was developed by Orochimaru that allows him to transfer his soul to someone else's body. It is also referred to as the "Eternal Youth and Immortality Technique". It was developed in order to fuel hi...
nodes.full_description:
The Living Corpse Reincarnation is a technique that was developed by Orochimaru that allows him to transfer his soul to someone else's body. It is also referred to as the "Eternal Youth and Immortality Technique". It was developed in order to fuel his dream of acquiring all the knowledge in existence, a feat that cannot be achieved in a single lifetime.

Contents

1 Usage
2 Known Hosts or Candidates

2.1 Hosts
2.2 Candidates


3 References


Usage[]
The Living Corpse Reincarnation immortalises one's mind, transferring it to a stronger body before the current host rots. By repeating this process periodically, this effectively allows the user to remain in the realm of living, so long as they can keep the host body alive while residing within.
Orochimaru can only perform this technique once every three years. It also seems that when the three years are almost over, he is forced to move into another host, as the previous one begins to weaken and reject him. Presumably, if he had a proper container, he could stay in the host for a full lifetime. The fact that he wanted to prepare Sasuke Uchiha and Kimimaro for the transfer before performing it reinforces this.
To perform this technique, Orochimaru reveals his true form: a gigantic white snake composed of smaller white snakes, by abandoning his current host's body. Orochimaru then swallows the new host and takes him or her to a separate, mental plane where he envelops the mind of his victim. The snake body then dies and falls apart, and Orochimaru's soul dominates the body (though the Sharingan seems to be able to reverse the process against Orochimaru, which also grants the host Orochimaru's supply of chakra and powers). The souls of the hosts are kept alive within Orochimaru, leaving them "still alive", in a sense (albeit suppressed), and when Orochimaru switches hosts, the souls leave with him. Apparently if the host of these souls' chakra level falls enough it is possible for them to resurface in material form as seen with Orochimaru surfacing with his Eight Branches Technique after Sasuke used up most of his chakra.
After taking over another body, Orochimaru modifies it to suit his theme of snakes, in order to increase his survival capabilities, such as stretching and bending his body, reconnecting any severed parts, and shedding his skin to heal injuries. This ensures that if Orochimaru cannot transfer to another body within the three years' time, he can allow his current one to greatly heal and evade attacks, rendering it virtually immortal; Sasuke refers this as the "Power of the White Snake" (白蛇の力, Shirohebi no Chikara).[2] Orochimaru also alters the face of his host to look like his original form.
After being revived through the Evil Releasing Method, Orochimaru seemingly circumvented this process, emerging in a slightly different snake form and then slithering into a White Zetsu clone's mouth.[3]

Known Hosts or Candidates[]
Hosts[]
Unknown person — when Orochimaru uses his Living Corpse Reincarnation on Sasuke, one of his past hosts is seen in Orochimaru and Sasuke's mental plane.
Unknown person — when Orochimaru uses his Living Corpse Reincarnation on Sasuke, another one of his past hosts is seen in Orochimaru and Sasuke's mental plane.
Unknown female — for replacing the hand Itachi Uchiha severed; left body to escape the effects of his arms being sealed away.
Gen'yūmaru — a desperate temporary replacement body before Sasuke Uchiha; left body for Sasuke Uchiha.
Sasuke Uchiha — after having been absorbed by Sasuke when he reversed his Living Corpse Reincarnation technique, took over due to Itachi's battle with his brother lowering Sasuke's chakra enough for Orochimaru to gain control; was sealed away by Itachi.
White Zetsu Clone — for the cells of Hashirama Senju, as well as to escape the fatal injury of releasing the Dead Demon Consuming Seal.[3]
Candidates[]
Itachi Uchiha — for the Sharingan; failed due to Orochimaru being unable to defeat him.
Kimimaro — for the Shikotsumyaku; rejected due to terminal disease.
Guren — for the Crystal Release; rejected due to being too late and loss of interest.(anime only)
Sasuke Uchiha — for the Sharingan; postponed due to being overpowered by Sasuke, then sealed away before another of his consciousnesses was released by the Evil Releasing Method.
References[]

↑ Tō no Sho, page 270

↑ Naruto chapter 365, page 8

↑ 3.0 3.1 Naruto chapter 618, page 15

nodes.label: Lion Combo
nodes.description: This technique is unique to Sasuke Uchiha, relying on his advanced physical condition and his "knack" for rapid combo attacks. Sasuke kicks a target into the air and follows close behind them. While in the air, Sasuke provokes the target into attacki...
nodes.full_description:
This technique is unique to Sasuke Uchiha, relying on his advanced physical condition and his "knack" for rapid combo attacks. Sasuke kicks a target into the air and follows close behind them. While in the air, Sasuke provokes the target into attacking him, giving him the chance to counter them and, in turn, kick them higher into the air at increasingly greater speeds. The higher up they get and the faster they move, the more damage that will be caused to the target when, as his finishing blow, Sasuke inevitably kicks them back to the ground.[1]
Sasuke copied the first two steps of the Lion Combo (the initial kick into the air and following his opponent) from Rock Lee, which are also the first two steps in Lee's Front Lotus.[2]

nodes.label: Limelight
nodes.description: Limelight is a lightning-based technique that is used when all four users take place in the cardinal directions. They will then join their lightning-chakra in the form of four connecting streams that shoot high into the sky above the target area. It ...
nodes.full_description: Limelight is a lightning-based technique that is used when all four users take place in the cardinal directions. They will then join their lightning-chakra in the form of four connecting streams that shoot high into the sky above the target area. It will then create a massive ball of lightning powerful enough to incinerate everything within the area of the four users. It is considered to be the most powerful and destructive Lightning Release technique.[1]

nodes.label: Limbo: Border Jail
nodes.description:
This article is about the technique. For the chapter, see Limbo: Border Jail…!!.




Using his Rinnegan, Madara Uchiha projects a shadow of himself into Limbo (輪墓, Rinbo, literally meaning: Wheel Grave), an invisible world that coexists with the phys...
nodes.full_description:
This article is about the technique. For the chapter, see Limbo: Border Jail…!!.




Using his Rinnegan, Madara Uchiha projects a shadow of himself into Limbo (輪墓, Rinbo, literally meaning: Wheel Grave), an invisible world that coexists with the physical world but that is ordinarily impossible to detect or perceive.[2] With one Rinnegan, Madara can form only one shadow, but with two Rinnegan, he can form up to four. Each shadow has the same abilities as the real Madara, with the added advantage of being untrackable.[1] The shadows can attack targets, giving the appearance of an inexplicable force knocking them down,[3] or they can defend Madara, giving the appearance of an invisible wall around him.[4] The shadows are invulnerable to any kind of physical damage and cannot be harmed through conventional means.[2] A shadow's very formation can be used defensively, taking Madara's place mid-attack as a sort of Body Replacement Technique.[5] After a certain amount of time, a shadow will need to return to Madara's body, and he will likewise need to wait a certain amount of time before he can reform it.[6]
Against most opponents, Madara's shadows give him an insurmountable advantage. But Naruto Uzumaki and Sasuke Uchiha, after receiving Six Paths chakra, undermine some of the shadows' usual benefits: Sasuke can see them with his own Rinnegan; Naruto can sense them while using Six Paths Sage Mode;[2] Naruto can damage them using Six Paths Senjutsu.[6] Through a combination of these skills, Naruto is able to capture a shadow, preventing it from returning to Madara.[7]

He then jumps once more, this time behind the opponent, and punches them into the ground face-first. Finally, falls with a heel drop on his foe akin to the Lion Combo.

After forming the neccessary hand seals and reciting an incantation, On Mayura Girante Sowaka, Mukade absorbs the seal placed by the Fourth Hokage, allowing him to time travel. Those caught in the blast are also sent through time.
Specifically, Mukad...
nodes.full_description:
After forming the neccessary hand seals and reciting an incantation, On Mayura Girante Sowaka, Mukade absorbs the seal placed by the Fourth Hokage, allowing him to time travel. Those caught in the blast are also sent through time.
Specifically, Mukade travelled back twenty years, six years before the seal was placed, though Naruto Uzumaki and Yamato arrived six years later.

nodes.label: Past Vision Sharing
nodes.description: This technique allows the user to share their past and experiences with a Byakugan user. The user will expel a glowing bubble from their mouth that releases blinding violet rays, which reacts to the person's Byakugan to project images into their mind...
nodes.full_description: This technique allows the user to share their past and experiences with a Byakugan user. The user will expel a glowing bubble from their mouth that releases blinding violet rays, which reacts to the person's Byakugan to project images into their mind. However, only those who are worthy are capable of seeing the vision while those from outside the determined targeted area are incapable of doing so. After the vision is transferred, the sphere can be retracted to the user.

nodes.description: Chōji uses the Super Multi-Size Technique only in one part of his body, similar to the Partial Multi-Size Technique.
nodes.full_description: Chōji uses the Super Multi-Size Technique only in one part of his body, similar to the Partial Multi-Size Technique.

nodes.label: Passing Fang
nodes.description: The user moves at a target at high speeds and delivers a body slam. Because of how quickly they move, the user travels in a fairly straight line, necessitating that they anticipate the target's movements in order to ensure a successful strike. As the...
nodes.full_description:
The user moves at a target at high speeds and delivers a body slam. Because of how quickly they move, the user travels in a fairly straight line, necessitating that they anticipate the target's movements in order to ensure a successful strike. As they move at the target, the user spins rapidly in order to pierce targets, drilling even through stone. Unlike the Fang Passing Fang, this technique is performed alone; users therefore require additional training to raise its attack power enough to compensate for this.[1]

References[]

↑ 1.0 1.1 Tō no Sho, page 250

nodes.label: Partial Multi-Size Technique
nodes.description: This is a more practical application of the Multi-Size Technique. Rather than increase the size of their entire body, the user increases the size of only specific body parts, typically the arms and legs. Because of the larger size, physical attacks m...
nodes.full_description: This is a more practical application of the Multi-Size Technique. Rather than increase the size of their entire body, the user increases the size of only specific body parts, typically the arms and legs. Because of the larger size, physical attacks made with the expanded limbs do greater damage than normal. The limbs' growth is very fast, giving users a way of taking opponents by surprise. As with other techniques of the Akimichi clan, its chakra requirements are quite high,[1] to the point that, in Part I, Chōji takes one of the Three Coloured Pills before using this technique.[2]

nodes.label: Parasitic Giant Insect — Bug Bite
nodes.description: Following an Aburame clan member placing a number of kidaichū onto the skin of an enemy, these insects immediately burrow into the victim's body and begin to devour its flesh and chakra. This process causes the insects to grow rapidly in size, until ...
nodes.full_description:
Following an Aburame clan member placing a number of kidaichū onto the skin of an enemy, these insects immediately burrow into the victim's body and begin to devour its flesh and chakra. This process causes the insects to grow rapidly in size, until the host body is completely eaten away from the inside out.

References[]

↑ Fourth Databook, page 246

nodes.label: Partial Multi-Size Leg Technique
nodes.description: The user expands their leg and sends the opponent flying with a kick.
nodes.full_description: The user expands their leg and sends the opponent flying with a kick.

nodes.label: Parasitic Destruction Insects: Pupa
nodes.description: Shino uses his kikaichū to form a tornado that traps the opponent. He then walks into the tornado and sends another cluster to crush the opponent.
nodes.full_description: Shino uses his kikaichū to form a tornado that traps the opponent. He then walks into the tornado and sends another cluster to crush the opponent.

nodes.label: Parasitic Destruction Insects: Round Mass
nodes.description: This technique is a larger and more powerful version of the Floating Bugs technique.
nodes.full_description: This technique is a larger and more powerful version of the Floating Bugs technique.

nodes.label: Parasitic Destruction Insects: Whirl
nodes.description: Shino uses his kikaichū to form a funnel that traps the opponent, spins them around violently, and then throws them away.
nodes.full_description: Shino uses his kikaichū to form a funnel that traps the opponent, spins them around violently, and then throws them away.

nodes.label: Parasitic Destruction Insects: Spear
nodes.description: Shino's kikaichū combine into two spear-like forms that spiral towards the enemy and carries them into the air, where they brutally feast upon their chakra.
nodes.full_description: Shino's kikaichū combine into two spear-like forms that spiral towards the enemy and carries them into the air, where they brutally feast upon their chakra.

nodes.label: Parasitic Destruction Insects: Hail
nodes.description: Shino releases hundreds of thousands of kikaichū from his body into the air. On his command, the insects attack the opponent in five waves. They then coalesce into a large cloud and rain down on the opponent, and then the insects form a giant meteor-...
nodes.full_description: Shino releases hundreds of thousands of kikaichū from his body into the air. On his command, the insects attack the opponent in five waves. They then coalesce into a large cloud and rain down on the opponent, and then the insects form a giant meteor-like insect sphere crashing down on the opponent.

nodes.label: Parasitic Destruction Insects: Hollow
nodes.description: Shino manipulates the kikaichū to form a large airborne cloud that descends on the opponent. After the insects are on the ground surrounding the opponent, the insects swarm upon them, and quickly erupt into an explosion of insects.
nodes.full_description: Shino manipulates the kikaichū to form a large airborne cloud that descends on the opponent. After the insects are on the ground surrounding the opponent, the insects swarm upon them, and quickly erupt into an explosion of insects.

nodes.label: Parasitic Destruction Insects: Eclipse
nodes.description: Shino manipulates his kikaichū to form a giant pillar that collapses into a wave that engulfs the opponent. The bugs then turn into a whirlpool that drag the opponent below ground before spouting out as a pillar that implodes.
nodes.full_description: Shino manipulates his kikaichū to form a giant pillar that collapses into a wave that engulfs the opponent. The bugs then turn into a whirlpool that drag the opponent below ground before spouting out as a pillar that implodes.

nodes.label: Parasitic Destruction Insects: Bind
nodes.description: Shino creates a cloud of kikaichū that lifts the opponent into the air. Then, many spheres of them repeatedly strike the opponent before sending them crashing to the ground.
nodes.full_description: Shino creates a cloud of kikaichū that lifts the opponent into the air. Then, many spheres of them repeatedly strike the opponent before sending them crashing to the ground.

nodes.label: Parasitic Destruction Insects: Arrowhead Swarm
nodes.description: Shino reveals several kikaichū behind his opponent, which begin to wrap around them. At the same time, Shino sends more insects in a spiralling pattern. All the insects swarm at the opponent, damaging them, and then dispersing.
nodes.full_description: Shino reveals several kikaichū behind his opponent, which begin to wrap around them. At the same time, Shino sends more insects in a spiralling pattern. All the insects swarm at the opponent, damaging them, and then dispersing.

nodes.label: Parasitic Destruction Insect Technique
nodes.description: Shortly after a member of the Aburame clan is born, thousands of insects are allowed to colonise his or her body. In exchange for getting to feed off of their host's chakra, the insects follow the host's every command: from attack to defence to recon...
nodes.full_description:
Shortly after a member of the Aburame clan is born, thousands of insects are allowed to colonise his or her body. In exchange for getting to feed off of their host's chakra, the insects follow the host's every command: from attack to defence to reconnaissance, and everything in between. The insects inevitably become the core ability of the Aburame's entire fighting style, upon which all of their other jutsu rely.
This technique, alternatively translated as "Kikaichū Technique", is named after the kikaichū, the species of insects that Aburame are most commonly colonised by. But they are not the only option: Torune uses rinkaichū and Yōji used kochū. Aburame are not even restricted to a single species: Shino uses both kikaichū and kidaichū; Muta uses kikaichū and shōkaichū.

nodes.label: Protective Sphere of Light
nodes.description: This is a technique in which Shion's bell illuminates and negates any negative occurence. It was powerful enough to protect Shion from Mōryō's darkness.
nodes.full_description: This is a technique in which Shion's bell illuminates and negates any negative occurence. It was powerful enough to protect Shion from Mōryō's darkness.

nodes.label: Scroll Communication Technique
nodes.description: The user communicates to another by using a scroll, on which writing appears and disappears.
nodes.full_description: The user communicates to another by using a scroll, on which writing appears and disappears.

nodes.label: Protective Cloth Dome
nodes.description: Maki uses her cloth for defensive means by wrapping it around her and any nearby allies, she can form a protective barrier. The cloth can be made around a nearby object such as a rock, to better hold down the fortification. If the cloth is made wet b...
nodes.full_description:
Maki uses her cloth for defensive means by wrapping it around her and any nearby allies, she can form a protective barrier. The cloth can be made around a nearby object such as a rock, to better hold down the fortification. If the cloth is made wet by a Water Release technique, it allows the dome to defend against powerful heat-based attacks.

See Also[]
Earth Release: Rock Shelter
Unsealing Technique: Segmented Iron Dome
Wood Release: Wood Locking Wall

nodes.label: Scorching River Great Eruption
nodes.description: Rōshi grabs his opponent and makes a great leap, transforming into Son Gokū. He then puts his opponent between his lava-coated fists, slamming them into the ground. As he raises his arms, the ground beneath him erupts.
nodes.full_description: Rōshi grabs his opponent and makes a great leap, transforming into Son Gokū. He then puts his opponent between his lava-coated fists, slamming them into the ground. As he raises his arms, the ground beneath him erupts.

nodes.label: Scorch Release: Halo Hurricane Jet Black Arrow Style Zero
nodes.description: This technique combines Naruto Uzumaki's Wind Release: Rasenshuriken with Sasuke Uchiha's Blaze Release: Kagutsuchi along with their variants. Because the wind to flame ratio is perfectly balanced, the flames are greatly enhanced, causing whatever is...
nodes.full_description:
This technique combines Naruto Uzumaki's Wind Release: Rasenshuriken with Sasuke Uchiha's Blaze Release: Kagutsuchi along with their variants. Because the wind to flame ratio is perfectly balanced, the flames are greatly enhanced, causing whatever is struck by this technique to be enveloped in a swirling mass of black flames. 

Usage[]
When first used, the large-scale version of this technique combined Naruto's Wind Release: Ultra-Big Ball Rasenshuriken and the arrow of Sasuke's Blaze Release: Susanoo Kagutsuchi when they collided in mid-air, creating something reminiscent of a pin-wheel. A smaller-scale version of this technique combined a normal Rasenshuriken and black flames manipulated with Kagutsuchi to form a flaming pinwheel. When the technique made contact with the target, they were launched backwards and likewise engulfed in the black flames.

nodes.label: Scorch Release: Great Steaming Explosive Blast
nodes.description: Pakura combines several of her flaming orbs to create a single massive one, which then violently explodes with enough force and power to incinerate a large area around it. When this happens, steam can be seen emitting from the area.
nodes.full_description: Pakura combines several of her flaming orbs to create a single massive one, which then violently explodes with enough force and power to incinerate a large area around it. When this happens, steam can be seen emitting from the area.

nodes.label: Scorch Release: Extremely Steaming Murder
nodes.description: The user creates several flaming orbs that resemble small suns. These orbs rotate around the user and can be freely controlled to attack enemies. When an orb touches an opponent, it instantly evaporates all the water inside their body, leaving them i...
nodes.full_description: The user creates several flaming orbs that resemble small suns. These orbs rotate around the user and can be freely controlled to attack enemies. When an orb touches an opponent, it instantly evaporates all the water inside their body, leaving them in a mummified state. When this happens, steam can be seen emitting from the opponent's body.[2] However, this technique is vulnerable to Water Release, which can be used to dissipate the heat, becoming steam.[3]

nodes.label: Scorching Heat Sand Binding Coffin
nodes.description: As Gaara traps his opponent within an enormous sphere of sand, he also manoeuvres his siblings around it in sand platforms. Kankurō uses the Sasori puppet to set the sphere on fire, while Temari fans the flames. Gaara finishes covering the opponent i...
nodes.full_description: As Gaara traps his opponent within an enormous sphere of sand, he also manoeuvres his siblings around it in sand platforms. Kankurō uses the Sasori puppet to set the sphere on fire, while Temari fans the flames. Gaara finishes covering the opponent in sand, and crushes them, causing the flaming sand prison to explode.

nodes.label: Scientific Ninja Tool: Purple Electricity
nodes.description: Using his shadow clones, Boruto is launched by their boosted wind, and uses Purple Electricity through the use of the Shinobi Gauntlet.
nodes.full_description: Using his shadow clones, Boruto is launched by their boosted wind, and uses Purple Electricity through the use of the Shinobi Gauntlet.

nodes.label: Scientific Ninja Tool: Orca and Powerful Breath
nodes.description: Boruto utilises his Shinobi Gauntlet to release a surge water pooling the area and electrify it with a bolt of electricity, electrocuting anyone that is in the water.
nodes.full_description: Boruto utilises his Shinobi Gauntlet to release a surge water pooling the area and electrify it with a bolt of electricity, electrocuting anyone that is in the water.

nodes.label: Scent of Illusionary Flowers Technique
nodes.description: This genjutsu uses a species of white flower that grows near the Valley of Lies as a medium. When victims smell the flowers' scent, they remember things from their lives that will cause them to lose their will to fight. The flowers' scent is strong e...
nodes.full_description:
This genjutsu uses a species of white flower that grows near the Valley of Lies as a medium. When victims smell the flowers' scent, they remember things from their lives that will cause them to lose their will to fight. The flowers' scent is strong enough to, with enough time, seep into victims' other belongings, keeping them entranced even if the flowers are discarded. If victims also discard the scented belongings and move out of range of the smell, they will be free of the genjutsu.
When Konan falls under the genjutsu's influence, she sees a field of flowers and her childhood friend, Yahiko. Yahiko articulates the guilt she's been feeling, at first causing her to think he is merely a figment of her imagination. When he starts shifting blame to her other friend, Nagato – a sentiment she does not believe is justified – she realises he is a genjutsu. She dispels the field of flowers, revealing a cliff she was about to walk off of, and after discarding her cloak causes Yahiko's image to disappear as well.

nodes.label: Scientific Ninja Tool: Ever-Changing
nodes.description:
With their Scientific Ninja Tools, the user can use three different stored ninjutsu:

Whirlwind Shuriken (旋風手裏剣): The user throws a shuriken contained with a Wind Release that releases a gust of wind.
Water Ball (水球弾): The user releases a Water Relea...
nodes.full_description:
With their Scientific Ninja Tools, the user can use three different stored ninjutsu:

Whirlwind Shuriken (旋風手裏剣): The user throws a shuriken contained with a Wind Release that releases a gust of wind.
Water Ball (水球弾): The user releases a Water Release ninjutsu, forming an orb that shoots bullets of water.
Lightning Gun (雷砲, Raideppō): The user releases a Lightning Release ninjutsu, shooting a beam of electricity.

nodes.label: Scent Blossom Colouring
nodes.description: Kurenai creates a cherry blossom clone which attacks the opponent with several kunai slashes while creating a stream of cherry blossom petals behind it, before spinning around, and delivering a final slash that sends the opponent flying away.
nodes.full_description: Kurenai creates a cherry blossom clone which attacks the opponent with several kunai slashes while creating a stream of cherry blossom petals behind it, before spinning around, and delivering a final slash that sends the opponent flying away.

nodes.label: Scattering Thousand Crows Technique
nodes.description: This technique summons a flock of countless crows, dazzling the enemy. The user can freely manipulate the crows by emitting chakra from his fingertips and altering it into high frequency waves. Since the crows continuously clone themselves, the targe...
nodes.full_description: This technique summons a flock of countless crows, dazzling the enemy. The user can freely manipulate the crows by emitting chakra from his fingertips and altering it into high frequency waves. Since the crows continuously clone themselves, the target becomes completely surrounded, obscuring their field of vision. When no longer needed, the crows will simply disappear in a puff of smoke.

nodes.label: Scattering Tailed Beast Balls
nodes.description: In his full Tailed Beast transformation, Naruto discharges multiple uncompressed Tailed Beast Balls at once. They can be shot in a widespread manner, and can converge on multiple targets.
nodes.full_description: In his full Tailed Beast transformation, Naruto discharges multiple uncompressed Tailed Beast Balls at once. They can be shot in a widespread manner, and can converge on multiple targets.

nodes.label: Scarlet Invitation
nodes.description: Kurenai strikes the opponent with a combination of an elbow strike and two kicks before creating multiple cherry blossom petals which burst up from the ground lifting them into the air.
nodes.full_description: Kurenai strikes the opponent with a combination of an elbow strike and two kicks before creating multiple cherry blossom petals which burst up from the ground lifting them into the air.

nodes.label: Scale Powder Blasting
nodes.description: Using Chōmei's wings, Fū strikes her opponent and flies into the air while releasing scales, then fully transforms into Chōmei and delivers a drill-like attack on her opponent. Just before impact, Fū snaps Chōmei's mouthparts, creating a spark which ...
nodes.full_description:
Using Chōmei's wings, Fū strikes her opponent and flies into the air while releasing scales, then fully transforms into Chōmei and delivers a drill-like attack on her opponent. Just before impact, Fū snaps Chōmei's mouthparts, creating a spark which ignites the scale-filled tornado her rotation created, resulting in a massive explosion.

See Also[]

nodes.full_description: Amachi spreads his arms and launches his scales at high velocity at the target. This technique had enough power to burst a shadow clone and throw Naruto back quite some distance. In addition, it had a wide enough range to wipe out six shadow clones at once.

nodes.full_description: Fū lands a series of kicks and punches, blinds her opponent with scales, and then flies into it, landing more hits with Chōmei's wings as she rotates.

nodes.label: Scale Powder

nodes.full_description: The user releases a large amount of fine powder from their mouth or body, which, due to its luminous quality, shines so brightly that it can temporarily blind multiple targets within its area of effect.

With the help of pre-existing sand, the user creates a sandstorm barrier that is capable of overpowering other active barriers, like the Sensing Barrier. The technique also disturbs sensing abilities of the opponents. The barrier can be used offensively to surround opponents and limit their sense of vision.

nodes.label: Sand Whip
nodes.description: Gaara raises himself on a sand platform, striking all around himself with a sand whip for any target within reach.
nodes.full_description: Gaara raises himself on a sand platform, striking all around himself with a sand whip for any target within reach.

nodes.label: Sand Waterfall Mass Attack
nodes.description: Gaara strikes the opponent with a ball of sand, then pours sand down on them before raising the sand upwards to knock them into the air.
nodes.full_description: Gaara strikes the opponent with a ball of sand, then pours sand down on them before raising the sand upwards to knock them into the air.

nodes.label: Sand Waterfall Funeral
nodes.description: After encasing a target with sand, such as by using the Sand Binding Coffin, Gaara clenches his fist to cause the sand to contract. The sand presses in on the target from all directions until they're pulverised, killing them. Although some of the tar...
nodes.full_description:
After encasing a target with sand, such as by using the Sand Binding Coffin, Gaara clenches his fist to cause the sand to contract. The sand presses in on the target from all directions until they're pulverised, killing them. Although some of the target's remains burst through the sand, scattering around the area similar to rain, most of their blood is absorbed by the sand itself.[1]
Gaara can moderate the amount of pressure used in the sand's contraction, either making death quick and painless or dragging it out to prolong their suffering. He can also stop short of killing his targets, only compressing the sand enough to break their bones.[2] In this case, however, the damage is so severe that only Tsunade is skilled enough to mend the bones, and even then she anticipates only a 50% success rate.[3] In Gaara Hiden, the Sand Waterfall Funeral is stated to leave no identifiable trace of its victims, making it a useful way to fake a person's death.
In the anime, Shinki performs this technique using Iron Sand.[4]

nodes.label: Sand Waterfall Imperial Funeral
nodes.description: After a target has been engulfed by Quicksand Waterfall Flow, Gaara slams his hands onto the sand and activates this technique.[2] As with the regular Sand Waterfall Funeral, the sand compresses upon and grinds down the target, though on a far greate...
nodes.full_description: After a target has been engulfed by Quicksand Waterfall Flow, Gaara slams his hands onto the sand and activates this technique.[2] As with the regular Sand Waterfall Funeral, the sand compresses upon and grinds down the target, though on a far greater scale than the regular version. The large volume of sand used in the Quicksand Waterfall Flow is flattened out and the target is repeatedly squeezed, preventing them from moving and ultimately crushing them to death. Kimimaro is able to survive this technique only because of fortification to his bones.[1]

nodes.label: Sand Waterfall Mass Defence
nodes.description: Gaara manipulates his sand to swirl around himself, acting as a shield against projectiles.
nodes.full_description: Gaara manipulates his sand to swirl around himself, acting as a shield against projectiles.

nodes.label: Storm Release: Black Hunting
nodes.description: Seemingly using the manoeuvrability of his Storm Release: Laser Circus technique, but employing the use of black lightning instead of normal lightning, Darui sends out several panthers which are guided towards the opponent, slashing them as they pass...
nodes.full_description: Seemingly using the manoeuvrability of his Storm Release: Laser Circus technique, but employing the use of black lightning instead of normal lightning, Darui sends out several panthers which are guided towards the opponent, slashing them as they pass. The panthers then merge into a single, giant panther behind the opponent, which bites them and then explodes.

nodes.label: Sand Taijutsu Tsunami
nodes.description: Gaara sends the opponent into the air where Lee kicks the opponent. Gaara then uses Quicksand Waterfall Flow and Lee appears from inside the tsunami of sand, and kicks the opponent into it. As the opponent slowly descends, the sand proceeds, and they...
nodes.full_description: Gaara sends the opponent into the air where Lee kicks the opponent. Gaara then uses Quicksand Waterfall Flow and Lee appears from inside the tsunami of sand, and kicks the opponent into it. As the opponent slowly descends, the sand proceeds, and they drown in it.

nodes.label: Storm Release: Laser Circus
nodes.description: This technique creates several beams and shoots them at the enemy. First, a halo of bright energy spreads around the user's hands as this technique is activated, then it encircles the user's hand and from that, the beams are shot out towards the enem...
nodes.full_description: This technique creates several beams and shoots them at the enemy. First, a halo of bright energy spreads around the user's hands as this technique is activated, then it encircles the user's hand and from that, the beams are shot out towards the enemy.[2] The user is able to alter the beam's direction after being shot, making it possible to strike multiple enemies with pinpoint accuracy, even bypassing hostages held in close proximity.[3] The user can also increase the number of beams to a great amount to pin down an enemy.[4]

nodes.label: Storm Release: Azure Eagle Blade

nodes.full_description: Darui generates beams of energy that strike the opponent, then jumps and delivers a sword strike with his electricity-charged blade.

nodes.label: Storm Release Secret Technique: Demon Dragon Storm
nodes.description: Hiruko uses the Storm Release kekkei genkai he acquired through his Chimera Technique to produce a massive thunder cloud capable of infinitely absorbing chakra to grow in size, strength and ferocity. The amount of chakra it receives will also increas...
nodes.full_description:
Hiruko uses the Storm Release kekkei genkai he acquired through his Chimera Technique to produce a massive thunder cloud capable of infinitely absorbing chakra to grow in size, strength and ferocity. The amount of chakra it receives will also increase. He can apparently channel this absorbed energy into himself, amplifying the technique to its highest limit.
By using different seals while active, Hiruko can summon multiple red pillars of chakra in the area and/or mass-absorb multiple techniques through a suction into his mouth.

nodes.full_description:
This article is about the ninjutsu. For the chapter, see Steaming Danger Tyranny!!.




The Steaming Danger Tyranny is Gengetsu Hōzuki's "infinite explosion ninjutsu" (無限爆破忍術, mugen bakuha ninjutsu, literally meaning: infinite explosion ninja technique).

Contents

1 Usage
2

nodes.label: Steaming Danger Tyranny: Sleeve Cutter
nodes.description: The user uses Steaming Danger Tyranny, which is capable of forming an axe on one of its hands. The axe can be used for combat purposes.
nodes.full_description: The user uses Steaming Danger Tyranny, which is capable of forming an axe on one of its hands. The axe can be used for combat purposes.

nodes.label: Stealth Snake Hand
nodes.description: Kabuto lands a series of attacks with snakes and chakra scalpels, before burrowing underground and rising out for a snake-based uppercut.
nodes.full_description: Kabuto lands a series of attacks with snakes and chakra scalpels, before burrowing underground and rising out for a snake-based uppercut.

nodes.label: Starch Syrup Gun
nodes.description: The user kneads chakra, along with natural energy and then converts it into large amount of high-viscosity water within their mouth before spitting it outward with an incredible amount of force. The projectile-like force of this technique combined wi...
nodes.full_description: The user kneads chakra, along with natural energy and then converts it into large amount of high-viscosity water within their mouth before spitting it outward with an incredible amount of force. The projectile-like force of this technique combined with its monstrous volume gives it the capability to quickly cover a wide area.

nodes.label: Starch Syrup Binding Rope
nodes.description: After kneading chakra in the stomach and converting it to high-viscosity water, the user spits it out, in the form of ropes that restrains the target's movement. Because of the viscosity of the water, it is even more difficult for them to escape its ...
nodes.full_description: After kneading chakra in the stomach and converting it to high-viscosity water, the user spits it out, in the form of ropes that restrains the target's movement. Because of the viscosity of the water, it is even more difficult for them to escape its confines.

nodes.label: Steam Dash
nodes.description: After increasing their chakra temperature to its boiling point, the user releases boiling steam from their body, after which, they dash straight at the opponent in a straight line, taking the similar approach to a locomotive and creating sounds, whic...
nodes.full_description: After increasing their chakra temperature to its boiling point, the user releases boiling steam from their body, after which, they dash straight at the opponent in a straight line, taking the similar approach to a locomotive and creating sounds, which are similar to the ones made by a steam whistle.

nodes.label: Stake Chains
nodes.description: Obito delivers a series of strikes to the opponent with a combination of Kamui, a shuriken and Wood Release: Cutting Technique. Then he creates black receivers which rain on the opponent. Finally, Obito uses Demonic Statue Chains to pick up the stake...
nodes.full_description: Obito delivers a series of strikes to the opponent with a combination of Kamui, a shuriken and Wood Release: Cutting Technique. Then he creates black receivers which rain on the opponent. Finally, Obito uses Demonic Statue Chains to pick up the stakes and smash them to the opponent.

nodes.label: Spore Technique
nodes.description: White Zetsu is able to plant spore-sized parasite clones onto the bodies of others for the purpose of remotely monitoring them. As these clones parasitise their victim's chakra and have no chakra of their own, they cannot be detected by standard sens...
nodes.full_description:
White Zetsu is able to plant spore-sized parasite clones onto the bodies of others for the purpose of remotely monitoring them. As these clones parasitise their victim's chakra and have no chakra of their own, they cannot be detected by standard sensory abilities.[2] Once activated via time-delay, the parasite clones suddenly expand, restricting their victim's movements and stealing greater amounts of chakra.
The absorbed chakra can be transferred to another individual by establishing physical contact with them.[3] The spores can also activate in order to shield their host from harm,[4] or be forced into activation and expelled from their host's body if that individual takes in senjutsu chakra.[5]

nodes.label: Spontaneous Tree Summoning
nodes.description: A last resort technique which doesn't require hand seals. Using their own cells as a medium, the user creates an entire tree from their body at the cost of a large amount of chakra. In doing so, it can alter the trajectory of incoming attacks.
nodes.full_description: A last resort technique which doesn't require hand seals. Using their own cells as a medium, the user creates an entire tree from their body at the cost of a large amount of chakra. In doing so, it can alter the trajectory of incoming attacks.

nodes.label: Spirit Transformation Technique
nodes.description: This highly versatile technique allows the user's spirit to leave their body. By taking possession of a target, the spirit can suppress and collapse the victim's spirit, killing them, or freely manipulate their actions. This technique can also be use...
nodes.full_description:
This highly versatile technique allows the user's spirit to leave their body. By taking possession of a target, the spirit can suppress and collapse the victim's spirit, killing them, or freely manipulate their actions. This technique can also be used to communicate information or transfer chakra.[2] This technique will always reach the intended target, even when their whereabouts are unknown to the user. Having become a living ghost, the spirit has no substance and cannot be affected by enemy attacks.[1]
With the release of the Summoning: Impure World Reincarnation technique, a reincarnated Dan was capable of taking control of his ascending spirit for a short period of time using this technique. Dan Katō noted that this technique had been used to kill a great number of shinobi during his lifetime[3] and that the only way to counteract the technique is to trap the user within a barrier, such as the Four Violet Flames Formation, before it is activated.[4]

nodes.label: Stagnate Snake Confinement
nodes.description: Kabuto expels four white snakes from his mouth on the field, which is stepped on, will have numerous snakes swarm on the opponent.
nodes.full_description: Kabuto expels four white snakes from his mouth on the field, which is stepped on, will have numerous snakes swarm on the opponent.

nodes.label: Spirit Reflection Technique
nodes.description: Malice takes a shinobi's chakra and imbues a puppet with it, creating a perfect copy of the shinobi. These puppets are granted any weapons, techniques, and bloodline techniques they may have. Malice is able to control the puppets from very long dista...
nodes.full_description: Malice takes a shinobi's chakra and imbues a puppet with it, creating a perfect copy of the shinobi. These puppets are granted any weapons, techniques, and bloodline techniques they may have. Malice is able to control the puppets from very long distances and without the use of chakra threads.

nodes.label: Spirit Transformation Soul Killing Technique
nodes.description: Dan's soul leaves his body, and enters the body of his opponent. Inside, it destroys their opponent's soul before returning to Dan's body.
nodes.full_description: Dan's soul leaves his body, and enters the body of his opponent. Inside, it destroys their opponent's soul before returning to Dan's body.

nodes.label: Spirit Foot
nodes.description: Shizune spins around and kicks her opponent sending them flying backwards.
nodes.full_description: Shizune spins around and kicks her opponent sending them flying backwards.

nodes.label: Spiralling Strife Spheres
nodes.description: Naruto, while in Nine-Tails Chakra Mode, uses a chakra arm to form multiple Rasengan above his head. He then uses additional arms to hold the Rasengan and hit multiple opponents simultaneously.
nodes.full_description: Naruto, while in Nine-Tails Chakra Mode, uses a chakra arm to form multiple Rasengan above his head. He then uses additional arms to hold the Rasengan and hit multiple opponents simultaneously.

nodes.label: Spiralling Ring
nodes.description: Menma creates a dark purple Rasengan-like orb of chakra surrounded by a series of white rings of chakra that orbit the main sphere. These rings then align into one disc-like shape around the orb, causing the rings to resemble planetary rings. It matc...
nodes.full_description: Menma creates a dark purple Rasengan-like orb of chakra surrounded by a series of white rings of chakra that orbit the main sphere. These rings then align into one disc-like shape around the orb, causing the rings to resemble planetary rings. It matches Naruto's Sage Mode Wind Release: Rasenshuriken in power.

nodes.label: Spiralling Tower Technique
nodes.description: This technique is devised by Kakashi Hatake as a way to reach 200 kilometres above Konohagakure. His original idea is to create an Earth-Style Wall to reach that altitude, but he doesn't believe he would have enough chakra to make it tall enough. For...
nodes.full_description:
This technique is devised by Kakashi Hatake as a way to reach 200 kilometres above Konohagakure. His original idea is to create an Earth-Style Wall to reach that altitude, but he doesn't believe he would have enough chakra to make it tall enough. For this reason he recruits Yamato to assist him. They practice all night to synchronise Kakashi's Earth Release with Yamato's Wood Release, finding a configuration that is structurally sound but that also will reach the intended elevation within the one hour they'll be allotted.
The Spiralling Tower originally works as intended, with Kakashi's earth pillar and Yamato's wood pillar entwining in order to fortify each other as they grow into the sky. But a rainstorm begins shortly after they start, forcing Kakashi to spend additional chakra to reinforce the earth pillar against the rain and wind. The task eventually becomes too much for him and he loses sync with Yamato, briefly halting the tower's growth and potentially risking its destruction. Gaara and Kurotsuchi, whose assistance Kakashi requested the night before, arrive in time to assist, stabilising the tower that has been created so far and adding a sand pillar from Gaara and a second earth pillar from Kurotsuchi to its continued entwining growth.
The Spiralling Tower ends up being a success, with the three-man team that was ascending it reaching their destination in time. At the conclusion of the three's mission, an impact at the peak topples the tower and causes debris to start falling on Konoha. Gaara attempts to use his sand to shield the village, but he has no additional chakra to do so. A separate team of six ninja assembled specifically to deal with this potential debris begins to repel the initial chunks of the tower, but they are quickly overwhelmed. It is ultimately the Seventh Hokage who destroys the majority of the debris, saving the village.

nodes.label: Spiralling Great Fire Sphere
nodes.description:
Naruto creates a Rasengan, Sasuke breathes Fire Release: Great Fireball into it. Naruto then slams the flame-covered Rasengan into the opponent which erupts into a fiery blast.

See Also[]
Fire Release: Great Flame Rasengan

nodes.description:
The user gathers chakra with two fingers to condense it into a small Rasengan. It can be shot from a distance at the target and has immense penetrative power, throwing its target off their feet even after piercing through them.

nodes.label: Spiralling Flash Super Round Dance Howl Style Three
nodes.description:
This technique was devised by Minato Namikaze and employs the use of the Flying Thunder God Technique. 

Usage[]
Minato throws six Flying Thunder God Kunai behind the enemy, and teleports to them. The technique can also be used with the help of a sha...
nodes.full_description:
This technique was devised by Minato Namikaze and employs the use of the Flying Thunder God Technique. 

Usage[]
Minato throws six Flying Thunder God Kunai behind the enemy, and teleports to them. The technique can also be used with the help of a shadow clone, though this is not a compulsory component of the technique's execution.[2] It should be noted that this technique has never been seen in its entirety.
In the anime, the usage of the technique was enough to defeat an entire platoon of shinobi. Though it was not seen directly, it produced a lightning flash and repelled the enemies with great force. It also seems to require the kunai to be placed in a circular pattern, a possible reference to its name.[3]

References[]

↑ Fourth Databook, page 328

↑ Naruto chapter 639, page 13

↑ Naruto: Shippūden episode 417

nodes.label: Spiralling Absorption Sphere
nodes.description: Naruto uses his chakra arms while within Nine-Tails Chakra Mode to form a Big Ball Rasengan in his hand, then throws it above his back. He then uses extra chakra arms to grab and smash enemies into the sphere, simulating an "absorption" of the victim...
nodes.full_description: Naruto uses his chakra arms while within Nine-Tails Chakra Mode to form a Big Ball Rasengan in his hand, then throws it above his back. He then uses extra chakra arms to grab and smash enemies into the sphere, simulating an "absorption" of the victims into the Rasengan.

nodes.label: Spiral Lotus
nodes.description: This technique is exactly like the Front Lotus except Naruto gives it another name when he uses it.
nodes.full_description: This technique is exactly like the Front Lotus except Naruto gives it another name when he uses it.

nodes.label: Susanoo: Great Fireball Technique
nodes.description: Using Complete Body — Susanoo as a medium, the user can fire a multitude of fireballs from the construct's mouth. The fireballs vary in size, capable of becoming as large as a Tailed Beast. As the technique doesn't explode on impact, the fireballs ca...
nodes.full_description:
Using Complete Body — Susanoo as a medium, the user can fire a multitude of fireballs from the construct's mouth. The fireballs vary in size, capable of becoming as large as a Tailed Beast. As the technique doesn't explode on impact, the fireballs can be repelled with enough force. By launching the technique into the sky, it creates thunderclouds, making it possible to use Kirin.

See Also[]
Fire Release: Phoenix Sage Fire Technique

nodes.description: Hagoromo uses his Truth-Seeking Balls to shoot bright blue bullets of chakra at the opponent.
nodes.full_description: Hagoromo uses his Truth-Seeking Balls to shoot bright blue bullets of chakra at the opponent.

nodes.full_description: Hashirama creates two rising wood pillars that intertwine with each other from the ground and lift the opponent into the air. He then creates two more pillars of intertwining wood, striking the opponent further into the air.

nodes.full_description: Naruto combines his Truth-Seeking Balls and kicks the single large ball towards the opponent with great force.

nodes.description: Naruto creates several shadow clones to charge towards and beat the opponent before kicking the opponent into the air. Naruto and Sasuke each form a Rasengan and Chidori that they both use on the falling opponent.
nodes.full_description: Naruto creates several shadow clones to charge towards and beat the opponent before kicking the opponent into the air. Naruto and Sasuke each form a Rasengan and Chidori that they both use on the falling opponent.

nodes.label: True Sickle Weasel Technique
nodes.description: Temari summons Kamatari, who then creates a stronger and larger version of her Sickle Weasel Technique. The wind vortex can reach opponents farther away from her than her original technique.
nodes.full_description: Temari summons Kamatari, who then creates a stronger and larger version of her Sickle Weasel Technique. The wind vortex can reach opponents farther away from her than her original technique.

nodes.label: True: Tailed Beast Rasenshuriken
nodes.description: Naruto punches his opponent with a tailed beast chakra arm, sending them up in the air and putting some distance between them. He fully manifests Kurama, and creates nine shadow clones, each creating a different Rasenshuriken. The shadow clones throw...
nodes.full_description: Naruto punches his opponent with a tailed beast chakra arm, sending them up in the air and putting some distance between them. He fully manifests Kurama, and creates nine shadow clones, each creating a different Rasenshuriken. The shadow clones throw the Rasenshuriken, while the real Naruto sends a Tailed Beast Ball, all attacks converging on the opponent.

nodes.label: True: Chibaku Tensei
nodes.description: The user claps both hands together, forming a black sphere between them, and launches it. The black sphere will then expand and encase a large area. Upon which, it draws in a large quantity of the earth around, effectively creating a "moon" that hove...
nodes.full_description: The user claps both hands together, forming a black sphere between them, and launches it. The black sphere will then expand and encase a large area. Upon which, it draws in a large quantity of the earth around, effectively creating a "moon" that hovers high in the sky with the consumed area inside. Slowly after, the structure will begin compressing itself, crushing everything within. The structure is very powerful as even an Eight Gates-enhanced attack could barely scathe its surfaces. By performing a Snake handseal, the technique can be released, safely returning the entrapped area back to its proper location.

nodes.label: True Several Thousand Hands: Spiralling Praying Palms

nodes.full_description: Using a massive wooden statue, Asura generates several Amenomihashira on its many hands and unleashes them upon his opponent.

nodes.full_description: Sending his shadow towards his opponent, it will then crawl up the opponent's body until a shadow-hand reaches the opponent's neck, and breaks it.

The giant Gaara holds the opponent down and implodes, crushing them. The implosion is so great that it sends a shock wave through the battlefield.

nodes.label: True Rasengan
