When used, the user slowly moves around the area dealing damage to any target in his path. In addition, it absorbs chakra from the user.

nodes.label: True Reverse Lotus
nodes.description: After unlocking the sixth of the Eight Gates, Lee pummels his opponent.
nodes.full_description: After unlocking the sixth of the Eight Gates, Lee pummels his opponent.

nodes.label: Trinity
nodes.description: Obito uses Fire Release: Phoenix Sage Fire Technique and Minato throws Flying Thunder God Kunai at the opponent. Kakashi then forms a Chidori and Obito activates his Sharingan and Minato teleports them to the opponent using Flying Thunder God Techniq...
nodes.full_description: Obito uses Fire Release: Phoenix Sage Fire Technique and Minato throws Flying Thunder God Kunai at the opponent. Kakashi then forms a Chidori and Obito activates his Sharingan and Minato teleports them to the opponent using Flying Thunder God Technique. Kakashi strikes the opponent with Chidori and Obito kicks the opponent, with Kakashi rushing and striking the opponent with Chidori yet again. Minato then teleports to the opponent. The three then strike the opponent, with Obito stabbing the opponent with a kunai, Minato slashing with a kunai and Kakashi slashing with a White Light Chakra Sabre.

nodes.label: True Fire of Samadhi
nodes.description: This Fire Release technique appears to be initiated remotely upon placing the target in contact with a physical object such as a kunai or even a small toad, and can cause the target to spontaneously burst into flames. Regarded as the "Flames of Purga...
nodes.full_description:
This Fire Release technique appears to be initiated remotely upon placing the target in contact with a physical object such as a kunai or even a small toad, and can cause the target to spontaneously burst into flames. Regarded as the "Flames of Purgatory" (煉獄の炎, Rengoku no Honō),[1] they are said to be inextinguishable by wind or rain, and burn so quickly that regenerative techniques cannot keep up with them, leaving the victim's body completely charred in mere moments. The flames can, however, be absorbed and sealed away.

Contents

1 Influence
2

nodes.label: True Eight Trigrams Sixty-Four Palms
nodes.description: Neji leaps forward and strikes the opponent several times in the back before dashing in front of them. He strikes several more times until using an Eight Trigrams Palms Revolving Heaven-like strike to launch the opponent into the air. There, Neji str...
nodes.full_description: Neji leaps forward and strikes the opponent several times in the back before dashing in front of them. He strikes several more times until using an Eight Trigrams Palms Revolving Heaven-like strike to launch the opponent into the air. There, Neji strikes the opponent before several more times hitting them once more at light speed, blasting them into the air in a beam of chakra.

nodes.label: Transparent Escape Technique
nodes.description:
This technique has never actually been seen in the manga, but it allows the user to spy on others without being noticed. It was invented by Jiraiya during his youth to allow him to spy on girls bathing without the risk of being caught.
In the anime, ...
nodes.full_description:
This technique has never actually been seen in the manga, but it allows the user to spy on others without being noticed. It was invented by Jiraiya during his youth to allow him to spy on girls bathing without the risk of being caught.
In the anime, the technique is shown to render the user invisible, allowing them to either make stealthy strikes on their opponent or escape from the opponent's sight. Hayate Gekkō was adept at using this technique, utilising it in a similar manner to the Hiding with Camouflage Technique; his entire figure became transparent to mask his appearance.

nodes.label: Tree Climbing Practice
nodes.description: Tree Climbing Practice is a training method used to gain more skills with chakra control. This training involves focusing a fixed amount of chakra to the bottom of one's feet, and using that to climb a tree without using one's hands. If the stream of...
nodes.full_description: Tree Climbing Practice is a training method used to gain more skills with chakra control. This training involves focusing a fixed amount of chakra to the bottom of one's feet, and using that to climb a tree without using one's hands. If the stream of chakra is too weak, the user will lose their footing on the tree and fall off. If it is too strong, the user will be pushed away from the tree, causing the tree to fracture around the point of contact and the user will fall. The concept of this exercise is similar to magnetics. This is evidenced when Sasuke was able to attract a kunai Naruto threw his direction to his feet and then throw it at an enemy by kicking the kunai while releasing his chakra's hold on the kunai.

nodes.label: Transformation: Adamantine Staff
nodes.description: The user transforms into a staff for their summoner to use as a weapon; Enma's staff form was the preferred weapon of Hiruzen Sarutobi, whose heavy use of it through decades of warfare contributed to his reputation as a "God of Shinobi". The staff is...
nodes.full_description:
The user transforms into a staff for their summoner to use as a weapon; Enma's staff form was the preferred weapon of Hiruzen Sarutobi, whose heavy use of it through decades of warfare contributed to his reputation as a "God of Shinobi". The staff is as hard as diamond, making it very destructive. This also renders it largely impervious to damage, making it useful as a defence;[1] despite this, Enma still feels pain from clashing with the Sword of Kusanagi.[2] The staff is also able to extend to great lengths,[1] enough that, in the anime, it could push the Nine-Tails beyond the borders of Konohagakure.[3] The user can produce any part of his regular body from the staff, such as his claws or fangs, to surprise opponents.[1]
Enma is shown to clone himself while in his staff form for use in the Adamantine Prison Wall.

nodes.label: Transformation Technique
nodes.description:
The Transformation Technique allows the user to take the appearance of whatever they choose. 

Overview[]
This technique is most often used to disguise the user as another person, but they can also turn into an animal, plant, or inanimate object;[1] ...
nodes.full_description:
The Transformation Technique allows the user to take the appearance of whatever they choose. 

Overview[]
This technique is most often used to disguise the user as another person, but they can also turn into an animal, plant, or inanimate object;[1] according to Sasuke Retsuden, inanimate objects are the most difficult to transform into, and users are shown familiarising themselves with an object's weight and feel before assuming its form. Users will gain the attributes and physical features of whatever they transform into, such as a weapon's sharpness or an animal's fangs.[2][3] To be able to assume so many different forms makes this technique invaluable for not just combat, but intelligence gathering and diversionary tactics as well.[1] In Sasuke Shinden, some transformations are shown to take some getting used to, such as if the assumed form has a different height than the user or if the assumed form wears clothes that the user isn't accustomed to.
Being able to use the Transformation Technique does not necessarily mean one can use it well. Ideally, the user's transformation should be indistinguishable from the original, so that if they were placed together they could not be told apart. Inexperienced users, particularly Academy students, will often have obvious discrepancies in their transformations, making them useless for deception.[1] Even practised users, though their transformations may lack any serious flaws, can overlook small details of whoever they're impersonating (such as minor scrapes or blemishes), thus enabling careful observers to expose them as impostors. Even if a transformation is a perfect likeness, users can still inadvertently reveal themselves if they don't act the same way as their subject.[4] Users can also be identified as fakes if their scent is wrong.[5]
When a transformed user has been found out and attacked, they ordinarily allow the transformation to dispel. Some users may maintain the transformation in a final attempt to keep their cover, only dispelling the transformation once this effort fails.[4] Still other users may, when they seem to be dispelling the transformation, actually take another transformation altogether, confusing opponents as to their true identity. Seemingly the only way to reliably find out if somebody is using the Transformation Technique is to knock them unconscious, which will cause the transformation to dissolve.[6]
Tsunade uses the Transformation Technique to constantly appear several decades younger, keeping it active regardless of where she is or what she's doing. She only reverts to her original form when she no longer has the chakra to maintain her transformation.[7] In the anime, Kagerō also keeps her Transformation Technique active for long periods of time, taking the form of a buck-toothed, hunchbacked man.[8] In Akatsuki Hiden, the citizens of Shangri-la use the Transformation Technique at all times in a concerted effort to make new lives for themselves; their transformations only dispel when they die.

nodes.label: Transcription Seal: Izanagi
nodes.description: This is a Mangekyō Sharingan technique that seals the technique Izanagi within the Sharingan of the target. After being sealed within the person, it is involuntarily activated when certain requirements, which are predetermined by the user, are met. M...
nodes.full_description:
This is a Mangekyō Sharingan technique that seals the technique Izanagi within the Sharingan of the target. After being sealed within the person, it is involuntarily activated when certain requirements, which are predetermined by the user, are met. Madara Uchiha used this on his own right eye, to trigger after he dies in order to rewrite his death into a mere dream.

See Also[]
Time-Release Technique
Transcription Seal: Amaterasu

nodes.label: Tracking Technique
nodes.description: Upon activation, the user's pupils glow yellow. This allows them to see the lingering energy traces left from a person's footsteps.
nodes.full_description: Upon activation, the user's pupils glow yellow. This allows them to see the lingering energy traces left from a person's footsteps.

nodes.label: Transmission Wood
nodes.description: After turning a wood clone into a seed, the seed can be used to track a target by either planting it on them or having them ingest it. Only the user of this technique can detect the seed's transmissions.

This is a technique that seals the technique Amaterasu within the Sharingan of another person. After being sealed within the person, it is involuntarily activated (indicated by the person's Sharingan taking the form of the sealer's Mangekyō Sharingan) when the eye sees its target, which is predetermined by the user.

nodes.label: Welcoming Approach: Thousand-Armed Murder
nodes.description: This is the ultimate technique of the Fire Temple that is taught only to its ninja monks, and requires the special Gift of the Hermit Group chakra. The technique is activated when the user takes a specific stance with their left hand making a half-ra...
nodes.full_description: This is the ultimate technique of the Fire Temple that is taught only to its ninja monks, and requires the special Gift of the Hermit Group chakra. The technique is activated when the user takes a specific stance with their left hand making a half-ram and then extending their right hand down with his palm parallel to the ground. Once the stance is taken, the spirit of the Thousand-Armed Kannon is summoned to defend the user, or attack their enemies. The spirit is normally calm, angelic and looks peaceful. However, whenever the user gets angry, the spirit turns red and transforms into a demonic-looking creature. Kannon then attacks the user's target with its 1000 spirit fists. The size and power of the spirit is dependent upon the skill of the user.

nodes.label: Weather Manipulation
nodes.description: A special ability known by his clan, Yota can to freely manipulate the weather around him. Regardless of the natural atmosphere around him, he could manifest many different weather effects, effectively turning them into powerful attacks or defences. ...
nodes.full_description:
A special ability known by his clan, Yota can to freely manipulate the weather around him. Regardless of the natural atmosphere around him, he could manifest many different weather effects, effectively turning them into powerful attacks or defences. It should be noted that his area of effect is not limited to outside, as he is able to isolate his abilities to relatively closed off areas, while within them. Yota has shown to have a great level of control over the range and direction of his ability, and could use them simultaneously if need be.
The following effects have been shown:

Rain: Once manifested, it could rain softly or fiercely, and could even be directed towards a single person. The rain itself seems to have an unusual effects on his opponents, as it is able to drain them of their chakra and vitality, while seemingly making them sad as well. Once produced in terms of offence and defence, he could summon varying sizes of very powerful, pressurised, water trenches to either block incoming attacks, restrain, or crush his opponents. He could even create huge water bubbles that attacks opponents with concussive force. Coming from many different directions, each of his attacks could manifest from anywhere within his vicinity, seemingly coming from thin air.
Snow: Showing only the offensive capabilities, Yota is able to turn a simple snowfall into a powerful blizzard, enabling him to near instantly freeze everything around him, including people.
Lightning: Yota can produce large bolts of purple lightning. The lightning could be directed from anywhere, to anywhere the enemy is, and in rapid succession. It was fast enough to keep up with Kiba Inuzuka and Akamaru. Should the lighting ever connect, it is powerful enough to instantly kill the target. However, if Yota wills it, the lightning can completely obliterate the target, even if it is the latter himself.
Wind: Yota is able to fully manipulate the direction and intensity of wind by whistling. He could summon anything from a concentrated tornado, to several whirlwinds. Each of these attacks have the offensive capabilities to slash and wound the intended target. It was powerful enough to cut, and catch off guard, Naruto Uzumaki, despite being in Nine-Tails Chakra Mode.
Sunlight: Yota could also make the sun shine brightly. Although it hasn't been used offensively or defensively, it has shown to cause flowers to bloom quickly around him.

nodes.full_description: Gaara has his sand barrage the opponent three times and then he finishes it with a slash from a giant sand rope.

nodes.label: Water Surface Walking Practice
nodes.description: This training method is used to gain better chakra control. To do this, the user has to be emitting a constant stream of chakra from the bottom of their feet and using the repellent force to walk across the water's surface. This technique is more dif...
nodes.full_description:
This training method is used to gain better chakra control. To do this, the user has to be emitting a constant stream of chakra from the bottom of their feet and using the repellent force to walk across the water's surface. This technique is more difficult to master than the Tree Climbing Practice, because the amount of chakra that needs to be emitted changes constantly.
It has also been shown that one can use their chakra to "skate" across the water surface, like an ice skater, instead of just walking or running. As Jiraiya noted, the more one trains this technique, the more they reach a state where they stand on water without even noticing it or basically even trying.[1] Furthermore, this technique allows its users to walk on sticky surfaces without being affected.[2]
It doesn't have to just be at the feet. A user under water can focus chakra on their hands or any other body part that makes contact with the water's surface. If they were submerged, they can climb atop the water as if they were climbing out of a pool.

References[]

↑ Naruto: Shippūden episode 14

↑ Naruto chapter 326, page 8

The user spews water from their mouth in a waterfall-like fashion to wash away the target. One can freely control the power ...
nodes.full_description:
This article is about the ninjutsu used by Yahiko. For the ninjutsu used by Kurotsuchi, see Water Release: Water Trumpet.




The user spews water from their mouth in a waterfall-like fashion to wash away the target. One can freely control the power of this technique by the amount of chakra kneaded and then released. While considered to be a basic Water Release technique, it has many variations.

nodes.label: Water Release: Water–Heavens Convergence
nodes.description:
This technique enables the user to manipulate water and moisture around oneself. In this way, the user can quickly extract and utilise groundwater or water from vegetation, should no other source be avaliable.
It can be used to block incoming attacks...
nodes.full_description:
This technique enables the user to manipulate water and moisture around oneself. In this way, the user can quickly extract and utilise groundwater or water from vegetation, should no other source be avaliable.
It can be used to block incoming attacks and explosions, trap or drown opponents, and shape the water into various shapes. Uniquely, the user can employ a strategy to suspense countless droplets in the air in order to redirect projectiles, act as a shield, or quickly take hold of an opponent. 
Having the ability to manipulate the water from long distances allows the user, in conjunction with the Summoning Technique, to make use of water-based summonings to fight in areas that it normally wouldn't be able to. 
Should there be no avaliable water source, this technique cannot be used.

nodes.label: Water Release: Wild Bubble Wave
nodes.description: The user spits out a large volume of foam-like bubbles which covers the ground and reduces its friction, considerably limiting the opponents' movements. The bubbles are spit out with violent force that is capable of washing away most attacks, such as...
nodes.full_description:
The user spits out a large volume of foam-like bubbles which covers the ground and reduces its friction, considerably limiting the opponents' movements. The bubbles are spit out with violent force that is capable of washing away most attacks, such as oil and fire. This technique can also be used as an effective smokescreen.

References[]

↑ Sha no Sho, page 272

nodes.full_description: While infused with Samehada, Kisame creates a large vortex of water around himself, which defends him from enemy attacks, as well as harms anyone in close proximity.

The user creates a whip made of water that can wrap around the opponent. The user can also channel lightning chakra to shock anyone wrapped in it. This technique seems to be known by the Kirigakure hunter-nin.[1] It's also strong enough to completely counter Yamato's Wood Release.[2]

nodes.description: This is a technique which creates a waterfall by developing spring water in a place without water veins and manipulating the resulting water current to form a wave. This is a very convenient technique as it can be used for training or relaxation. On ...
nodes.full_description: This is a technique which creates a waterfall by developing spring water in a place without water veins and manipulating the resulting water current to form a wave. This is a very convenient technique as it can be used for training or relaxation. On the other hand, because it changes the environment on a large scale, it also has the effect of hiding one's location from the enemy by confusing them. The width of the water source, waterfall, and basin can be expanded as long as the user continues to send chakra in.

nodes.label: Zero-Tails Sealing Technique
nodes.description:
This technique is a unique form of sealing which was passed down in the Land of the Sky and used to restrain the Zero-Tails. 

Overview[]
This technique is designed to use dark chakra generated by the Zero-Tails rather than to seal it. It would appea...
nodes.full_description:
This technique is a unique form of sealing which was passed down in the Land of the Sky and used to restrain the Zero-Tails. 

Overview[]
This technique is designed to use dark chakra generated by the Zero-Tails rather than to seal it. It would appear to be a complex sealing technique, given the many sealing formulas in surrounding sealing room, as well as a rather large tablet, which is actually used to restrain the beast. 
The exact mechanics of this technique are unknown, however, after the Zero-Tails was sealed, the beast became encased in a tan coloured cocoon-like structure, with the addition of several tubular attachments, which allow the beast to channel its dark chakra through the Ancor Vantian. The technique also acts to protect the Zero-Tails by absorbing any chakra from external sources which pose a threat.

nodes.label: Yomito's Transformation Technique
nodes.description: Yomito activates this technique by placing the mask he keeps strapped to his right arm on his face. Once activated Yomito transforms into an oni-like creature. His body greatly grows in size and becomes very muscular, his skin becomes grey and his ha...
nodes.full_description:
Yomito activates this technique by placing the mask he keeps strapped to his right arm on his face. Once activated Yomito transforms into an oni-like creature. His body greatly grows in size and becomes very muscular, his skin becomes grey and his hair becomes crimson. The only clothes that remain are his pants. He also gains a necklace of large, dark green beads and a crimson marking on the back of each arm, right above his elbows. In this form Yomito makes use of the enormous fists it grants him, using them to smash the ground or chuck rocks out of it to attack from a distance. The only vulnerable spot seems to be his head and he has to somehow be knocked down for it to be reached.

See Also[]
Tailed Beast Replication
Taisa's Transformation Technique
Transformation Technique
Wood Release: Transformation

nodes.label: Yin Seal: Release
nodes.description: The Strength of a Hundred Seal - which takes the form of a diamond on the user's forehead - is used to gradually build up and store the user's chakra over time.[2] Yin Seal: Release opens that seal, giving the user access to the accumulated chakra. U...
nodes.full_description:
The Strength of a Hundred Seal - which takes the form of a diamond on the user's forehead - is used to gradually build up and store the user's chakra over time.[2] Yin Seal: Release opens that seal, giving the user access to the accumulated chakra. Upon release, a pattern starts to appear from the diamond shape,[1] spreading out across their forehead and potentially the rest of their body;[3] by spreading the seal's pattern to another, the user can transfer the seal's chakra to them instead.[4] The stored chakra amounts to far more than what the user has on their own, allowing them to perform chakra-demanding jutsu that they wouldn't be able to use otherwise, such as Creation Rebirth.[1] If not all of the chakra ends up being used, it can be stored in a new Strength of a Hundred Seal.[5]

References[]

↑ 1.0 1.1 1.2 Tō no Sho, page 201

↑ Jin no Sho, page 279

↑ Naruto chapter 577

↑ Naruto chapter 685

↑ Naruto chapter 171, page 7

nodes.label: Yin Healing Wound Destruction
nodes.description: Kabuto analyses an opponent's facial expression, movements, and the properties of their jutsu to anticipate where and how he will be attacked.[1] He then gathers chakra to the area of his body where the attack will strike,[2] preemptively starting me...
nodes.full_description: Kabuto analyses an opponent's facial expression, movements, and the properties of their jutsu to anticipate where and how he will be attacked.[1] He then gathers chakra to the area of his body where the attack will strike,[2] preemptively starting medical treatment in order to minimise the damage he'll receive.[1] The more extensive the damage, the more chakra it takes to heal; the damage from Rasengan is so great that Kabuto lacks enough chakra to fully recover.[2] In addition to needing to correctly read the opponent and react in time, users require great resilience in order to perform the jutsu, traits that only Kabuto possesses.[1]

nodes.label: Yellow Flash (jutsu)
nodes.description: Minato blasts the opponent into the air with a Rasengan and then proceeds to throw one of his Flying Thunder God Kunai behind them. As he teleports behind them, he strikes them in the back with another Rasengan that expands to a larger size before ex...
nodes.full_description: Minato blasts the opponent into the air with a Rasengan and then proceeds to throw one of his Flying Thunder God Kunai behind them. As he teleports behind them, he strikes them in the back with another Rasengan that expands to a larger size before exploding and sending the opponent back to the ground.

nodes.label: Yellow Flash Rasengan
nodes.description: Minato kicks the opponent in the air, throws his Flying Thunder God Kunai, teleports to them, and kicks them again, ending the combo with a Rasengan while on the ground as the opponent falls down on the attack.
nodes.full_description: Minato kicks the opponent in the air, throws his Flying Thunder God Kunai, teleports to them, and kicks them again, ending the combo with a Rasengan while on the ground as the opponent falls down on the attack.

nodes.label: Yasaka Magatama
nodes.description: Yasaka Magatama is a technique that Susanoo users can use from any of its hands. Due to its structure, it acts in a similar manner to that of a shuriken when thrown by Susanoo — rapidly spinning towards the intended target — and results in an explosi...
nodes.full_description:
Yasaka Magatama is a technique that Susanoo users can use from any of its hands. Due to its structure, it acts in a similar manner to that of a shuriken when thrown by Susanoo — rapidly spinning towards the intended target — and results in an explosion upon impact. The size of these projectiles are dependent on the user, with smaller variations often used when fighting in close quarters or confined spaces.[2][3]

Contents

1 Variants
2 Influence
3

nodes.label: Yellow Flash (Naruto)
nodes.description: Channelling Kurama's chakra, Naruto performs an enhanced Body Flicker Technique to instantly cross vast distances.
nodes.full_description: Channelling Kurama's chakra, Naruto performs an enhanced Body Flicker Technique to instantly cross vast distances.

nodes.label: Yasaka Magatama: Tailed Beast Noka
nodes.description: Itachi, Killer B and Naruto all use long distance ninjutsu, the Yasaka Magatama, Tailed Beast Ball and Rasenshuriken in a collaboration. This combination was enough to destroy Nagato's Chibaku Tensei.
nodes.full_description: Itachi, Killer B and Naruto all use long distance ninjutsu, the Yasaka Magatama, Tailed Beast Ball and Rasenshuriken in a collaboration. This combination was enough to destroy Nagato's Chibaku Tensei.

nodes.label: Yachihoko
nodes.description:
Yachihoko is a Mangekyō Sharingan dōjutsu.

Overview[]
Tied to the usage of her Engraved Tsukuyomi, it allows Nanashi to control the mind and the chakra of any individual linked with an Engraved Tsukuyomi branding. Yachihoko is a powerful Genjutsu, a...
nodes.full_description:
Yachihoko is a Mangekyō Sharingan dōjutsu.

Overview[]
Tied to the usage of her Engraved Tsukuyomi, it allows Nanashi to control the mind and the chakra of any individual linked with an Engraved Tsukuyomi branding. Yachihoko is a powerful Genjutsu, and works by erasing the memories of any individual it targets, creating puppets that Nanashi is able to manipulate. The Genjutsu itself is powerful enough that even a perfect Jinchūriki, such as Naruto Uzumaki, was unable to have it dispelled by his Tailed Beast, Kurama.
Yachihoko also allows for the manipulation of chakra from to and from the user via those marked with the Engraved Tsukuyomi blemish. Merz was able to absorb the chakra of a vast portion of the Shinobi World using Yachihoko. Additionally, Nanashi could transfer chakra this way, giving it to Boruto on two occasions to allow him to fight.

Influence[]
Like other Mangekyō Sharingan techniques, Yachihoko takes its name from ancient Japanese myth and the Shintō religion. Yachihoko-no-Mikoto being a god of luck and victory in sports and martial arts.

See also[]
Genjutsu Cursed Seal
Kotoamatsukami
Tsukuyomi

nodes.label: Wrapping Flame Cat Fire
nodes.description: Transforming into Matatabi, Yugito runs towards the opponent in a fiery tackle.
nodes.full_description: Transforming into Matatabi, Yugito runs towards the opponent in a fiery tackle.

nodes.label: Yachihoko no Kami
nodes.description: Kaguya opens numerous small portals to shoot hazards from her dimensions at the opponent.
nodes.full_description: Kaguya opens numerous small portals to shoot hazards from her dimensions at the opponent.

nodes.label: Wooden Puppet Manipulation Technique
nodes.description: By placing a charm onto the puppet beforehand, this technique allows the user to control its movements through will alone. Alternatively, the puppets can attack the opponent on their own, though the ability to react to their opponent's movements is l...
nodes.full_description:
By placing a charm onto the puppet beforehand, this technique allows the user to control its movements through will alone. Alternatively, the puppets can attack the opponent on their own, though the ability to react to their opponent's movements is limited. If the tag is removed, then the technique can then be disabled.
Genshō Ryūdōin was able to use this technique on a massive scale, forcing hundreds of puppets upon his opponents. Additionally, he was able to break them apart and fuse them together. Together, they created a massive wall capable of holding someone back as strong as Might Guy.

nodes.label: Wooden Men Possession Turnover Manipulation Technique
nodes.description: This technique forces two opponents to fight each other through wooden training dummies, with the intent of tricking them into fighting each other until all but one of them is defeated. The only way to break the technique is to have fast and strong t...
nodes.full_description: This technique forces two opponents to fight each other through wooden training dummies, with the intent of tricking them into fighting each other until all but one of them is defeated. The only way to break the technique is to have fast and strong taijutsu, by utilising speed so extreme that the wooden training dummies are unable to keep up and thus break apart, effectively breaking the technique. If the victims are familiar enough with one another they will be able to tell who their opponent is. They can also communicate through non-verbal means such as Morse code.

nodes.label: Wood Stab Palm
nodes.description: Yamato strikes the opponent with a series of punches and kicks leading to him jumping into the air and releasing a wooden spear from his palm that is directed into the opponent and used to drive them into the ground.
nodes.full_description: Yamato strikes the opponent with a series of punches and kicks leading to him jumping into the air and releasing a wooden spear from his palm that is directed into the opponent and used to drive them into the ground.

nodes.label: Wood Release: Wooden Spear Heavenly Tear
nodes.description: After a taijutsu combo, Hashirama summons a large tree branch to send the opponent flying in the air, jumps at them and punches them down.
nodes.full_description: After a taijutsu combo, Hashirama summons a large tree branch to send the opponent flying in the air, jumps at them and punches them down.

nodes.label: Wood Release: World of Trees Wall
nodes.description:
The user creates countless wooden branches that grow at high speed from the ground. The branches interlace to form a wide, net-like wall with an impressive defensive power. 

See Also[]
Wood Release: Great Forest Technique
Wood Release: Wood Locking ...
nodes.full_description:
The user creates countless wooden branches that grow at high speed from the ground. The branches interlace to form a wide, net-like wall with an impressive defensive power. 

See Also[]
Wood Release: Great Forest Technique
Wood Release: Wood Locking Wall

nodes.label: Wood Release: Wooden Mallet
nodes.description: Yamato creates several pieces of wood from the ground that shoot out and pierce the opponent.
nodes.full_description: Yamato creates several pieces of wood from the ground that shoot out and pierce the opponent.

nodes.label: Wood Release: Wood Human Technique
nodes.description: After forming the required hand seals, the user creates an enormous statue-like creature out of wood. This humanoid creature with a full body and an oni-like face is usually created with a wooden dragon wrapped around its torso, and is generally used...
nodes.full_description:
After forming the required hand seals, the user creates an enormous statue-like creature out of wood. This humanoid creature with a full body and an oni-like face is usually created with a wooden dragon wrapped around its torso, and is generally used in battle as an avatar. The wooden dragon can be multiplied and be used to attack its enemies directly as well. This creature is stated to be as powerful as the Nine-Tails,[1] and could catch an uncompressed, uncharged, standard Tailed Beast Ball fired by the latter. If the user doesn't have enough time to manifest the entire body, they can manifest a limb or two first to buy enough time for the full body to form.[3] It could even clash against the likes of Madara Uchiha's Complete Body — Susanoo, which was stated by Madara himself to have destructive powers rivalling even the tailed beasts.[4]
In the anime, it is capable of spawning multiple Wood Dragon heads, each capable of self-destructing.[5]

Influence[]
This technique seems to be based upon Ryūtōki (竜燈鬼, Dragon-Lamp Demon), a creature from Japanese folklores, who is typically depicted as a small oni with a dragon coiled around its torso. Together with Tentōki (天燈鬼, Heavenly-Lamp Demon), the pair symbolise the power of the Shitennō to repel and defeat evil.
The Buddhist monk Kōben sculpted notable wooden statues of both Tentōki and Ryūtōki, which are each considered a National Treasure of Japan.

nodes.label: Wood Release: Wood Locking Wall
nodes.description: An extremely versatile move, this technique uses chakra to activate the roots in the ground and, using the user of the technique as a reference point, makes wooden pillars appear from left and right. The wooden pillars join together in a dome-shape w...
nodes.full_description: An extremely versatile move, this technique uses chakra to activate the roots in the ground and, using the user of the technique as a reference point, makes wooden pillars appear from left and right. The wooden pillars join together in a dome-shape with the user at the centre. In the case that the user confronts the enemy at a short distance, the enemy can be locked up inside the dome, catching the enemy in a double sided attack. Furthermore, it can function as an easy shelter against an enemy's long-distance attacks, like the shockwave created from Naruto Uzumaki in his Version 2 state.[3]

nodes.label: Wood Release: Wood Fetters Technique
nodes.description: Yamato creates a spiralling pillar of wood rise up from the ground beneath the intended target causing them damage whist throwing them several feet.
nodes.full_description: Yamato creates a spiralling pillar of wood rise up from the ground beneath the intended target causing them damage whist throwing them several feet.

nodes.label: Wood Release: Wood Spikes Ring
nodes.description: The user creates a semi-circle of wood around a captured target, and then form spikes within the ring, pointing at the target, preventing them from making any sudden movements.
nodes.full_description: The user creates a semi-circle of wood around a captured target, and then form spikes within the ring, pointing at the target, preventing them from making any sudden movements.

nodes.label: Wood Release: Wild Picket Technique
nodes.description: Yamato places his hands on the ground to bring forth three cylinder shaped branches to attack the opponent.
nodes.full_description: Yamato places his hands on the ground to bring forth three cylinder shaped branches to attack the opponent.

nodes.label: Wood Release: Wood Dragon Technique
nodes.description: The user creates a gigantic wooden dragon, which they can use for a multitude of purposes including restraining a target, or for offensive purposes. The dragon that the user creates can vary in terms of appearance. While both instances created a serp...
nodes.full_description:
The user creates a gigantic wooden dragon, which they can use for a multitude of purposes including restraining a target, or for offensive purposes. The dragon that the user creates can vary in terms of appearance. While both instances created a serpentine dragon, Chinese dragon, though the first had a short trunk-like nose, while the other two later created did not. It also has the ability to absorb chakra from its target, slowly rendering them unable to use techniques by biting into the target and draining them almost in a vampiric fashion.[2][3] In the anime, Hashirama was able to cause the dragon to detonate on his target, resulting in a large explosion.[4]

Contents

1 Countering
2 Influence
3

nodes.label: Wood Release: Transformation
nodes.description: Yamato performs the necessary hand seals, then wood emerges and covers his entire body with a puff of smoke or chakra, covering up the transformation. Once the technique is done, the transformation is complete. It acts more like a costume than a tran...
nodes.full_description: Yamato performs the necessary hand seals, then wood emerges and covers his entire body with a puff of smoke or chakra, covering up the transformation. Once the technique is done, the transformation is complete. It acts more like a costume than a transformation, as he is able to leave it behind if necessary. He also demonstrates the ability to adjust his voice while using this technique.

nodes.label: Wood Release: Tree of Flight
nodes.description: Yamato kicks the opponent into the air before summoning a bridge of wood that carries the opponent away. Yamato then jumps behind them and uses a beam of wood to run them through the wood bridge and force them to the ground.
nodes.full_description: Yamato kicks the opponent into the air before summoning a bridge of wood that carries the opponent away. Yamato then jumps behind them and uses a beam of wood to run them through the wood bridge and force them to the ground.

nodes.label: Wood Release: Tree Bind Flourishing Burial
nodes.description: This technique lets the user summon a tree around their opponent to bind them. This technique is relatively powerful and holds opponents much more gracefully, with less of a strain on the user, because the user sinks them into the ground. Afterwards,...
nodes.full_description:
This technique lets the user summon a tree around their opponent to bind them. This technique is relatively powerful and holds opponents much more gracefully, with less of a strain on the user, because the user sinks them into the ground. Afterwards, the user can enclose the opponent so that their body is crushed.
This technique requires some preparation as Yamato first had to crush the earth and then add water before this technique could be used.

nodes.label: Wood Release: Stocks
nodes.description: Yamato creates wooden stocks to restrain a target. These stocks also have the added effect of suppressing the target's chakra, rendering most captives unable to retaliate.
nodes.full_description: Yamato creates wooden stocks to restrain a target. These stocks also have the added effect of suppressing the target's chakra, rendering most captives unable to retaliate.

nodes.label: Wood Release: Revolt of Hell
nodes.description: Obito skewers his opponent with wood tendrils, punches and kicks them upwards, followed by a knee to the face. He then phases through them on the way down, and brings up several roots to impale them.
nodes.full_description: Obito skewers his opponent with wood tendrils, punches and kicks them upwards, followed by a knee to the face. He then phases through them on the way down, and brings up several roots to impale them.

nodes.label: Wood Release: Smothering Binding Technique
nodes.description:
By transforming their arm into a tree, the user can then create multiple branches which will rapidly grow around the target, immobilising them. This technique is strong enough to restrain a giant squid.

References[]

↑ Fourth Databook, page 327

nodes.description: After forming the necessary seals, Yamato is able to turn an area into a vast forest in a matter of mere moments complete with trees and even grass growing out of any terrain he is on. This technique is very similar to Hashirama's signature technique...

This technique is very similar to Hashirama's signature technique, albeit on a somewhat smaller scale.

nodes.label: Wood Release: Serial Pillar Houses Technique
nodes.description: A larger scaled version of the Wood Release: Four-Pillar House Technique where instead of creating a single house, Yamato creates multiple houses at once. Because of the sheer volume of structures created with this technique, it appears to exhaust hi...
nodes.full_description: A larger scaled version of the Wood Release: Four-Pillar House Technique where instead of creating a single house, Yamato creates multiple houses at once. Because of the sheer volume of structures created with this technique, it appears to exhaust him rather quickly.

nodes.label: Wood Release: Nativity of Trees

nodes.full_description: Yamato strikes the opponent with Wood Release: Great Forest Technique and makes the wood that struck the opponent form into a tree.

nodes.label: Wood Release: Pillar Crush
nodes.description: Yamato traps the opponent in a wooden prison and turns his wood clone into a giant pillar that ultimately crushes the opponent.
nodes.full_description: Yamato traps the opponent in a wooden prison and turns his wood clone into a giant pillar that ultimately crushes the opponent.

nodes.description: Hashirama attacks the opponent with thick tree branches growing out towards the opponent.
nodes.full_description: Hashirama attacks the opponent with thick tree branches growing out towards the opponent.

nodes.label: Wood Release: Hotei Technique
nodes.description: The user creates a number of gigantic wooden hands that erupt upward from beneath the ground, which then encircle and attempt to restrain a chosen enemy. The size of each of these hands is around the size of a tailed beast. Hashirama is shown to be a...
nodes.full_description:
The user creates a number of gigantic wooden hands that erupt upward from beneath the ground, which then encircle and attempt to restrain a chosen enemy. The size of each of these hands is around the size of a tailed beast. Hashirama is shown to be able to manifest two hands with sheer will alone, without the use of hand seals.

Influence[]
This technique seems to be influenced by Budai (布袋, Budai), also known as Hotei in Japanese. He is almost always shown smiling or laughing, hence his nickname: the Laughing Buddha. In Japan, Hotei persists in folklore as one of the Seven Lucky Gods of Taoism.

See Also[]
Desert: Hand
References[]

↑ Fourth Databook, page 299

nodes.label: Wood Release: Great Tree Roaring Nativity
nodes.description: Hashirama summons tree branches to lift himself up in the air towards the opponent and punches the ground beneath them, causing trees to grow underneath and strike them away.
nodes.full_description: Hashirama summons tree branches to lift himself up in the air towards the opponent and punches the ground beneath them, causing trees to grow underneath and strike them away.

nodes.label: Wood Release: Hōbi Technique
nodes.description:
Quickly creating a dome-like structure in the form of a dragon's face, the user is completely surrounded. Taking advantage of the nature of Wood Release, this fūinjutsu substantially weakens incoming attacks whilst protecting the user inside. 
Hashir...
nodes.full_description:
Quickly creating a dome-like structure in the form of a dragon's face, the user is completely surrounded. Taking advantage of the nature of Wood Release, this fūinjutsu substantially weakens incoming attacks whilst protecting the user inside. 
Hashirama once used this to nullify the destructive force of Kurama's Tailed Beast Ball. On the user's command, the dome is split down the middle and can be opened.

Influence[]
This technique is influenced by a dragon-shaped mask that the Buddhist bodhisattva of compassion, Avalokiteśvara, also known as "Senju Kannon" (千手観音, Thousand-Armed Kannon) carries around.

References[]

↑ Fourth Databook, page 327

nodes.label: Wood Release: Great Wooden Mallet
nodes.description: Yamato creates a wood clone with a giant wooden hammer as a hand, which jumps at the opponent and clobbers them with it.
nodes.full_description: Yamato creates a wood clone with a giant wooden hammer as a hand, which jumps at the opponent and clobbers them with it.

nodes.label: Wood Release: Great Forest Technique
nodes.description: A technique that changes one's own arm into big trees. Using chakra, the tissues are transformed into trees at the cellular level. Then, by activating the trees, stimulating them to grow rapidly, they lengthen at high speed and fork into many branche...
nodes.full_description:
A technique that changes one's own arm into big trees. Using chakra, the tissues are transformed into trees at the cellular level. Then, by activating the trees, stimulating them to grow rapidly, they lengthen at high speed and fork into many branches. It is possible to capture the enemy with these branches and at the same time, if one changes the ends into sharp stakes, turn them into countless, sharp, spear-like piercing weapons. 
Yamato also used this technique to infiltrate Orochimaru's hideout. After finding a small crack in the wall, the wood squeezed into the hole and grew into a square shape which increase the size of the hole so that he and his team could pass through.[2]

References[]

↑ Sha no Sho, page 306

↑ Naruto chapter 302, page 7

nodes.label: Wood Release: Great Spear Tree
nodes.description: Obito brings up several thick roots from the ground, and uses them to crush his opponents.
nodes.full_description: Obito brings up several thick roots from the ground, and uses them to crush his opponents.

nodes.label: Wood Release: Foo Dog Heads
nodes.description: A technique designed to be used to absorb a tailed beast's chakra. The user produces the "sit" (座, suwaru) kanji on their palm and creates a series of wooden pillars, which are engraved with what resemble foo dog faces and have lit wicks on top of th...
nodes.full_description:
A technique designed to be used to absorb a tailed beast's chakra. The user produces the "sit" (座, suwaru) kanji on their palm and creates a series of wooden pillars, which are engraved with what resemble foo dog faces and have lit wicks on top of them.[1] When the user slams their palm on the ground, the wooden statues rush towards the target and absorb its chakra.[2]

See Also[]
Wood Release: Wood Dragon Technique
References[]

↑ Naruto chapter 317, page 6

↑ Naruto chapter 322, pages 10-11

nodes.label: Wood Release: Great Forest Crumbling
nodes.description: The user makes trees grow rapidly under the opponent, stabbing them and throwing them quite distantly.
nodes.full_description: The user makes trees grow rapidly under the opponent, stabbing them and throwing them quite distantly.

nodes.label: Wood Release: Four-Pillar Prison Technique
nodes.description: The user converts chakra into timber under the ground and lets it grow rapidly while forming it into a wooden prison. The size of the prison is based on the user's imagination. From an insect cage to a great prison, one can make it into whatever they...
nodes.full_description: The user converts chakra into timber under the ground and lets it grow rapidly while forming it into a wooden prison. The size of the prison is based on the user's imagination. From an insect cage to a great prison, one can make it into whatever they want by regulating the amount of chakra used. The timber itself is treated with a chakra coating, making its destruction extremely difficult. During war, it has the great ability to detain prisoners, but it can also be used as a disciplinary measure for quarrelling subordinates.

nodes.label: Wood Release: Four-Pillar House Technique
nodes.description: By sending chakra into the ground, the roots of the plants are converted into raw materials. This technique allows for a building to be constructed, by forcing accelerated growth. Just like with the Four-Pillar Prison Technique, the size and shape of...
nodes.full_description: By sending chakra into the ground, the roots of the plants are converted into raw materials. This technique allows for a building to be constructed, by forcing accelerated growth. Just like with the Four-Pillar Prison Technique, the size and shape of the building are taken from the user's imagination or memories. By placing tags around the house, the user creates a barrier, making it impossible for the enemy to detect it and allowing the user to "camp" in peace.

nodes.label: Wood Release: Firmament Splinter
nodes.description: Hashirama slams the ground with his fist, releasing large trees from which rises from underground and captures the opponent, allowing him to finish them off by punching them down through the trees, and into the ground.
nodes.full_description: Hashirama slams the ground with his fist, releasing large trees from which rises from underground and captures the opponent, allowing him to finish them off by punching them down through the trees, and into the ground.

nodes.label: Wood Release: Cypress Nail
nodes.description: Yamato impales the opponent with Wood Release: Great Forest Technique and hammers the wood with a giant wooden mallet that crushes the opponent to bits.
nodes.full_description: Yamato impales the opponent with Wood Release: Great Forest Technique and hammers the wood with a giant wooden mallet that crushes the opponent to bits.

nodes.label: Wood Release: Circular Pillar Prison Technique
nodes.description: Yamato creates wooden pillars in a circular formation to trap and crush the opponent.
nodes.full_description: Yamato creates wooden pillars in a circular formation to trap and crush the opponent.

nodes.label: Wood Release: Beams
nodes.description: Yamato causes several wood beams to erupt from the ground and reach high into the sky. They spread out and turn back down, crashing down at the opponent. They end up looking like a willow.
nodes.full_description: Yamato causes several wood beams to erupt from the ground and reach high into the sky. They spread out and turn back down, crashing down at the opponent. They end up looking like a willow.

nodes.label: Wood Release: Complete Capture
nodes.description: Yamato traps his opponent in a wooden dome, and sends several wood beams crashing at it, destroying the dome and hitting his opponent.
nodes.full_description: Yamato traps his opponent in a wooden dome, and sends several wood beams crashing at it, destroying the dome and hitting his opponent.

nodes.label: Wood Release: Cutting Technique
nodes.description: A versatile technique where the user can produce sharp wooden spikes from their body to either fashion short-range weapons akin to a makeshift sword,[2] or use them as projectiles, where the branches' growth can be triggered remotely, skewering the e...
nodes.full_description:
A versatile technique where the user can produce sharp wooden spikes from their body to either fashion short-range weapons akin to a makeshift sword,[2] or use them as projectiles, where the branches' growth can be triggered remotely, skewering the enemy as a result.[3]
Obito was able to channel this technique through the Ten-Tails' tails after he and Madara Uchiha strengthened their control over the beast by connecting to it using Hashirama Senju's DNA.[4][5]

nodes.label: Wood Release: All Creation
nodes.description: Hashirama causes multiple wood tendrils to rise up from the ground, weaving into a wooden wall around the opponent's limbs binding them in place. He then concentrates his chakra into his fist and then strikes the opponent, breaking them free of the w...
nodes.full_description: Hashirama causes multiple wood tendrils to rise up from the ground, weaving into a wooden wall around the opponent's limbs binding them in place. He then concentrates his chakra into his fist and then strikes the opponent, breaking them free of the woven wooden wall.

nodes.label: Wood Release: Adamantine Fist
nodes.description: Hashirama enhances the physical strength of Wood Release: Wood Human Technique, which jumps and smashes the opponent with its fist, dealing great damage.
nodes.full_description: Hashirama enhances the physical strength of Wood Release: Wood Human Technique, which jumps and smashes the opponent with its fist, dealing great damage.

nodes.label: Wood Release: Advent of a World of Flowering Trees
nodes.description: Taking advantage of the innate properties of Wood Release which allows the user to force trees to grow on any surface at a rapid pace, the user creates a dense forest of flowering trees. During the forest's formation, the user can have the branch res...
nodes.full_description:
Taking advantage of the innate properties of Wood Release which allows the user to force trees to grow on any surface at a rapid pace, the user creates a dense forest of flowering trees. During the forest's formation, the user can have the branch restrain any target(s) that tries to attack the user before the formation of the forest is complete. The pollen produced by these flowers is then released into the atmosphere and when inhaled, renders any afflicted target unconscious. The user can also control where the pollen spreads so it does not affect them nor their comrades. The pollen is also capable of penetrating Susanoo's defences.
With enough willpower, it is possible to regain consciousness, however, in order to counter the technique fully, either the trees themselves must be destroyed completely or the target must continue to remain elevated above the dispersed pollen.

References[]

↑ Fourth Databook, page 297

nodes.label: Wood Release: Adamantine Beckoning Tree
nodes.description: Hashirama uses this technique to make some thick tendrils of wood surround him. This can be used to defend against close range attacks or to strike an opponent when they are near.
nodes.full_description: Hashirama uses this technique to make some thick tendrils of wood surround him. This can be used to defend against close range attacks or to strike an opponent when they are near.

nodes.label: Wood Release Secret Technique: Nativity of a World of Trees
nodes.description: Hashirama Senju creates a dense growth of trees, controlling how it grows using his chakra. The trees' life force is immense enough to split the earth as they sprout and further pierce through any other obstructions they encounter. This growth is als...
nodes.full_description: Hashirama Senju creates a dense growth of trees, controlling how it grows using his chakra. The trees' life force is immense enough to split the earth as they sprout and further pierce through any other obstructions they encounter. This growth is also fast enough that it can capture targets before they have a chance to escape. Hashirama used this technique to serve as a foundation for Konohagakure; none other than Hashirama have been capable of such a feat.[1] In the anime, Kinoe attempted to use this technique, but failed.[3] Years later, he instead uses Wood Release: Nativity of a Sea of Trees, a similar yet smaller-scale version of this technique.

nodes.label: Wood Pillar Spin Kick
nodes.description: Yamato makes a pillar of wood come out of the ground, takes hold of the pillar and then begins spinning around with his leg hanging out to kick the opponent multiple times.
nodes.full_description: Yamato makes a pillar of wood come out of the ground, takes hold of the pillar and then begins spinning around with his leg hanging out to kick the opponent multiple times.

nodes.label: Wood Clone: Kick
nodes.description: Yamato makes a pillar of wood come out of the ground and hit the opponent, knocking them backwards. A clone then flips over the pillar and slams his leg into the opponent when they are on the ground.
nodes.full_description: Yamato makes a pillar of wood come out of the ground and hit the opponent, knocking them backwards. A clone then flips over the pillar and slams his leg into the opponent when they are on the ground.

nodes.label: Wood Pillar Sky Kick
nodes.description: Yamato attacks his opponent with a series of punches and kicks before turning their left arm into a pillar of wood that is extended into the ground and lifting him into the air towards the opponent, and kicking them backwards.
nodes.full_description: Yamato attacks his opponent with a series of punches and kicks before turning their left arm into a pillar of wood that is extended into the ground and lifting him into the air towards the opponent, and kicking them backwards.

nodes.label: Wood Pillar Climb
nodes.description: Yamato makes a pillar of wood come out of the ground and hit the opponent, knocking them backwards.
nodes.full_description: Yamato makes a pillar of wood come out of the ground and hit the opponent, knocking them backwards.

nodes.label: Wood Clone Technique
nodes.description: A clone that is created by using chakra to alter the user's own cells into vegetation. The clones can be as simple in function as a wooden dummy for use in the Body Replacement Technique or completely mobile and able to perform jutsu.[4] They have th...
nodes.full_description:
A clone that is created by using chakra to alter the user's own cells into vegetation. The clones can be as simple in function as a wooden dummy for use in the Body Replacement Technique or completely mobile and able to perform jutsu.[4] They have the ability to travel far from the user and are able to communicate with the original. Moreover, since the wood clone has the ability to merge with plants and trees, it is also great for reconnaissance missions.[5] By directly touching the wood clone with his hand, the user can change the shape of the clone.[6]
Unlike other clone techniques, the wood clone doesn't disappear when hit and takes the damage to a certain degree. This, according to Madara Uchiha, makes it the perfect clone technique that only he with his dōjutsu was able to see through.[7] Wood clones are also somewhat inhibited by the actions of the user, so if they are preoccupied with other tasks the wood clones will not be able to act to their full potential.[8] Wood clones can, however, be dispelled like normal clones.[9]

nodes.label: Wolf River
nodes.description: After transforming into a two headed wolf, Kiba and Akamaru leap forward and bite the opponent with both heads sending them flying.
nodes.full_description: After transforming into a two headed wolf, Kiba and Akamaru leap forward and bite the opponent with both heads sending them flying.

nodes.label: Wolf Fang Rising Fist
nodes.description: The user hits the opponent with a series of punches and slashes, finishing with a rising uppercut that lifts the opponent into the air.
nodes.full_description: The user hits the opponent with a series of punches and slashes, finishing with a rising uppercut that lifts the opponent into the air.

nodes.description:
The Wisdom Wolf Decay is a ninjutsu unique to Saiken.
