nodes.label: Wolf Fang Punishing Drill
nodes.description: Asuma delivers two slashes across the opponent's chest and delivers another slash upwards to launch the opponent into the air and Asuma jumps into the air and delivers two slashes in the opponent's face and delivers one final slash to blow the oppone...
nodes.full_description: Asuma delivers two slashes across the opponent's chest and delivers another slash upwards to launch the opponent into the air and Asuma jumps into the air and delivers two slashes in the opponent's face and delivers one final slash to blow the opponent into the ground.

nodes.label: Wire Cage
nodes.description: This technique uses wire strings to form a powerful protective dome. This dome can repel most basic taijutsu attacks. The user can reshape the wire within the dome as needed, changing it from a defensive structure to a binding string with ease.
nodes.full_description: This technique uses wire strings to form a powerful protective dome. This dome can repel most basic taijutsu attacks. The user can reshape the wire within the dome as needed, changing it from a defensive structure to a binding string with ease.

nodes.label: Wire Bind
nodes.description: After performing the necessary hand seals, the user launches several strands of wire to ensnare an enemy. Once captured, the user can tighten the wire at will, to inflict injury or maim the victim.
nodes.full_description: After performing the necessary hand seals, the user launches several strands of wire to ensnare an enemy. Once captured, the user can tighten the wire at will, to inflict injury or maim the victim.

nodes.label: Wing Rotation
nodes.description: Transformed as Chōmei, Fū swirls Chōmei's non-winged tail, creating and directing a small tornado towards her opponent.
nodes.full_description: Transformed as Chōmei, Fū swirls Chōmei's non-winged tail, creating and directing a small tornado towards her opponent.

nodes.label: Windmill Throw
nodes.description: Sakura grabs her opponent by the torso, jumps up with them and comes back down, hitting the ground with them, and still holding them, throws them behind her back sideways.
nodes.full_description: Sakura grabs her opponent by the torso, jumps up with them and comes back down, hitting the ground with them, and still holding them, throws them behind her back sideways.

nodes.label: Wing Beheading
nodes.description: Using two of Chōmei's wings, Fū spins and unleashes two large blades of wind on the opponent.
nodes.full_description: Using two of Chōmei's wings, Fū spins and unleashes two large blades of wind on the opponent.

nodes.label: Windmill
nodes.description: Kimimaro teleports above the opponent, extending his bones and then spins downwards like a giant drill to rip through the opponent's body.
nodes.full_description: Kimimaro teleports above the opponent, extending his bones and then spins downwards like a giant drill to rip through the opponent's body.

nodes.label: Wind Water Wild Wave Technique
nodes.description: In this cooperation ninjutsu, the Water Release user unleashes a wave of water which torrents towards the opponent while the Wind Release user enhances the wave's destructive capability with wind.
nodes.full_description: In this cooperation ninjutsu, the Water Release user unleashes a wave of water which torrents towards the opponent while the Wind Release user enhances the wave's destructive capability with wind.

nodes.label: Winding Smoke Technique
nodes.description: After revealing a special tag, the user executes a hand seal, releasing a green sort of smoke to disable the sight of all enemies involved in it. This gives the user the opportunity to escape or attack their opponents, depending on their will.
nodes.full_description: After revealing a special tag, the user executes a hand seal, releasing a green sort of smoke to disable the sight of all enemies involved in it. This gives the user the opportunity to escape or attack their opponents, depending on their will.

nodes.label: Wind and Lightning Release: Typhoon Lightning Spiral
nodes.description: Naruto forms a wind-natured Rasengan and Sasuke adds his Chidori to the sphere, after which the two thrust the technique into the opponent.
nodes.full_description: Naruto forms a wind-natured Rasengan and Sasuke adds his Chidori to the sphere, after which the two thrust the technique into the opponent.

nodes.label: Wind Waves
nodes.description: The user waves their hand and creates a large blade of wind that can be launched at the opponent. This technique was powerful enough to briefly stop the movements of Sasuke Uchiha's Susanoo.
nodes.full_description: The user waves their hand and creates a large blade of wind that can be launched at the opponent. This technique was powerful enough to briefly stop the movements of Sasuke Uchiha's Susanoo.

nodes.label: Wind Spider Technique
nodes.description: Jigumo can summon his wind spiders, enabling him to spin trails, which can be used to shoot his opponent with webs at high speeds (as shown in Casualty Puppet), trap opponents inside a room crawling with spiders and webs, or to make a windmill of web...
nodes.full_description: Jigumo can summon his wind spiders, enabling him to spin trails, which can be used to shoot his opponent with webs at high speeds (as shown in Casualty Puppet), trap opponents inside a room crawling with spiders and webs, or to make a windmill of webs. This technique was used to track down team Jiraiya by spinning a silver trail. This can be useful with a ventriloquism technique.

nodes.label: Wind Return
nodes.description: Using the Weaknessless Soaring Shortswords, the user of this technique can easily cancel another Wind Release technique and redirect it to its user in the form of a hurricane.
nodes.full_description: Using the Weaknessless Soaring Shortswords, the user of this technique can easily cancel another Wind Release technique and redirect it to its user in the form of a hurricane.

nodes.label: Wind Release: Vacuum Sphere
nodes.description: The user takes a deep breath and exhales several small blasts of wind chakra that scatters in different directions, making it very difficult for one to avoid without injury. Due to the properties of this technique, the expelled blasts are capable of ...
nodes.full_description:
The user takes a deep breath and exhales several small blasts of wind chakra that scatters in different directions, making it very difficult for one to avoid without injury. Due to the properties of this technique, the expelled blasts are capable of piercing into and potentially through an opponent's flesh. In the anime, Danzō could also compress the air to create a spherical-like blast that is powerful enough to break through a wood dome.[2]

See Also[]
Wind Release: Air Bullets
Wind Release: Drilling Air Bullet
References[]

↑ Fourth Databook, page 288

↑ 2.0 2.1 Naruto: Shippūden episode 356

nodes.label: Wind Release: Wind Cutter Technique
nodes.description:
This article is about the ninjutsu used by an unnamed Anbu. For the ninjutsu used by Kujaku, see Wind Cutter Technique.




Using their chakra or a ninja tool such as a war fan to manipulate or create an external source of wind, the user can create o...
nodes.full_description:
This article is about the ninjutsu used by an unnamed Anbu. For the ninjutsu used by Kujaku, see Wind Cutter Technique.




Using their chakra or a ninja tool such as a war fan to manipulate or create an external source of wind, the user can create one to several blades of wind, which are capable of slicing through their target with ease. Temari and a group of tessenjutsu users from Sunagakure also used this technique as a means of countering a powerful, incoming torrent of wind.[2]

See Also[]
Beast Tearing Palm
Blade of Wind
Wind Release: Vacuum Wave
References[]

↑ Fourth Databook, page 325

↑ Naruto chapter 611, pages 15-17

nodes.label: Wind Release: Whirlwind Fist
nodes.description:
A technique where the user clads their fist with Wind Release to form somewhat of a typhoon that is a revolving blade of wind. Upon impact against an individual, the technique pierces their body and blows them away with a shock wave.
In Konoha Shinde...
nodes.full_description:
A technique where the user clads their fist with Wind Release to form somewhat of a typhoon that is a revolving blade of wind. Upon impact against an individual, the technique pierces their body and blows them away with a shock wave.
In Konoha Shinden, Mirai Sarutobi is said to be this jutsu's creator, having modelled the wind's movements on Temari's Sickle Weasel Technique and the general shape on the Rasengan.[1]

References[]

↑ Konoha Shinden chapter 14

nodes.label: Wind Release: Verdant Mountain Gale
nodes.description:
By using wind-based chakra, the user can infuse their bladed weapons with it from a distance and manipulate them.

See Also[]
Chakra Levitation Technique
Wind Release: Rotating Shuriken
nodes.full_description:
By using wind-based chakra, the user can infuse their bladed weapons with it from a distance and manipulate them.

See Also[]
Chakra Levitation Technique
Wind Release: Rotating Shuriken

nodes.label: Wind Release: Vacuum Wave
nodes.description: The user takes a deep breath and spins while exhaling, compressing the released air into a solitary blade of wind that covers a substantial area around the user, due to their circular motion. The resulting sharpened blast is large enough to slice thr...
nodes.full_description:
The user takes a deep breath and spins while exhaling, compressing the released air into a solitary blade of wind that covers a substantial area around the user, due to their circular motion. The resulting sharpened blast is large enough to slice through multiple targets located at a significant distance from the user, causing grievous injuries to those hit.

References[]

↑ Fourth Databook, page 289

nodes.label: Wind Release: Vacuum Gale: Single
nodes.description: Danzō jumps back, firing a vacuum sphere, and while his opponent is stunned, he follows with a vacuum wave.
nodes.full_description: Danzō jumps back, firing a vacuum sphere, and while his opponent is stunned, he follows with a vacuum wave.

nodes.label: Wind Release: Vacuum Serial Waves
nodes.description: The user takes a deep breath and exhales several blades of wind at different angles, by rapidly moving their head in various directions. The power of this technique can be dramatically enhanced when utilised in conjunction with the effects of extreme...
nodes.full_description:
The user takes a deep breath and exhales several blades of wind at different angles, by rapidly moving their head in various directions. The power of this technique can be dramatically enhanced when utilised in conjunction with the effects of extreme suction, such as that generated by Baku, where the augmented attack proved effective enough to even slice through the defences of Sasuke's humanoid Susanoo.

References[]

↑ Fourth Databook, page 289

nodes.label: Wind Release: Vacuum Great Sphere
nodes.description: A stronger version of the Wind Release: Vacuum Sphere technique, where the user instead chooses to compress the entirety of the previously inhaled breath into a single large, crushing sphere of wind chakra that they then proceed to expel from their m...
nodes.full_description:
A stronger version of the Wind Release: Vacuum Sphere technique, where the user instead chooses to compress the entirety of the previously inhaled breath into a single large, crushing sphere of wind chakra that they then proceed to expel from their mouth.

References[]

↑ Fourth Databook, page 288

↑ Naruto Collectible Card Game

nodes.label: Wind Release: Toad Oil Flame Bullet
nodes.description:
This article is about the technique that utilises wind and fire. For fire release technique, see Toad Oil Flame Bullet.




This is a three-way synchronised cooperation ninjutsu between Naruto, Gamatatsu, and Gamakichi. It is an expansion of the Wind...
nodes.full_description:
This article is about the technique that utilises wind and fire. For fire release technique, see Toad Oil Flame Bullet.




This is a three-way synchronised cooperation ninjutsu between Naruto, Gamatatsu, and Gamakichi. It is an expansion of the Wind Release: Toad Oil Bullet technique. After Naruto enhances Gamatatsu's Toad Oil Bullet with his wind-natured chakra, Gamakichi steps in and uses his Fire Release: Flame Bullet technique to ignite the oil. The wind not only improves the oil's coverage and distance, but also adds power to the flame. Using this technique they were able to knock out the Three-Tails.

See Also[]
Fire Release: Toad Oil Flame Bullet
Sage Art: Goemon
References[]

↑ Naruto Collectible Card Game

nodes.label: Wind Release: Toad Gun
nodes.description:
The Wind Release: Toad Gun is a two-way cooperation ninjutsu between Naruto and Gamatatsu. It is a wind-infused version of the Water Release: Water Gun technique. 
To set up for this technique, Naruto stands behind or atop Gamatatsu, moulding his win...
nodes.full_description:
The Wind Release: Toad Gun is a two-way cooperation ninjutsu between Naruto and Gamatatsu. It is a wind-infused version of the Water Release: Water Gun technique. 
To set up for this technique, Naruto stands behind or atop Gamatatsu, moulding his wind chakra, while Gamatatsu moulds his own chakra and keeps water in his mouth. When ready, Naruto signals Gamatatsu to exhale all of the water through his mouth, combined with the wind chakra that Naruto channelled into Gamatatsu. 
This technique creates a powerful and fast stream of water, which eventually spreads to cover a much larger area, but maintaining a powerful striking force due to the wind chakra. The attack was strong enough to break through Guren's Crystal Release: Jade Crystal Labyrinth Technique, which was suggested to be powerful enough to withstand the Rasengan.

nodes.label: Wind Release: Vacuum Blade
nodes.description: The user exhales wind-infused chakra onto a weapon in order to increase its sharpness, range and lethality. For example, the user can infuse a kunai to resemble a makeshift scimitar or infuse shuriken to increase their range and cutting power. In the...
nodes.full_description: The user exhales wind-infused chakra onto a weapon in order to increase its sharpness, range and lethality. For example, the user can infuse a kunai to resemble a makeshift scimitar or infuse shuriken to increase their range and cutting power. In the case of the kunai, wind-natured chakra, which envelopes the weapon, has a distinctive light green colouring.

nodes.label: Wind Release: Ultra-Big Ball Rasenshuriken
nodes.description:
The Wind Release: Ultra-Big Ball Rasenshuriken is a more advanced version of Wind Release: Rasenshuriken. 

Usage[]
While in Nine-Tails Chakra Mode, Naruto uses chakra arms to greatly expand his Rasenshuriken to the point where its size exceeds that ...
nodes.full_description:
The Wind Release: Ultra-Big Ball Rasenshuriken is a more advanced version of Wind Release: Rasenshuriken. 

Usage[]
While in Nine-Tails Chakra Mode, Naruto uses chakra arms to greatly expand his Rasenshuriken to the point where its size exceeds that of a summon as large as Gamakichi. Naruto used four hands to form the technique instead of three.[2] Much like the smaller variants, Naruto is able to throw this technique a considerable distance. It is powerful enough to break through a giant barrier.[3]

nodes.label: Wind Release: Sword of the Wind Count
nodes.description: Through a mere hand motion, the user releases a sharp wave of compressed wind from their hand. This was powerful enough to effortlessly slash through a shadow clone.
nodes.full_description: Through a mere hand motion, the user releases a sharp wave of compressed wind from their hand. This was powerful enough to effortlessly slash through a shadow clone.

nodes.label: Wind Release: Toad Oil Bullet
nodes.description: This technique is the wind-natured upgrade of the Toad Oil Bullet technique, similar in principle to the Water Release: Water Gun. It was ad-libbed from Naruto's and Gamatatsu's Wind Release: Toad Gun technique, using toad oil instead of water. Narut...
nodes.full_description:
This technique is the wind-natured upgrade of the Toad Oil Bullet technique, similar in principle to the Water Release: Water Gun. It was ad-libbed from Naruto's and Gamatatsu's Wind Release: Toad Gun technique, using toad oil instead of water. Naruto moulds his wind-natured chakra, while Gamatatsu moulds his own chakra into the oil in his mouth. On command Gamatatsu will expel the oil from his mouth, and combine it with the wind chakra that Naruto channels into Gamatatsu's body, creating a powerful and fast stream of toad oil, which spreads to cover a much larger area but maintaining a powerful striking force due to the wind-natured chakra.
This technique sets up for Gamakichi's Fire Release: Flame Bullet technique, which combine to produce the Wind Release: Toad Oil Flame Bullet technique.

nodes.label: Wind Release: Scattering Blossoms
nodes.description: Hana attacks her target with a petal filled wind vortex. However, per chakra nature relationships, this jutsu faltered when used against a fire-breathing flame bear.
nodes.full_description: Hana attacks her target with a petal filled wind vortex. However, per chakra nature relationships, this jutsu faltered when used against a fire-breathing flame bear.

nodes.label: Wind Release: Spiralling Barrier
nodes.description: Using a Rasengan, Konohamaru can counter an enemy attack by dispersing the Rasengan with wind chakra, creating a strong wind barrier. This technique proved to be powerful enough to block a Chidori.
nodes.full_description: Using a Rasengan, Konohamaru can counter an enemy attack by dispersing the Rasengan with wind chakra, creating a strong wind barrier. This technique proved to be powerful enough to block a Chidori.

nodes.label: Wind Release: Shakujō Twister
nodes.description: By spinning their shakujō above their head, the user is able to produce a very large twister around himself before launching it out. It is powerful enough to easily repel demonic wind blasts.
nodes.full_description: By spinning their shakujō above their head, the user is able to produce a very large twister around himself before launching it out. It is powerful enough to easily repel demonic wind blasts.

nodes.label: Wind Release: Shield of the Wind Count
nodes.description: A self-proclaimed invincible barrier; using hand gestures, the user is able to create a protective barrier of wind capable of repelling any incoming attack they perceive, back on the original user with equal or greater force. In the anime, even if an...
nodes.full_description:
A self-proclaimed invincible barrier; using hand gestures, the user is able to create a protective barrier of wind capable of repelling any incoming attack they perceive, back on the original user with equal or greater force. In the anime, even if an attack proves too powerful to repel, the barrier will cushion enough of the attack to save the user from an otherwise deadly assault.
Using this technique, Shojoji displayed the ability to not only repel projectiles, but chakra-based attacks such as Boruto Uzumaki's Rasengan as well.

nodes.label: Wind Release: Spiralling Wind Ball
nodes.description: This technique allows the user to breathe wind-infused chakra into the palm of their hand, shaping it into a small, whirlwind-like ball. Then the user will shoot it at their opponent. This technique seems to be very fast and powerful, as it is capabl...
nodes.full_description: This technique allows the user to breathe wind-infused chakra into the palm of their hand, shaping it into a small, whirlwind-like ball. Then the user will shoot it at their opponent. This technique seems to be very fast and powerful, as it is capable of smashing through thick rock. They can be launched in rapid succession.

nodes.label: Wind Release: Sand Cloud Whirlwind
nodes.description: The user creates a dome-shaped sandstorm which surrounds the opponent and prevents them from escaping. During the technique's execution, the used sand particles collide against each other, thus creating electromagnetic waves which place the trapped p...
nodes.full_description:
The user creates a dome-shaped sandstorm which surrounds the opponent and prevents them from escaping. During the technique's execution, the used sand particles collide against each other, thus creating electromagnetic waves which place the trapped person under never-ending genjutsu in the form of featureless beings attacking with kunai. While the target is busy fending these illusions off, they are vulnerable to attacks from the outside.

See Also[]
Chakra Ghost Technique

nodes.label: Wind Release: Sand Buckshot
nodes.description: After Gaara scatters and compresses numerous sand particles into bullet-like projectiles, Shukaku expels a giant gust of wind from its stomach, with the impact of a bomb to increase the force of the bullets, creating a large-scale sandstorm. This att...
nodes.full_description:
After Gaara scatters and compresses numerous sand particles into bullet-like projectiles, Shukaku expels a giant gust of wind from its stomach, with the impact of a bomb to increase the force of the bullets, creating a large-scale sandstorm. This attack is powerful enough to pierce through flesh with ease, and is difficult to dodge, due to the technique's speed and range. 
An additional benefit of this attack is that it pushes the target away from the user and Gaara can then use any of the sand left in his target's bloodstream to immobilise or manipulate them, leaving them vulnerable to follow up attacks.

References[]

↑ Fourth Databook, page 326

nodes.label: Wind Release: Rotating Shuriken
nodes.description:
By infusing wind-natured chakra into shuriken, the user can make them spin, as well as control them in the air.

See Also[]
Wind Release: Vacuum Blade
Wind Release: Verdant Mountain Gale
nodes.full_description:
By infusing wind-natured chakra into shuriken, the user can make them spin, as well as control them in the air.

See Also[]
Wind Release: Vacuum Blade
Wind Release: Verdant Mountain Gale

nodes.label: Wind Release: Repeated Rasenshuriken
nodes.description:
The Wind Release: Repeated Rasenshuriken is a ninjutsu created and utilised by Naruto Uzumaki. 

Usage[]
After activating Kurama Mode or Sage Mode (in the anime), Naruto is able to form two Rasenshuriken and wield both at the same time. Their cutting...
nodes.full_description:
The Wind Release: Repeated Rasenshuriken is a ninjutsu created and utilised by Naruto Uzumaki. 

Usage[]
After activating Kurama Mode or Sage Mode (in the anime), Naruto is able to form two Rasenshuriken and wield both at the same time. Their cutting power is so extreme that by using one of them as a melee weapon, Naruto was able to cut through the Ten-Tails' extremely durable tails with ease.[1]

References[]

↑ Naruto chapter 617, pages 11-12

nodes.label: Wind Release: Pressure Damage
nodes.description: A powerful wind technique released by Kakuzu's wind-element mask. This tornado-like mass is compressed until it has a very high density before being released. The blast can hit a vast range, inflicting massive damage on both the target and their clos...
nodes.full_description: A powerful wind technique released by Kakuzu's wind-element mask. This tornado-like mass is compressed until it has a very high density before being released. The blast can hit a vast range, inflicting massive damage on both the target and their close surroundings. This technique can also be combined with the Fire Release: Intelligent Hard Work, to increase the flame's potency in a great scale, causing a massive fire-storm.

nodes.label: Wind Release: Passing Typhoon
nodes.description: The user creates a gust of wind that blows away all weather conditions. It is powerful enough to dispel even the Hiding in Mist Technique.
nodes.full_description: The user creates a gust of wind that blows away all weather conditions. It is powerful enough to dispel even the Hiding in Mist Technique.

nodes.description:
This article is about the ninjutsu. For the episode, see Wind Release: Rasenshuriken!.




The Wind Release: Rasenshuriken is a shuriken-shaped variant of the Wind Release: Rasengan.

Contents

1 Overview
2 Development
3

This article is about the ninjutsu. For the episode, see Wind Release: Rasenshuriken!.




The Wind Release: Rasenshuriken is a shuriken-shaped variant of the Wind Release: Rasengan.

nodes.label: Wind Release: Obscuring Paper
nodes.description: The user manifests countless dark papers to surround and envelop the area, forming a barrier to trap targets inside. Within it, the user can unleash their other techniques to attack from any angle. The user can also project their voice to further con...
nodes.full_description: The user manifests countless dark papers to surround and envelop the area, forming a barrier to trap targets inside. Within it, the user can unleash their other techniques to attack from any angle. The user can also project their voice to further confuse the enemy. If the barrier is damaged, the user can reinforce it with new paper. It is a chakra taxing technique which can't be maintained for long.

nodes.label: Wind Release: Multi-Layered Gale
nodes.description: The user creates a wall of multiple layers of vacuum that are stacked on top of each other like a mille-feuille. This technique can be used to provide additional support to other defensive techniques.
nodes.full_description: The user creates a wall of multiple layers of vacuum that are stacked on top of each other like a mille-feuille. This technique can be used to provide additional support to other defensive techniques.

nodes.label: Wind Release: Infinite Sand Cloud — Great Breakthrough
nodes.description: While preparing to enter Tailed Beast Mode, Gaara covers his body with sand. With this sand, he is able to form mouths all over his body. Gaara inhales with these and his regular mouth, causing his body to swell up. He then exhales this wind, mixing ...
nodes.full_description:
While preparing to enter Tailed Beast Mode, Gaara covers his body with sand. With this sand, he is able to form mouths all over his body. Gaara inhales with these and his regular mouth, causing his body to swell up. He then exhales this wind, mixing it with sand that's been coated with his chakra. The resulting sandstorm covers a wide area in front of Gaara and is very powerful, enough to knock down trees and deal extensive physical damage. For these reasons, it is a useful attack against multiple opponents.[1]

References[]

↑ 1.0 1.1 Tō no Sho, page 268

nodes.label: Wind Release: Great Wind Protective Wall
nodes.description:
This article is about Temari's anime only ninjutsu. For Temari's game only ninjutsu, see Great Wind Violent Wall.




Using her Giant Folding Fan, Temari creates a wind wall that pushes her opponents away.
nodes.full_description:
This article is about Temari's anime only ninjutsu. For Temari's game only ninjutsu, see Great Wind Violent Wall.




Using her Giant Folding Fan, Temari creates a wind wall that pushes her opponents away.

nodes.label: Wind Release: Great Task of the Dragon
nodes.description: The user swings their fan to the sky, causing a giant tornado to descend upon a target. This technique can be set up as a feint as it has a delayed activation. The technique alters weather conditions temporarily and attacks from the sky rather than f...
nodes.full_description: The user swings their fan to the sky, causing a giant tornado to descend upon a target. This technique can be set up as a feint as it has a delayed activation. The technique alters weather conditions temporarily and attacks from the sky rather than from the person. The storm clouds that create the attack dissipate immediately after the tornado begins while the tornado continues in a highly concentrated state.

nodes.label: Wind Release: Great Wind Mask
nodes.description: Kakuzu, while in his long-range form, releases a wind bullet that can repel a multitude of things and damage multiple enemies all at once.
nodes.full_description: Kakuzu, while in his long-range form, releases a wind bullet that can repel a multitude of things and damage multiple enemies all at once.

nodes.description:

Contents

The Wind Release: Great Cast Net technique works similar to its parent technique whereby the user utilises their Giant Folding Fan to create a multitude of extremely sharp blades of wind to attack their opponent with. These blades of wind overlap with one another forming a figurative net which cuts the target from all angles.
This technique can be used in conjunction with other tessenjutsu users for increased power.

nodes.description: Shukaku pounds on its stomach with its arm, producing a loud sound. The external pressure from the pound forces a ball of wind from Shukaku's large mouth, firing it like a bullet. The wind, highly compressed and imbued with chakra, travels in a strai...
nodes.full_description:
Shukaku pounds on its stomach with its arm, producing a loud sound. The external pressure from the pound forces a ball of wind from Shukaku's large mouth, firing it like a bullet. The wind, highly compressed and imbued with chakra, travels in a straight line. It moves quickly across the landscape, tearing up trees and hollowing out the ground. When it finally impacts with its target, it explodes,[1] dealing enough damage that even Gamabunta couldn't withstand more than a few. By hitting its stomach rapidly, Shukaku can produce multiple Air Bullets in order to overwhelm opponents.[2]

See Also[]

Naruto uses Wind Release: Rasengan, which, when used in tandem with his holding the Dragon Blade, enhances the technique, causing a dragon of wind to swirl around Naruto, damaging the surroundings around him. 
This technique was unintentionally created when Naruto and his allies were trapped inside the collapsing Mount Koryū, causing him to use a Rasengan to try and break through the entrance. The Dragon Blade responded to its wielder's heightened emotions and lent him its power.

This ability allows a user to materialise their will (意志, ishi) itself into a physical form.

Contents

1 Usage

1.2 Madara Uchiha


2 References


Usage[]
Kaguya Ōtsutsuki[]
Kaguya Ōtsutsuki was able to use her chakra to create ...
nodes.full_description:
This ability allows a user to materialise their will (意志, ishi) itself into a physical form.

Contents

1 Usage

1.1 Kaguya Ōtsutsuki
1.2 Madara Uchiha


2 References


Usage[]
Kaguya Ōtsutsuki[]
Kaguya Ōtsutsuki was able to use her chakra to create life to fulfill her desires. In an attempt to retrieve the chakra bestowed upon her two sons, she imparted her will upon the God Tree and  — along with all the people tethered to it —  created what then became the Ten-Tails.[1] Titanic in size, she was able to use its power to fight her children for a length of months.
Immediately prior to being sealed by Hagoromo and Hamura, Kaguya Ōtsutsuki formulated a plan that would result in her eventual revival. To accomplish this, she created a sentient being known as Black Zetsu, which would spend centuries fulfilling her desire.[2][3] Created as a malleable construct, Black Zetsu is capable of controlling the actions of others by coating itself over their bodies and taking possession of them.[4] Once the remnants of her chakra were finally reunited, Black Zetsu was able to revive her within a new host, Madara Uchiha. It was also capable of manipulating the husk of the Ten-Tails, extracting a number of White Zetsu from it.

Madara Uchiha[]
Madara Uchiha was also capable of using this ability. Moments prior to his death, he attempted to infuse his will into the right half of White Zetsu, seemingly creating Black Zetsu, which he referred to as a weaker version of himself; in actuality, Black Zetsu merely made it look like it was being created as part of its plan. 
Madara was actually able to impart his will into the black rod that emerged from the flowering tree he was attached to in his old age. Revealing it to Obito, Madara claimed that it was a physical manifestation of his will and that it should be used when performing the Six Paths Technique.[5]
On a later occasion, following his resurrection, Madara caused a number of these black rods to emerge from Obito's artificial right half, which became entirely coated in a black substance similar to Black Zetsu.[6] This allowed Madara to remotely control Obito's actions using his chakra, as well as fire black rods out of his body as projectiles, though Obito was ultimately able to resist his control.[7]

References[]

↑ Naruto chapter 681, page 9

↑ Naruto chapter 678, pages 14-16

↑ Naruto chapter 681, page 8

↑ Naruto chapter 656, page 16

↑ Naruto chapter 606, pages 15-16

↑ Naruto chapter 636, pages 15-17

↑ Naruto chapter 637

nodes.full_description:
This technique uses chakra to temporarily enhance the head's metabolism and manipulate the hair that grows longer as a result of it. There is also chakra flowing through the lengthened hair, making its hardness comparable to that of steel wire. By thickly bundling the hair, its strength is further increased, also increasing its destructive power. Its name may come from the fact that, as seen just before striking Pain, it takes the shape of what resembles a lion's mouth.

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Shark Wild Sphere Technique
nodes.description: Merged with Samehada, Kisame surrounds himself with water and summons sharks to attack the trapped opponent.
nodes.full_description: Merged with Samehada, Kisame surrounds himself with water and summons sharks to attack the trapped opponent.

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Shark Breakthrough
nodes.description: Kisame summons a water shark to jump into the air and bolt towards the opponent, striking them.
nodes.full_description: Kisame summons a water shark to jump into the air and bolt towards the opponent, striking them.

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Shark Bullet Technique
nodes.description: The user manipulates a volume of water with their hand; by thrusting their hand in a direction, the manipulated water is sent in that direction. As it moves, the body of water takes the shape of a shark, with additional water following in its wake fo...
nodes.full_description: The user manipulates a volume of water with their hand; by thrusting their hand in a direction, the manipulated water is sent in that direction. As it moves, the body of water takes the shape of a shark, with additional water following in its wake for as long as the user keeps their hand thrust out. Because of how quickly the shark moves and because of how much water there is, it does extensive damage when it impacts something.[1] Users can also ride within the water shark as it moves, allowing them to travel faster than they're able to swim.[2]

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Severing Slash
nodes.description:
After jumping in the air, Mei kneads chakra in her stomach and converts it into water before expelling it from her mouth as a high-pressured stream to strike the opponent down into the ground.

See Also[]
Water Release: Water Severing Wave
nodes.full_description:
After jumping in the air, Mei kneads chakra in her stomach and converts it into water before expelling it from her mouth as a high-pressured stream to strike the opponent down into the ground.

See Also[]
Water Release: Water Severing Wave

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Shark Blade
nodes.description: Kisame points Samehada towards his opponent and then envelops it with water, which is then manipulated into the form of a shark. Kisame then thrust Samehada forward, releasing the shark as a projectile that flies towards the opponent and explodes int...
nodes.full_description: Kisame points Samehada towards his opponent and then envelops it with water, which is then manipulated into the form of a shark. Kisame then thrust Samehada forward, releasing the shark as a projectile that flies towards the opponent and explodes into a burst of water on contact.

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Severing Wave
nodes.description: After kneading chakra in the stomach and converting it into water, the user spews it out as a high pressure stream that is powerful enough to cut cleanly through the roots of the God Tree with ease.
nodes.full_description: After kneading chakra in the stomach and converting it into water, the user spews it out as a high pressure stream that is powerful enough to cut cleanly through the roots of the God Tree with ease.

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Pillar Method Attack
nodes.description: Yagura hooks his opponent with his staff, throwing them up in the air, and hits them with four water pillars.
nodes.full_description: Yagura hooks his opponent with his staff, throwing them up in the air, and hits them with four water pillars.

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Scales
nodes.description: Tenma creates a myriad of fish scales out of water and blasts them at his opponents through his fiddler crab.
nodes.full_description: Tenma creates a myriad of fish scales out of water and blasts them at his opponents through his fiddler crab.

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Quaking Pillar
nodes.description: The user jumps into the air and stabs down towards the ground. This causes water to burst up around the user, and creates a pillar of water to rise into the air and repel the enemy.
nodes.full_description: The user jumps into the air and stabs down towards the ground. This causes water to burst up around the user, and creates a pillar of water to rise into the air and repel the enemy.

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Pillar
nodes.description: The user creates a pillar of water, allowing them to dodge attacks by raising the pillar above their level, or to level themselves with an opponent if they're higher, for example, on a rock.
nodes.full_description: The user creates a pillar of water, allowing them to dodge attacks by raising the pillar above their level, or to level themselves with an opponent if they're higher, for example, on a rock.

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Palm Wave
nodes.description: Yagura jumps up in the air, delivers a couple hits with his staff, and finishes with a water blast that knocks his opponent down in the ground.
nodes.full_description: Yagura jumps up in the air, delivers a couple hits with his staff, and finishes with a water blast that knocks his opponent down in the ground.

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Mirror Technique
nodes.description: The user creates a large, flat, circular pool of water in front of their opponent. Its surface acts like a mirror, perfectly reflecting the attacking targets. By then hooking onto and rotating the "mirror" 90° with their staff, the reflections emerge...
nodes.full_description: The user creates a large, flat, circular pool of water in front of their opponent. Its surface acts like a mirror, perfectly reflecting the attacking targets. By then hooking onto and rotating the "mirror" 90° with their staff, the reflections emerge and materialise from the mirror, where they collide with the mirrored targets. As these reflections use the exact same technique as their counterpart — regardless of its type — they counter the attack completely, while repelling them in the process. However, upon impact, the reflections disperse into water.

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Mass Crumbling Bullet
nodes.description: Yagura creates a giant ball of water above his opponent before crashing it down on them.
nodes.full_description: Yagura creates a giant ball of water above his opponent before crashing it down on them.

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Lock Technique
nodes.description: Tobirama lands a water punch to his opponent, causing a whirlpool to hold them in place. He then jumps up in the air, and comes down at the opponent with a water drill.
nodes.full_description: Tobirama lands a water punch to his opponent, causing a whirlpool to hold them in place. He then jumps up in the air, and comes down at the opponent with a water drill.

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Hail
nodes.description: The user cups their hands together and stretches their arms outward at the target. They will then unleash a large barrage of water bullets. The bullets are very potent, able to effortlessly demolish large and sturdy trees.
nodes.full_description: The user cups their hands together and stretches their arms outward at the target. They will then unleash a large barrage of water bullets. The bullets are very potent, able to effortlessly demolish large and sturdy trees.

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Gun
nodes.description:
This article is about the collaboration technique. For the Hōzuki clan's hiden technique, see Water Gun Technique.




This technique is demonstrated as being both a technique on its own and as a two-way cooperation ninjutsu between Gamariki and Jira...
nodes.full_description:
This article is about the collaboration technique. For the Hōzuki clan's hiden technique, see Water Gun Technique.




This technique is demonstrated as being both a technique on its own and as a two-way cooperation ninjutsu between Gamariki and Jiraiya. Using this technique, Gamariki can blast off a wave of high speed water from his mouth with extreme precision and force. When combined with another person's chakra, this technique becomes a two-way collaboration water technique that can slice the target into multiple fine-carved pieces. After he learns this technique, Gamatatsu is able to combine it with Naruto's wind-natured chakra to create the Wind Release: Toad Gun technique.

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Formation Wall
nodes.description: The user spits a stream of water from their mouth at the ground, which circles around them and rises upward to create a wall.[1] If the user is standing on a body of water, they can instead create the wall from the surroundings.[2] The water wall def...
nodes.full_description:
The user spits a stream of water from their mouth at the ground, which circles around them and rises upward to create a wall.[1] If the user is standing on a body of water, they can instead create the wall from the surroundings.[2] The water wall defends anyone within its perimeter from attack, with the wall's strength being determined by how much of the user's chakra is put into it. Users control how long the wall lasts as well as how much water it's made with. Because the water is clear, the wall doesn't obstruct the user's vision, allowing them to make their next move uninhibited.[1] The wall's initial formation, if timed correctly, can be used to fend off opponents, flinging them away as the wall rises.[3] In the anime, the water can also be gathered midair, and dispersed in all directions as a form of fire-fighting,[4] or shot from one's hand.[5]
In Sasuke Shinden, Sasuke Uchiha creates the Water Formation Wall around his allies rather than around himself, providing them a shield while he carries out other tasks.

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Formation Pillar
nodes.description:
A defensive technique where chakra kneaded inside the body is converted into water and then expelled from the mouth in a dense, curved torrent, near-instantaneously creating a circular barricade that can be used to intercept incoming attacks. 
In her...
nodes.full_description:
A defensive technique where chakra kneaded inside the body is converted into water and then expelled from the mouth in a dense, curved torrent, near-instantaneously creating a circular barricade that can be used to intercept incoming attacks. 
In her battle against Madara Uchiha, Mei was able to use this to overpower and extinguish his Fire Release: Great Fire Destruction — a feat that would normally require many Water Release users working in tandem.

References[]

↑ Fourth Databook, page 320

↑ Naruto: Shippūden episode 333

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Forge Technique
nodes.description:
By gathering water around the user's sword, it generates a rapidly swirling stream. Once striking with it, it unleashes a strong surge of water to launch a target.

See Also[]
Takigakure Style: Watercutting Sword
Water Release: Water Blade Technique
nodes.full_description:
By gathering water around the user's sword, it generates a rapidly swirling stream. Once striking with it, it unleashes a strong surge of water to launch a target.

See Also[]
Takigakure Style: Watercutting Sword
Water Release: Water Blade Technique

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Dragon Whirlpool Technique
nodes.description: Gengetsu creates a barrage of water bullets and shoots the opponent in successive hits. Then he creates a whirlpool and sends it to the opponent.
nodes.full_description: Gengetsu creates a barrage of water bullets and shoots the opponent in successive hits. Then he creates a whirlpool and sends it to the opponent.

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Fang Bullet
nodes.description: The user forms projectiles underwater; the water that the projectiles are made of is highly pressurised because of how compact they are. The projectiles are then shot from the water at high speeds at the user's target, which can be made more lethal b...
nodes.full_description:
The user forms projectiles underwater; the water that the projectiles are made of is highly pressurised because of how compact they are. The projectiles are then shot from the water at high speeds at the user's target, which can be made more lethal by adding a spinning motion. This technique is especially useful during fights taking place on top of water, as the projectiles can be shot at the target from any direction, ideally blind-spots. Users will often try to distract targets before using this technique against them, or even use this technique itself as a distraction.[1] In the anime, multiple users can work together to create larger, stronger projectiles,[2] or a single user can create several smaller projectiles in a scattershot manner.[3]

References[]

↑ 1.0 1.1 Tō no Sho, page 236

↑ 2.0 2.1 Naruto: Shippūden episode 270

↑ Boruto episode 246

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Dragon Whip
nodes.description:
This technique creates an orb of water from which many sharp whips of water emerge that can be directed towards and impale a target or multiple targets. The whips can also change direction in mid-trajectory, bending to seek out the targets.

See Also...
nodes.full_description:
This technique creates an orb of water from which many sharp whips of water emerge that can be directed towards and impale a target or multiple targets. The whips can also change direction in mid-trajectory, bending to seek out the targets.

See Also[]
Water Release: Running Water Whip
Water Release: Water Whip

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Dragon Bullet Technique
nodes.description: The user moulds water into the shape of a dragon, which they then direct at a target. The water crashes upon the target, dealing significant physical damage. Ideally, users will use pre-existing bodies of water for this technique, but sufficiently sk...
nodes.full_description: The user moulds water into the shape of a dragon, which they then direct at a target. The water crashes upon the target, dealing significant physical damage. Ideally, users will use pre-existing bodies of water for this technique, but sufficiently skilled users can instead create the water themselves, spitting the dragon from their mouths. The more talented the user, the greater the amount of water that the dragon can be made from.[1]

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Dragon Biting Explosion
nodes.description: Tobirama creates a large pool of water that, after firing the enemy into the air, shoots numerous water bullets at them and then finishes by forming the water bullets into a water dragon which attacks the target, sending them crashing into the ground...
nodes.full_description: Tobirama creates a large pool of water that, after firing the enemy into the air, shoots numerous water bullets at them and then finishes by forming the water bullets into a water dragon which attacks the target, sending them crashing into the ground.

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Dragon Triple Step Technique
nodes.description: An advanced version of the Water Release: Water Dragon Bullet Technique, where the user launches three water dragons at the target instead of one.
nodes.full_description: An advanced version of the Water Release: Water Dragon Bullet Technique, where the user launches three water dragons at the target instead of one.

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Dragon Shot
nodes.description: The user creates a small reservoir from which three water dragons are formed, attacking several opponents at once in different directions.
nodes.full_description: The user creates a small reservoir from which three water dragons are formed, attacking several opponents at once in different directions.

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Bullet Technique
nodes.description: The Water Release: Water Bullet Technique is a highly versatile Water Release technique with many variations. After kneading chakra in their stomach, the user expels a large quantity of water in the form of a powerful torrent aimed towards their inte...
nodes.full_description:
The Water Release: Water Bullet Technique is a highly versatile Water Release technique with many variations. After kneading chakra in their stomach, the user expels a large quantity of water in the form of a powerful torrent aimed towards their intended target.
This technique can also be used collaboratively to increase its range and effect.

See Also[]
Water Release: Water Trumpet
Water Release: Wild Water Wave

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Colliding Wave
nodes.description: The user creates a massive vortex of water that protects the user from attacks. It explodes from the top of it in the form of a wave, covering the entire battlefield. By using hand gestures, the user can manipulate the water to move in any direction....
nodes.full_description: The user creates a massive vortex of water that protects the user from attacks. It explodes from the top of it in the form of a wave, covering the entire battlefield. By using hand gestures, the user can manipulate the water to move in any direction. Having changed the battlefield in this way enables the user to follow up with additional Water Release techniques. The user can also evaporate the water at will.

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Bowl
nodes.description: The user emits a continuous jet of water from their hand to strike the enemy and disrupt their attack. Due to the nature of water, this technique works especially well against smoke-based attacks.
nodes.full_description: The user emits a continuous jet of water from their hand to strike the enemy and disrupt their attack. Due to the nature of water, this technique works especially well against smoke-based attacks.

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Current Bridge
nodes.description: The user slams their hands on the ground, causing a torrent of water to erupt. It sturdy enough for grown men to run across.
nodes.full_description: The user slams their hands on the ground, causing a torrent of water to erupt. It sturdy enough for grown men to run across.

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Buckshot
nodes.description: The user spits several blade-like projectiles, strong enough to penetrate protective armor.
nodes.full_description: The user spits several blade-like projectiles, strong enough to penetrate protective armor.

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Body
nodes.description: This technique transforms the user's entire form into water and back at will, granting the user free control of their shape, including slipping through small cracks. This technique allows for high-level infiltration and stealth. By travelling down a ...
nodes.full_description:
This technique transforms the user's entire form into water and back at will, granting the user free control of their shape, including slipping through small cracks. This technique allows for high-level infiltration and stealth. By travelling down a target's mouth, even a recently deceased one, the user is also able to possess them, controlling the body's full range movements and actions as if their own personal body, even talking. Due to this form's fluid and malleable nature, physical attacks will harmlessly pass through them. However, this technique is very vulnerable to Lightning Release and still vulnerable to chakra disruption by an opponent.

See Also[]
Earth Release: Mud Body Technique
Hydrification Technique
Iburi Clan's Kekkei Genkai
Sand Body
Water Replacement

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Beast
nodes.description:
The user manipulates water and transforms it into a giant wolf-like beast. The beast can launch powerful streams of water from its mouth, or sweep the area with its claws to let a powerful torrent of water to wash the enemies away.
When Kakashi used ...
nodes.full_description:
The user manipulates water and transforms it into a giant wolf-like beast. The beast can launch powerful streams of water from its mouth, or sweep the area with its claws to let a powerful torrent of water to wash the enemies away.
When Kakashi used this technique against Shabadaba's guards at his palace, he manipulated the water at the fountain, which was yellow. He managed to keep the water beast active for a long time, and combined it with his Sharingan to keep track of his enemies, which tired him out at the end.

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Blade Technique
nodes.description: The user forms a hand seal and raises a column of underground water from beneath their feet, which takes the shape of a high-pressured water blade. If one were to take a direct hit from the blade, it would cut clean through flesh and bone. This techn...
nodes.full_description:
The user forms a hand seal and raises a column of underground water from beneath their feet, which takes the shape of a high-pressured water blade. If one were to take a direct hit from the blade, it would cut clean through flesh and bone. This technique is perfect for digging through bedrock without creating igniting sparks. Using hydrated calcium and volcanic rock from the underground water, the shape of this technique can also take the form of a javelin, which is capable of piercing though the Shield of Sand. This technique was noted to have been created by Rasa, the Fourth Kazekage.

See Also[]
Takigakure Style: Watercutting Sword

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Binding
nodes.description: The user produces large tendrils from behind. They are highly malleable, able to twist and constrict as needed. They are also very strong, able to easily lift and subdue a grown man, potentially able to crush their victims.
nodes.full_description: The user produces large tendrils from behind. They are highly malleable, able to twist and constrict as needed. They are also very strong, able to easily lift and subdue a grown man, potentially able to crush their victims.

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Army Water Demon Technique
nodes.description: This technique gathers a large amount of water to form a large spiralling stream of water. It can be guided to strike a target in a number of angles.
nodes.full_description: This technique gathers a large amount of water to form a large spiralling stream of water. It can be guided to strike a target in a number of angles.

nodes.label: Water Release: Water Armour
nodes.description:
Suien covers the entirety of his body with chakra-infused water, making it like a sturdy suit of armour. It can withstand most physical attacks suffered.

See Also[]
Rock Armour
nodes.full_description:
Suien covers the entirety of his body with chakra-infused water, making it like a sturdy suit of armour. It can withstand most physical attacks suffered.

See Also[]
Rock Armour

nodes.label: Water Release: Tearing Torrent
nodes.description: This technique creates water that spirals in the user's hand which fires at a high speed towards the enemy. In the anime, it was also shown to be able to be conjured from the surrounding area in the form of a torrential wave.[1] It can also be combin...
nodes.full_description: This technique creates water that spirals in the user's hand which fires at a high speed towards the enemy. In the anime, it was also shown to be able to be conjured from the surrounding area in the form of a torrential wave.[1] It can also be combined with the Wind Release: Rasengan to create the Typhoon Water Vortex Technique.

nodes.label: Water Release: Transform-at-Will
nodes.description: Suien has a durable, jelly-like substance flow onto his enemy. This substance binds, blinds and suffocates the victim.
nodes.full_description: Suien has a durable, jelly-like substance flow onto his enemy. This substance binds, blinds and suffocates the victim.

nodes.label: Water Release: Torrent Bullet
nodes.description: The user creates a powerful vortex of water and unleashes it on the target.
nodes.full_description: The user creates a powerful vortex of water and unleashes it on the target.

nodes.label: Water Release: Surging Sea
nodes.description:
After kneading chakra in their stomach and converting it, the user expels a large surge of water from their mouth.

See Also[]
Water Release: Wild Water Wave
Water Release: Water Trumpet
nodes.full_description:
After kneading chakra in their stomach and converting it, the user expels a large surge of water from their mouth.

See Also[]
Water Release: Wild Water Wave
Water Release: Water Trumpet

nodes.label: Water Release: Tate Eboshi
nodes.description: After using his Hydrification Technique to merge with a water source, Suigetsu can form a giant wave that resembles a demon-like fish. Suigetsu can use this form to battle larger opponents, or he can use it to shield allies from attack. Though it was...
nodes.full_description: After using his Hydrification Technique to merge with a water source, Suigetsu can form a giant wave that resembles a demon-like fish. Suigetsu can use this form to battle larger opponents, or he can use it to shield allies from attack. Though it was strong enough to physically push back Killer B in his Tailed Beast Mode, it was not strong enough to withstand a point-blank range Tailed Beast Ball, and rendered Suigetsu unconscious soon afterwards, causing him to fall into a jelly-like state.

nodes.label: Water Release: Surfing Strike
nodes.description:
The user creates water underneath their feet in the form of a wave and then proceeds to ride it directly towards the opponent, sending the crashing waves to attack them.

See Also[]
Azure Stream
Instant Water
Wave Break
nodes.full_description:
The user creates water underneath their feet in the form of a wave and then proceeds to ride it directly towards the opponent, sending the crashing waves to attack them.

See Also[]

Instant Water

nodes.label: Water Release: Submerged Shark Scraping Destruction
nodes.description: Kisame spits a lake of water near the opponent from which water sharks come out and force them up. Kisame then jumps up and slashes the opponent back into the lake, where they are devoured by the sharks.
nodes.full_description: Kisame spits a lake of water near the opponent from which water sharks come out and force them up. Kisame then jumps up and slashes the opponent back into the lake, where they are devoured by the sharks.

nodes.label: Water Release: Stormy Blockade
nodes.description: This technique allows the user to summon a massive amount of water from the sky, crashing it onto the opponent. If needed, the user can cancel the technique in an instant.
nodes.full_description: This technique allows the user to summon a massive amount of water from the sky, crashing it onto the opponent. If needed, the user can cancel the technique in an instant.

nodes.label: Water Release: Starch Syrup Capturing Field
nodes.description: The user expels high viscosity water to cover the ground. This stream of sticky liquid can be used to form an adhesive trap that will inhibit a person's mobility. One can effectively reduce their enemy's area of activity with this technique, giving t...
nodes.full_description: The user expels high viscosity water to cover the ground. This stream of sticky liquid can be used to form an adhesive trap that will inhibit a person's mobility. One can effectively reduce their enemy's area of activity with this technique, giving the user an advantage on the battlefield. The normal scope of this technique is normally just a few metres, but it is possible to make an entire pond of starch syrup.[2] The syrup can be manipulated to move after it is created, being able to stick and travel up surfaces.[3]

nodes.label: Water Release: Snake's Mouth
nodes.description:
The user generates a spinning column of water which takes the form of a snake with a gaping jaw. This snake can twist and follow its targets and swallow them. After it has swallowed them, it turns into a river that carries the targets away.

See Also...
nodes.full_description:
The user generates a spinning column of water which takes the form of a snake with a gaping jaw. This snake can twist and follow its targets and swallow them. After it has swallowed them, it turns into a river that carries the targets away.

nodes.label: Water Release: Scattering Bullets Technique
nodes.description: Gengetsu sends a wide volley of water bullets at his opponent, delivering several sequential hits.
nodes.full_description: Gengetsu sends a wide volley of water bullets at his opponent, delivering several sequential hits.

nodes.label: Water Release: Running Water Whip
nodes.description:
After kneading chakra in her mouth, Mei converts it into water before expelling from her mouth in the form a whip, which she uses to lash at her opponent, sending them flying back.

See Also[]
Water Release: Water Dragon Whip
Water Release: Water Whi...

After kneading chakra in her mouth, Mei converts it into water before expelling from her mouth in the form a whip, which she uses to lash at her opponent, sending them flying back.

Water Release: Water Whip

nodes.label: Water Release: Running Water Spear
nodes.description: After attacking the opponent with multiple water attacks, Mei shapes the remaining water into a spear that strikes them upwards.
nodes.full_description: After attacking the opponent with multiple water attacks, Mei shapes the remaining water into a spear that strikes them upwards.

nodes.label: Water Release: Rampaging Water
nodes.description: Gamabunta shoots a stream of water from his mouth. This technique appears to tire him.
nodes.full_description: Gamabunta shoots a stream of water from his mouth. This technique appears to tire him.

nodes.label: Water Release: Rising Water Slicer
nodes.description:
The user summons a linear wave of water that shoots outward from the ground at high speeds to its target. It is strong enough to slice clean through rock.

See Also[]
Water Release: Water Severing Wave
Earth Release: Underground Split
nodes.full_description:
The user summons a linear wave of water that shoots outward from the ground at high speeds to its target. It is strong enough to slice clean through rock.

See Also[]

Earth Release: Underground Split

nodes.label: Water Release: Rapid Thunder Whip Technique
nodes.description: The user dips their first two fingers into a source of water making a long rope of water rise out from said source. The whip is as sharp as a sword being able to cleanly slice through trees and wrap opponents up. Lightning chakra is also channeled th...
nodes.full_description: The user dips their first two fingers into a source of water making a long rope of water rise out from said source. The whip is as sharp as a sword being able to cleanly slice through trees and wrap opponents up. Lightning chakra is also channeled through the whip.

nodes.label: Water Release: Raging Jellyfish
nodes.description: Funamushi creates a giant water jellyfish, which he rides and controls. With its tentacles, it can cause widespread destruction and attack multiple targets at once. Funamushi only employed it in combat when he had access to a significant amount of wa...
nodes.full_description:
Funamushi creates a giant water jellyfish, which he rides and controls. With its tentacles, it can cause widespread destruction and attack multiple targets at once. Funamushi only employed it in combat when he had access to a significant amount of water provided by rainfall. Despite his Water Release being vulnerable to Lightning Release, especially when absorbing water to use jutsu, once it was used, it appeared to suffer no effect from three simultaneous Lightning Release attacks.

See Also[]
Cat God Possession: Monster Cat Beckoning Technique
Susanoo
Wood Release: Wood Human Technique

nodes.label: Water Release: Pillar Encirclement
nodes.description: The user creates four large water pillars which then circle around the user as a protective barrier.
nodes.full_description: The user creates four large water pillars which then circle around the user as a protective barrier.

nodes.label: Water Release: Jadeite
nodes.description: The user holds their arm out with their palms flat at target, launching a powerful stream of water to push them back.
nodes.full_description: The user holds their arm out with their palms flat at target, launching a powerful stream of water to push them back.

nodes.label: Water Release: Mouth Shot
nodes.description: A technique where the user spits out a single senbon-shaped droplet of water with high velocity which is hard to avoid. Once the droplet hits anything, it forcefully bursts and hurts the target. While the technique lacks the force to seriously endang...
nodes.full_description:
A technique where the user spits out a single senbon-shaped droplet of water with high velocity which is hard to avoid. Once the droplet hits anything, it forcefully bursts and hurts the target. While the technique lacks the force to seriously endanger somebody, it can be used to weaken enemies while they are distracted.

See Also[]
Heavenly Weeping
Water Needle

nodes.label: Water Release: Lotus Light Rupture
nodes.description: The user creates drops of water from an outside source, which are then shaped into razor-sharp lotus petals. As the petals expand in size and spin around, emitting explosive energy in every direction, they are launched at the opponent. The petals can...
nodes.full_description: The user creates drops of water from an outside source, which are then shaped into razor-sharp lotus petals. As the petals expand in size and spin around, emitting explosive energy in every direction, they are launched at the opponent. The petals can be controlled and are able to kill a man with a single petal. Hisen noted it to be his strongest technique.

nodes.label: Water Release: Infinite Sharks
nodes.description: Kisame creates an orb of water that releases countless water sharks that rapidly assault the opponent. If the orb is released underwater, the strength of the sharks is greatly enhanced and all of them colliding with the target will result in an enorm...
nodes.full_description:
Kisame creates an orb of water that releases countless water sharks that rapidly assault the opponent. If the orb is released underwater, the strength of the sharks is greatly enhanced and all of them colliding with the target will result in an enormous implosion.

See Also[]
Water Release: Four Sharks Rain

nodes.label: Water Release: Imminent Danger
nodes.description: The user generates a powerful stream of water that becomes a vortex able overwhelm several targets it hits. It is able to move with such sudden change in direction as to leave opponents disoriented as they struggle to anticipate it. Alternatively, th...
nodes.full_description:
The user generates a powerful stream of water that becomes a vortex able overwhelm several targets it hits. It is able to move with such sudden change in direction as to leave opponents disoriented as they struggle to anticipate it. Alternatively, the user is able to ride the technique, holding their sword and spinning with the vortex's rotation to launch a more lethal assault.

See Also[]
Tornado of Water
Water Release: Great Waterfall Technique

nodes.label: Water Release: Hiding in Water Technique
nodes.description: A technique that allows the user to fuse with water, even in water as shallow as a puddle.[1] By doing so, the user can take advantage of their hidden presence and launch a surprise attack on their target.
nodes.full_description: A technique that allows the user to fuse with water, even in water as shallow as a puddle.[1] By doing so, the user can take advantage of their hidden presence and launch a surprise attack on their target.

nodes.label: Water Release: Hydrification Exploding Funeral Technique
nodes.description: The user dissolves into a big pool of water, engulfing the opponent, then emerges from beneath the opponent's feet and explodes. As the user is able to turn their entire body into water, they do not sustain damage and are able to re-assemble after de...
nodes.full_description: The user dissolves into a big pool of water, engulfing the opponent, then emerges from beneath the opponent's feet and explodes. As the user is able to turn their entire body into water, they do not sustain damage and are able to re-assemble after detonation.

nodes.label: Water Release: Large Projectile
nodes.description:
When in Kaima Form, the user is able to attack with a giant blast of water by spitting it as a strong stream from their mouth.

References[]

↑ Naruto Collectible Card Game
nodes.full_description:
When in Kaima Form, the user is able to attack with a giant blast of water by spitting it as a strong stream from their mouth.

See Also[]

nodes.label: Water Release: Hail Barrage
nodes.description: This technique freezes water into twelve jagged chunks of hail.
nodes.full_description: This technique freezes water into twelve jagged chunks of hail.

nodes.label: Water Release: Hard Whirlpool Water Blade
nodes.description: The user makes the water under their opponent explode, launching them into the air. They then jump above them, creating a large whirlpool around their arm, striking the opponent with it and creating a large water explosion.
nodes.full_description: The user makes the water under their opponent explode, launching them into the air. They then jump above them, creating a large whirlpool around their arm, striking the opponent with it and creating a large water explosion.

nodes.label: Water Release: Hail
nodes.description:
Chino gathers water into large clumps in the shape of massive orb-like formations and then drops them from the sky on to her opponents. The attack covers a large range, making it difficult to dodge.

See Also[]
Sand Hail
nodes.full_description:
Chino gathers water into large clumps in the shape of massive orb-like formations and then drops them from the sky on to her opponents. The attack covers a large range, making it difficult to dodge.

See Also[]
Sand Hail

nodes.label: Water Release: Great Whirlpool Enfolding Technique
nodes.description: Kisame uses a nearby water supply to create a giant water vortex around his Samehada. Kisame wields the vortex as a weapon and then jumps above his opponent and uses his sword to smash the vortex into his targets causing massive damage.
nodes.full_description: Kisame uses a nearby water supply to create a giant water vortex around his Samehada. Kisame wields the vortex as a weapon and then jumps above his opponent and uses his sword to smash the vortex into his targets causing massive damage.

nodes.label: Water Release: Gunshot
nodes.description: The user creates water in their body using chakra. The user then spits the water from their mouth as orb-shaped projectiles, whose destructive potential are determined by how much chakra is placed in them. The orbs travel quickly towards the target, ...
nodes.full_description:
The user creates water in their body using chakra. The user then spits the water from their mouth as orb-shaped projectiles, whose destructive potential are determined by how much chakra is placed in them. The orbs travel quickly towards the target, dealing extensive damage upon impact. When Gamabunta uses this technique, the water orbs are not only especially large, but are made more lethal because they're shot while he's airborne, thereby adding the force of gravity to their power.[1]

See Also[]
Starch Syrup Gun
References[]

↑ 1.0 1.1 Tō no Sho, page 238

↑ Naruto Collectible Card Game

↑ Naruto: Ultimate Ninja Online

nodes.label: Water Release: Great Waterfall Technique
nodes.description: A large volume of water is directed from a preexisting source or expelled high into the air from the mouth; to manipulate so much water at once requires a great deal of chakra. Once high enough, it cascades down onto the targeted area, resembling a g...
nodes.full_description:
A large volume of water is directed from a preexisting source or expelled high into the air from the mouth; to manipulate so much water at once requires a great deal of chakra. Once high enough, it cascades down onto the targeted area, resembling a giant waterfall. The force of this waterfall is great enough to hollow out the ground, washing away everything in the area. In the aftermath, whatever remains will appear devastated, as though some sort of natural disaster has just occurred.[1]

References[]

↑ 1.0 1.1 Rin no Sho, page 201

nodes.label: Water Release: Great Water Drill
nodes.description: Kisame coats Samehada in water, and forms it into the shape of a drill. After drilling the opponent into the ground the water spreads out into a tsunami that drenches the battlefield.
nodes.full_description: Kisame coats Samehada in water, and forms it into the shape of a drill. After drilling the opponent into the ground the water spreads out into a tsunami that drenches the battlefield.

nodes.label: Water Release: Great Waterfall Flow Technique
nodes.description: By mixing a source of water with chakra, the user can create a whirlpool of differentiating sizes in order to drown their opponent.
nodes.full_description: By mixing a source of water with chakra, the user can create a whirlpool of differentiating sizes in order to drown their opponent.

nodes.label: Water Release: Great Water Mass Bullet
nodes.description: Isobu, or Yagura while taking on its form, releases water balls of varying size. These large water projectiles are also powerful enough to destroy an entire cliff side.
nodes.full_description: Isobu, or Yagura while taking on its form, releases water balls of varying size. These large water projectiles are also powerful enough to destroy an entire cliff side.

nodes.label: Water Release: Great Water Arm Technique: Half-Moon Cut
nodes.description: Suigetsu enlarges his arm muscles by using the Water Release: Great Water Arm Technique, then proceeds to use Kubikiribōchō to deliver a straight cut to the opponent, followed up by a moonslice that causes water to erupt from the ground.
nodes.full_description: Suigetsu enlarges his arm muscles by using the Water Release: Great Water Arm Technique, then proceeds to use Kubikiribōchō to deliver a straight cut to the opponent, followed up by a moonslice that causes water to erupt from the ground.

nodes.label: Water Release: Great Water Arm Technique
nodes.description: By putting the Hydrification Technique into practical use, the muscles of the arm are temporarily enlarged and strengthened. Moisture is gathered from the whole body and compressed into the entire arm, like an instant pump-up. However, because it is ...
nodes.full_description: By putting the Hydrification Technique into practical use, the muscles of the arm are temporarily enlarged and strengthened. Moisture is gathered from the whole body and compressed into the entire arm, like an instant pump-up. However, because it is essential to properly control the moisture balance inside the body, this technique's degree of difficulty is very high. The technique gives the user superhuman strength, capable of breaking through both rock walls and steel doors with ease.

nodes.label: Water Release: Great Shark Bullet Technique
nodes.description:
The Water Release: Great Shark Bullet Technique is a stronger version of the Water Release: Water Shark Bullet Technique.

Usage[]
The user creates a gigantic shark out of water and, by thrusting both hands forward, sends it to attack the opponent. T...
nodes.full_description:
The Water Release: Great Shark Bullet Technique is a stronger version of the Water Release: Water Shark Bullet Technique.

Usage[]
The user creates a gigantic shark out of water and, by thrusting both hands forward, sends it to attack the opponent. This technique differs from the original, since this one is able to absorb the chakra from an opponent's technique and in turn, use that chakra to grow larger and more powerful. Therefore, the stronger the opponent's technique is, the stronger this technique will get.

nodes.label: Water Release: Great Gunshot
nodes.description: The user spits out a giant pressurised bullet of water from their mouth that goes through and damages the opponent as it hits them.
nodes.full_description: The user spits out a giant pressurised bullet of water from their mouth that goes through and damages the opponent as it hits them.

nodes.label: Water Release: Furious Roaring Tornado
nodes.description:
The user draws on nearby water sources to create a large waterspout, capable of tearing through an area with ease. The user must be inside the waterspout in order to control it.

See Also[]
Tornado of Water
Water Release: Great Waterfall Technique
Wa...
