nodes.label: Water Release: Great Exploding Water Colliding Wave
nodes.description: This technique is a larger version of the Water Release: Exploding Water Colliding Wave. With it, the user spews out a massive amount of water, covering an entire area with a ferocious tsunami. The produced ocean of water can be used for further tech...
nodes.full_description: This technique is a larger version of the Water Release: Exploding Water Colliding Wave. With it, the user spews out a massive amount of water, covering an entire area with a ferocious tsunami. The produced ocean of water can be used for further techniques, and even gathered into a gigantic water prison, allowing Kisame to use his Water Prison Shark Dance Technique.

nodes.label: Water Release: Four Sharks Rain
nodes.description: Kisame slams his palm onto a nearby water surface, sending a large surge of water into the air. This water then forms into a group of four water sharks, which then rush towards the target from above. Should these sharks be attacked, the water that co...
nodes.full_description: Kisame slams his palm onto a nearby water surface, sending a large surge of water into the air. This water then forms into a group of four water sharks, which then rush towards the target from above. Should these sharks be attacked, the water that composes them simply reforms into countless droplet-sized sharks, which continue to rain down upon the target and inflict damage whenever they come into contact with them.

nodes.label: Water Release: Five Gluttonous Sharks
nodes.description: Kisame slashes a body of water, creating a pillar of water that launches the opponent into the air. He then releases five water sharks that attack the opponent until one devours them before imploding, launching the opponent into the air. The remainin...
nodes.full_description: Kisame slashes a body of water, creating a pillar of water that launches the opponent into the air. He then releases five water sharks that attack the opponent until one devours them before imploding, launching the opponent into the air. The remaining water sharks surround the opponent and force them under water where they implode in on them.

nodes.label: Water Release: Five Feeding Sharks
nodes.description: The user puts their hand on the surface of a body of water and from the tips of five fingers, chakra is released into the water, changing it into the form of five ferocious sharks. The sharks circle the target with high speed, creating a raging strea...
nodes.full_description:
The user puts their hand on the surface of a body of water and from the tips of five fingers, chakra is released into the water, changing it into the form of five ferocious sharks. The sharks circle the target with high speed, creating a raging stream that takes away their prey's freedom of movement and their sharp teeth tear into the enemy with each consecutive attack. In the anime, these sharks can regenerate from surrounding water, making them difficult to destroy.

References[]

↑ Sha no Sho, page 271

nodes.label: Water Release: Falling Rain Needles
nodes.description: By using the existing rain around them, the user infuses their chakra into the individual raindrops, sharpening them into ultra-thin needles to fall down and skew their targets. Because of its minuscule nature and how they blend in with the rest of t...
nodes.full_description:
By using the existing rain around them, the user infuses their chakra into the individual raindrops, sharpening them into ultra-thin needles to fall down and skew their targets. Because of its minuscule nature and how they blend in with the rest of the rain, it is hard for a person to discern the true nature of this technique without prior knowledge.

See also[]
Heavenly Weeping
Thousand Flying Water Needles of Death
Water Release: Hail

nodes.label: Water Release: Exploding Water Colliding Wave
nodes.description: The user spits out a great volume of water from their mouth, swallowing up and crushing the enemy with the advancing surge. The user can ride the wave, allowing them to move at high speed, and attack the enemy, now swept off their feet. The amount of...
nodes.full_description:
The user spits out a great volume of water from their mouth, swallowing up and crushing the enemy with the advancing surge. The user can ride the wave, allowing them to move at high speed, and attack the enemy, now swept off their feet. The amount of water created is proportional to the amount of chakra used; when used with Kisame's enormous chakra, even a dry wasteland can become a small ocean. Afterwards, the excess water can be used for additional Water Release techniques.
In the anime, Nagato seemingly used this technique, through the Deva Path, covering a small valley by punching the ground causing water to gush out of it instead of spewing it out of his mouth.[2] Similarly, Isari caused the water waves to form around him after forming the hand seals, instead of expelling it from his mouth.[3]

References[]

↑ Sha no Sho, page 272

↑ Naruto: Shippūden episode 167

↑ Boruto episode 234

nodes.description: Utakata blows several bubbles at his opponent, stunning them, ending it with a single great bubble. Upon the great bubble bursting, it turns into several smaller bubbles, which coalesce into an even great bubble on top of his opponent, and floors the...
nodes.full_description: Utakata blows several bubbles at his opponent, stunning them, ending it with a single great bubble. Upon the great bubble bursting, it turns into several smaller bubbles, which coalesce into an even great bubble on top of his opponent, and floors them.

nodes.full_description: Utakata strikes his opponent using his bubble pipe, followed by two empty-handed swipes, and finishes it with a volley of bubbles.

nodes.full_description: Transformed as Saiken, Utakata swipes one of his tails at his opponent, followed by two shots of corrosive alkali, and finishes it with a volley of bubbles.

nodes.full_description: Utakata transforms into Saiken and spews popping bubbles at the opponent, finishing with a Tailed Beast Ball.

nodes.label: Water Release: Bubbles Technique — Drift
nodes.description: Utakata creates a single, particularly large bubble with his bubble pipe and quickly jumps inside. Under his command, the bubble will take him wherever he wishes. It's seemingly very capable of both travelling very long distances and floating rather ...
nodes.full_description: Utakata creates a single, particularly large bubble with his bubble pipe and quickly jumps inside. Under his command, the bubble will take him wherever he wishes. It's seemingly very capable of both travelling very long distances and floating rather high into the air with no apparent risk of popping. Utakata can also make the bubble camouflage to hide from anyone who's after him. Utakata is also able to take people with him via this technique. Smaller bubbles were seen floating casually alongside it, whereas the first time it was shown, it was just the one bubble. Upon bursting the bubble to get out of it, Utakata can use it do damage nearby opponents.

nodes.label: Water Release: Bubbles Technique — Combo
nodes.description: Utakata jumps up in the air and blows six bubbles, four miniature and two large ones. The first five merely stun his opponent, and the last one knocks them far back.
nodes.full_description: Utakata jumps up in the air and blows six bubbles, four miniature and two large ones. The first five merely stun his opponent, and the last one knocks them far back.

nodes.label: Water Release: Black Rain Technique
nodes.description: This technique creates a flammable black mist that forms a small cloud. The user can then move the cloud above their target and disperse it, covering the target in flammable oil. This technique was first used to burn down Idate Morino's boat, after i...
nodes.full_description: This technique creates a flammable black mist that forms a small cloud. The user can then move the cloud above their target and disperse it, covering the target in flammable oil. This technique was first used to burn down Idate Morino's boat, after it was lit with fire.

nodes.label: Water Release: Bubbles Technique — Broad Defence
nodes.description: Utakata uses his Soap Bubble Ninjutsu to create a dome around himself and his allies. This dome is shown to be strong enough to resist large explosions.
nodes.full_description: Utakata uses his Soap Bubble Ninjutsu to create a dome around himself and his allies. This dome is shown to be strong enough to resist large explosions.

nodes.label: Water Release: Bubbles Technique
nodes.description: After blowing dozens of bubbles, the user manipulates them to surround the enemy in all directions. Only the slightest amount of physical contact with an opponent is required to make these bubbles burst, resulting in a small but powerful explosion wh...
nodes.full_description: After blowing dozens of bubbles, the user manipulates them to surround the enemy in all directions. Only the slightest amount of physical contact with an opponent is required to make these bubbles burst, resulting in a small but powerful explosion when they do. The user can then make them entirety detonate simultaneously with a snap of their fingers.

nodes.label: Water Release: Blood Conversion Technique
nodes.description: The user extracts all the blood in their target to convert into pure water, causing the victims to shrivel into dry husks which results in their immediate death. This technique is useful if there are no nearby sources of water to perform ninjutsu. If...
nodes.full_description: The user extracts all the blood in their target to convert into pure water, causing the victims to shrivel into dry husks which results in their immediate death. This technique is useful if there are no nearby sources of water to perform ninjutsu. If the user's body is in a weakened state resulted in a severe lack of water, they can use this technique to revitalise themselves.

nodes.label: Water Release: Azure Dragon Palm
nodes.description: Ao dashes towards his opponent pushing his hands forward and when his hands come in contact with them, he unleashes a spiralling torrent of water.
nodes.full_description: Ao dashes towards his opponent pushing his hands forward and when his hands come in contact with them, he unleashes a spiralling torrent of water.

The user simply creates a jet of water that can be used to extinguish fire.

nodes.label: Water Release Genjutsu: Demonic Phantom Fog Prison
nodes.description: After Kandachi performs the necessary hand seals, the Conch King opens its shell and releases a mist that puts the opponent under a genjutsu. In the genjutsu, the Conch King licks the opponent until they're frozen, which results in the opponent being...
nodes.full_description:
After Kandachi performs the necessary hand seals, the Conch King opens its shell and releases a mist that puts the opponent under a genjutsu. In the genjutsu, the Conch King licks the opponent until they're frozen, which results in the opponent being overcome with fear and going into a mental breakdown in a matter of time. The power of the genjutsu was greatly increased by the magnetic forces of the trees surrounding the swamp they were in.

References[]

↑ Naruto Collectible Card Game

nodes.label: Water Release: A Thousand Feeding Sharks
nodes.description: A much more powerful version of the Water Release: Five Feeding Sharks, where the user creates one thousand sharks out of water that replicates a giant wave to swarm down and attack the opponent.
nodes.full_description: A much more powerful version of the Water Release: Five Feeding Sharks, where the user creates one thousand sharks out of water that replicates a giant wave to swarm down and attack the opponent.

nodes.label: Water Release Bullet: Orca
nodes.description: The user sends a huge surge of water crashing down onto the enemy, which restricts their movements, given the intensity and pressure of the waves produced.
nodes.full_description: The user sends a huge surge of water crashing down onto the enemy, which restricts their movements, given the intensity and pressure of the waves produced.

nodes.label: Water Release: Angry Bitter Rain
nodes.description: After water has been shot into the air, such as with the Water Release: Water Bullet Technique, this jutsu turns the water black. When the black water falls on a target it clings to their body and covers their eyes, blocking their vision. Because of ...
nodes.full_description: After water has been shot into the air, such as with the Water Release: Water Bullet Technique, this jutsu turns the water black. When the black water falls on a target it clings to their body and covers their eyes, blocking their vision. Because of the name ("doku" meaning "poison"), victims are intended to believe the water is poisonous. In truth the water is harmless, and the name is only meant to distract victims long enough for the user to follow up with another attack and/or escape.

nodes.label: Water Prison Technique
nodes.description: This technique traps a target in a sphere of water; the water can either be drawn from the surroundings[2] or expelled from the user's mouth.[3] The water that the sphere is made from is noticeably heavy,[2] which restricts the target's movements and...
nodes.full_description:
This technique traps a target in a sphere of water; the water can either be drawn from the surroundings[2] or expelled from the user's mouth.[3] The water that the sphere is made from is noticeably heavy,[2] which restricts the target's movements and can make breathing difficult.[4] As such, those trapped within the water prison cannot ordinarily escape on their own. Neji Hyūga was able to free himself by simultaneously releasing chakra from all of his tenketsu, destroying the prison.[5] In Akatsuki Hiden, Kisame Hoshigaki escaped by increasing the volume of water within the prison beyond what it could contain, causing it to burst.
In order to maintain the prison, users must stay in contact with the sphere, typically by keeping an arm submerged within it. For this reason, water clones can be used in combination with water prisons, either by having the water clone attack other targets while the user maintains the prison,[6] or by having the clones themselves form the prisons, leaving the user free to act. In cases where a water clone forms the water prison, the water of the clone's body can be used as a source for the prison.[4] In the anime, this contact is shown to not be necessary, allowing users to trap targets from a distance,[7] and can draw in other people to trap upon contact with it.[8]
The water prison's usefulness has caused it to be adapted for other purposes. It can be stored in scrolls, trapping anyone who tries to read their contents without permission.[9] Alternatively, users can confine themselves within a water prison, thus preventing opponents from reaching them.[3]

nodes.label: Water Prison Shark Dance Technique
nodes.description: After using the Water Release: Great Exploding Water Colliding Wave, Kisame forms the water into a gigantic prison. Because he acts as the centre of the dome of water, the dome alters its position in order to reflect the direction of his movements, m...
nodes.full_description:
After using the Water Release: Great Exploding Water Colliding Wave, Kisame forms the water into a gigantic prison. Because he acts as the centre of the dome of water, the dome alters its position in order to reflect the direction of his movements, making it difficult for his target to escape as long as he continues his pursuit.
Fusing with Samehada provides Kisame a tremendous advantage. This fused form grants him the ability to breathe underwater while his target continues to drown as they attempt to futilely escape the large body of water. This technique is extremely effective in one on one fights, but the user would probably not be able to contain two enemies fleeing in opposite directions.

References[]

↑ Fourth Databook, page 262

nodes.label: Water Prison Bead Binding Technique

nodes.full_description: After thrusting their palm out, the user creates a large bubble in front of them, which then disperse into smaller Water Prison Technique traps when targets are near enough to it.

nodes.full_description: Tobirama attacks the opponent with a combination of taijutsu and Water Release. He begins with a simple punch followed by three kicks and then lifting the opponent into the air where with his mastery of the Water Release, Tobirama materialises from his palm, a blade of water that he uses to blast the opponent through the air.

nodes.label: Water Needle
nodes.description: Using the chakra control granted by the Gentle Fist, Hinata concentrates her chakra until water vortexes are created around her. Those vortexes shoot water blasts which turn to needle-like water. By using Byakugan, this technique can be used with gre...
nodes.full_description: Using the chakra control granted by the Gentle Fist, Hinata concentrates her chakra until water vortexes are created around her. Those vortexes shoot water blasts which turn to needle-like water. By using Byakugan, this technique can be used with great precision to hit very small targets such as bees.

nodes.full_description: Gengetsu creates a barrage of water bullets and sends them at the opponent. Then he forms one big water bullet and shoots the opponent with it.

nodes.label: Water Gun: Two Guns
nodes.description:

nodes.label: Water Droplet Reflection Sight
nodes.description: By dilating her pupils, Yome is able to track down enemies via the reflection on tiny water droplets. According to Sen, once Yome has fixated her sight, her visual range reaches several dozen kilometres. Yome can also use this ability to augment her ...
nodes.full_description:
By dilating her pupils, Yome is able to track down enemies via the reflection on tiny water droplets. According to Sen, once Yome has fixated her sight, her visual range reaches several dozen kilometres. Yome can also use this ability to augment her evasion-skills during combat.
Downsides of this technique are the evaporation of water droplets caused by the sun, which complicates the usage of the technique and shortens its period of time and her sensitivity towards blinding light, for example caused by a flash bomb.

nodes.label: Water Clone Technique
nodes.description: This technique originates from Kirigakure.[2] Using water from the surroundings, the user creates one or more copies of themselves. Unlike the standard Clone Technique, these water clones are physically real, allowing them to interact with others and...
nodes.full_description:
This technique originates from Kirigakure.[2] Using water from the surroundings, the user creates one or more copies of themselves. Unlike the standard Clone Technique, these water clones are physically real, allowing them to interact with others and even perform the same jutsu as the user. Although a single water clone can be quite challenging to a standard genin,[1] water clones only have about a tenth of their user's strength. When a water clone is sufficiently damaged, it will revert back into water.[3] In the anime, the clones can alternatively disperse into a mist that act as a smokescreen to briefly covers the area.[4]
Water clones cannot travel too far from their user's location, meaning that running away is a viable option against them.[5] This aside, water clones are useful as support and diversions.[1] The clones can even be used as mobile bodies of water, through which the user can perform their other water-based jutsu; when this is done, the user will need to perform the necessary hand seals.[6]

See Also[]
Bubble Clone Technique
References[]

↑ 1.0 1.1 1.2 Rin no Sho, page 224

↑ Naruto chapter 142, page 10

↑ Naruto chapter 23, page 3

↑ Boruto episode 165

↑ Naruto chapter 14, page 6

↑ Naruto chapter 257, pages 15-16

nodes.full_description: Nurari is able to manipulate the strange liquid from his special suit. He is able to contort his body in various ways and even summon extra limbs. Nurari is able to shed layers of his suit, making him immune to techniques like Parasitic Destruction Insect Technique and also seems to be able to manipulate the liquid's viscosity and stickiness. He can extract this liquid in the form of projectiles to throw at his opponents in order to trap them, incapacitate them, or to pin them down. He can also form the membrane into barriers in order to nullify incoming projectile attacks.

nodes.label: Vanishing Facial Copy Technique
nodes.description:
This article is about the technique used by Orochimaru. For the technique used by the Kedōin Clan, see Face Copying Technique.




The user applies their hand to a target's face, allowing them to take the face and use it as their own. Because it's th...
nodes.full_description:
This article is about the technique used by Orochimaru. For the technique used by the Kedōin Clan, see Face Copying Technique.




The user applies their hand to a target's face, allowing them to take the face and use it as their own. Because it's the actual face that they're using and not a disguise, the user runs no risk of being discovered due to imperfections or minor flaws. The bodies of those whose faces have been stolen are, as a consequence, quite ghastly to look upon.[1] After Orochimaru uses this technique to take the face of a Kusagakure-nin, his voice changes as well, though it's not clear if that's part of this technique. As he takes damage in combat, the stolen face gradually wrinkles before finally tearing away, revealing Orochimaru's face underneath.[2] Orochimaru can also remove the face himself when he no longer needs it.[3]

nodes.full_description:
The user gathers a large quantity of chakra to rapidly regenerate any damage done to the body.

Usage[]
Mukade utilises this technique with his unlimited resource of Ryūmyaku chakra, repairing any and all damage done to his puppet body, and resealing his ultimate form's weak point should it be exposed, allowing him to recover from fatal wounds and severe chakra drainage. So long as he has enough chakra, he is near immortal.

See Also[]

Creation Rebirth
Yin Healing Wound Destruction

nodes.full_description: Using his chakra, Gaara gathers the densest minerals in the soil, compresses their size, and then mixes them together. The resulting sand is formed into a protective shield in front of Gaara, shaped to resemble a miniature Shukaku, the "Incarnation of Sand" (砂の化身, Suna no Keshin). The Shukaku shield, because of how meticulously it's constructed, is incredibly strong, to the point that not even the Dance of the Clematis: Flower can penetrate it.[1]

The Spear of Shukaku is the attack counterpart of the Shield of Shukaku. Like the shield, Gaara crushes the hardest materials from the ground using sand, this time in the form of a halberd, in the shape of the Shukaku's hand. Just like the shield which has yet to find anything that could break its defence, the halberd has yet to find a defence that it can't break through.

nodes.description:
The Uchiha Style Kenjutsu (うちは流剣術, Uchiha Ryū Kenjutsu) is a unique style of kenjutsu developed and mastered by Sasuke Uchiha, who passed on the skill to his student Boruto. 
This style of kenjutsu utilizes moves similar to Japanese iai, where the en...
nodes.full_description:
The Uchiha Style Kenjutsu (うちは流剣術, Uchiha Ryū Kenjutsu) is a unique style of kenjutsu developed and mastered by Sasuke Uchiha, who passed on the skill to his student Boruto. 
This style of kenjutsu utilizes moves similar to Japanese iai, where the enemy is slashed at the same moment the user draws their sword from its sheath. 
Lightning Release chakra can also be used to coat the blade and increase its sharpness.[1]

References[]

↑ 1.0 1.1  Boruto Database: Uchiha Style Sword Techniques

As this reflection of an attack occurs both suddenly and unexpectedly, the reflected attack can prove difficult for opponents to evade.[1]

nodes.label: Uchiha Imprisonment Sealing
nodes.description: During the Warring States Period, the Uchiha clan would place seal tags surrounding where they are imprisoning their captives. If the prisoners were to touch the bars in their prison, they would catch fire. Any attempts at using ninjutsu would drain ...
nodes.full_description: During the Warring States Period, the Uchiha clan would place seal tags surrounding where they are imprisoning their captives. If the prisoners were to touch the bars in their prison, they would catch fire. Any attempts at using ninjutsu would drain the prisoner's chakra.

nodes.label: Uchiha Flame Formation
nodes.description: After manifesting small chakra flames on each finger of one hand, the user then slams their palm on the ground, resulting in the creation of a cylindrical barrier of flames enveloping a location of their choosing. Should the enemy come into contact w...
nodes.full_description:
After manifesting small chakra flames on each finger of one hand, the user then slams their palm on the ground, resulting in the creation of a cylindrical barrier of flames enveloping a location of their choosing. Should the enemy come into contact with the barrier's exterior, they will be quickly set ablaze.
This powerful barrier uses the ground as catalyst to keep burning while using only a small amount of chakra. The flames are powerful enough to deflect a punch from the Eight-Tails.

See Also[]
Barrier Gate Five Seals Technique: Castle Closing Eight Gates
Four Red Yang Formation
Four Violet Flames Formation
References[]

↑ Fourth Databook, page 234

nodes.label: Uchiha Blaze Sword: Fire Possession
nodes.description: The user breathes a fireball and then slices through the opponent with their sword.
nodes.full_description: The user breathes a fireball and then slices through the opponent with their sword.

nodes.label: Uchiha Cherry Blossom Thunderclap
nodes.description: Sasuke manifests his Complete Body Susanoo, striking the opponent with its sword, which launches several portions of the floor in the air. Sakura jumps between these floor portions to close the distance with the target, punching them back towards the...
nodes.full_description: Sasuke manifests his Complete Body Susanoo, striking the opponent with its sword, which launches several portions of the floor in the air. Sakura jumps between these floor portions to close the distance with the target, punching them back towards the ground. Sarada finishes it by landing a Chidori.

nodes.label: Typhoon Release: Consecutive Bursting Strong Winds
nodes.description:
A Typhoon Release technique used by Nowaki through his kekkei genkai.

Usage[]
After forming the necessary hand seals, he releases a storming vortex that can be used to simply limit his enemy's field of vision or do massive damage to his surroundings...
nodes.full_description:
A Typhoon Release technique used by Nowaki through his kekkei genkai.

Usage[]
After forming the necessary hand seals, he releases a storming vortex that can be used to simply limit his enemy's field of vision or do massive damage to his surroundings, mowing down anything around him. With effort he can increase the scale and intensity of the storm, being capable of covering an entire island.

nodes.label: Typhoon Rotating
nodes.description:
The user gathers wind to create a large tornado that swirls towards the opponent. The user can also form the tornado beneath the opponent.

See Also[]
Wind Release: Great Slashing Tornado
Wind Release: Great Task of the Dragon
nodes.full_description:
The user gathers wind to create a large tornado that swirls towards the opponent. The user can also form the tornado beneath the opponent.

See Also[]
Wind Release: Great Slashing Tornado
Wind Release: Great Task of the Dragon

nodes.label: Typhoon Water Vortex Technique
nodes.description: This cooperation ninjutsu uses the wild rotation of the thrown Wind Release: Rasengan to swallow up the water current created by the Water Release: Tearing Torrent, creating a large quantity of water vapour. Once invoked, a strong wind whirls around ...
nodes.full_description:
This cooperation ninjutsu uses the wild rotation of the thrown Wind Release: Rasengan to swallow up the water current created by the Water Release: Tearing Torrent, creating a large quantity of water vapour. Once invoked, a strong wind whirls around inside the highly concentrated mist, turning it into a solid barrier. The mist created by the violent rotation of the Rasengan also has the effect of taking away the enemy's field of vision. Of course, the mist can be used as a smokescreen when escaping, but the confusion it creates can also be used, for instance, to launch a surprise attack. If one can use multiple natures, it is possible to perform this technique alone.

See Also[]
Water Vortex Thunderclap
References[]

↑ Sha no Sho, page 252

nodes.label: Typhoon Flame Formation
nodes.description: Hagoromo surrounds himself in raging winds, which he promptly ignites.
nodes.full_description: Hagoromo surrounds himself in raging winds, which he promptly ignites.

nodes.label: Typhoon Release: Great Consecutive Bursting Extreme Winds
nodes.description: Nowaki summons a massive tornado, intense enough to not only dwarf Sasuke Uchiha's Complete Body — Susanoo, but to also be capable of forcing it to the defensive. Despite its power, the technique has an exploitable flaw. The user is left defenseless ...
nodes.full_description: Nowaki summons a massive tornado, intense enough to not only dwarf Sasuke Uchiha's Complete Body — Susanoo, but to also be capable of forcing it to the defensive. Despite its power, the technique has an exploitable flaw. The user is left defenseless at the eye of the storm. Should the enemy reach it, they can easily counter with a surprise attack.

nodes.label: Typhoon Impact
nodes.description:
Asura expels a gust of slashing wind that swirls towards the opponent.

See Also[]
Bashōsen: Coil of Wind
Sickle Weasel Technique
Wind Release: Great Sickle Weasel Technique
nodes.full_description:
Asura expels a gust of slashing wind that swirls towards the opponent.

See Also[]
Bashōsen: Coil of Wind
Sickle Weasel Technique
Wind Release: Great Sickle Weasel Technique

nodes.label: Two Calm Kusanagi
nodes.description: Sasuke first hits the opponent into the air. Orochimaru spits his Kusanagi to Sasuke, and it slashes the opponent on the way. Sasuke grabs the Kusanagi with his free hand and jumps towards the opponent, slicing them repeatedly with his and Orochimaru...
nodes.full_description: Sasuke first hits the opponent into the air. Orochimaru spits his Kusanagi to Sasuke, and it slashes the opponent on the way. Sasuke grabs the Kusanagi with his free hand and jumps towards the opponent, slicing them repeatedly with his and Orochimaru's swords.

nodes.label: Two-Tails Exploding Orbs
nodes.description: Matatabi creates large orbs of flame-like chakra, similar to the flame covering its body. It then manipulates these orbs in order to chase the enemy before they explode. Enemies hit by the explosions of one of these orbs will have their offensive cap...
nodes.full_description: Matatabi creates large orbs of flame-like chakra, similar to the flame covering its body. It then manipulates these orbs in order to chase the enemy before they explode. Enemies hit by the explosions of one of these orbs will have their offensive capabilities lowered for a time. This has only been shown used by a false Two-Tails.

nodes.label: Twisted Truth-Seeking
nodes.description: The user gathers their Truth-Seeking Balls to shape them into a drill to drill the opponent.
nodes.full_description: The user gathers their Truth-Seeking Balls to shape them into a drill to drill the opponent.

nodes.label: Two Rays of Light Among the Clouds
nodes.description: Ginkaku and Kinkaku stand on the front and back sides of the opponent, the former starting by releasing a fire ball with Bashōsen, following with the latter using the suction of Benihisago to kick the opponent and then finishing them by raising the o...
nodes.full_description: Ginkaku and Kinkaku stand on the front and back sides of the opponent, the former starting by releasing a fire ball with Bashōsen, following with the latter using the suction of Benihisago to kick the opponent and then finishing them by raising the opponent with earth through Bashōsen and channeling electricity through Shichiseiken, releasing an electric surge by slamming down on them.

nodes.label: Twinsword Technique: Cut to Pieces
nodes.description: Chōjūrō unleashes his Hiramekarei, forming a long-sword, with which he slices his opponent.
nodes.full_description: Chōjūrō unleashes his Hiramekarei, forming a long-sword, with which he slices his opponent.

nodes.label: Twinsword Technique: Crushing Hammer
nodes.description: Chōjūrō unleashes his Hiramekarei, forming a hammer, with which he attacks his opponent.
nodes.full_description: Chōjūrō unleashes his Hiramekarei, forming a hammer, with which he attacks his opponent.

nodes.label: Twinkling Maiden's Heart
nodes.description: Sakura smiles at her opponent before glaring and summoning her giant inner self. Inner Sakura yells "I'm speaking from the heart!" as she punches her opponent. The screen shatters, revealing it all to have been a genjutsu and Sakura herself punched h...
nodes.full_description: Sakura smiles at her opponent before glaring and summoning her giant inner self. Inner Sakura yells "I'm speaking from the heart!" as she punches her opponent. The screen shatters, revealing it all to have been a genjutsu and Sakura herself punched her opponent. The foe flies off into the distance. Sakura smiles and says "You should be nice to girls."

nodes.label: Twin Rising Dragons: Second Scroll
nodes.description: Tenten jumps in the air and opens her giant scroll, releasing a smoke dragon hiding a large number of weapons that she rains down on her opponent.
nodes.full_description: Tenten jumps in the air and opens her giant scroll, releasing a smoke dragon hiding a large number of weapons that she rains down on her opponent.

nodes.label: Twin Swift Rasengan
nodes.description: Firstly, Jiraiya performs a single Rasengan, deforming the ground. After a moment, while the first one is still in contact with the opponent, he creates a larger Rasengan and combines both of them. Due to the massive power, the slightly deformed grou...
nodes.full_description:
Firstly, Jiraiya performs a single Rasengan, deforming the ground. After a moment, while the first one is still in contact with the opponent, he creates a larger Rasengan and combines both of them. Due to the massive power, the slightly deformed ground gets destroyed.

See Also[]
Spiralling Serial Spheres

nodes.label: Twin Swallow Cut
nodes.description: Tenten repeatedly hits her opponent with a pair of tonfa, then strikes them into the air with a three-section staff which she separates to deliver a final blow to the falling opponent.
nodes.full_description: Tenten repeatedly hits her opponent with a pair of tonfa, then strikes them into the air with a three-section staff which she separates to deliver a final blow to the falling opponent.

nodes.label: Twin Snakes Mutual Death Technique
nodes.description: This technique was taught to Anko Mitarashi by Orochimaru. The user grabs one of their intended victim's hands and forces it to assist in performing the necessary hand seals. Once this is done, the user and the victim die, which Rin no Sho likens to ...
nodes.full_description: This technique was taught to Anko Mitarashi by Orochimaru. The user grabs one of their intended victim's hands and forces it to assist in performing the necessary hand seals. Once this is done, the user and the victim die, which Rin no Sho likens to a lovers' double-suicide.[1] It's not actually clear how death occurs because the technique has never been seen performed successfully: when Anko uses it on Orochimaru, she stabs his hand to hers to prevent him from escaping as she performs the hand seals. When she realises he's merely a shadow clone, the technique is aborted.[2] Naruto: One Decade, One Hundred Ninja illustrates this technique as two snakes coiling around Anko and Orochimaru.

nodes.label: Twin Rising Dragons
nodes.description:
The Twin Rising Dragons is a technique created by Tenten that takes advantage of her pinpoint accuracy.

Overview[]
Tenten places two scrolls on either side of her in an upright position. After completing the necessary hand signs, the scrolls rise up...
nodes.full_description:
The Twin Rising Dragons is a technique created by Tenten that takes advantage of her pinpoint accuracy.

Overview[]
Tenten places two scrolls on either side of her in an upright position. After completing the necessary hand signs, the scrolls rise up and spin around each other cloaked in smoke shaped like a dragon. When the smoke disperses, Tenten jumps in between the scrolls and starts to unseal and throw weapons at her opponent in quick succession. If her opponent deflects or dodges the attack, she can use the wire strings attached to the weapons to recover them for another attack.
During the time-skip, Tenten made some improvements to this technique. She no longer has to waste her time grabbing and throwing the weapons, as she can send them flying with just a movement of her hand. As such, she can unseal more weapons at a time, allowing her to attack at a much faster rate. She also adds explosive tags to her kunai to make her attacks more lethal.

nodes.label: Twin Metal Rods Shootdown
nodes.description: Tenten summons a twin-ended Wolf Teeth Mace that is the size of a human.
nodes.full_description: Tenten summons a twin-ended Wolf Teeth Mace that is the size of a human.

nodes.label: Twin Fangs Slash
nodes.description: Using their Kunai Blades, Izumo and Kotetsu attack the enemy from two sides and pierce them through.
nodes.full_description: Using their Kunai Blades, Izumo and Kotetsu attack the enemy from two sides and pierce them through.

nodes.label: Twin Pole Heavely Drop
nodes.description: After separating, Sakon and Ukon place themselves so that their opponent is in between them. They both lunge at the opponent, switching places and knocking them into the air. While the opponent is airborne, they jump into the air, and both grab an op...
nodes.full_description:
After separating, Sakon and Ukon place themselves so that their opponent is in between them. They both lunge at the opponent, switching places and knocking them into the air. While the opponent is airborne, they jump into the air, and both grab an opponent's arm. They then both spin rapidly until the opponent's head makes contact with the ground.

See Also[]
Front Lotus

nodes.label: Turning into a Frog Technique
nodes.description: By touching the forehead of a target and then, according to a mental image the user forms, the target changes into a tree frog. This is mainly used for  interrogating several prisoners of war. Seeing their comrades changed into a frog before their ey...
nodes.full_description: By touching the forehead of a target and then, according to a mental image the user forms, the target changes into a tree frog. This is mainly used for  interrogating several prisoners of war. Seeing their comrades changed into a frog before their eyes, the prisoners of war will cave in, becoming what could be described as a "frog chorus", sonorously chanting information. This terrifying technique will, without a doubt, make an "information leak" open up.

nodes.label: Turbulent Four Seasons
nodes.description: Itachi and Shisui both attack their opponent with Fire Release: Great Dragon Fire Technique. Through the blazing fire, Itachi launches a barrage of kunai at them. Afterwards, Shisui appears behind the opponent, grabbing one of the kunai and in unison...
nodes.full_description: Itachi and Shisui both attack their opponent with Fire Release: Great Dragon Fire Technique. Through the blazing fire, Itachi launches a barrage of kunai at them. Afterwards, Shisui appears behind the opponent, grabbing one of the kunai and in unison with Itachi launch a flurry of attacks with a kunai each in hand.

nodes.label: Tsukuyomi
nodes.description:
Tsukuyomi is a Mangekyō Sharingan dōjutsu and one of the most powerful genjutsu in existence.[2] Said to represent the "Spiritual World and Darkness" (精神界と闇, Seishinkai to Yami), it is the antipode to Amaterasu.[1]

Contents

1 Overview
2

Tsukuyomi is a Mangekyō Sharingan dōjutsu and one of the most powerful genjutsu in existence.[2] Said to represent the "Spiritual World and Darkness" (精神界と闇, Seishinkai to Yami), it is the antipode to Amaterasu.[1]

nodes.label: Tsukuyomi Mode
nodes.description: This technique is a variation of Tsukuyomi, a high-level genjutsu. The user transforms the Tsukuyomi into a barrier that slows the opponent down. This does not happen physically but rather mentally. It makes the opponent think they are being held bac...
nodes.full_description: This technique is a variation of Tsukuyomi, a high-level genjutsu. The user transforms the Tsukuyomi into a barrier that slows the opponent down. This does not happen physically but rather mentally. It makes the opponent think they are being held back by a barrier. While using this technique, Itachi's health and chakra slowly drain.

nodes.label: Truth-Seeking: Sever
nodes.description: Obito forms two scythe-like weapons from the Truth-Seeking Balls to swipe at the opponent.
nodes.full_description: Obito forms two scythe-like weapons from the Truth-Seeking Balls to swipe at the opponent.

nodes.label: Truth-Seeking: Shining Deity
nodes.description: Obito forms four large interconnected arms that spin around shooting beams of chakra.
nodes.full_description: Obito forms four large interconnected arms that spin around shooting beams of chakra.

nodes.label: Tsuchigumo Style: Forbidden Life Technique Release: Creation of Heaven and Earth
nodes.description: This technique releases the seal on the Fury technique and then accumulates natural energy from the earth and atmosphere to be used for the technique. The bearer of the seal acts as a passive vessel, continuously gathering natural energy, which makes...
nodes.full_description: This technique releases the seal on the Fury technique and then accumulates natural energy from the earth and atmosphere to be used for the technique. The bearer of the seal acts as a passive vessel, continuously gathering natural energy, which makes it possible to use Fury without their cooperation.

nodes.label: Truth-Seeking: Saving Light
nodes.description: Obito fires a Truth-Seeking Ball at the opponent, which lights up and expands, releasing a large explosion. Once released, the ball returns to him.
nodes.full_description: Obito fires a Truth-Seeking Ball at the opponent, which lights up and expands, releasing a large explosion. Once released, the ball returns to him.

nodes.label: Tornado Rasengan
nodes.description: The Tornado Rasengan is a Rasengan formed from the released chakra of Kurama. The Rasengan formed is red similar to the Demon Fox Rasengan from Naruto the Movie: Legend of the Stone of Gelel, but with several streams of red chakra spiralling around t...
nodes.full_description: The Tornado Rasengan is a Rasengan formed from the released chakra of Kurama. The Rasengan formed is red similar to the Demon Fox Rasengan from Naruto the Movie: Legend of the Stone of Gelel, but with several streams of red chakra spiralling around the sphere. The Rasengan can then be further compressed giving the sphere more power.

nodes.label: Truth-Seeking: Pure Shadow
nodes.description: Obito encases himself in a Truth-Seeking Ball shelling, which he uses to hit the opponent numerous times.
nodes.full_description: Obito encases himself in a Truth-Seeking Ball shelling, which he uses to hit the opponent numerous times.

nodes.label: Truth-Seeking Umbrella
nodes.description: Obito uses a Truth-Seeking Ball to shape it into a spear-like weapon, impaling any far off opponents.
nodes.full_description: Obito uses a Truth-Seeking Ball to shape it into a spear-like weapon, impaling any far off opponents.

nodes.label: Tornado Lightning
nodes.description:
Tornado Lightning (旋風雷光撃, Torunēdo Raitoningu) is a technique utilised by Ranke by drawing energy from the Stone of Gelel.

Overview[]
With the power of the Stone of Gelel, Ranke generates electrical energy in her palms that she can whip around in or...
nodes.full_description:
Tornado Lightning (旋風雷光撃, Torunēdo Raitoningu) is a technique utilised by Ranke by drawing energy from the Stone of Gelel.

Overview[]
With the power of the Stone of Gelel, Ranke generates electrical energy in her palms that she can whip around in order to attack her opponent, capable of striking at various angles and tearing through rock and metal.

nodes.label: Tornado High
nodes.description: Boruto and a shadow clone string a series of attacks at an opponent, finishing by creating a small tornado that lifts the shadow clone as it performs an upper kick.
nodes.full_description: Boruto and a shadow clone string a series of attacks at an opponent, finishing by creating a small tornado that lifts the shadow clone as it performs an upper kick.

nodes.label: Torn Castle
nodes.description: Zabuza kicks his opponent, delivers some side slashes with Kubikiribōchō, kicks them once more, and finishes with a forward stab, knocking his opponent far back.
nodes.full_description: Zabuza kicks his opponent, delivers some side slashes with Kubikiribōchō, kicks them once more, and finishes with a forward stab, knocking his opponent far back.

nodes.label: Top Transformed Buddha
nodes.description: After creating a gigantic wooden statue that possesses hundreds or thousands of hands, the user utilises all of these hands simultaneously to deliver powerful blows to the target. Due to the sheer volume of the punches involved, defending against the...
nodes.full_description:
After creating a gigantic wooden statue that possesses hundreds or thousands of hands, the user utilises all of these hands simultaneously to deliver powerful blows to the target. Due to the sheer volume of the punches involved, defending against the entirety of them is nearly impossible. This can be used as a one-shot technique, increasing its destructive power but also resulting in the hands behind the statue's back being destroyed. Afterwards, Hashirama discards the back of the statue to increase the mobility of the True Several Thousand Hands statue. It can also be used more conservatively as seen in Tobi's usage, preventing the hands from being destroyed and enabling another usage of the technique, but results in less destructive power.

Contents

1 Influence
2

nodes.label: Torii Seal
nodes.description:
When Naruto first obtained Nine-Tails Chakra Mode, his previous seal's outward appearance had changed into a shape of a magatama, along with a swirl design that resembled Uzushiogakure's symbol.[1]
By using the seal's key, he can create several massi...
nodes.full_description:
When Naruto first obtained Nine-Tails Chakra Mode, his previous seal's outward appearance had changed into a shape of a magatama, along with a swirl design that resembled Uzushiogakure's symbol.[1]
By using the seal's key, he can create several massive interlocking torii that can even immobilise and imprison Kurama with ease. Naruto then isolated Kurama's chakra in another part of him away from the fox itself in between four torii, so he could access it freely.[2] It was later revealed that Kurama isn't always bound by the torii and has freedom of movement behind its cage, but Naruto can enter the cage without breaking the seal and still manipulate the torii to immobilise the fox if he wants.[3]


The seal's outward appearance on the Nine-Tails Chakra Mode's shroud.The seal's outward appearance on the Tailed Beast Mode's shroud.

nodes.label: Tongue Tooth Sticky Acid
nodes.description: Katsuyu releases an acidic paste from the mouth that, because of Katsuyu's size and height, is spread over a wide area. The acid's concentration and density is great enough to melt stone. Katsuyu requires no preparation to perform this technique, all...
nodes.full_description: Katsuyu releases an acidic paste from the mouth that, because of Katsuyu's size and height, is spread over a wide area. The acid's concentration and density is great enough to melt stone. Katsuyu requires no preparation to perform this technique, allowing it to be used instantly, which in turn means that targets have no opportunity to dodge.[1]

nodes.label: Toad Three Slashes
nodes.description: The user coats their weapon with chakra and swings it at the target, releasing three sharp crescent-like waves.
nodes.full_description: The user coats their weapon with chakra and swings it at the target, releasing three sharp crescent-like waves.

nodes.label: Tonton Combo
nodes.description: Shizune transforms Tonton into a copy of herself who uses chakra scalpels to stun their opponent. Tonton changes back and jumps up as Shizune slices though the opponent, side-to-side with two chakra scalpels herself. However, she caught the tip of To...
nodes.full_description: Shizune transforms Tonton into a copy of herself who uses chakra scalpels to stun their opponent. Tonton changes back and jumps up as Shizune slices though the opponent, side-to-side with two chakra scalpels herself. However, she caught the tip of Tonton's tail while the pig was doing a flip; the opponent collapses. Shizune then notices Tonton's tail is burning and begins healing her as an angry Tonton repeatedly hits her.

nodes.label: Toad Sword Beheading
nodes.description: A toad, using its naturally strong hips and legs, leaps precisely at a target. Toads can cover a great distance by doing this, shifting from a remote location to close range suddenly in order to catch targets off guard. The toad then just as quickly ...
nodes.full_description: A toad, using its naturally strong hips and legs, leaps precisely at a target. Toads can cover a great distance by doing this, shifting from a remote location to close range suddenly in order to catch targets off guard. The toad then just as quickly swings with their sword, before the target can react, shifting the power of their leap into the strike. When used by Gamabunta, the slash is powerful enough to sever the arm of Shukaku's Tailed Beast Mode.[1]

nodes.label: Toad Spying Technique
nodes.description: Koji links with his artificial toad to access their point of view, seeing and hearing everything around the toad. This can be done via special software or through Koji directly, in which the latter case his pupils will become toad-like. It allows for...
nodes.full_description:
Koji links with his artificial toad to access their point of view, seeing and hearing everything around the toad. This can be done via special software or through Koji directly, in which the latter case his pupils will become toad-like. It allows for more discreet surveillance and intel gathering. He can also use two toads to communicate with others if one is left with the person they are in contact with. The connection can even be maintained between separate dimensions.[1][2]

See Also[]
Dragon Spying Technique
Insect Spying Technique
Snake Spying Technique
References[]

↑ Boruto episode 204

↑ Boruto: Two Blue Vortex chapter 3, pages 39-41

nodes.label: Time-Release Technique
nodes.description: By placing a mark on a person in a ritualistic method, this technique will activate as timed even if the person is tortured or put under a trance. This is meant to catch an enemy when their guard is down. Sai mentions that this is used as a last reso...
nodes.full_description:
By placing a mark on a person in a ritualistic method, this technique will activate as timed even if the person is tortured or put under a trance. This is meant to catch an enemy when their guard is down. Sai mentions that this is used as a last resort technique by the Anbu, and as such, is rare; Sakura likens it to a living time bomb. When Kakashi Hatake requested Tsunade to use it on him, the technique would activate Kakashi's Mangekyō Sharingan technique, the Kamui, upon Hiruko's attempt to assimilate him.

See Also[]
Transcription Seal: Amaterasu
Transcription Seal: Izanagi

nodes.label: Toad Oil Bullet
nodes.description: The user converts their chakra into an extremely sticky oil and spits it out as a huge mass or as a barrage of small bullets. Those caught by it will find it difficult to move, and simply washing the oil away with regular water won't be easy. Further...
nodes.full_description:
The user converts their chakra into an extremely sticky oil and spits it out as a huge mass or as a barrage of small bullets. Those caught by it will find it difficult to move, and simply washing the oil away with regular water won't be easy. Furthermore, if a Fire Release technique is launched at the target after this technique is used, they will be enveloped in flames in an instant.

Reference[]

↑ Sha no Sho, page 239

nodes.label: Time Reversal Technique
nodes.description: This technique is used by the Anbu to pull out forgotten memories. After forming the appropriate hand seals, the Anbu will put the target into a state of reverse hypnosis, allowing them to remember details that they otherwise would not. The target wi...
nodes.full_description:
This technique is used by the Anbu to pull out forgotten memories. After forming the appropriate hand seals, the Anbu will put the target into a state of reverse hypnosis, allowing them to remember details that they otherwise would not. The target will comply with interrogation, but seems to retain his or her personality while under hypnosis. For example, when the Anbu used this technique to bring back Naruto's memories about his conversations with Gennō, Naruto was more specific about the ramen he shared with the old man rather than their conversations, which the Anbu were asking about.
The technique was also used, without success, by Mitate to attempt to reverse Menma's amnesia. Menma's memories eventually returned without the aid of the Time Reversal Technique after the Konoha hospital was struck by lightning.

References[]

↑ Naruto Collectible Card Game

nodes.label: Toad Flatness — Shadow Manipulation Technique
nodes.description: The user first infuses a target's shadow with their own chakra. The user then flattens themselves to paper-like thinness and merges with the target's shadow, giving them complete control over the target's mind and body. The user must hold their breat...
nodes.full_description:
The user first infuses a target's shadow with their own chakra. The user then flattens themselves to paper-like thinness and merges with the target's shadow, giving them complete control over the target's mind and body. The user must hold their breath in order to maintain this control.[1] Jiraiya uses this technique on Ryūsui with the intention of exploring Amegakure and gathering intel, but he is quickly spotted by Konan speaking to a toad. Although Konan immediately knows that it's Jiraiya because of what she overhears, she focuses her attacks on Ryūsui's body, evidently believing him to be Jiraiya in disguise despite her prior knowledge of this technique.[2] In this way, the controlled body is useful as a shield,[1] and while it's taking attacks meant for the user, the user is able to prepare their own attacks unnoticed.[2]
To release this technique, users inhale deeply, causing their body to inflate back to its normal thickness.[1] Their targets simultaneously regain control of their body and senses, with no apparent memory of what happened while they were being controlled.[3]

nodes.label: Toad Smoke Technique
nodes.description:
The user produces a burst of a smoke from their body, forming a thick smokescreen to mask their movements. It can also produce a denser smoke within shaped like the user for an additional distraction.

See Also[]
Destroying Smell Smoke Prison
nodes.full_description:
The user produces a burst of a smoke from their body, forming a thick smokescreen to mask their movements. It can also produce a denser smoke within shaped like the user for an additional distraction.

See Also[]
Destroying Smell Smoke Prison

nodes.label: Tight Binding Golden Chain Technique
nodes.description:
These chains formed by a member of the Uzumaki clan are used offensively rather than the ones used for sealing purposes.

Contents

1 Usage
2

nodes.label: Time Reservoir
nodes.description: A member of the Ōtsutsuki clan can manipulate the mental space of an individual to send their conscience to a certain point back in time. The user creates a doorway which will enable an indictable to travel to the past. The individual sent back in ti...
nodes.full_description:
A member of the Ōtsutsuki clan can manipulate the mental space of an individual to send their conscience to a certain point back in time. The user creates a doorway which will enable an indictable to travel to the past. The individual sent back in time can only observe past events, they can not interfere or make changes. However, under three conditions, the individual can be sent back in time, both mentally and physically:

The user must use an unstable space that could control the principles of time, such as the genjutsu Tsukuyomi.
The technique must be performed on the night of a full moon, in order for there to be a natural ley line flowing through the earth.
The individual being sent back must have an object that has a strong connection between them and the person they are looking for in the past, containing both their chakra mixed together.
Once these conditions are met, the user can perform the time travel. The individual sent back only has a limited amount of time in the past before they are returned to their original time. If they make any changes in the past, events in the future will change and the individual will not have any recollection of their time in the past.

nodes.label: Thunderswords Technique: Remote Control
nodes.description: This technique allows the user to manipulate Kiba independently from afar. This allows the user to keep their hands free for combat and also attack from multiple angles at once. The user can also manipulate the blades to strike in a variety of manner...
nodes.full_description: This technique allows the user to manipulate Kiba independently from afar. This allows the user to keep their hands free for combat and also attack from multiple angles at once. The user can also manipulate the blades to strike in a variety of manners.

Ranke collects a large amount of lightning energy into her hand using the Gelel source in her body, balls her hand into a fist...
nodes.full_description:
Thunder Sabre (雷光衝破突, Sandā Sāburu) is a technique utilised by Ranke by drawing energy from the Stone of Gelel.

Overview[]
Ranke collects a large amount of lightning energy into her hand using the Gelel source in her body, balls her hand into a fist and strikes at her opponent. It was powerful enough to punch through Gaara's Shield of Sand and send the young shinobi crashing through a wall.

nodes.label: Three-Tails Mini Clone
nodes.description:
When the Three-Tails devours anything, its body produces thousands of smaller clones of itself with its gut. These antibody-like clones attack and devour the invading organism, presumably to aid in digestion and destroy any potential hazards. 
The Th...
nodes.full_description:
When the Three-Tails devours anything, its body produces thousands of smaller clones of itself with its gut. These antibody-like clones attack and devour the invading organism, presumably to aid in digestion and destroy any potential hazards. 
The Three-Tails has the ability to create different sizes of its mini clones: from the size of a hand to the size of a human being, and they are resilient enough to resist Guren's crystal techniques and kunai.[1]

See Also[]
Ten-Tails Fission
References[]

↑ Naruto: Shippūden episode 108

nodes.label: Three-Tails' Rampage
nodes.description: Isobu takes over Rin, causing her to manifest a chakra cloak, and slam the opponent with a chakra tail. Isobu fully manifests itself, slams the opponent underwater, and sends a Tailed Beast Ball their way. Rin manages to suppress Isobu with memories ...
nodes.full_description: Isobu takes over Rin, causing her to manifest a chakra cloak, and slam the opponent with a chakra tail. Isobu fully manifests itself, slams the opponent underwater, and sends a Tailed Beast Ball their way. Rin manages to suppress Isobu with memories of her team, as a slight shower from the explosion rains down on her.

nodes.label: Three-Tails Chakra: Release
nodes.description: Due to his mysterious connection to the Three-Tails, Yūkimaru is able to at least partially control the Three-Tails. At first, Yūkimaru can only make an apparition of the beast appear, after taking some of Kabuto's pills. Later, after taking a larger...
nodes.full_description:
Due to his mysterious connection to the Three-Tails, Yūkimaru is able to at least partially control the Three-Tails. At first, Yūkimaru can only make an apparition of the beast appear, after taking some of Kabuto's pills. Later, after taking a larger dosage of the pills (combined with Guren's Crystal Release technique) he is able to make the beast fully appear, but couldn't control it. Later, when Guren is in danger of being harmed by the Three-Tailed Beast, he is able to halt it completely without Kabuto's pills. When Guren seemingly sacrificed her life to save him, Yūkimaru lost control of himself and used his powers to the fullest which enhanced the Three-Tails strength and rampage enabling it to break through the Four-Corner Sealing Barrier. This could mean that, like Naruto's jinchūriki forms, this ability is tied to his emotions. 
Shizune concluded that due to the extensive toll this ability took on Yūkimaru's body, his lifespan was shortened, and he lost the ability altogether.

nodes.label: Three-Tailed Rasengan
nodes.description: While in his three-tailed form, Naruto creates a shadow clone that charges a Nine-Tails-enhanced Rasengan that implodes in on the enemy who is attacked by it.
nodes.full_description: While in his three-tailed form, Naruto creates a shadow clone that charges a Nine-Tails-enhanced Rasengan that implodes in on the enemy who is attacked by it.

nodes.label: Three-Seal Barrier
nodes.description: Similar to the Five-Seal Barrier technique, instead the user places three sealing tags around their location. If any one manages to enter through a secret entrance of the protected hideout, a deep mist is created and the only way to get rid of it is ...
nodes.full_description: Similar to the Five-Seal Barrier technique, instead the user places three sealing tags around their location. If any one manages to enter through a secret entrance of the protected hideout, a deep mist is created and the only way to get rid of it is remove the tags around the protected area.

nodes.label: Three Jewels Suction Crushing
nodes.description: This technique is a performance by puppets 6, 7, and 8 of the Chikamatsu Collection. The three puppets get into a triangular formation and by opening the mechanisms marked with "Buddha", "Dharma", and "Sangha", respectively, they invoke this techniqu...
nodes.full_description: This technique is a performance by puppets 6, 7, and 8 of the Chikamatsu Collection. The three puppets get into a triangular formation and by opening the mechanisms marked with "Buddha", "Dharma", and "Sangha", respectively, they invoke this technique. A terrifying tornado breaks out and sucks the targets into the centre of the formation. Everything that is sucked into the centre is completely crushed with tremendous force and shot out from the back. However, the vacuum can be overloaded, leaving the three puppets vulnerable to attacks.

nodes.label: Three Demon Gods
nodes.description: Momoshiki grabs his opponent, throws them up in the air, and consumes a chakra edible, changing his appearance. Transformed, he sends five dog avatars which converge at his opponent, biting at them, before a fire pheasant crashes through them. Finall...
nodes.full_description: Momoshiki grabs his opponent, throws them up in the air, and consumes a chakra edible, changing his appearance. Transformed, he sends five dog avatars which converge at his opponent, biting at them, before a fire pheasant crashes through them. Finally, Momoshiki punches his opponent back at the ground with a giant rock monkey.

Kin Tsuchi controls a vast amount of needles at once using strings, and attacks the enemy. When shown in the game, this technique resembles a white version of Haku's Thousand Flying Water Needles of Death.

nodes.description: Sasori attacks his opponent using his Third Kazekage puppet, causing multiple arms to erupt from seals in its left arm, reaching for a mid-air opponent.
nodes.full_description: Sasori attacks his opponent using his Third Kazekage puppet, causing multiple arms to erupt from seals in its left arm, reaching for a mid-air opponent.

nodes.description:
This article is about Haku's technique. For Kin Tsuchi's technique, see Thousand Needles of Death.




The user creates a thousand long needles from the nearby water, which surround the target. The user carefully aims the needles at the target and fi...
nodes.full_description:
This article is about Haku's technique. For Kin Tsuchi's technique, see Thousand Needles of Death.




The user creates a thousand long needles from the nearby water, which surround the target. The user carefully aims the needles at the target and fires them at rapid speeds. Targets who are struck by the needles suffer significant injury.[1] When Haku uses this technique against Sasuke Uchiha, Sasuke is able to escape harm by leaping directly upwards.[2]

nodes.label: Thousand Hands Manipulation Force
nodes.description:
The Thousand Hands Manipulation Force is a technique which is used through the puppet of the Third Kazekage.

Usage[]
From the Third Kazekage puppet's left arm opens several compartments. These compartments are prepared with summoning seals in them, ...
nodes.full_description:
The Thousand Hands Manipulation Force is a technique which is used through the puppet of the Third Kazekage.

Usage[]
From the Third Kazekage puppet's left arm opens several compartments. These compartments are prepared with summoning seals in them, which call forth a large number of long puppet arms that can bend and follow the opponent, then crush them with devastating force. The arms are modified with launchers, which can emit poison gas, binding wires with a kunai-anchor, or regular kunai. Sasori can detach the entire left arm (with the thousand arms) to regain mobility for the puppet, and a buzzsaw takes its place.

See Also[]
Mutually Multiplying Explosive Tags
References[]

↑ Sha no Sho, page 278

nodes.label: Third Eye
nodes.description: Gaara creates an eye out of sand that hovers in the air wherever it's created. Gaara connects the eye with his optic nerve using chakra, allowing him to see whatever is in the Third Eye's field of vision. The eye gives Gaara a useful method of perfor...
nodes.full_description:
Gaara creates an eye out of sand that hovers in the air wherever it's created. Gaara connects the eye with his optic nerve using chakra, allowing him to see whatever is in the Third Eye's field of vision. The eye gives Gaara a useful method of performing surveillance without being noticed;[1] in Sakura Hiden, Gaara manipulates the Third Eye's sand to allow it to double as a listening device. Gaara also uses the Third Eye when fully surrounding himself with the Shield of Sand, allowing him to be protected without sacrificing seeing what opponents are doing.[2] In Gaara Hiden, Gaara is capable of creating several Third Eyes and connect each eye to his optical nerve at once, allowing him to observe things from multiple angles simultaneously.
Rasa makes his Third Eye out of Gold Dust. Rasa, like Gaara, must close one of his eyes before he can see through the Third Eye.[3][4] In the anime, Shinki has displayed the ability of creating multiple Third Eyes with his Iron Sand, without the need of closing one of his, though it quickly drains his chakra.[5]

nodes.full_description: This is a cooperation ninjutsu where one Fire Release user attacks the enemy from one side and a Water Release user attacks them from the other. The collision of these two naturally opposing natures create a devastating attack as well as a great deal of water vapour.
