Appearance[]
When Toneri activates this mode, he gains a cyan-coloured chakra shroud wi...
nodes.full_description:
The Tenseigan Chakra Mode is a heightened transformation unique to those who possess the Tenseigan.

Contents

1 Appearance
2 Attributes
3 See Also
4 References


Appearance[]
When Toneri activates this mode, he gains a cyan-coloured chakra shroud with six magatama markings on his collar, dark markings over his eyebrows and lower eyelids, and a single horn shaped like Kaguya's extending from his forehead. The shroud constantly radiates flickering flames of chakra, and his clothing and hair continuously billow upwards as if caught in a strong breeze.

Attributes[]
This mode is said to be roughly on par with Naruto Uzumaki's senjutsu-enhanced Nine-Tails Chakra Mode. Upon activating this form the user gains access to nine Truth-Seeking Balls, and Toneri displayed the ability to amplify their power by infusing them with chakra, turning them into glowing cyan orbs. In addition to shaping them into shields and dividing them into smaller orbs to launch high-speed barrage attacks, he was also able to transform a single orb into an ornate cage which he used to imprison Hinata Hyūga while battling Naruto. The Truth-Seeking Balls were also utilised in his Silver Wheel Reincarnation Explosion and Golden Wheel Reincarnation Explosion techniques, which he used to create an incredibly powerful silver typhoon that obliterated the moon's crust and a massive golden sword that cut the entire moon in half.

See Also[]
Nine-Tails Chakra Mode
Six Paths Sage Mode
Six Paths Senjutsu
References[]

↑ Retsu no Sho, page 19

nodes.label: The Inheritance of the Will of Fire
nodes.description: Hashirama, Tobirama and Hiruzen use a combination of wood, water and fire to push away the opponent. Hashirama uses Wood Release Secret Technique: Nativity of a World of Trees to create a forest in which Tobirama and Hiruzen strike the opponent using...
nodes.full_description: Hashirama, Tobirama and Hiruzen use a combination of wood, water and fire to push away the opponent. Hashirama uses Wood Release Secret Technique: Nativity of a World of Trees to create a forest in which Tobirama and Hiruzen strike the opponent using a fire and water combination. The three Hokage then strike the opponent, with Hashirama using Chakra Enhanced Strength, Tobirama kicking the opponent and Hiruzen summoning Monkey King: Enma and striking the opponent with the adamantine staff. The force of the attacks explodes the forest in the process.

nodes.label: Tenrō-Style Ninjutsu: Beast-Human Transformation Technique
nodes.description: The user transforms themselves into a wolf-like creature that enhances their strength and speed. The transformation wears off if the user is defeated. This technique is known only by the members of the Tenrō clan.
nodes.full_description: The user transforms themselves into a wolf-like creature that enhances their strength and speed. The transformation wears off if the user is defeated. This technique is known only by the members of the Tenrō clan.

nodes.label: The Great Sakura
nodes.description: Sakura traps her opponent in a genjutsu in which the giant form of Inner Sakura raises up from beneath the opponent. Inner Sakura takes the opponent into the air and crushes the opponent with both her hands, and the genjutsu promptly ends with the op...
nodes.full_description:
Sakura traps her opponent in a genjutsu in which the giant form of Inner Sakura raises up from beneath the opponent. Inner Sakura takes the opponent into the air and crushes the opponent with both her hands, and the genjutsu promptly ends with the opponent on the ground.
In the Ultimate Ninja Storm sub-series, Sakura traps her opponent in a genjutsu. As Inner Sakura appears behind Sakura, she then slides her fist which is imbued with pink chakra against the ground before she uppercuts her opponent into the air ending the genjutsu.

nodes.label: Tengai Shinsei: Pierce
nodes.description: A smaller scale version of the larger variant, Madara Uchiha calls forth a shower of small meteors.
nodes.full_description: A smaller scale version of the larger variant, Madara Uchiha calls forth a shower of small meteors.

nodes.label: Tenpenchii
nodes.description: By interfering with the natural energy using its immeasurable amount of chakra, the Ten-Tails is able to simultaneously create a variety of natural disasters that devastate the surrounding area, with itself acting as their epicentre. The phenomena in...
nodes.full_description:
By interfering with the natural energy using its immeasurable amount of chakra, the Ten-Tails is able to simultaneously create a variety of natural disasters that devastate the surrounding area, with itself acting as their epicentre. The phenomena involved in this technique include: earthquakes, floods, thunderstorms, and tornadoes. These concurrent events result in a blast akin to a nuclear explosion, even forming a vast mushroom cloud.[2]

Influence[]
Tenpenchii (天変地異) is a Japanese four-character idiom, comprised of two shorter words referring to natural disasters affecting the sky, tenpen (天変), and the earth, chii (地異). The idiom is often translated simply as "cataclysm".

nodes.label: The Immortals Rushing Madly Ahead
nodes.description: Taking advantage of Hidan's immortality, Kakuzu uses the Fire Release: Intelligent Hard Work and Wind Release: Pressure Damage techniques to engulf Hidan in flames, propelling him towards the opponent, while Hidan slashes them continuously with his T...
nodes.full_description: Taking advantage of Hidan's immortality, Kakuzu uses the Fire Release: Intelligent Hard Work and Wind Release: Pressure Damage techniques to engulf Hidan in flames, propelling him towards the opponent, while Hidan slashes them continuously with his Triple-Bladed Scythe.

nodes.label: Tenketsu Blocking Strikes
nodes.description: A taijutsu technique that allows the user to disable an opponent by performing a two-fingered thrust at the opponent's tenketsu. By doing so, the user can manipulate the flow of chakra within their opponent, similar the the Gentle Fist fighting style...
nodes.full_description:
A taijutsu technique that allows the user to disable an opponent by performing a two-fingered thrust at the opponent's tenketsu. By doing so, the user can manipulate the flow of chakra within their opponent, similar the the Gentle Fist fighting style. Shira can unblock his opponents' tenketsu, with a single impact with his fist.
While seemingly not hampering the opponent in any other way, it seems to prevent the opponent from initiating the surge of chakra when the Eight Gates are opened.

nodes.label: Ten-Finger Drilling Bullets
nodes.description: Kimimaro parts his fingertips, creating holes that expose hardened finger bones. In volleys (five per hand), he shoots these bone bullets at a target by swinging his hand,[2] causing a loud sound as they're fired. The bullets travel incredibly quickl...
nodes.full_description: Kimimaro parts his fingertips, creating holes that expose hardened finger bones. In volleys (five per hand), he shoots these bone bullets at a target by swinging his hand,[2] causing a loud sound as they're fired. The bullets travel incredibly quickly through the air and take a spinning motion. Upon impact, the bullets tear through skin, flesh, and bone.[1] The bullets aren't able to penetrate the Shield of Sand,[3] but in the anime, they can pierce samurai armour.[4] Kimimaro relies on this technique for his long-range attacks.[1]

nodes.label: Ten-Tails Fission
nodes.description: Used primarily as a defensive manoeuvre, the Ten-Tails has the ability to perform biological fission, extruding pieces of its body to create smaller entities that resemble itself, known as Fission Beings. After being produced these creatures will act...
nodes.full_description:
Used primarily as a defensive manoeuvre, the Ten-Tails has the ability to perform biological fission, extruding pieces of its body to create smaller entities that resemble itself, known as Fission Beings. After being produced these creatures will act in a coordinated fashion to defend the main body from perceived threats.
As part of this technique, the Ten-Tails can also separate and purge injured parts from its main body. This was done after part of its body was set ablaze by Amaterasu.[1]
Code utilised his Claw Marks to forcefully pinch off pieces of the juvenile Ten-Tails in Kara's captivity, which then reformed into humanoid forms he named Claw Grime.[2]

See Also[]
Fission Technique
Slug Great Division
Three-Tails Mini Clone
References[]

↑ Naruto chapter 635, page 13

↑ Boruto chapter 72, pages 38-41

nodes.label: Tengai Shinsei
nodes.description: The user weaves three hand seals simultaneously between themselves and their Susanoo, in order to draw massive meteorites from the upper atmosphere down towards a specific location on the ground. As they descend in succession along the same trajector...
nodes.full_description:
The user weaves three hand seals simultaneously between themselves and their Susanoo, in order to draw massive meteorites from the upper atmosphere down towards a specific location on the ground. As they descend in succession along the same trajectory, if one of these meteorites is stopped, the user can summon another one to then collide with the first, ensuring that they crash into their intended destination.
The impact of this technique was of such enormity that it devastated a significant portion of the Fourth Division, with the resulting tremors felt from the border of the Land of Lightning to as far away as the Allied Shinobi Forces' headquarters.[2] It was also able to completely destroy Madara's Susanoo, and obliterate his body.[3]

nodes.label: Ten Directions
nodes.description:
This article is about the shinjutsu. For the chapter, see Ten Directions (chapter).



Ten Directions is a shinjutsu that was used by Shibai Ōtsutsuki.  It enables the user to see into the future. Not only does this allow foresight, it also shows mul...
nodes.full_description:
This article is about the shinjutsu. For the chapter, see Ten Directions (chapter).



Ten Directions is a shinjutsu that was used by Shibai Ōtsutsuki.  It enables the user to see into the future. Not only does this allow foresight, it also shows multiple possible futures.

Contents

1 Usage

1.1 Foreseen Futures


2 Influence
3 See also


Usage[]
Amado Sanzu had integrated Shibai's cells into the Inners of Kara, along with Ada and Daemon, with the intention of them using his shinjutsu. While the siblings were able to use his shinjutsu, none of the Inners (except for Code) have shown any signs of awakening his abilities. 
At the brink of death during his battle with Isshiki Ōtsutsuki, Koji Kashin had awakened Ten Directions, allowing the former Inner to foresee future events. Having seen Omnipotence being cast before it had happened, Koji used this vision to deduce the phenomenon had altered his memories of Boruto Uzumaki and Kawaki, which he managed to figure out that Boruto has always been the real son of the Seventh Hokage when he was born. Three years later, Koji would become partners with Boruto and using the Ten Directions, the future knowledge he gained from the shinjutsu had helped Boruto accelerate and improve his training. By teaching him all the skills and techniques he would learn in different potential futures.

Foreseen Futures[]
Because the future is not a straight path, Ten Directions gives the user many alternate possibilities of what could be the future. The following are the visions that Koji had foreseen:

In his fight with Isshiki, Naruto died. Isshiki would then successfully reincarnate through Kawaki's Kāma and use Boruto as the sacrifice for the Ten-Tails to plant the God Tree. This future was avoided.
After sealing Naruto and Hinata away with Daikokuten, Kawaki successfully killed Boruto and Sarada, when she tried to defend him. Omnipotence is not cast by Ada, resulting in Boruto and Kawaki's lives never being swapped in everyone's memories. This would lead to Kawaki being defeated by Code and used as the sacrifice for the Ten-Tails. This future was avoided.
In nearly all outcomes, the Ten-Tails breaks free of Code's control and evolves into multiple sentient God Trees.
In most outcomes, Boruto is killed by Jura and Kawaki is devoured by the Ten-Tails. The God Tree is grown, resulting in the end of the world.
Influence[]
In Buddhism, the expression "Ten Directions" refers to a concept of comprehensiveness and totality that is often used to describe the entirety of the universe and the reach of the Dharma, the Buddhist teachings. The "Ten Directions" include the eight cardinal points—north, south, east, west, northeast, northwest, southeast, and southwest—along with up and down, representing the totality of space. This concept is used to illustrate the idea that the Dharma is universal and encompasses all areas of existence and experience. It is a way to emphasize that Buddhist teachings are relevant and applicable to all aspects of life and the cosmos.

See also[]
Future Telling
Senrigan

nodes.label: Temporary Paralysis Technique
nodes.description: Using this technique causes a target or targets to be physically immobilised, as though they've been tied down with invisible steel ropes. Because it's a relatively simple technique, even genin should be able to perform it. However, the strength of t...
nodes.full_description: Using this technique causes a target or targets to be physically immobilised, as though they've been tied down with invisible steel ropes. Because it's a relatively simple technique, even genin should be able to perform it. However, the strength of the binding varies significantly from one skill level to the next, so a mere genin could not hope to restrain the same targets that an Anbu could, for instance.[1] The Temporary Paralysis Technique is a useful way to stop an opponent from attacking or, alternatively, make an opponent easier to attack.

nodes.label: Temple of Nirvana Technique
nodes.description: Everybody within an area is subjected to the same illusion: many white feathers fluttering down from the sky. If a given target sees enough of these feathers fall, they will fall into a deep sleep.[1] Because it's a genjutsu, victims cannot be woken ...
nodes.full_description: Everybody within an area is subjected to the same illusion: many white feathers fluttering down from the sky. If a given target sees enough of these feathers fall, they will fall into a deep sleep.[1] Because it's a genjutsu, victims cannot be woken in conventional ways, meaning they will continue to sleep even if extensive combat is going on around them.[2] Only by dispelling the genjutsu, such as with the Genjutsu Cancel, can victims regain consciousness.[3] If targets are attentive enough, they can similarly dispel the genjutsu themselves before the feathers have lulled them to sleep.[4]

nodes.label: Temporal Rewind
nodes.description: In preparation of being struck, the user activates their Rinnegan as glowing blue. This technique allows them to warp several seconds into the past. While normally defensive, essentially allowing the user to seemingly teleport away from danger, repea...
nodes.full_description: In preparation of being struck, the user activates their Rinnegan as glowing blue. This technique allows them to warp several seconds into the past. While normally defensive, essentially allowing the user to seemingly teleport away from danger, repeated usage of this technique grants a pseudo-form of clairvoyance. With the acquired knowledge of how the near-future will happen, a perfect counter-strategy can be formed from being able to accurately tell how the enemy will act. However, due to the effects of the technique, the user experiences more time than those around them, putting the user at risk of prolonged exposure to hazardous conditions.

nodes.label: Telescope Technique
nodes.description: By peering into a crystal ball, the user can see the current activities of anyone whose chakra signature they know. Users can view subjects from any location, regardless of distance or potential obstructions, making it ideal for intelligence gatherin...
nodes.full_description: By peering into a crystal ball, the user can see the current activities of anyone whose chakra signature they know. Users can view subjects from any location, regardless of distance or potential obstructions, making it ideal for intelligence gathering. The Third Hokage uses this technique to monitor the villagers of Konohagakure and thus maintain public order.[1]

nodes.label: Teleportation Seal
nodes.description: The user creates a seal that can teleport anything within its confines to a predetermined location, dispersing into balls of light. Hamura used this technique to travel to the moon he and Hagoromo created.
nodes.full_description: The user creates a seal that can teleport anything within its confines to a predetermined location, dispersing into balls of light. Hamura used this technique to travel to the moon he and Hagoromo created.

nodes.label: Tearing Blade
nodes.description: Orochimaru jumps up high and then comes falling down onto the opponent, stabbing them and then slashing them with his Sword of Kusanagi in the process.
nodes.full_description: Orochimaru jumps up high and then comes falling down onto the opponent, stabbing them and then slashing them with his Sword of Kusanagi in the process.

nodes.label: Telegram Flash
nodes.description: With his team lending him chakra, Akaboshi can slam his hand onto the ground and cause lightning to spread from his hand to underneath the opponent.
nodes.full_description: With his team lending him chakra, Akaboshi can slam his hand onto the ground and cause lightning to spread from his hand to underneath the opponent.

nodes.label: Tearing Air Heavenly Light Slashing Flash Style Zero
nodes.description: In Nine-Tails Chakra Mode, Minato scatters Flying Thunder God Kunai around the opponent, slashing them each time he warps.
nodes.full_description: In Nine-Tails Chakra Mode, Minato scatters Flying Thunder God Kunai around the opponent, slashing them each time he warps.

nodes.label: Tearing Fang
nodes.description: Akamaru attacks the opponent by jumping and kicking them, finishing them with a weaker Passing Fang.
nodes.full_description: Akamaru attacks the opponent by jumping and kicking them, finishing them with a weaker Passing Fang.

nodes.label: Tatami Return
nodes.description: Mifune slashes at his opponent a couple times, jumps up, and upon landing, the impact makes the ground in front of him rise up, with a slab of rock sending his opponent up in the air.
nodes.full_description: Mifune slashes at his opponent a couple times, jumps up, and upon landing, the impact makes the ground in front of him rise up, with a slab of rock sending his opponent up in the air.

nodes.label: Team-work is Outstanding
nodes.description: Naruto, Sakura, and Sasuke kick the opponent in a combined attack. Naruto and Sasuke then rush ahead, delivering a series of hits to the target. Then, Sakura reveals a rope that she had hid under the ground and uses it to tie the opponent to a log, a...
nodes.full_description: Naruto, Sakura, and Sasuke kick the opponent in a combined attack. Naruto and Sasuke then rush ahead, delivering a series of hits to the target. Then, Sakura reveals a rope that she had hid under the ground and uses it to tie the opponent to a log, accidentally tying Naruto with them, while Sasuke escapes using the Body Replacement Technique.

nodes.label: Takigakure Whirlwind
nodes.description:
While in midair the user will come down with a whirlwind-like force flowing around them, the user then punches the target.

See Also[]
Leaf Whirlwind
Flying Single Foot
nodes.full_description:
While in midair the user will come down with a whirlwind-like force flowing around them, the user then punches the target.

Leaf Whirlwind
Flying Single Foot

nodes.label: Takigakure Style: Watercutting Sword
nodes.description: A secret technique of Takigakure that allows the user to manipulate water into the form of a sword. While usually used for close quarters, this technique can, as demonstrated by Shibuki, be used for ranged assaults as well. This sword is also shown t...
nodes.full_description:
A secret technique of Takigakure that allows the user to manipulate water into the form of a sword. While usually used for close quarters, this technique can, as demonstrated by Shibuki, be used for ranged assaults as well. This sword is also shown to be very resilient as it is able to withstand and cut through most Fire Release techniques.

See Also[]
Ice Sword Technique
Water Release: Water Blade Technique

nodes.label: Taisa's Transformation Technique
nodes.description: Taisa activates this technique by forming the needed hand seal. Once activated, Taisa transforms into an armoured beetle similar to a kabutomushi. He then gains six legs which are mostly bandaged up, five horns, and orange and violet markings all ove...
nodes.full_description: Taisa activates this technique by forming the needed hand seal. Once activated, Taisa transforms into an armoured beetle similar to a kabutomushi. He then gains six legs which are mostly bandaged up, five horns, and orange and violet markings all over his back body. In this form, Taisa is able to make powerful charge attacks with his horns and can release a Poison Mist from his body. He is also able to leap high into the air and land down on the enemy with great force. The only vulnerable part of this form is his underbelly, and he has to somehow be tipped over for an attack to reach it.

nodes.label: Takamimusubinokami
nodes.description: After absorbing his enemies' ninjutsu with the Rinnegan in his right hand, Momoshiki can release those same techniques from the Rinnegan in his left hand, using the chakra he obtains from his pills to amplify their power as many times as he wishes.[1...
nodes.full_description:
After absorbing his enemies' ninjutsu with the Rinnegan in his right hand, Momoshiki can release those same techniques from the Rinnegan in his left hand, using the chakra he obtains from his pills to amplify their power as many times as he wishes.[1] In the anime after absorbing Kinshiki, Momoshiki's golden Rinnegan turn red when he uses this technique.[2]

Enhanced Techniques[]
Deep Crimson Spiral
Fire Release Bullet: "Blaze"
Lightning Release Bullet: Powerful Breath
Pheasant Hunter
Shadow Imitation Technique
Tailed Beast Ball
Water Release Bullet: Orca
Water Release: Torrent Bullet
Water Release: Water Dragon Bullet Technique

nodes.label: Tailed Beast Transfer Technique
nodes.description: This technique allows one person to transfer the complete chakra of a sealed tailed beast within a jinchūriki into a different person.
nodes.full_description: This technique allows one person to transfer the complete chakra of a sealed tailed beast within a jinchūriki into a different person.

nodes.label: Tailed Beast Telepathy
nodes.description: An innate skill possessed by all the tailed beasts, which allows them to communicate with one another on a deeper plain of their subconscious minds known as the Mental World (精神世界, Seishin Sekai). This kind of communication differs from the one used ...
nodes.full_description:
An innate skill possessed by all the tailed beasts, which allows them to communicate with one another on a deeper plain of their subconscious minds known as the Mental World (精神世界, Seishin Sekai). This kind of communication differs from the one used by jinchūriki and their tailed beasts, since there are no seals or other restrictions and it is accessible for all tailed beasts and their respective jinchūriki. However, it requires a jinchūriki and their tailed beast to be fully linked to gain access to this world. Furthermore, it is impossible for influences from the outside to reach this plane, even if the tailed beasts are being controlled.
It appears that even without a jinchūriki, the tailed beasts are able to contact humans, as Shukaku did with Gaara.[1]

See Also[]
Mind Body Transmission Technique
Wave Transmission Technique
References[]

↑ Boruto episode 55

nodes.label: Tailed Beast Tail
nodes.description: Yugito claws her opponent and then slaps them with one of Matatabi's tails.
nodes.full_description: Yugito claws her opponent and then slaps them with one of Matatabi's tails.

nodes.label: Tailed Beast Seventeen Whirlwinds Attack
nodes.description: Killer B and Naruto, in their Tailed Beast Modes, twist their tails to form two twisters with the opponent caught in between them, and finish by shooting Tailed Beast Balls at them.
nodes.full_description: Killer B and Naruto, in their Tailed Beast Modes, twist their tails to form two twisters with the opponent caught in between them, and finish by shooting Tailed Beast Balls at them.

nodes.label: Takemikazuchi
nodes.description: Sasuke pierces his opponent with Amaterasu flames while simultaneously capturing them inside a Chibaku Tensei which is enveloped by the black flames. Sasuke then jumps high in the air and activates his Complete Body Susanoo and proceeds to fly toward...
nodes.full_description:
Sasuke pierces his opponent with Amaterasu flames while simultaneously capturing them inside a Chibaku Tensei which is enveloped by the black flames. Sasuke then jumps high in the air and activates his Complete Body Susanoo and proceeds to fly towards the Chibaku Tensei. He creates a Chidori through his Susanoo and covers it in Amaterasu flames as well before charging towards the opponent still caught inside the Chibaku Tensei. The impact results in a massive explosion which blows the Chibaku Tensei into smithereens.

Influence[]
Takemikazuchi is a god of thunder and swords in Japanese mythology.

nodes.label: Tailed Beast Removal Technique
nodes.description: After setting up an area, the user can attempt to extract a tailed beast from its jinchūriki. The jinchūriki is bound to a rock table surrounded by a large circular sealing formula with several ceremonial rocks surrounding it. During the extraction p...
nodes.full_description:
After setting up an area, the user can attempt to extract a tailed beast from its jinchūriki. The jinchūriki is bound to a rock table surrounded by a large circular sealing formula with several ceremonial rocks surrounding it. During the extraction process, the jinchuriki experiences extreme pain as the beast is ripped from their body.
Harusame attempted to use this technique to extract Saiken from its jinchūriki, Utakata. During the extraction process, Utakata slipped into the beast's full form and ended up killing Harusame.

nodes.label: Tailed Beast Planetary Rasenshuriken
nodes.description: Naruto starts with a wind punch, sending the opponent into the air. He then transforms into his Kurama Mode and prepares a giant-sized Rasenshuriken and a Tailed Beast Ball. He throws the Rasenshuriken, then fires four satellite Tailed Beast Balls, c...
nodes.full_description: Naruto starts with a wind punch, sending the opponent into the air. He then transforms into his Kurama Mode and prepares a giant-sized Rasenshuriken and a Tailed Beast Ball. He throws the Rasenshuriken, then fires four satellite Tailed Beast Balls, circling around the shuriken. As the attack hits the opponent, it explodes, resulting in an enormous dome of blue chakra.

nodes.label: Tailed Beast Rasengan
nodes.description:
The Tailed Beast Rasengan is an incomplete technique of Naruto Uzumaki. It attempts to use the Rasengan's form to create a substitute for the Tailed Beast Ball.

Contents

1 Background
2

nodes.label: Tailed Beast Lariat
nodes.description: The Tailed Beast Lariat (尾獣の雷犂熱刀, Bijū no Rariatto) is a taijutsu technique, available to the Eight-Tails jinchūriki. After manifesting their Version 2 form, without bones, or while in their Tailed Beast Mode, the user charges at the opponent, striki...
nodes.full_description:
The Tailed Beast Lariat (尾獣の雷犂熱刀, Bijū no Rariatto) is a taijutsu technique, available to the Eight-Tails jinchūriki. After manifesting their Version 2 form, without bones, or while in their Tailed Beast Mode, the user charges at the opponent, striking them with a Lariat. It is unknown if this technique contains Lightning Release nature transformation, like the original version.

References[]

↑ Naruto: Shippūden episode 429

nodes.label: Tailed Beast Replication
nodes.description: Gensui creates a special sealing tag which, if placed on human beings, transforms them into false replications of one of the tailed beasts. Not only does the seal shape the victim into the desired tailed beast, but it also grants them the original's ...
nodes.full_description:
Gensui creates a special sealing tag which, if placed on human beings, transforms them into false replications of one of the tailed beasts. Not only does the seal shape the victim into the desired tailed beast, but it also grants them the original's abilities. The tag can also replicate the tailed beast's jinchūriki as well.
In order to maintain itself, the technique drains the victim's chakra, leaving them in varying stages of incapacitation, dependent on the technique's duration. Also, while the technique is active, the victim is under the complete control of the user.


Replicated Tailed Beasts


Tailed Beast

Victim


Kurama/Naruto Uzumaki
Unknown, Ryuka Tenrō (Kurama only)


Shukaku
Konohagakure shinobi


Matatabi
Konohamaru Sarutobi, Taisa Amagiri

See Also[]

nodes.label: Tailed Beast Full Charge
nodes.description: All the Tailed Beasts gather together, after which they all head in to attack the opponent in the following order: Shukaku punches the opponent, Matatabi slashes them with its claws, Isobu bulldozes them towards Son Gokū, who kicks them, allowing Kok...
nodes.full_description:
All the Tailed Beasts gather together, after which they all head in to attack the opponent in the following order: Shukaku punches the opponent, Matatabi slashes them with its claws, Isobu bulldozes them towards Son Gokū, who kicks them, allowing Kokuō to thrust their body towards Saiken who then sprays them with acid, which leads to Chōmei knocking the opponent towards Gyūki, whose punch allows Kurama to ram them into the ground. 
After the sequence, the Tailed Beasts unite their tails into a single attack, pummelling their opponent.

Triva[]
While unnamed in the manga and anime, it was named in Naruto Shippūden: Ultimate Ninja Storm 4.
In Naruto Shippūden: Ultimate Ninja Storm 4, the Tailed Beasts use a similar attack, except all nine jinchūriki participate in it.
The name of this jutsu seems to be a pun on the Godzilla film "Destroy All Monsters" (怪獣総進撃, Kaijū Sōshingeki).

nodes.label: Tailed Beast Sealing
nodes.description: Whenever Naruto Uzumaki entered into a tailed form, the First Hokage's Necklace activated this technique to restrain him. It is unknown if the technique just restrains Naruto until Yamato is able to suppress the Nine-Tails' influence or if it suppres...
nodes.full_description:
Whenever Naruto Uzumaki entered into a tailed form, the First Hokage's Necklace activated this technique to restrain him. It is unknown if the technique just restrains Naruto until Yamato is able to suppress the Nine-Tails' influence or if it suppresses the influence by itself as the Nine-Tails cancelled the technique by crushing the necklace.[2]

References[]

↑ Naruto Trading Card Game

↑ Naruto chapter 438, pages 2-4

nodes.label: Tailed Beast Eight Twists
nodes.description: After assuming his full Eight-Tails transformation, Killer B tightly coils the beast's tails around himself, before extending them with an enormous amount of physical strength. This causes him to spin rapidly, resulting in the generation of tremendou...
nodes.full_description: After assuming his full Eight-Tails transformation, Killer B tightly coils the beast's tails around himself, before extending them with an enormous amount of physical strength. This causes him to spin rapidly, resulting in the generation of tremendous gusts of wind that buffets everything in the surrounding area. This technique was powerful enough to level the terrain within a large range of the Eight-Tails.

nodes.label: Tailed Beast Chakra Arms
nodes.description: This is an ability a jinchūriki is able to perform when in a tailed form. The jinchūriki will use the raw chakra of the their Tailed Beast to form arms, which they can freely manipulate to attack their foes, able to strike an opponent faster than eve...
nodes.full_description:
This is an ability a jinchūriki is able to perform when in a tailed form. The jinchūriki will use the raw chakra of the their Tailed Beast to form arms, which they can freely manipulate to attack their foes, able to strike an opponent faster than even a Sharingan user can react to.[2] The chakra arms' hands are clawed while the rest of the arm seems to lack any kind of joint, thus allowing them to have flexible movements that will generally be impossible for normal arms. The user can create any number of arms that they desire and they can also serve other purposes such as grappling hooks, to either grab onto objects or enemies from great distances, for offensive means, as merely touching one of these can cause fatal burns, due to the Nine-Tails' seething hatred within its chakra (though this is not always the case). Due to having chakra attached to his body, the chakra arms can grow in size and from the fourth tail up, Naruto, the arms, or any part of his body can divide into two or more fully operational appendages.[3] Killer B has also been shown to use this technique though instead of arms, he can form horns which he uses for his Lightning Release: Lariat technique.[4]
In his Nine-Tails Chakra Mode, Naruto can use the chakra arms to a greater extent, as he can use and release chakra arms from anywhere on his body on a small or large scale. These arms even have the power to crush stone without Naruto putting much thought into it.[5] In the anime Naruto was able to crush a sword with a chakra arm just by tightening his grip.[6] After some practice, he mastered the chakra arms, able to manipulate various stones and geometric shapes without crushing them.[7] Now he is able to use them in an attempt to create a new technique: the Tailed Beast Rasengan since he was advised by the Eight-Tails against the use of shadow clones in this form.[8] Naruto's mastery of the Tailed Beast Chakra Arms is so great that he is able to create several at once to launch attacks at several enemies, use them to pull enemies into the attack, and even create tiny ones around his finger. The arms also grant him a greater level of dexterity and manoeuvrability out of what would normally be a helpless situation,[9] such as guiding his Rasenshuriken during his fight against the Third Raikage. Not only that, Naruto can control each individual shroud he gives out to protect his allies.

nodes.label: Tailed Beast Combo
nodes.description: Naruto, in his Nine-Tails Chakra Mode, and Minato combine their Rasengans and strike the opponent with it. Minato then throws his Flying Thunder God Kunai at the opponent. The two ninja then bump fists, with Minato entering his Nine-Tails Chakra Mode...
nodes.full_description: Naruto, in his Nine-Tails Chakra Mode, and Minato combine their Rasengans and strike the opponent with it. Minato then throws his Flying Thunder God Kunai at the opponent. The two ninja then bump fists, with Minato entering his Nine-Tails Chakra Mode. Father and son then use Flying Thunder God Technique to teleport to the thrown kunai, delivering a series of strikes to the opponent, forming a yellow and orange rasengan-shaped chakra silhouette, which creates a massive explosion, dealing great damage in the process.

nodes.label: Tailed Beast Ball Rasenshuriken
nodes.description: With help from Kurama, Naruto converts his Truth-Seeking Ball into a Tailed Beast Ball, and adds wind-natured chakra to create the shuriken-like blades around it before hurling it at the target. The resulting explosion dwarfs that of a regular Tailed...
nodes.full_description: With help from Kurama, Naruto converts his Truth-Seeking Ball into a Tailed Beast Ball, and adds wind-natured chakra to create the shuriken-like blades around it before hurling it at the target. The resulting explosion dwarfs that of a regular Tailed Beast Ball and can destroy multiple planetoid-like objects in one blast.

nodes.label: Tail Sweep
nodes.description: Releasing six tails, Kinkaku extends one of them and attacks opponents like a whip.
nodes.full_description: Releasing six tails, Kinkaku extends one of them and attacks opponents like a whip.

nodes.label: Tail Chasing Fang Fang Rotating Fang
nodes.description: After the user transforms into a single, three-headed, gigantic wolf with their shadow clone and ninken, the user curls into a ball and rolls at a ferocious speed towards the enemy, as if chasing after their own tail. The ultra-violent rotation creat...
nodes.full_description: After the user transforms into a single, three-headed, gigantic wolf with their shadow clone and ninken, the user curls into a ball and rolls at a ferocious speed towards the enemy, as if chasing after their own tail. The ultra-violent rotation created can tear through multiple enemies, rending them apart with ease.

nodes.label: Tail Path Foolishness
nodes.description: Sasori, while inside his puppet Hiruko, extends the puppet's iron tail to circle around his opponent like a cocoon and then suddenly constricts it, crushing them.
nodes.full_description: Sasori, while inside his puppet Hiruko, extends the puppet's iron tail to circle around his opponent like a cocoon and then suddenly constricts it, crushing them.

nodes.label: Sword of Totsuka: Slashing Rise
nodes.description: Itachi uses the Sword of Totsuka to deliver a diagonal slash, followed by three horizontal slashes, the last of which throws his opponent up in the air, where Itachi hits him with a fireball, sending them further back.
nodes.full_description: Itachi uses the Sword of Totsuka to deliver a diagonal slash, followed by three horizontal slashes, the last of which throws his opponent up in the air, where Itachi hits him with a fireball, sending them further back.

nodes.label: Tail Releasing Method
nodes.description: This fūinjutsu employs the use of formulae to bind a jinchūriki before extracting the tailed beast from within them. When extracted, the beast initially takes the form of pure chakra, also causing the host to go into a near Version 1-like state. Afte...
nodes.full_description: This fūinjutsu employs the use of formulae to bind a jinchūriki before extracting the tailed beast from within them. When extracted, the beast initially takes the form of pure chakra, also causing the host to go into a near Version 1-like state. After being extracted, the beast takes a corporeal form. Obito Uchiha waited until Kushina Uzumaki's seal was weak enough to use this technique to extract Kurama.[2]

nodes.label: Sword of Kusanagi: One-Stab Death
nodes.description: Orochimaru summons a giant snake, which slams the ground with its tail, throwing the target into the air. Then, Orochimaru commands the Sword of Kusanagi to stab the target.
nodes.full_description: Orochimaru summons a giant snake, which slams the ground with its tail, throwing the target into the air. Then, Orochimaru commands the Sword of Kusanagi to stab the target.

nodes.label: Sword of Totsuka: Serial Slashes
nodes.description: Itachi uses the Sword of Totsuka for two horizontal slashes, followed by a stab, and finishes it with a fireball.
nodes.full_description: Itachi uses the Sword of Totsuka for two horizontal slashes, followed by a stab, and finishes it with a fireball.

nodes.label: Sword of Nunoboko: Mow
nodes.description: Hagoromo shapes his shakujō into the Sword of Nunoboko, coated in dark flaming chakra, and slashes the opponent.
nodes.full_description: Hagoromo shapes his shakujō into the Sword of Nunoboko, coated in dark flaming chakra, and slashes the opponent.

nodes.label: Sword of Kusanagi: Longsword of the Sky
nodes.description: This technique allows Orochimaru to control the Sword of Kusanagi. As he moves his fingers, the Sword of Kusanagi makes the same movements, even to the point of moving in the air. This allows him to continue using the sword even if he's been disarmed...
nodes.full_description:
This technique allows Orochimaru to control the Sword of Kusanagi. As he moves his fingers, the Sword of Kusanagi makes the same movements, even to the point of moving in the air. This allows him to continue using the sword even if he's been disarmed of it, wielding it against opponents and, because of the sword's natural sharpness, easily cutting through them.[1] The sword moves quickly while airborne, allowing Orochimaru to direct it at opponents from behind before it can be defended against.[2] In the anime, the sword's blade emits a bright blue light when controlled in this way.[3]

References[]

↑ 1.0 1.1 Tō no Sho, page 209

↑ Naruto chapter 123

↑ Naruto episode 73

nodes.label: Sword of Kusanagi: Blades from All Directions
nodes.description: After restraining the target with a snake, Orochimaru summons several replicas of his Sword of Kusanagi which attacks the enemy from every direction.
nodes.full_description: After restraining the target with a snake, Orochimaru summons several replicas of his Sword of Kusanagi which attacks the enemy from every direction.

nodes.full_description: Sasuke attacks his opponent with a series of sword slashes, a roundhouse kick, before hitting them with a forward lunging, horizontal slash.

nodes.label: Sword of Kusanagi: Chidori Katana
nodes.description: This technique allows Sasuke to channel the Chidori through his chokutō. This makes it nearly unblockable as the radiating and chirping blade can easily cut through steel. Furthermore, if an opponent is stabbed, their body goes numb due to an electri...
nodes.full_description: This technique allows Sasuke to channel the Chidori through his chokutō. This makes it nearly unblockable as the radiating and chirping blade can easily cut through steel. Furthermore, if an opponent is stabbed, their body goes numb due to an electrical current which causes the muscles to contract, making it impossible for the opponent to move. However, it can be countered by other weapons that also utilise Lightning Release chakra flow, such as Killer B's swords.[2]

nodes.label: Sword of Kagutsuchi: Violent
nodes.description: Sasuke attacks his opponent with a string of sword slashes, Chidori, and a black flame sword, the last swing of which sends a volley of black flame spikes.
nodes.full_description: Sasuke attacks his opponent with a string of sword slashes, Chidori, and a black flame sword, the last swing of which sends a volley of black flame spikes.

nodes.label: Sword of Kagutsuchi: Stabbing Flame
nodes.description: While inside his Susanoo, Sasuke swipes his Amaterasu sword horizontally, proceeds with a downward stab at the ground that causes flame spikes to erupt, throwing his opponent up in the air, where he stabs them, and sends a final pulse of black flames...
nodes.full_description: While inside his Susanoo, Sasuke swipes his Amaterasu sword horizontally, proceeds with a downward stab at the ground that causes flame spikes to erupt, throwing his opponent up in the air, where he stabs them, and sends a final pulse of black flames through the sword.

nodes.label: Sword of Kagutsuchi
nodes.description: By applying shape transformation to the orb of black flames wielded by his Susanoo, Sasuke manifests a blade in its hand for the purpose of slicing and piercing targets, thus setting them ablaze with the inextinguishable flames of Amaterasu.
nodes.full_description: By applying shape transformation to the orb of black flames wielded by his Susanoo, Sasuke manifests a blade in its hand for the purpose of slicing and piercing targets, thus setting them ablaze with the inextinguishable flames of Amaterasu.

nodes.label: Susanoo: Twin Gods Lightning Advent
nodes.description: Sasuke and Itachi activate their Complete Body — Susanoo. Itachi launches his Yasaka Magatama at the opponent while Sasuke slashes at them with his Blaze Release: Susanoo Kagutsuchi, with the resulting flames creating lightning clouds. The two then f...
nodes.full_description: Sasuke and Itachi activate their Complete Body — Susanoo. Itachi launches his Yasaka Magatama at the opponent while Sasuke slashes at them with his Blaze Release: Susanoo Kagutsuchi, with the resulting flames creating lightning clouds. The two then fly high up in the sky, fusing their Susanoo's sword together, which Sasuke engulfs in lightning and Itachi engulfs in black flames. They finish by flying down at the opponent sword first, the impact in which is so great, it dispels the lightning clouds, clearing up the sky.

nodes.label: Swift Release: Shadowless Flight
nodes.description: Hiruko uses this technique to move at instantaneous speeds, rapidly striking his opponents at various angles while avoiding any opposition regardless of the opponent's speed or strength. This technique is very effective against strength-based close-c...
nodes.full_description: Hiruko uses this technique to move at instantaneous speeds, rapidly striking his opponents at various angles while avoiding any opposition regardless of the opponent's speed or strength. This technique is very effective against strength-based close-combat taijutsu users.

nodes.label: Swarming Art
nodes.description: Deidara creates many clay spiders which crawl all over the opponent and detonate on them.
nodes.full_description: Deidara creates many clay spiders which crawl all over the opponent and detonate on them.

nodes.label: Susanoo: Twin Flames
nodes.description: In the skeletal states of their Susanoo, Itachi and Sasuke slash downwards with the Sword of Totsuka and Sword of Kagutsuchi, creating a fiery explosion.
nodes.full_description: In the skeletal states of their Susanoo, Itachi and Sasuke slash downwards with the Sword of Totsuka and Sword of Kagutsuchi, creating a fiery explosion.

nodes.label: Susanoo: Tsukumo
nodes.description: After Shisui manifests his Susanoo's upper-body, it opens its ribcage to expose its chest before launching a barrage of large, green-coloured chakra needles at an incredible speed.
nodes.full_description: After Shisui manifests his Susanoo's upper-body, it opens its ribcage to expose its chest before launching a barrage of large, green-coloured chakra needles at an incredible speed.

nodes.label: Susanoo: Sever
nodes.description:
Madara begins by elbowing his opponent, and follows with a series of six Susanoo Sword slashes and stabs, before manifesting his incomplete Susanoo to deliver a final, downward slash.

See Also[]
Sword of Kagutsuchi: Sever

Madara begins by elbowing his opponent, and follows with a series of six Susanoo Sword slashes and stabs, before manifesting his incomplete Susanoo to deliver a final, downward slash.

nodes.description: Sasuke has his Susanoo punch his opponent, followed by a Susanoo sword swipe, a Fire Release attack, and two further sword swipes.
nodes.full_description: Sasuke has his Susanoo punch his opponent, followed by a Susanoo sword swipe, a Fire Release attack, and two further sword swipes.

nodes.label: Susanoo: Tear
nodes.description: Madara has his Susanoo swipe the opponent with a sword, throwing them into the air, then manifests its incomplete form to deliver a cross slash with two Susanoo swords as they fall, knocking them further back.
nodes.full_description: Madara has his Susanoo swipe the opponent with a sword, throwing them into the air, then manifests its incomplete form to deliver a cross slash with two Susanoo swords as they fall, knocking them further back.

nodes.label: Susanoo: Smash

nodes.full_description: Sasuke swats his opponent aside and punches them with a Susanoo arm.

nodes.label: Susanoo: Rotating Flame

nodes.full_description: Shisui ignites his Susanoo's drilled spear with fire and drills into the opponent.

nodes.label: Susanoo: Dance of the Sword
nodes.description: Using their Susanoo, the user swipes it blade to unleash a large wave of chakra to slice the opponent.
nodes.full_description: Using their Susanoo, the user swipes it blade to unleash a large wave of chakra to slice the opponent.

nodes.label: Susanoo: Lightning Battle Formation
nodes.description: Using Susanoo, Indra brings down five bolts of lightning surrounding the opponent, where streams of electricity surge towards the center, causing a large electric blast.
nodes.full_description: Using Susanoo, Indra brings down five bolts of lightning surrounding the opponent, where streams of electricity surge towards the center, causing a large electric blast.

nodes.label: Susanoo: Fist
nodes.description: The user manifests a partially transformed Susanoo arm, which when used, can destroy a wall or repel a large individual.
nodes.full_description: The user manifests a partially transformed Susanoo arm, which when used, can destroy a wall or repel a large individual.

nodes.label: Susanoo: Lightning Flame Flash
nodes.description: With Susanoo, Indra swipes his avatar's sword, unleashing a fiery twister and leaving the field electrified.
nodes.full_description: With Susanoo, Indra swipes his avatar's sword, unleashing a fiery twister and leaving the field electrified.

nodes.label: Susanoo: Crush
nodes.description: Sasuke grabs his opponent with one of Susanoo's fists and crushes them within it.
nodes.full_description: Sasuke grabs his opponent with one of Susanoo's fists and crushes them within it.

nodes.label: Susanoo: Kamui Lightning Cutter
nodes.description: Kakashi throws Kamui-imbued shuriken at his opponent, transporting them to Kamui's dimension, before going there himself. As his opponent falls through the dimension, Kakashi manifests his Complete Body — Susanoo, channels a Kamui Lightning Cutter th...
nodes.full_description: Kakashi throws Kamui-imbued shuriken at his opponent, transporting them to Kamui's dimension, before going there himself. As his opponent falls through the dimension, Kakashi manifests his Complete Body — Susanoo, channels a Kamui Lightning Cutter through its hand, and runs his opponent with it.

nodes.label: Susanoo: Dance of Two Swords
nodes.description: The user's Susanoo swipes its blades, slashing with numerous waves of chakra.
nodes.full_description: The user's Susanoo swipes its blades, slashing with numerous waves of chakra.

nodes.label: Susanoo: Destruction
nodes.description:
Indra in his Susanoo creates a wave by slamming down both swords.

References[]

↑ Naruto Shippūden: Ultimate Ninja Blazing

nodes.label: Susanoo: Blade of Yachihoko

While in his Susanoo, Merz uses Yachihoko to gather chakra from all those who were under the effect of the Engraved Tsukuyomi, to increase the size of his sword.

See Also[]
Indra's Arrow
nodes.full_description:
While in his Susanoo, Merz uses Yachihoko to gather chakra from all those who were under the effect of the Engraved Tsukuyomi, to increase the size of his sword.

nodes.label: Supercooled Water Technique
nodes.description: The user employs Water Release and Wind Release to create supercooled water. The user can also create weapons out of the frozen water. With enough mastery, the use of Wind Release to supercool the water can be dispensed. While working fundamentally t...
nodes.full_description:
The user employs Water Release and Wind Release to create supercooled water. The user can also create weapons out of the frozen water. With enough mastery, the use of Wind Release to supercool the water can be dispensed. While working fundamentally the same, Sasuke states that this technique is inferior to the true Ice Release.

See Also[]
Water Release: Cold Sky Water Attack

nodes.label: Surging Fire Wild Dance
nodes.description: This technique is a barrage of taijutsu attacks. The user first attacks their opponent with a kick, which is immediately followed by a punch and another kick from the opposite leg.
nodes.full_description: This technique is a barrage of taijutsu attacks. The user first attacks their opponent with a kick, which is immediately followed by a punch and another kick from the opposite leg.

nodes.label: Susanoo: Attack
nodes.description: Sasuke lands a punch, followed by a few sword slashes, a kick, and a few more sword slashes before manifesting a Susanoo arm to punch his opponent.
nodes.full_description: Sasuke lands a punch, followed by a few sword slashes, a kick, and a few more sword slashes before manifesting a Susanoo arm to punch his opponent.

nodes.full_description: An application of Chidori through a Complete Body — Susanoo, whereby Sasuke produces a massive Chidori with its primary left hand.

nodes.label: Susanoo
nodes.description:
This article is about the technique. For the chapter, see Susanoo…!!.



Susanoo is a gigantic, humanoid avatar made of the user's chakra which surrounds them and fights on their behalf, that has been handed down throughout all the generations of the...
nodes.full_description:
This article is about the technique. For the chapter, see Susanoo…!!.



Susanoo is a gigantic, humanoid avatar made of the user's chakra which surrounds them and fights on their behalf, that has been handed down throughout all the generations of the Uchiha Clan.[2] It is the strongest ability available to those who have awakened the Mangekyō Sharingan in both eyes.[3]

Contents

1 Attributes
2 Development
3 Versions

3.1 Itachi Uchiha
3.2 Sasuke Uchiha
3.3 Madara Uchiha
3.4 Indra Ōtsutsuki
3.5 Shisui Uchiha
3.6 Kakashi Hatake
3.7 Hagoromo Ōtsutsuki
3.8 Merz


4 Influence
5

nodes.label: Supreme Ultimate Rasengan
nodes.description: Naruto merges his Rasengan with Minato's to create a Rasengan that drills through the opponent, causing massive damage. The Supreme Ultimate Rasengan, like the Tornado Rasengan, has several streams of chakra spiralling around the centre, but it has f...
nodes.full_description: Naruto merges his Rasengan with Minato's to create a Rasengan that drills through the opponent, causing massive damage. The Supreme Ultimate Rasengan, like the Tornado Rasengan, has several streams of chakra spiralling around the centre, but it has far more streams, completely covering the users' bodies. These streams are capable of deflecting attacks. The sphere itself appears unstable, with the shape fluctuating wildly unlike the solid sphere shape of other Rasengan techniques.

nodes.label: Superb Turn
nodes.description: Deidara creates two small birds out of clay and they fly towards the opponent and explode. These knock them back a long distance, and can ricochet off walls.
nodes.full_description: Deidara creates two small birds out of clay and they fly towards the opponent and explode. These knock them back a long distance, and can ricochet off walls.

nodes.label: Super: Human Bullet Tank
nodes.description:
Chōji jumps into the air where he performs his Super Multi-Size Technique, followed by an enormous Human Bullet Tank to slam into his opponent. 

See Also[]

Leaping Bullet Shell Tower
nodes.full_description:

nodes.label: Super Revival Fist
nodes.description:
The Super Revival Fist is the ultimate technique derived from dark chakra.

Usage[]
By gathering dark chakra in the user's hand, the user can create a dark orb with two dark rings around it. The user will then plough the orb into the opponent, result...
nodes.full_description:
The Super Revival Fist is the ultimate technique derived from dark chakra.

Usage[]
By gathering dark chakra in the user's hand, the user can create a dark orb with two dark rings around it. The user will then plough the orb into the opponent, resulting in the opponent being struck with tremendous bone-shattering force.

See Also[]
Chidori
Rasengan

nodes.label: Super-Ultra-Big Ball Rasengan
nodes.description: The Super-Ultra-Big Ball Rasengan is an even more powerful version of the Ultra-Big Ball Rasengan. The impact of this technique can carve a huge crater on the ground. In the anime, its strength was enough to uproot trees in its near vicinity.
nodes.full_description: The Super-Ultra-Big Ball Rasengan is an even more powerful version of the Ultra-Big Ball Rasengan. The impact of this technique can carve a huge crater on the ground. In the anime, its strength was enough to uproot trees in its near vicinity.

nodes.label: Super Tailed Beast Big Ball Rasenshuriken
nodes.description: Naruto enters his Nine-Tails Chakra Mode's Tailed Beast form, then proceeds to create nine separate Tailed Beast Ball Rasenshuriken within each of his tails, using the elemental properties of Magnet, Fire, Water, Lava, Boil and Wind Release, as well ...
nodes.full_description: Naruto enters his Nine-Tails Chakra Mode's Tailed Beast form, then proceeds to create nine separate Tailed Beast Ball Rasenshuriken within each of his tails, using the elemental properties of Magnet, Fire, Water, Lava, Boil and Wind Release, as well as Tailed Beast chakra. He then throws each Rasenshuriken towards his opponent, culminating in a multitude of explosions.

nodes.label: Super Multi-Size Technique
nodes.description: This is a heightened version of the Akimichi clan's Multi-Size Technique. It is essentially the same as the base version, though the user becomes significantly larger, on a scale comparable to a mountain. Because of their huge size, any physical atta...
nodes.full_description: This is a heightened version of the Akimichi clan's Multi-Size Technique. It is essentially the same as the base version, though the user becomes significantly larger, on a scale comparable to a mountain. Because of their huge size, any physical attacks the user makes are by default extremely powerful and cover a wide area. Such a drastic increase in size places a great strain on the user's body.[1] The chakra requirements to perform this technique are also quite steep; in Part I, Chōji Akimichi must take one of the Three Coloured Pills in order to have enough chakra.[2]

nodes.label: Super Pressure
nodes.description: While in his initial jinchūriki form, Naruto delivers a series of punches to the opponent before uppercutting them into the air. There, Naruto punches the enemy to the ground and delivers a series of punches before kicking the enemy aside.
nodes.full_description: While in his initial jinchūriki form, Naruto delivers a series of punches to the opponent before uppercutting them into the air. There, Naruto punches the enemy to the ground and delivers a series of punches before kicking the enemy aside.

nodes.label: Super Open Hand Slap
nodes.description: After using the Multi-Size Technique to increase their size, the user funnels chakra into their hands, which causes special markings to appear on them. The weight and power of the hands are greatly increased because of the larger size, the muscles ar...
nodes.full_description: After using the Multi-Size Technique to increase their size, the user funnels chakra into their hands, which causes special markings to appear on them. The weight and power of the hands are greatly increased because of the larger size, the muscles are activated with concentrated chakra, and the thickness is also increased. With so much chakra that it becomes visible, the user's palms become like an iron hammer. This gives this attack the power to even cave in the earth, causing extensive crushing damage to anything that may be caught beneath them. Due to the increased size of their palms, the attack covers a wide range.

nodes.label: Super Mini-Tailed Beast Ball
nodes.description: While in Nine-Tails Chakra Mode, Naruto gathers and balances the necessary black and white chakra to form a condensed, miniaturised Tailed Beast Ball. Upon impact, the ball explodes resulting in a very sizeable blast radius. As with the Rasengan, he ...
nodes.full_description:
While in Nine-Tails Chakra Mode, Naruto gathers and balances the necessary black and white chakra to form a condensed, miniaturised Tailed Beast Ball. Upon impact, the ball explodes resulting in a very sizeable blast radius. As with the Rasengan, he can extend the ball forward with the use of a chakra arm. Naruto can use a shadow clone to help him form the ball,[1] while in Tailed Beast Mode he can form it on his own.[2]

See Also[]
Compression Rasengan
Mini-Rasenshuriken
Runt Ball Rasengan
Tailed Beast Rasengan
References[]

↑ Naruto chapter 595, pages 6-14

↑ Naruto chapter 601, page 12

nodes.label: Super Inner Sakura
nodes.description: Sakura does a sequence of punches and then she strikes her opponent with a powerful punch that sends them flying. After this, she makes a rapid combo of punches and finishes with a strike with her knee and a powerful kick.
nodes.full_description: Sakura does a sequence of punches and then she strikes her opponent with a powerful punch that sends them flying. After this, she makes a rapid combo of punches and finishes with a strike with her knee and a powerful kick.

nodes.description: Minato dashes towards his opponent and kicks them on the knee. He then slides behind them and kicks the same knee again in such a way that the opponent fly into the air.
nodes.full_description: Minato dashes towards his opponent and kicks them on the knee. He then slides behind them and kicks the same knee again in such a way that the opponent fly into the air.

nodes.description: With Mitsuki's addition of senjutsu chakra and Sarada adding to the force of impact, Boruto's Compression Rasengan's compression and power is increased. Their combined might makes it possible to overcome the near impervious defences, like Deepa's Car...
nodes.full_description: With Mitsuki's addition of senjutsu chakra and Sarada adding to the force of impact, Boruto's Compression Rasengan's compression and power is increased. Their combined might makes it possible to overcome the near impervious defences, like Deepa's Carbon Armour.

nodes.label: Super Beast Imitating Drawing: White Sketch
nodes.description: Sai uses his Super Beast Imitating Drawing to create three lions and a large hawk. The lions hit the opponent rapidly and send them upward, where the hawk waits and fires a barrage of razor sharp ink feathers at the opponent, covering them in ink and...

The lions hit the opponent rapidly and send them upward, where the hawk waits and fires a barrage of razor sharp ink feathers at the opponent, covering them in ink and sending them crashing into the ground.

nodes.label: Super Beast Imitating Drawing: Flight
nodes.description: Sai creates several ink birds from his scroll to attack his opponent.
nodes.full_description: Sai creates several ink birds from his scroll to attack his opponent.

nodes.label: Super God Imitating Drawing
nodes.description:
The Super God Imitating Drawing is a technique usable by those who have mastered the Super Beast Imitating Drawing.

Usage[]
Often employed in one-to-one combat, the user is able to bring forth massive and powerful gods. Boasting greater power than t...
nodes.full_description:
The Super God Imitating Drawing is a technique usable by those who have mastered the Super Beast Imitating Drawing.

Usage[]
Often employed in one-to-one combat, the user is able to bring forth massive and powerful gods. Boasting greater power than the Super Beast Imitating Drawing, each creation can quickly deliver deadly blows capable of easily destroying stone and the terrain. Because these drawings draw on the emotions of the user, the angrier they become, the more powerful the drawings become.
Against Magire, Sai was able to strip the former of his chakra cloak and knock him unconscious with a single blow. Likewise, he was able to overpower and even throw the Gatekeeper a considerable distance.

nodes.label: Super Fang Wolf Fang
nodes.description: Man and beast transform into a single two-headed gigantic animal by the Human Beast Combination Transformation: Double-Headed Wolf technique, and just like its parent technique, have their body spin in a violent assault against the enemy. The power i...
nodes.full_description: Man and beast transform into a single two-headed gigantic animal by the Human Beast Combination Transformation: Double-Headed Wolf technique, and just like its parent technique, have their body spin in a violent assault against the enemy. The power is great enough to break through three Rashōmon gates without losing its power. In addition unlike its parent technique it does not first require the use of Dynamic Marking first.

nodes.description: Potcha and Mondai put on their football helmets and charge at the enemy with a high speed. The attack resembles Passing Fang, though it is unknown how much damage it causes, since it was only used once and was halted by Lee and Guy.
nodes.full_description: Potcha and Mondai put on their football helmets and charge at the enemy with a high speed. The attack resembles Passing Fang, though it is unknown how much damage it causes, since it was only used once and was halted by Lee and Guy.

nodes.full_description: Sai enlarges and unrolls the giant scroll with an image of a dragon that he summons to carry his opponent into the air and slam them into the scroll which the dragon itself submerges in.

nodes.description: While flying in the air above the opponent on his ink hawk, Sai uses his Super Beast Imitating Drawing to have multiple ink creatures descend upon the opponent and attack them. Then Sai dives down himself and slashes them with his tantō.
nodes.full_description: While flying in the air above the opponent on his ink hawk, Sai uses his Super Beast Imitating Drawing to have multiple ink creatures descend upon the opponent and attack them. Then Sai dives down himself and slashes them with his tantō.

nodes.label: Summoning: Triple Rashōmon
nodes.description: The Summoning: Triple Rashōmon is an upgrade to the standard Summoning: Rashōmon, which — as its name suggests — summons not one, but three menacing Rashōmon. The technique requires two summoning seals to be completed, and these gates serve the same ...
nodes.full_description:
The Summoning: Triple Rashōmon is an upgrade to the standard Summoning: Rashōmon, which — as its name suggests — summons not one, but three menacing Rashōmon. The technique requires two summoning seals to be completed, and these gates serve the same function as the single Rashōmon, but with triple the defence. The first gate takes the attack head-on, the second reduces the attack's power and the third disperses the pressure, causing all attacks that come in contact with it to lose their power before they can be effective. The defensive capabilities of this technique are further boosted by the lack of hand seals required to perform this technique.
The defensive capabilities of this technique was able to protect Orochimaru from dying from a Tailed Beast Ball, which he stated would have killed him had he taken that attack head on.

References[]

↑ Sha no Sho, page 250

nodes.label: Super Beast Imitating Drawing: A Hundred Demons Wandering at Night
nodes.description: Sai uses his Super Beast Imitating Drawing to create dozens of lions which shower down on the opponent. He then creates a giant dragon, finishing them off.
nodes.full_description: Sai uses his Super Beast Imitating Drawing to create dozens of lions which shower down on the opponent. He then creates a giant dragon, finishing them off.

nodes.label: Super Beast Flying Combo
nodes.description: Sai creates an ink hawk with Naruto riding high in the air and him and some shadow clones drop down on the opponent.
nodes.full_description: Sai creates an ink hawk with Naruto riding high in the air and him and some shadow clones drop down on the opponent.

nodes.label: Super Beast Flying Hammer
nodes.description: Yamato strikes the opponent with a wooden pillar where Sai's ink hawks attack the opponent in the air and Yamato slams the opponent to the ground with another wooden pillar.
nodes.full_description: Yamato strikes the opponent with a wooden pillar where Sai's ink hawks attack the opponent in the air and Yamato slams the opponent to the ground with another wooden pillar.

nodes.label: Summoning: True Fire of the Flaming Mountain
nodes.description: The user summons fire from the Flaming Mountains. Because they're naturally-occurring, physical flames, instead of being chakra-based, Kāma cannot absorb them.
nodes.full_description: The user summons fire from the Flaming Mountains. Because they're naturally-occurring, physical flames, instead of being chakra-based, Kāma cannot absorb them.

nodes.label: Summoning: Torture Chamber
nodes.description: This technique is used by Ibiki to summon an iron torture chamber around himself and the opponent. First, the enemy's arms and legs are captured by four chains, and then the walls of the cage appear flat on the ground, quickly folding together to box...
nodes.full_description:
This technique is used by Ibiki to summon an iron torture chamber around himself and the opponent. First, the enemy's arms and legs are captured by four chains, and then the walls of the cage appear flat on the ground, quickly folding together to box them in. Finally, a large statue falls atop the cage, which is then tightly bound in chains.
The floor of the cage is outfitted with a number of gears that can be turned to constrict garrotte wire, which is tightly wrapped around the victim's body. It appears that Ibiki can control the force of the gears using hand seals and chakra, using it as a method of torture and interrogation. He is also able to perceive the pain of the victim.

nodes.label: Summoning: Ten-Tails
nodes.description: Obito slams his right hand to the ground, creating a summoning symbol to call Ten-Tails. The Ten-Tails' fist will then burst from under the ground a short distance in front of Obito, striking the opponent. As the rest of the incomplete Ten-Tails surf...
nodes.full_description:
Obito slams his right hand to the ground, creating a summoning symbol to call Ten-Tails. The Ten-Tails' fist will then burst from under the ground a short distance in front of Obito, striking the opponent. As the rest of the incomplete Ten-Tails surfaces, Obito stands upon its head, ordering it to attack. An eruption will occur in front of the Ten-Tails, incinerating Obito's opponent.

See Also[]
Summoning: Nine-Tails

nodes.label: Summoning: Rashōmon
nodes.description: The user summons a large gate; Sakon and Ukon can only summon it together. The gate itself is designed to look frightening, with the gate's doors having a demonic face upon them; this is to intimidate onlookers, potentially warding them off. The gate...
nodes.full_description:
The user summons a large gate; Sakon and Ukon can only summon it together. The gate itself is designed to look frightening, with the gate's doors having a demonic face upon them; this is to intimidate onlookers, potentially warding them off. The gate's doors are tightly shut and solidly built, making it useful as a shield against most forms of physical attack. The stronger the attack, the more damage the attacker will do to themselves when they try and fail to break through the gate.[1] Sakon and Ukon praise Kiba Inuzuka and Akamaru for being able to dent the gate, which they say is Orochimaru's strongest defence.[2] Despite this, Orochimaru can also use a three gate variant, and beyond that is a five gate variant.
In the anime, this gate possesses offensive capabilities, with launchers installed in the roof-tiles that fire swarms of blades via a chain mechanism. However, launching too many of them near its base will cripple its foundation and the gate will collapse.[3]

nodes.label: Summoning: Toad Mouth Bind
nodes.description: Unlike the usual practice of summoning an entire creature, the user instead summons only the oesophagus of a giant toad from Mount Myōboku: Rock Lodging (妙木山・岩宿, Myōbokuzan: Iwayado). The oesophagus is summoned around a target; if this is done inside...
nodes.full_description:
Unlike the usual practice of summoning an entire creature, the user instead summons only the oesophagus of a giant toad from Mount Myōboku: Rock Lodging (妙木山・岩宿, Myōbokuzan: Iwayado). The oesophagus is summoned around a target; if this is done inside a cave or some other structure, it's possible the target will not even notice. The walls of the oesophagus are sticky and pliable, making it difficult for opponents to keep their footing and, therefore, fight as normal. The oesophagus is ordinarily inescapable, and over time it will contract around and digest its victims.[1]
Jiraiya can control the oesophagus, causing it to expand, contract, or grow in whatever direction he wishes. When first used, Jiraiya claims that no one has ever escaped from this technique. Itachi Uchiha and Kisame Hoshigaki manage to escape when Itachi burns through the oesophagus using Amaterasu. This surprises Jiraiya, as the oesophagus is fire-resistant due to the toad's ability to breathe fire.[2]
In the anime, Jiraiya demonstrates the ability to summon a giant toad's stomach using this technique. This section of the toad contains stomach acid, and the air within is filled with an acidic poison that is colourless and odourless, making it difficult to detect. Though it can be endured in small amounts, this poison begins to paralyse a person's entire body after ten minutes of continuous exposure, indiscriminately affecting anyone contained within the stomach.[3]

nodes.label: Summoning: Quintuple Rashōmon
nodes.description: While one is already boasted as an absolute defense, the user — without the need of hand seals — instantly summons five Rashōmon gates to neutralise incoming attacks. The user can alter the positioning of all five gates, even if it is to change the t...
nodes.full_description:
While one is already boasted as an absolute defense, the user — without the need of hand seals — instantly summons five Rashōmon gates to neutralise incoming attacks. The user can alter the positioning of all five gates, even if it is to change the trajectory of an attack. Not only were the combination of these gates able to redirect an attack as powerful as a Tailed Beast Ball equipped with a Susanoo sword, but they remained standing upon impact.[2]

References[]

↑ Fourth Databook, page 247

↑ Naruto chapter 621, page 8

nodes.label: Summoning: Rainwater Gate

nodes.label: Summoning: Quick Beheading Dance
nodes.description: Temari uses her Giant Folding Fan to create a whirlwind that is powerful enough to travel several hundred metres. As she swings the fan,[1] which has previously been smeared with her blood,[3] she summons Kamatari, which travels upon the winds and ra...
nodes.full_description: Temari uses her Giant Folding Fan to create a whirlwind that is powerful enough to travel several hundred metres. As she swings the fan,[1] which has previously been smeared with her blood,[3] she summons Kamatari, which travels upon the winds and rapidly cuts through everything in its path. The debris that Kamatari creates, as well as anything else in the area, is picked up by the winds and crushes whatever it is flung against. Because of how extensive this technique's damage and how wide an area it covers, it is most useful against hiding opponents or when the user is surrounded. The terrain is left flattened afterwards, which also means the user's location is exposed.[1]

nodes.label: Summoning: Toad Shop Technique
nodes.description: This technique summons a Shop Toad (見世蝦蟇, Mise Gama) from Mount Myōboku. This toad has the ability to transform into a building and with their chakra, the user gives the building a design they imagined themselves. The target is then lured inside, for...
nodes.full_description:
This technique summons a Shop Toad (見世蝦蟇, Mise Gama) from Mount Myōboku. This toad has the ability to transform into a building and with their chakra, the user gives the building a design they imagined themselves. The target is then lured inside, for example, with the promise of cheap drinks. Once the target has entered the store, the toad changes back into its original small form, trapping the target inside the toad's stomach. From the moment the cancellation hand seal is performed, it takes only a few seconds for it to return to its original shape, meaning there is little chance of escape.

References[]

↑ Sha no Sho, page 249

nodes.label: Summoning: Nine-Tails
nodes.description: The user summons Kurama, who they have under their control, to blast the opponent with the Tailed Beast Ball.
nodes.full_description: The user summons Kurama, who they have under their control, to blast the opponent with the Tailed Beast Ball.

nodes.label: Summoning: Lightning Flash Blade Creation
nodes.description: This is a special "ninja tool summon" that allows the user to seal ninja tools like swords or kunai into a scroll or their clothes beforehand, allowing them to be called upon when needed. The ninja tools can be summoned in an instant just by touching...
nodes.full_description:
This is a special "ninja tool summon" that allows the user to seal ninja tools like swords or kunai into a scroll or their clothes beforehand, allowing them to be called upon when needed. The ninja tools can be summoned in an instant just by touching the sealing "marks" which can be drawn anywhere. The greatest advantage of this technique is that the time between taking out a ninja tool, taking the right stance and actually throwing it is greatly reduced. Also when a weapon such as a fūma shuriken is summoned, the time needed to throw it can be further shortened by having prepared the weapon in its fully extended form beforehand.
The ninja tools are thrown with the speed of a flash of lightning, ruining the opponent's outset of the battle, and snatching away the initiative. Furthermore, because the summoned ninja tools can remain hidden until right before they are used, if this technique is mastered, there are an exceptional number of possible tactics. A large number of ninja tools can be stored within the sealing marks, which can make the efficiency of this technique last longer.

nodes.label: Summoning: Impure World Reincarnation
nodes.description: The Summoning: Impure World Reincarnation is a jutsu that binds the soul of a deceased person to a living vessel, restoring them as they were in the last moments of their lives in order to do their summoner's bidding. It was originally created by Tob...
nodes.full_description:
The Summoning: Impure World Reincarnation is a jutsu that binds the soul of a deceased person to a living vessel, restoring them as they were in the last moments of their lives in order to do their summoner's bidding. It was originally created by Tobirama Senju, some time after which he declared it a kinjutsu. Orochimaru would discover the technique decades later and improve on its use, while his subordinate Kabuto Yakushi nearly perfected it.

3 Countering
