The sphere itself is not a great form of detection and needs on-the-field reports to locate targets that should be kept track of. When linked with a Sensing Barrier, this imprecision is mitigated somewhat.

nodes.label: Sensing Transmission
nodes.description: By making physical contact with another individual, the user is able to transmit what they are currently sensing directly into the target's mind. The user's perception can then be further transferred to another individual that person is connected to,...
nodes.full_description:
By making physical contact with another individual, the user is able to transmit what they are currently sensing directly into the target's mind. The user's perception can then be further transferred to another individual that person is connected to, be it physically or through such means as their shadow.[1]

References[]

↑ 1.0 1.1 Jin no Sho, page 246

nodes.label: Sensing Hexagram Seal
nodes.description: The user places a hexagram seal on the ground that allows them to sense targets on a wide radius by transmitting waves through the seal. This technique could also identify if an individual was a medical-nin.
nodes.full_description: The user places a hexagram seal on the ground that allows them to sense targets on a wide radius by transmitting waves through the seal. This technique could also identify if an individual was a medical-nin.

nodes.label: Self-Taught: Youth Kick
nodes.description:
Might Duy jumps and delivers a powerful drop kick to the opponent.

See Also[]
Drop Kick
nodes.full_description:
Might Duy jumps and delivers a powerful drop kick to the opponent.

See Also[]
Drop Kick

nodes.label: Sensing Barrier
nodes.description:
This article is about the Konoha barrier ninjutsu.  For other uses, see Kanchi (disambiguation).




The Sensing Barrier is a giant, dome-shaped barrier placed over a designated area. The barrier is not visible to the standard eye; when viewed with c...
nodes.full_description:
This article is about the Konoha barrier ninjutsu.  For other uses, see Kanchi (disambiguation).




The Sensing Barrier is a giant, dome-shaped barrier placed over a designated area. The barrier is not visible to the standard eye; when viewed with certain dōjutsu, it can be seen that there is a design of several circles which have the kanji for boundary (界), and barrier (結界, kekkai) inscribed in them. When linked with a Sensing Water Sphere, all unauthorised passage in and out of the barrier can be detected and pinpointed.

nodes.label: Senbon Shower
nodes.description: This technique requires special umbrellas that have been spring-loaded with hundreds of senbon. The user opens several of these umbrellas and spins them into the air. As they spin, they release the combined thousands of senbon, which the user control...
nodes.full_description: This technique requires special umbrellas that have been spring-loaded with hundreds of senbon. The user opens several of these umbrellas and spins them into the air. As they spin, they release the combined thousands of senbon, which the user controls with their chakra. The user directs the senbon to fall upon the target, striking them all over like rain; to control so many senbon at once requires a great deal of training. Because of how many senbon there are, evading all of them is almost impossible. Furthermore, each senbon is supposed to be able to penetrate a five millimetre-thick steel plate.[1] The senbon can also be dipped in poison to increase their lethality.[3] Despite all this, Gaara's Shield of Sand completely protected him from damage.[4]

nodes.label: Self-Repairing Barrier
nodes.description: The Self-Repairing Barrier is a Cooperation Ninjutsu that by linking chakra from a team of ninja, will create a barrier which if damaged, will constantly repair itself with said chakra that emanates from their bodies. The barrier also prevents those ...
nodes.full_description:
The Self-Repairing Barrier is a Cooperation Ninjutsu that by linking chakra from a team of ninja, will create a barrier which if damaged, will constantly repair itself with said chakra that emanates from their bodies. The barrier also prevents those outside of it from sensing anything inside it through traditional methods.
The users can erect as much as 36 barriers, with the highest number being able to stop and contain any individual jinchūriki. It proved to be strong enough to take a direct Tailed Beast Ball from Killer B, with only nine of the thirty-six barriers shattering. However, Naruto Uzumaki transformed into his Nine-Tails Chakra Mode and forced the Tailed Beast Ball to push the rest of the way through with B following, showing it could not withstand the assault of two jinchūriki.

nodes.label: Self-Seal Technique
nodes.description: This technique allows the user to turn their body into stone, allowing them to store chakra for many years. The technique also keeps the user from ageing.
nodes.full_description: This technique allows the user to turn their body into stone, allowing them to store chakra for many years. The technique also keeps the user from ageing.

nodes.label: Self-Healing Technique
nodes.description: Upon forming the necessary hand seals, either immediately before or after being struck by an attack, the user's body will regenerate to heal all recent injuries and lost anatomy in seconds, leaving no lingering traces of said wounds.[2] This techniqu...
nodes.full_description:
Upon forming the necessary hand seals, either immediately before or after being struck by an attack, the user's body will regenerate to heal all recent injuries and lost anatomy in seconds, leaving no lingering traces of said wounds.[2] This technique can also negate the effects of venom on the user's body.[3]
With the aid of a special core made from Scientific Ninja Tools, the technique can be augmented to activate instantly and even restore the person from the most maiming of damage, including getting their head obliterated, restoring them to their original form within seconds. The core can be moved around the body via hand seals, lowering the chances of its destruction.[4] The negative effect of using the core, should it be removed as the body became modified to depend on it for stability, the user's body will mutate uncontrollably.
While stated to possess a regenerative ability in the manga, Victor's usage was never shown until the anime.[5] Similar to Boro's usage, Victor is capable of regenerating limbs and his head. If a limb is severed, Victor can manipulate the limb or use his blood as tendrils to retrieve and immediately reattach it.[6] However, Victor's regeneration is not perfect as it is not capable of keeping up with inextinguishable Fire Release techniques.[7] Also, since Victor utilised a cursed seal to extend his life, prolonged usage of this technique would accelerate Victor's decline in health, as his over-usage led to his permanent loss of his right eye and leg and likewise leaves him extremely drained.[8]

nodes.label: Self-Destruction
nodes.description: With their modified body, the user will initiate a self-destruction upon defeat in order to prevent the enemy from studying their body or to take out those who defeated them. If they have additional bodies stored away, they can transfer their conscio...
nodes.full_description: With their modified body, the user will initiate a self-destruction upon defeat in order to prevent the enemy from studying their body or to take out those who defeated them. If they have additional bodies stored away, they can transfer their consciousness via drone to a new body.

nodes.label: Self-Taught: Instant Attack
nodes.description: Might Duy opens the Eight Gates and delivers a powerful punch that creates a large vacuum, propelling the enemy away.
nodes.full_description: Might Duy opens the Eight Gates and delivers a powerful punch that creates a large vacuum, propelling the enemy away.

nodes.label: Self-Cursing Seal
nodes.description: Similar to the Cursed Tongue Eradication Seal, this seal can also be applied during combat, and can secretly be placed on the opponent's body. When the user activates it, the curse seal's marks spread around the opponent's body, paralysing them. Howe...
nodes.full_description: Similar to the Cursed Tongue Eradication Seal, this seal can also be applied during combat, and can secretly be placed on the opponent's body. When the user activates it, the curse seal's marks spread around the opponent's body, paralysing them. However, one can break free from the seal with a strong enough release of chakra.

nodes.label: Secret Technique: Tree Blood Barrier
nodes.description: The user manifests threads made of their own blood to encase the area around them. Anyone stained by the blood will instantly have their body and its actions controlled by the user. The threads are relatively easy to damage, but can regenerate. At th...
nodes.full_description:
The user manifests threads made of their own blood to encase the area around them. Anyone stained by the blood will instantly have their body and its actions controlled by the user. The threads are relatively easy to damage, but can regenerate. At the same time, there is only a certain amount of damage they can regenerate from. Their control is also not absolute, as it can be overpowered by other jutsu that control the target's actions. Alternatively, the threads can also be used to control weapons from afar.

See Also[]
Hundred Puppet Soul Binding
Spider Web Area

nodes.label: Secret Technique: Summoning: Mugen Castle
nodes.description: A technique created by Orochimaru. Kabuto uses eight seal tags to summon the Mugen Castle. The castle can absorb the people's vitality and is also capable of destroying the land where it stands. When the castle is destroyed by removing the eight seal...
nodes.full_description: A technique created by Orochimaru. Kabuto uses eight seal tags to summon the Mugen Castle. The castle can absorb the people's vitality and is also capable of destroying the land where it stands. When the castle is destroyed by removing the eight seal tags, it disappears without a trace.

nodes.label: Secret Technique: Sealing Release
nodes.description: Tsukino uses her two tantō to perform her technique. When using this technique, she can dispel seals.
nodes.full_description: Tsukino uses her two tantō to perform her technique. When using this technique, she can dispel seals.

nodes.label: Secret Technique: Mouth Seal Technique
nodes.description: The user initiates the technique with a specific technique seal and apparently before asking the target a question. If the target answers, the technique is then immediately invoked causing the person to lose the use of their voice. The target will re...
nodes.full_description: The user initiates the technique with a specific technique seal and apparently before asking the target a question. If the target answers, the technique is then immediately invoked causing the person to lose the use of their voice. The target will remain in this state until the technique is dispelled by the user.

nodes.label: Secret Technique: Insect Wall
nodes.description: By releasing a large number of kikaichū, the user creates a massive wall out of them, which protects both himself and allies nearby. The wall is strong enough to protect against large falling objects[3] and Fire Release techniques.[4]
nodes.full_description: By releasing a large number of kikaichū, the user creates a massive wall out of them, which protects both himself and allies nearby. The wall is strong enough to protect against large falling objects[3] and Fire Release techniques.[4]

nodes.label: Secret Technique: Mist Rain
nodes.description:
This article is about the anime-only ninjutsu. For OVA-only missing-nin, see Kirisame.




A technique known by Kirigakure hunter-nin. The user makes rain that absorbs any chakra it comes into contact with, as long as it's not of the same signature a...
nodes.full_description:
This article is about the anime-only ninjutsu. For OVA-only missing-nin, see Kirisame.




A technique known by Kirigakure hunter-nin. The user makes rain that absorbs any chakra it comes into contact with, as long as it's not of the same signature as the original user. The effect of this technique is powerful enough to absorb Utakata's Soap Bubble Ninjutsu and Naruto's Rasengan.

nodes.label: Secret Technique: Insect Tornado
nodes.description: This technique covers the enemy's entire body with the kikaichū living inside the Aburame clan member's body. The chakra-sensing kikaichū spread over a wide range, and the moment they locate the enemy, the insects, following the user's orders, gather...
nodes.full_description:
This technique covers the enemy's entire body with the kikaichū living inside the Aburame clan member's body. The chakra-sensing kikaichū spread over a wide range, and the moment they locate the enemy, the insects, following the user's orders, gather at once completely surrounding the target creating a fast-moving tornado that will seemingly disintegrate the target.

See Also[]
Parasitic Destruction Insects: Whirl

nodes.label: Secret Technique: Insect Gathering
nodes.description: By simply touching a surface with their palm and fingers, the user releases a small web of chakra that draws bugs to that location. Since the Aburame member can communicate with insects, it can be useful to gain information by gathering local insects...
nodes.full_description:
By simply touching a surface with their palm and fingers, the user releases a small web of chakra that draws bugs to that location. Since the Aburame member can communicate with insects, it can be useful to gain information by gathering local insects.

References[]

↑ Naruto Collectible Card Game

nodes.label: Secret Technique: Insect Sphere
nodes.description: The user sends their kikaichū to spread over a wide range, and the moment they locate the target, the insects gather at once, forming a sphere around the target. They then attach themselves to the target and begin eating away at their chakra. Even if...
nodes.full_description: The user sends their kikaichū to spread over a wide range, and the moment they locate the target, the insects gather at once, forming a sphere around the target. They then attach themselves to the target and begin eating away at their chakra. Even if the target manages to escape, the insects will immediately follow.

nodes.label: Secret Technique: Insect Cocoon
nodes.description: This unique technique allows the user to accelerate the growth of their insects. As the user's body is already a hive of sorts for the insects, the user will encase themselves in an actual cocoon to further aid the insects. This is an extremely usefu...
nodes.full_description: This unique technique allows the user to accelerate the growth of their insects. As the user's body is already a hive of sorts for the insects, the user will encase themselves in an actual cocoon to further aid the insects. This is an extremely useful move for Aburame clan members, since their attacks mainly focus on the usage of insects. However, using this in the midst of a battle can be potentially dangerous as it leaves the user static and vulnerable. As such when this technique is being employed, the user generally finds a safe location or otherwise can be guarded by their teammate.

nodes.label: Secret Technique Stone Needles
nodes.description: This technique makes use of the users chakra as a paralysing agent. The user throws kunai with strings attached at the opponent. Once the enemy is hit, chakra is ran through the string to paralyse the opponent, which will serve to either incapacitate...
nodes.full_description: This technique makes use of the users chakra as a paralysing agent. The user throws kunai with strings attached at the opponent. Once the enemy is hit, chakra is ran through the string to paralyse the opponent, which will serve to either incapacitate the enemy or allow the user to attack.[2] However, against those who can absorb chakra, this technique could backfire as the target may simply steal chakra from the user, while exhibiting immunity to the paralysis, as Kisame demonstrated.

nodes.label: Secret Technique: Insect Bog
nodes.description: Shino sends his insects to encase the opponent; the insects then lift the opponent into the air, and crush them.
nodes.full_description: Shino sends his insects to encase the opponent; the insects then lift the opponent into the air, and crush them.

nodes.label: Secret Technique: Insect Arm
nodes.description: Shino sends his insects that form roots and entangle the opponent and then explode.
nodes.full_description: Shino sends his insects that form roots and entangle the opponent and then explode.

nodes.label: Secret Sword: Snowstorm Beheading
nodes.description: While focusing their chakra into their sword while still sheathed, the user performs a Battōjutsu strike. From this, the user unleashes a powerful shockwave which becomes a massive tornado surrounding them, repelling everything in the area near the u...
nodes.full_description:
While focusing their chakra into their sword while still sheathed, the user performs a Battōjutsu strike. From this, the user unleashes a powerful shockwave which becomes a massive tornado surrounding them, repelling everything in the area near the user. Powerful as the technique is, it is not without drawbacks. It takes time and focus to unleash the technique. It is also very chakra-taxing, making it only usable once in a given day. Finally, the technique is also potentially dangerous to the user, as loss of control can potentially cause as much harm to the user as all other targets around them.

See Also[]
Wind Release: Shakujō Twister

nodes.label: Secret Sword: Moonlight
nodes.description:
This article is about a kenjutsu. For a technique with the similiar name, see Moonlight.



Hayate dashes to his opponent with great speed before attacking them with a quick lateral sword strike. The tremendous speed leaves a trace of an afterimage i...
nodes.full_description:
This article is about a kenjutsu. For a technique with the similiar name, see Moonlight.



Hayate dashes to his opponent with great speed before attacking them with a quick lateral sword strike. The tremendous speed leaves a trace of an afterimage in the process.

See Also[]
Hazy Moon Night

nodes.label: Secret Ingredient
nodes.description: Chōji headbutts the opponent and rolls into them two times.
nodes.full_description: Chōji headbutts the opponent and rolls into them two times.

nodes.label: Sealing Trap Explosion
nodes.description: Tsukino prepares a sealing trap on the ground which, when stepped on by an enemy, explodes.
nodes.full_description: Tsukino prepares a sealing trap on the ground which, when stepped on by an enemy, explodes.

nodes.label: Secret Anaesthesia
nodes.description: Using Yomi's snakes, Kusuna has them bite a target. The bite leaves a purplish colour around the area bitten mark and causes target's veins to swell up, after which they become temporarily paralysed.
nodes.full_description: Using Yomi's snakes, Kusuna has them bite a target. The bite leaves a purplish colour around the area bitten mark and causes target's veins to swell up, after which they become temporarily paralysed.

nodes.label: Seasickness Fist
nodes.description: Similar to the Drunken Fist, the user harnesses the queasiness caused to them by motion sickness to lend them a degree of unpredictability in combat. They can also vomit on their opponent in order to totally gross them out.
nodes.full_description: Similar to the Drunken Fist, the user harnesses the queasiness caused to them by motion sickness to lend them a degree of unpredictability in combat. They can also vomit on their opponent in order to totally gross them out.

nodes.label: Sealing Technique: Tiger Vision Staring Bullet
nodes.description: After the user draws a gigantic tiger, the illustration extends from the scroll and while still connected, captures its prey with its teeth and claws, before dragging the victim back into the scroll and pinning them down within the confines of the dr...
nodes.full_description:
After the user draws a gigantic tiger, the illustration extends from the scroll and while still connected, captures its prey with its teeth and claws, before dragging the victim back into the scroll and pinning them down within the confines of the drawing. Due to the enormity of the illustration, the user requires an extended period of time to complete the image, during which they need protection as their attention is devoted to drawing.[2]
In the anime, Danzō noted that to make this technique stronger, Sai would have to make use of his emotions. If the user is consumed by negative emotions, their eyes turn black, their pupils will turn red, and they will secrete a dark substance from their eyes and mouth. Because of his training in Root, this was initially impossible for Sai to control, but later, after seeing Rock Lee's determination to protect his comrades and remembering his time with Team Kakashi, he was able to.[3]

nodes.label: Sealing Technique: Vitality Seal Formation
nodes.description: Tsukino uses her two tantō to perform her fūinjutsu. When using this technique, she can temporarily suppress the chakra of multiple individuals in the area around her.
nodes.full_description: Tsukino uses her two tantō to perform her fūinjutsu. When using this technique, she can temporarily suppress the chakra of multiple individuals in the area around her.

nodes.label: Sealing Technique: Spirit Sealing
nodes.description: This requires a scroll to perform the technique. It allows the user to seal a soul from a human inside the scroll.
nodes.full_description: This requires a scroll to perform the technique. It allows the user to seal a soul from a human inside the scroll.

nodes.label: Sealing Technique: Three Directions Seal
nodes.description: The user, along with two shadow clones, creates a triangular seal around the opponent. Then a tetrahedral form of light traps and sends them up in the sky, leaving a large hole on the ground.
nodes.full_description: The user, along with two shadow clones, creates a triangular seal around the opponent. Then a tetrahedral form of light traps and sends them up in the sky, leaving a large hole on the ground.

nodes.label: Sealing Technique: Lion Closing Roar
nodes.description: This sealing technique completely blocks the target's chakra with a sealing formula (封印式, fūin-shiki) drawn on the ground or a wall. This is done by closing all the tenketsu of the person caught in the middle. When the target is sealed, a stylised ka...
nodes.full_description:
This sealing technique completely blocks the target's chakra with a sealing formula (封印式, fūin-shiki) drawn on the ground or a wall. This is done by closing all the tenketsu of the person caught in the middle. When the target is sealed, a stylised kanji for "close" or "shut" (閉, hei) appears in the middle of the sealing formula.
To successfully seal the target, one has to get them exactly inside the sealing formula. This task requires great accuracy and is very difficult to accomplish. Various methods can be used to make this easier. For instance, one can prepare a puppet or a ninja tool to deploy this technique. Monzaemon once equipped this sealing formula to the Lion-Headed Kannon, a tool used to pin a target down — which Chiyo then came to possess.

References[]

↑ Sha no Sho, page 295

↑ Naruto Collectible Card Game

nodes.label: Sealing Technique: Rōen Kodon
nodes.description: A sealing technique that is passed down within the Kodon clan, allowing its members to seal Rōen, a wolf-like monster that has terrorised them since ancient times. The seal must be placed at Rōen's weak point, on the back of its head. If successfully...
nodes.full_description:
A sealing technique that is passed down within the Kodon clan, allowing its members to seal Rōen, a wolf-like monster that has terrorised them since ancient times. The seal must be placed at Rōen's weak point, on the back of its head. If successfully applied, Rōen's body gradually turns to smoke, which then travels to and is contained within the Kodon clan's shrine. Rōen will only remain imprisoned there for seven years, at which time the sealing must be performed anew. Kodon can release the seal before then if they choose.
The back of Rōen's head is covered with tentacles that shield the area and attack anyone who comes near, absorbing their chakra. Because of this, users require another person's help to distract Rōen while the seal is placed. Even with help, there's a good chance that the user will die trying to use the seal, or even immediately afterwards while Rōen's body still has form. If the seal isn't correctly applied, it will at least dull Rōen's movements, making it easier to try using the seal again.
The seal can also be used to confine Rōen within another's body; as with its typical use, the seal is placed at the back of the head. Reishi Kodon's body was not compatible with Rōen, but his infant brother, Kina Kodon, was. Doing this doesn't carry the seven year time limit, but it does link Rōen's chakra with Kina's: if ever the seal broke, Kina would die within ten minutes if a new seal couldn't be performed. As a curious side-effect, the seal also seemed to compel Kina to stay near the clan's shrine, preventing him and Reishi from relocating to a new home.

nodes.label: Sealing Technique: Release
nodes.description: This technique is a counter-measure that can be used to undo fūinjutsu that may be binding the user. By placing their hand atop the seal, it activates, nullifying the effects of the fūinjutsu casted on them.
nodes.full_description: This technique is a counter-measure that can be used to undo fūinjutsu that may be binding the user. By placing their hand atop the seal, it activates, nullifying the effects of the fūinjutsu casted on them.

nodes.label: Sealing Technique: Octopus Hold
nodes.description:
The Sealing Technique: Octopus Hold is a fūinjutsu unique to Killer B, using his ability to generate clones made of ink.

Usage[]
A fūinjutsu made for large military affairs, it can instantly seal up to 1,000 enemies. The clones, when they flank and ...
nodes.full_description:
The Sealing Technique: Octopus Hold is a fūinjutsu unique to Killer B, using his ability to generate clones made of ink.

Usage[]
A fūinjutsu made for large military affairs, it can instantly seal up to 1,000 enemies. The clones, when they flank and entangle the enemy, begin to bind them. Within three seconds, the target's entire body is dyed by ink, completely sealing their movements; escape is impossible.[1]

nodes.label: Sealing Technique: Phantom Dragons Nine Consuming Seals
nodes.description:
This article is about the fūinjutsu. For the episode of the same name, see Sealing Technique: Phantom Dragons Nine Consuming Seals.




The Sealing Technique: Phantom Dragons Nine Consuming Seals is a technique that was used by Pain and the other mem...
nodes.full_description:
This article is about the fūinjutsu. For the episode of the same name, see Sealing Technique: Phantom Dragons Nine Consuming Seals.




The Sealing Technique: Phantom Dragons Nine Consuming Seals is a technique that was used by Pain and the other members of Akatsuki to forcibly seal a tailed beast [2] or to extract a still-living jinchūriki's tailed beast chakra into the Demonic Statue of the Outer Path. The technique took three full days to complete if nine of the Akatsuki members were present. Zetsu stated that if there are fewer people to perform the technique, it would take a while longer.[3]
To prepare for the technique, Pain would summon the Demonic Statue, after which each member would then stand on one of its fingertips, corresponding to their specific ring finger. When performed, this technique caused the bit to fall out of the mouth of the statue. Each of the Akatsuki members would then concentrate, causing the kanji of their rings to appear on the nail of the finger they were standing on. Nine dragon-like effigies then poured from the statue's mouth, surrounded the captured host, and painfully removed the tailed beast from them. In the case of an unsealed tailed beast, the same thing happened to the beast itself, and still took as much time as if it were sealed. After the process was complete, the beast was sealed within the statue, and one of the statue's nine eyes opened. The host would die due to the removal of their tailed beast. There is a numerical order, with the Nine-Tails needing be sealed last, or the statue would shatter.[4]
However, with Nagato now dead, Tobi claimed that they would need a new pawn to synchronise with the Demonic Statue in order to seal the Eight-Tails and the Nine-Tails.[5] Though Nagato intended to use it for peace in the form of a weapon of mass destruction to keep governments in line, the technique was created for Madara Uchiha's Eye of the Moon Plan, as Obito was tasked with ensuring that the Demonic Statue of the Outer Path and the tailed beasts would become the Ten-Tails once more.

See Also[]
Summoning: Demonic Statue of the Outer Path
Tail Releasing Method
Tailed Beast Removal Technique
References[]

↑ Sha no Sho, Page 294

↑ Naruto chapter 329, page 8-9

↑ Naruto chapter 419, page 11

↑ Naruto chapter 353, page 5

↑ Naruto chapter 450, page 9

nodes.label: Sealing Technique: Frog Suppression
nodes.description:
The user erects four pillars from the ground around their target. The pillars create a field that paralyses anyone caught inside. The paralysing effect can be countered through the use of another seal.

See Also[]
Lightning Release: Four Pillar Bind
...
nodes.full_description:
The user erects four pillars from the ground around their target. The pillars create a field that paralyses anyone caught inside. The paralysing effect can be countered through the use of another seal.

See Also[]
Lightning Release: Four Pillar Bind
Lightning Release: Thunder Binding

nodes.label: Sealing Technique: Four Limbs Weighting Seal
nodes.description:
This technique is performed by placing prayer beads around the wrists and ankles of the target and then pressing the palm against the target's chest. This increases the weight of the beads exponentially, weighing down the target's limbs.
Given how it...
nodes.full_description:
This technique is performed by placing prayer beads around the wrists and ankles of the target and then pressing the palm against the target's chest. This increases the weight of the beads exponentially, weighing down the target's limbs.
Given how it would be difficult to perform this technique in actual combat, its primary use is seemingly for training in a style similar to Might Guy and Rock Lee. As the target of this technique continues to train, the prayer beads change colour from white to blue, green, yellow and finally to red. Once they're red, this signifies that the training is complete. It is unknown if the prayer beads are an absolute requirement for this technique, or if it can be performed with any significantly weighed article of clothing, which would greatly improve this technique's battle efficiency.

nodes.label: Sealing Technique: Black Aura
nodes.description: Kuroma unleashes a dark and ominous aura capable of serving multiple purposes. The aura is able to subdue and restrain the opponent. The aura is also able to serve as an attack and defence, deflecting another attack or forcing the opponent into the d...
nodes.full_description: Kuroma unleashes a dark and ominous aura capable of serving multiple purposes. The aura is able to subdue and restrain the opponent. The aura is also able to serve as an attack and defence, deflecting another attack or forcing the opponent into the defensive by blowing them away.

nodes.label: Sealing Technique: Five Elements
nodes.description:
Kuroma uses his sealing tags to use the five element natures. 

Fire (火): Kuroma shoots balls of fire at the opponent.
Earth (土): Kuroma shakes the area around the opponent, who could get damaged.
Water (水): Kuroma creates a flow of gushing water und...
nodes.full_description:
Kuroma uses his sealing tags to use the five element natures. 

Fire (火): Kuroma shoots balls of fire at the opponent.
Earth (土): Kuroma shakes the area around the opponent, who could get damaged.
Water (水): Kuroma creates a flow of gushing water under the opponent which traps them in a sphere of water. Kuroma can perform an attack while the opponent is trapped. This technique is similar to Water Prison Technique, though Kuroma doesn't need to keep his arm in the sphere of water.
Wind (風): Kuroma unleashes a wave of wind that slashes at the opponent.
Lightning (雷): Kuroma fires a wave of lightning bolts at the opponent.

nodes.label: Sealing Technique: Crimson Seal
nodes.description: After executing the necessary hand seals, user creates a seal based on the Fire Release: Heavenly Prison, capable of immobilising and burning the target.
nodes.full_description: After executing the necessary hand seals, user creates a seal based on the Fire Release: Heavenly Prison, capable of immobilising and burning the target.

nodes.label: Sealing Tag Barrier
nodes.description: A barrier ninjutsu that involves the usage of several sealing tags being concealed beneath the surface. Once anybody steps onto the area, the tag will activate, releasing several thin threads that wrap around the target and restrain. Due to the fact ...
nodes.full_description: A barrier ninjutsu that involves the usage of several sealing tags being concealed beneath the surface. Once anybody steps onto the area, the tag will activate, releasing several thin threads that wrap around the target and restrain. Due to the fact that it contains sealing formulas on them, it proved to be very useful when dealing with reincarnated shinobi.

nodes.label: Sealing Release Technique
nodes.description: After throwing prayer beads on the sealed victim, Chūkaku begins to mumble words while performing ritual hand movements, leading the seal formula to slowly disappear. This technique seems to take concentration and strength since Chūkaku looked troubl...
nodes.full_description: After throwing prayer beads on the sealed victim, Chūkaku begins to mumble words while performing ritual hand movements, leading the seal formula to slowly disappear. This technique seems to take concentration and strength since Chūkaku looked troubled while performing it.

nodes.label: Sealed Iron Wall
nodes.description: A seal placed on the Fire Temple's gate to protect against intruders from the outside world. The two statues placed on either side of the gate form a barrier. Only ninja monks of the temple have access to enter due to the special chakra gifted from t...
nodes.full_description:
A seal placed on the Fire Temple's gate to protect against intruders from the outside world. The two statues placed on either side of the gate form a barrier. Only ninja monks of the temple have access to enter due to the special chakra gifted from the Gift of the Hermit Group. However, a powerful enough physical strike can break through the defences, as demonstrated with Kakuzu's Earth Release: Earth Spear. 

References[]

↑ Sha no Sho, page 296

nodes.label: Sand Stream
nodes.description: Gaara uses his sand to drag his opponents away in a stream to keep them from moving forward.
nodes.full_description: Gaara uses his sand to drag his opponents away in a stream to keep them from moving forward.

nodes.label: Sealed Binding Formation
nodes.description:
The Sealed Binding Formation (封縛法陣, Fūbaku Hōjin) is a capture technique (捕縛術, hobaku jutsu).

Overview[]
An array of sealing tags are placed around an area that can be activated with a hand seal and binds their target. Since the target is unable to ...
nodes.full_description:
The Sealed Binding Formation (封縛法陣, Fūbaku Hōjin) is a capture technique (捕縛術, hobaku jutsu).

Overview[]
An array of sealing tags are placed around an area that can be activated with a hand seal and binds their target. Since the target is unable to move, another individual will then be able to attack them with no problem. These tags can be deactivated by the user.

See Also[]
Barrier Method Formation

nodes.label: Sea of Trees Erosion
nodes.description: Using the Wood Release, a user can manipulate the terrain, bringing out underground roots of varying sizes to fit various offensive situations, such as using the roots for trickery, misdirection and restriction. One can also use a large scale version...
nodes.full_description: Using the Wood Release, a user can manipulate the terrain, bringing out underground roots of varying sizes to fit various offensive situations, such as using the roots for trickery, misdirection and restriction. One can also use a large scale version, bringing out massive roots over a larger area that tangle around each other with such force that anyone caught in-between is violently crushed to death.

nodes.label: Sand Sword
nodes.description: The user creates a giant blade out of sand to slice through the opponent's body with, which can stretch and slip through shields like a giant snake.
nodes.full_description: The user creates a giant blade out of sand to slice through the opponent's body with, which can stretch and slip through shields like a giant snake.

nodes.label: Sand Swift Spear Attack
nodes.description:
This article is about a technique used by Gaara in Naruto Shippūden: Ultimate Ninja Storm 3. For technique used by Gaara in Naruto: Ultimate Ninja 3, see Sand Blade Double Attack.




Gaara creates a drill-like sand spear which he hurls at his oppone...
nodes.full_description:
This article is about a technique used by Gaara in Naruto Shippūden: Ultimate Ninja Storm 3. For technique used by Gaara in Naruto: Ultimate Ninja 3, see Sand Blade Double Attack.




Gaara creates a drill-like sand spear which he hurls at his opponent.

See Also[]
Sand Prison Spear Attack

nodes.label: Sand Shuriken
nodes.description: Gaara, while preparing to enter Tailed Beast Mode, shapes the sand coating his arms into multiple shuriken. By swinging his arms - which are more powerful than normal because of his transformation - the shuriken are launched rapidly, with additional ...
nodes.full_description:
Gaara, while preparing to enter Tailed Beast Mode, shapes the sand coating his arms into multiple shuriken. By swinging his arms - which are more powerful than normal because of his transformation - the shuriken are launched rapidly, with additional volleys being possible with each additional swing. The Sand Shuriken, made to be stronger than steel, easily cut through whatever they come into contact with. This technique is a useful way to fend off approaching attackers, as well as a good way to stop opponents from fleeing.[1]

See Also[]
Paper Shuriken
Water Release: Water Shuriken
References[]

↑ 1.0 1.1 Tō no Sho, page 240

nodes.label: Sand Spear
nodes.description: After extracting an amount of sand from his Armour of Sand, Gaara shapes it in the form of a short spear. This technique can be used as a last resort when his chakra is drained or when he is unable to properly utilise other techniques.
nodes.full_description: After extracting an amount of sand from his Armour of Sand, Gaara shapes it in the form of a short spear. This technique can be used as a last resort when his chakra is drained or when he is unable to properly utilise other techniques.

nodes.label: Sand Restraining Technique
nodes.description:
The user immobilises and restrain the target's movements with sand. It's almost impossible for the target to escape from the technique unless apparently the user exhausts their chakra.[1][2]

References[]

↑ Naruto chapter 138, page 20

↑ Boruto epis...
nodes.full_description:
The user immobilises and restrain the target's movements with sand. It's almost impossible for the target to escape from the technique unless apparently the user exhausts their chakra.[1][2]

References[]

↑ Naruto chapter 138, page 20

↑ Boruto episode 121

nodes.label: Sand Mesh
nodes.description: Gaara uses his sand to create an expanding mesh, providing support and footing for his allies going after retreating enemies.
nodes.full_description: Gaara uses his sand to create an expanding mesh, providing support and footing for his allies going after retreating enemies.

nodes.label: Sand Lightning Needles
nodes.description: This technique is very similar to Sand Drizzle. Gaara launches a large amount of sand in the sky to rain down on the opponent. The sand then forms into needles which stick into the ground and create an electrical charge that drains or otherwise neutr...
nodes.full_description: This technique is very similar to Sand Drizzle. Gaara launches a large amount of sand in the sky to rain down on the opponent. The sand then forms into needles which stick into the ground and create an electrical charge that drains or otherwise neutralises electricity. Gaara uses this to disable Ranke's Plasma Ball.

nodes.label: Sand Prison Spear Attack
nodes.description:
Gaara first encases his opponent with sand, immobilising them, and then creates a large drill-like sand spear which he uses to impale them.

See Also[]
Sand Swift Spear Attack
nodes.full_description:
Gaara first encases his opponent with sand, immobilising them, and then creates a large drill-like sand spear which he uses to impale them.

See Also[]
Sand Swift Spear Attack

nodes.label: Sand Pillar
nodes.description: Gaara can form a sand pillar using the sand from the ground or by warping the lower half of his body into sand. Gaara manipulates the sand to suspend and manoeuvres himself in mid-air at high speeds. The sand maintains contact with the ground, thus c...
nodes.full_description: Gaara can form a sand pillar using the sand from the ground or by warping the lower half of his body into sand. Gaara manipulates the sand to suspend and manoeuvres himself in mid-air at high speeds. The sand maintains contact with the ground, thus creating a pillar-like formation.

nodes.label: Sand Hail
nodes.description:
Sand Hail is a larger scale version of Gaara's Sand Drizzle.

Overview[]
Gaara gathers his sand into large clumps in the shape of massive boulder-like formations and then drops them from the sky on to his opponents. It covers a wide range, making it ...
nodes.full_description:
Sand Hail is a larger scale version of Gaara's Sand Drizzle.

Overview[]
Gaara gathers his sand into large clumps in the shape of massive boulder-like formations and then drops them from the sky on to his opponents. It covers a wide range, making it difficult to dodge. Like the Sand Drizzle, the technique can distract the enemy with an aerial assault, leaving them open to an attack from below.[2]

See Also[]
Water Release: Hail
References[]

↑ Fourth Databook, page 321

↑ Naruto chapter 547, page 13

nodes.label: Sand Hell
nodes.description: Gaara creates a sand arm beneath his opponent, throwing them up in the air. Then he grabs them with two sand arms, and slams them to the ground.
nodes.full_description: Gaara creates a sand arm beneath his opponent, throwing them up in the air. Then he grabs them with two sand arms, and slams them to the ground.

nodes.label: Sand Formation: Shisa
nodes.description: The user generates one or multiple lion-like sand creatures to attack or subdue a target. They appear to be easily dispersed if struck hard enough.
nodes.full_description: The user generates one or multiple lion-like sand creatures to attack or subdue a target. They appear to be easily dispersed if struck hard enough.

nodes.label: Sand Exploding Sand Cluster
nodes.description: After using Sand Binding Coffin, Gaara creates a large boulder made of sand above himself. He then hurls the sand boulder at the opponent, crushing them.
nodes.full_description: After using Sand Binding Coffin, Gaara creates a large boulder made of sand above himself. He then hurls the sand boulder at the opponent, crushing them.

nodes.label: Sand Encampment Wall
nodes.description: Gaara summons a series of solid pillars of sand that come out from the ground and rise up beneath the opponent damaging them.
nodes.full_description: Gaara summons a series of solid pillars of sand that come out from the ground and rise up beneath the opponent damaging them.

nodes.label: Sand Cruel Pursuit Interment
nodes.description: Gaara manipulates his sand to create multiple arms of Shukaku rise from the ground and converge on the opponent crushing them into the ground.
nodes.full_description: Gaara manipulates his sand to create multiple arms of Shukaku rise from the ground and converge on the opponent crushing them into the ground.

nodes.label: Sand Drizzle
nodes.description: Gaara forms small lumps of sand high in the air, which he has fall on a target like rain. Gaara can control the sand lumps with his chakra, allowing him to ensure they strike their target and even guide them towards the target's blind-spots. Because ...
nodes.full_description:
Gaara forms small lumps of sand high in the air, which he has fall on a target like rain. Gaara can control the sand lumps with his chakra, allowing him to ensure they strike their target and even guide them towards the target's blind-spots. Because this control allows Gaara to strike the target from multiple directions at once, the target's attention will be focused upwards as they attempt to avoid it. As such, the technique is an effective distraction, allowing Gaara to use another source of sand to attack the target from underfoot.[1] This ground-level sand, in addition to being useful for followup attacks, can also be used to immobilise the target, preventing them from escaping the Sand Drizzle.[2]

See Also[]
Iron Sand Drizzle
Water Release: Drizzle
References[]

↑ 1.0 1.1 Tō no Sho, page 239

↑ Naruto chapter 215

nodes.label: Sand Cloud Dark Coffin
nodes.description: Many Shukaku sand arms come out of the ground near the opponent and form a sphere around the opponent. After it is lifted into the air, a vortex of sand surrounds it and it detonates.
nodes.full_description: Many Shukaku sand arms come out of the ground near the opponent and form a sphere around the opponent. After it is lifted into the air, a vortex of sand surrounds it and it detonates.

nodes.label: Sand Cloud Circle
nodes.description: Gaara manipulates his sand to create a spinning pillar of sand and dust to rise up from beneath the opponent lifting them into the air.
nodes.full_description: Gaara manipulates his sand to create a spinning pillar of sand and dust to rise up from beneath the opponent lifting them into the air.

nodes.label: Sand Cloud Dancing Rasengan
nodes.description: Gaara uses Sand Drizzle to knock out the opponent while Naruto finishes the combo with a well-placed Rasengan, stomping the enemy into the ground.
nodes.full_description: Gaara uses Sand Drizzle to knock out the opponent while Naruto finishes the combo with a well-placed Rasengan, stomping the enemy into the ground.

nodes.label: Sand Clone
nodes.description: Gaara shapes his sand into a lookalike of himself that fights for him. Unlike other clone techniques, the sand clone's composition is usually obvious at all times, only taking Gaara's shape and not his exact appearance. Because of this, the clone can...
nodes.full_description:
Gaara shapes his sand into a lookalike of himself that fights for him. Unlike other clone techniques, the sand clone's composition is usually obvious at all times, only taking Gaara's shape and not his exact appearance. Because of this, the clone can be reverted to sand at any time, most often when being attacked; as it's punched or kicked, Gaara can use the clone's sand to immediately capture the opponent's limbs. Alternatively, Gaara can use the clone as a decoy, drawing opponents to it and once they're close enough, manipulating the clone's sand against them.[1] Whereas other clones can only take so much damage before being destroyed, Gaara can reform the sand clone regardless of what happens to it.[2]
During the Fourth Shinobi World War, Gaara shows the ability to make a sand clone that looks exactly like the Third Tsuchikage rather than himself.[3] In this case, the sand clone he makes exactly resembles who they're based on, not being sand-shaped lookalikes of previous depictions.
Gaara is also able to hide other materials within the sand clones to be used against opponents who attack them, such as Gold Dust against the Second Mizukage's Steaming Danger Tyranny.[4]

nodes.label: Sand Cloud
nodes.description: Gaara gathers sand in the air that strikes down on the opponent.
nodes.full_description: Gaara gathers sand in the air that strikes down on the opponent.

nodes.label: Sand Cloak Technique
nodes.description:
The user cloaks the body of an ally with sand, acting like armour, which is strong enough to withstand a strong sandstorm without making the person flinch.

See Also[]
Armour of Sand
nodes.full_description:
The user cloaks the body of an ally with sand, acting like armour, which is strong enough to withstand a strong sandstorm without making the person flinch.

nodes.label: Sand Characters
nodes.description:
Sand Characters is a technique that utilises sand as a method of communication.

Usage[]
Sajin used this technique during the written test of the joint Chūnin Exams, where he altered the terrain by using sand to leave a message to his teammates.
Duri...
nodes.full_description:
Sand Characters is a technique that utilises sand as a method of communication.

Usage[]
Sajin used this technique during the written test of the joint Chūnin Exams, where he altered the terrain by using sand to leave a message to his teammates.
During the events of Naruto Shippūden the Movie: The Will of Fire, Gaara gave Jiraiya a bag of sand, which, when scattered, took the shape of a sign that signalled a temporary cease of fire for Sunagakure troops.
See Also[]
Water Characters

nodes.label: Sand Bullet
nodes.description: Gaara forms a small sphere made of sand and compresses it to increase its hardness. The sphere can strike opponents with such speed and force that it knocks them unconscious. He can also change its trajectory, to strike down multiple targets. By usin...
nodes.full_description: Gaara forms a small sphere made of sand and compresses it to increase its hardness. The sphere can strike opponents with such speed and force that it knocks them unconscious. He can also change its trajectory, to strike down multiple targets. By using this one small bullet, Gaara was able to defeat the Suna Assassin Captain along with all his subordinates.

nodes.label: Sand Blade Double Attack
nodes.description:
This article is about a technique used by Gaara in Naruto: Ultimate Ninja 3. For technique used by Gaara in Naruto Shippūden: Ultimate Ninja Storm 3, see Sand Swift Spear Attack.




Gaara sends two streams of sand towards the opponent, one stream ri...
nodes.full_description:
This article is about a technique used by Gaara in Naruto: Ultimate Ninja 3. For technique used by Gaara in Naruto Shippūden: Ultimate Ninja Storm 3, see Sand Swift Spear Attack.




Gaara sends two streams of sand towards the opponent, one stream rises into the sky while the other slides through the ground. The sand stream on the ground hits the opponent and carries him up into the air. Once in midair both streams collide with each other, making the opponent the epicentre of the collision.

nodes.label: Sand Castle Wolf Horn
nodes.description: The user surrounds their target in a vortex of swirling sand, which can be used as a medium for other sand techniques, like creating several Third Eyes, for information-gathering purposes.
nodes.full_description: The user surrounds their target in a vortex of swirling sand, which can be used as a medium for other sand techniques, like creating several Third Eyes, for information-gathering purposes.

nodes.label: Sand Body
nodes.description: Firstly deconstructing the sand from his gourd, Gaara's body also changes into sand. In this form, Gaara is invulnerable to damage and can travel over long distances as a rushing sandstorm, as well as maintain control over sand. It can also be applie...
nodes.full_description:
Firstly deconstructing the sand from his gourd, Gaara's body also changes into sand. In this form, Gaara is invulnerable to damage and can travel over long distances as a rushing sandstorm, as well as maintain control over sand. It can also be applied in battle, transforming parts of the body to increase manoeuvrability on the battlefield.

See Also[]
Earth Release: Mud Body Technique
Hydrification Technique
Iburi Clan's Kekkei Genkai
Water Replacement

nodes.label: Sand Binding Coffin
nodes.description: Using the sand he keeps stored in his Sand Gourd, Gaara immobilises his targets and captures them. Because the sand is naturally malleable, most of the target's usual methods for defence or escape become ineffective once they've been encased by it. T...
nodes.full_description:
Using the sand he keeps stored in his Sand Gourd, Gaara immobilises his targets and captures them. Because the sand is naturally malleable, most of the target's usual methods for defence or escape become ineffective once they've been encased by it. They can only wait until Gaara releases or kills them.[1] When killing his targets, Gaara tends to either let them suffocate or use Sand Waterfall Funeral.
In the anime, Shinki performs this technique using Iron Sand.[2]

nodes.label: Sand Binding Prison
nodes.description: A capturing ninjutsu that is characteristic to Gaara. Using ordinary sand, a perfectly airtight space is created, in which the enemy is captured. An enormous quantity of sand completely envelops the target from every direction and captures them. The ...
nodes.full_description: A capturing ninjutsu that is characteristic to Gaara. Using ordinary sand, a perfectly airtight space is created, in which the enemy is captured. An enormous quantity of sand completely envelops the target from every direction and captures them. The speed, hardness, and scope of the sand depend on the amount of chakra poured into it. Gaara can fine-tune the sand's properties to the target's size and characteristics. No matter if the target is on the ground or flying in the air, it is almost impossible to escape from this technique. However, even if someone successfully escapes from it, Gaara can easily use one of his offensive techniques, like the Sand Binding Coffin, to immediately attack the target.

nodes.label: Samurai Sabre Technique
nodes.description: Unique to Samurai, this technique employs the concept of chakra flow in a similar manner to the Flying Swallow and Sword of Kusanagi: Chidori Katana techniques. Through the use of chakra flow, the user channels their chakra through their swords, exte...
nodes.full_description:
Unique to Samurai, this technique employs the concept of chakra flow in a similar manner to the Flying Swallow and Sword of Kusanagi: Chidori Katana techniques. Through the use of chakra flow, the user channels their chakra through their swords, extending both the reach and cutting ability of the blade, while allowing the user to fire crescents of chakra whenever the blade is swung. This released chakra is capable of great destruction, as shown from how these projectiles completely penetrated a considerable stone pillar, before continuing to damage the immediate surroundings.
The samurai have also shown the ability to use shape transformation during the implementation of this technique, sculpting their respective chakra blades into various rudimentary weapons that extend beyond the natural dimensions of their original swords; such as broadswords, spiked shafts and even axes. This capability allows them to rely on smaller swords reminiscent of wakizashi, while attaining greater reach, damage and the possibility of conducting surprise attacks as necessary.
This transformational quality also appears to extend to even the crescents of chakra launched from the blade, forming a diverse range of projectiles that includes giant buzzsaws and shafts of chakra, the shape of which are seemingly dependent on the structure of the previously formed weapon.[1]

nodes.label: Samehada's Gonna Shank Ya!
nodes.description: B begins with a a couple kicks, before standing on one hand and spinning, kicking his opponent with both legs as he does so, and also striking them with one of his Supervibrato Lightning Release Swords in his other hand. Using the momentum of the spi...
nodes.full_description: B begins with a a couple kicks, before standing on one hand and spinning, kicking his opponent with both legs as he does so, and also striking them with one of his Supervibrato Lightning Release Swords in his other hand. Using the momentum of the spin, B gets back up and attacks the opponent three times with Samehada.

nodes.label: Sage Transformation
nodes.description: Sage Transformation (仙人化, Senninka) is a way of attaining Sage Mode,[1] using a bodily reaction exhibited by members of Jūgo's clan. By exposing their special body fluids to natural energy, they gain increased physical capabilities and the ability to...
nodes.full_description:
Sage Transformation (仙人化, Senninka) is a way of attaining Sage Mode,[1] using a bodily reaction exhibited by members of Jūgo's clan. By exposing their special body fluids to natural energy, they gain increased physical capabilities and the ability to perform various shape-shifting feats.

Contents

1 Usage
2 Variants
3

nodes.description: Kisame delivers several slashes to his opponent with Samehada whilst releasing water blasting his opponent and finishing with a downward slash that results in a pillar of water rising up.
nodes.full_description: Kisame delivers several slashes to his opponent with Samehada whilst releasing water blasting his opponent and finishing with a downward slash that results in a pillar of water rising up.

nodes.description: Kisame slashes downward in a reap, then drags his Samehada along the enemy's shoulder then slashes them with a turn, draining their chakra before stabbing the enemy and slams them into the ground behind him.
nodes.full_description: Kisame slashes downward in a reap, then drags his Samehada along the enemy's shoulder then slashes them with a turn, draining their chakra before stabbing the enemy and slams them into the ground behind him.

nodes.label: Sakura Special Shuriken Throwing Technique
nodes.description: Sakura throws five shuriken, which are connected to wires of chakra, chasing her opponent.
nodes.full_description: Sakura throws five shuriken, which are connected to wires of chakra, chasing her opponent.

nodes.label: Sage Mode
nodes.description:
This article is about the technique. For the chapter, see Sage Mode!!.



Sage Mode is an empowered state that can be entered by blending natural energy with one's chakra, creating senjutsu chakra. Sage Mode allows users to tap into the natural force...
nodes.full_description:
This article is about the technique. For the chapter, see Sage Mode!!.



Sage Mode is an empowered state that can be entered by blending natural energy with one's chakra, creating senjutsu chakra. Sage Mode allows users to tap into the natural force of the world, opening up new techniques to them and allowing them to power up existing ones with the new senjutsu chakra.

Contents

1 Training
2 Attributes

2.1 Advantages
2.2 Disadvantages

2.2.1 Bypassing the Disadvantages




3 Forms

3.1 Sage Mode

3.1.1 Sage Transformation


3.2 Tailed Beast Sage Mode
3.3 Six Paths Sage Mode


4 Techniques
5

nodes.label: Sakura Blizzard Technique
nodes.description: Sakura throws a barrage of kunai attached with bags of small explosive tags and cherry blossom petals to help camouflage the tags. Sakura simply has to throw an additional kunai with an explosive tag to ignite the tags and catch the target in a large...
nodes.full_description: Sakura throws a barrage of kunai attached with bags of small explosive tags and cherry blossom petals to help camouflage the tags. Sakura simply has to throw an additional kunai with an explosive tag to ignite the tags and catch the target in a large explosion.

nodes.label: Sage Combo
nodes.description: While in Sage Mode, Naruto creates four shadow clones, two that attack the opponent and two that help Naruto create Rasenshuriken, the attacking clones kick the opponent up and down and then Naruto throws Rasenshuriken at the opponent.
nodes.full_description: While in Sage Mode, Naruto creates four shadow clones, two that attack the opponent and two that help Naruto create Rasenshuriken, the attacking clones kick the opponent up and down and then Naruto throws Rasenshuriken at the opponent.

nodes.label: Sage Art: White Rage Technique
nodes.description: The Sage Art: White Rage Technique is a senjutsu used by those who studied in the Ryūchi Cave and mastered the Sage Transformation. After forming the necessary hand seals, the user expels a dragon-like entity from their mouth that carries an orb in i...
nodes.full_description:
The Sage Art: White Rage Technique is a senjutsu used by those who studied in the Ryūchi Cave and mastered the Sage Transformation. After forming the necessary hand seals, the user expels a dragon-like entity from their mouth that carries an orb in its left front claw. As the dragon tightly coils itself around the orb, it releases both blinding light and deafening sound by making the air oscillate. This alone greatly hinders those in the vicinity but, due to the intensity of the resulting vibrations, paralysing pain is also induced. Thus, the technique both briefly inhibits the opponent's senses, as well as techniques that require their active concentration.
According to Kabuto, only he is capable of functioning normally whilst this technique is in effect, thanks to the properties of his Sage Mode and his adopted abilities. Due to his snake characteristics, Kabuto can close the cornea of his eyes to completely block the harmful light, whilst instead relying upon the enhanced perception of his other senses to compensate for his obstructed vision. He can also liquefy the insides of his body in order to negate the effects of the harsh sound vibrations.

nodes.label: Sage Art: Yin Release Lightning Dispatch
nodes.description:
The Sage Art: Yin Release Lightning Dispatch is a ninjutsu used by Madara Uchiha.

Usage[]
By using Yin Release and combining it with natural energy, Madara releases myriads of white (purple in the anime) tangible lightning bolts from the palms of ea...
nodes.full_description:
The Sage Art: Yin Release Lightning Dispatch is a ninjutsu used by Madara Uchiha.

Usage[]
By using Yin Release and combining it with natural energy, Madara releases myriads of white (purple in the anime) tangible lightning bolts from the palms of each of his hands to capture the target.[2]

nodes.label: Sage Art: Wood Release: Ground Pulse
nodes.description: Hashirama's giant wood statue pokes a finger on the ground, causing wood to erupt from the ground, hitting his opponent.
nodes.full_description: Hashirama's giant wood statue pokes a finger on the ground, causing wood to erupt from the ground, hitting his opponent.

nodes.description: Hashirama's gigantic wood statue causes a wood dragon to erupt from the ground and strike his opponent.
nodes.full_description: Hashirama's gigantic wood statue causes a wood dragon to erupt from the ground and strike his opponent.

nodes.description:
Shima exhales a massive cloud of dust from her mouth, which is thick enough that it is capable of blocking the target's vision completely. The dust cloud is also large enough to hide a summon as large as Gamabunta.

See Also[]
Dust Wind Technique
Nin...

Shima exhales a massive cloud of dust from her mouth, which is thick enough that it is capable of blocking the target's vision completely. The dust cloud is also large enough to hide a summon as large as Gamabunta.

Wind Release: Dust Cloud Technique

nodes.label: Sage Art: Super Tailed Beast Rasenshuriken
nodes.description: This is an "ultimate technique" created by Naruto Uzumaki using the power given to him by the Sage of Six Paths. Naruto and eight of his shadow clones each form a Rasenshuriken that's been imbued with the unique chakra of a different tailed beast; Na...
nodes.full_description:
This is an "ultimate technique" created by Naruto Uzumaki using the power given to him by the Sage of Six Paths. Naruto and eight of his shadow clones each form a Rasenshuriken that's been imbued with the unique chakra of a different tailed beast; Naruto's reason for using such a varied attack is because he doesn't know which type of chakra Kaguya Ōtsutsuki would be weak to.[1] When the nine thrown Rasenshuriken strike Kaguya, multiple large explosions are created. Although Kaguya herself is not noticeably hurt by the attack, the tailed beasts' chakra contained within the Rasenshuriken resonates with the tailed beasts' chakra within Kaguya, preventing her from maintaining her humanoid form.[2] Jin no Sho describes this as, "the most marvellous ninjutsu of all time."[1]
The exact composition of the nine Rasenshuriken is never made explicit, but all are reminiscent of abilities seen elsewhere in the series:

The Rasenshuriken for Shukaku has a similar appearance to the Sage Art: Magnet Release Rasengan, which uses magnetized sand.
The Rasenshuriken for Matatabi appears to consist of the same blue fire that Matatabi's body is composed of.
The Rasenshuriken for Isobu is seemingly formed out of water.
The Rasenshuriken for Son Gokū appears to be the Sage Art: Lava Release Rasenshuriken.
The Rasenshuriken for Kokuō seems to be emitting steam, which Kokuō's jinchūriki have been shown to be able to produce.
The Rasenshuriken for Saiken resembles a bubbly gas. In the manga, the closest parallel is the corrosive gas used for Wisdom Wolf Decay. In the anime, it appears more analogous to the Soap Bubble Ninjutsu used by Saiken's jinchūriki.
The Rasenshuriken for Chōmei has no obvious source in either the manga or anime. Ultimate Ninja Storm 4 identifies it as being composed of Scale Powder.
The Rasenshuriken for Gyūki is seemingly made of ink, which Gyūki's jinchūriki have been shown to be able to produce.
The Rasenshuriken for Kurama appears no different from a standard Rasenshuriken.

nodes.label: Sage Art: Storm Release Light Fang
nodes.description: The user infuses Storm Release with senjutsu chakra to fire a sharp, thin stream of light from their mouth. It is powerful enough to cut clean through a Truth-Seeking Ball.[2] As it travels at the speed of light, it is described as being impossible t...
nodes.full_description: The user infuses Storm Release with senjutsu chakra to fire a sharp, thin stream of light from their mouth. It is powerful enough to cut clean through a Truth-Seeking Ball.[2] As it travels at the speed of light, it is described as being impossible to dodge.[1]

nodes.label: Sage Art: Many Ultra-Big Ball Spiralling Serial Spheres
nodes.description:
The Sage Art: Many Ultra-Big Ball Spiralling Serial Spheres is a technique utilised by Naruto Uzumaki which enhances his Rasengan with natural energy.

Overview[]
After creating multiple shadow clones with each of them holding a Rasengan, Naruto then...
nodes.full_description:
The Sage Art: Many Ultra-Big Ball Spiralling Serial Spheres is a technique utilised by Naruto Uzumaki which enhances his Rasengan with natural energy.

Overview[]
After creating multiple shadow clones with each of them holding a Rasengan, Naruto then enters Sage Mode. The clones then expand their Rasengan into Ultra Big Ball Rasengan and simultaneously strike the target, resulting in an enormous amount of damage, capable of even stunning Kurama.

nodes.label: Sage Art: Magnet Release Rasengan
nodes.description: A technique that's available to Naruto after inheriting the Sage of the Six Paths' powers. By combining his Rasengan with Shukaku's Magnet Release to reinforce its suction power, he creates a Rasengan with the beast's cursed seal markings. He then sm...
nodes.full_description: A technique that's available to Naruto after inheriting the Sage of the Six Paths' powers. By combining his Rasengan with Shukaku's Magnet Release to reinforce its suction power, he creates a Rasengan with the beast's cursed seal markings. He then smashes the sphere into his opponent in the same manner as a normal Rasengan. Upon being struck with this technique, the markings quickly spread across the target's body and immobilises them.

nodes.label: Sage Art: Lightning Cage Border Jail
nodes.description: Madara has his shadows take on a square formation and create a beam of lightning, going from shadow to shadow, which close onto the opponent in the middle of the formation.
nodes.full_description: Madara has his shadows take on a square formation and create a beam of lightning, going from shadow to shadow, which close onto the opponent in the middle of the formation.

nodes.label: Sage Art: Scattering Rage Technique
nodes.description: Kabuto expels numerous white dragons to attack the opponent.
nodes.full_description: Kabuto expels numerous white dragons to attack the opponent.

nodes.label: Sage Art: Magnet Release Rasenshuriken
nodes.description: The user accesses Shukaku's abilities to create a Rasenshuriken with magnetic and sealing properties.
nodes.full_description: The user accesses Shukaku's abilities to create a Rasenshuriken with magnetic and sealing properties.

nodes.label: Sage Art: Inorganic Reincarnation
nodes.description:
The Sage Art: Inorganic Reincarnation allows the user to breathe life into inorganic substances by filling the atmosphere with natural energy.

Usage[]
This Sage Art can be used to enslave objects with no life functions, such as the earth, giving the...
nodes.full_description:
The Sage Art: Inorganic Reincarnation allows the user to breathe life into inorganic substances by filling the atmosphere with natural energy.

Usage[]
This Sage Art can be used to enslave objects with no life functions, such as the earth, giving the user the ability to make even drastic alterations to the immediate environment that occur both suddenly and unexpectedly. This makes attacks using this method extremely difficult to avoid even for someone with the Sharingan. Among the various Sage Modes, only those who have mastered the senjutsu of the Ryūchi Cave can make use of this ability. 
Intense heat, like the flames of Amaterasu, can counter the effects of this technique, causing affected inorganic materials to revert to their lifeless state.

nodes.label: Sage Art: Lava Release Rasenshuriken
nodes.description: A powerful technique whereby Naruto, after accessing Son Gokū's power, creates a Rasenshuriken with a lava-infused nucleus, the heat of which causes the blades themselves to emit steam. The technique is strong enough to destroy a target's legs, and w...
nodes.full_description:
A powerful technique whereby Naruto, after accessing Son Gokū's power, creates a Rasenshuriken with a lava-infused nucleus, the heat of which causes the blades themselves to emit steam. The technique is strong enough to destroy a target's legs, and when expanded, it was powerful enough to bisect the Ten-Tails' tree form completely.

References[]

↑ Boruto chapter 32, page 8

nodes.label: Sage Art: Great Snake Lightning
nodes.description: A senjutsu enhanced version of the original, the user shoots cyan lightning shaped like snakes.
nodes.full_description: A senjutsu enhanced version of the original, the user shoots cyan lightning shaped like snakes.

nodes.label: Sage Art: Ink-Splatter Rasenshuriken
nodes.description: After accessing the power of Gyūki, Naruto forms a Rasenshuriken in ink.
nodes.full_description: After accessing the power of Gyūki, Naruto forms a Rasenshuriken in ink.

nodes.full_description: The user dashes towards the opponent in Sage Mode, attacks them with their snakes and finishes them with the lightning chakra snakes.

After focusing Senjutsu chakra to their throats, both Fukasaku and Shima croak together in unison, releasing large, loud and immensely powerful sound waves that effectively annoy, distract and temporarily paralyse any afflicted targets completely.

nodes.label: Sage Art: Amphibian Technique
nodes.description: This technique is used by Shima and Fukasaku to fuse with Jiraiya. It maximises the sage chakra for the person they are fused to and allows them to access Sage Mode. This also allows Fukasaku and Shima to continuously gather natural energy for Jiraiy...
nodes.full_description: This technique is used by Shima and Fukasaku to fuse with Jiraiya. It maximises the sage chakra for the person they are fused to and allows them to access Sage Mode. This also allows Fukasaku and Shima to continuously gather natural energy for Jiraiya, as he cannot do so himself while on the move, thus eliminating the weakness of exhausting all of his natural energy in battle. Fukasaku and Shima were not able to fuse with Naruto Uzumaki because Kurama rejected them.[2]

nodes.label: Ryūmyaku: Super Great Dragon Fire Technique
nodes.description: Using more of the Ryūmyaku chakra, Mukade shoots a larger, more powerful version of the Ryūmyaku: Great Dragon Fire from his puppet body's stomach. He states that this is his greatest technique. Unlike its lesser version, this technique doesn't simpl...
nodes.full_description: Using more of the Ryūmyaku chakra, Mukade shoots a larger, more powerful version of the Ryūmyaku: Great Dragon Fire from his puppet body's stomach. He states that this is his greatest technique. Unlike its lesser version, this technique doesn't simply burn targets but instead causes a massive explosion that can create a crater in the ground, and it does not leave any residual purple flames.

nodes.label: Sadistic Combination
nodes.description: Kakuzu delivers multiple punches to the opponent and then finishes them with wind and fire techniques.
nodes.full_description: Kakuzu delivers multiple punches to the opponent and then finishes them with wind and fire techniques.

nodes.label: Ryūmyaku: Great Dragon Fire
nodes.description: Mukade shoots purple flames from his puppet body's mouth using the Ryūmyaku chakra. The attack leaves a residue of purple flame around the area.
nodes.full_description: Mukade shoots purple flames from his puppet body's mouth using the Ryūmyaku chakra. The attack leaves a residue of purple flame around the area.

nodes.label: Rupture

nodes.full_description:
The user violently swings their chakra-enhanced sword with the intention of striking an approaching opponent, releasing a wave of chakra to cut a target.

nodes.label: Ryūmyaku Chakra Control
nodes.description: By controlling the vast chakra flowing from the Ryūmyaku (龍脈, literally meaning: Dragon Veins), the user is able to convert the chakra and use it in various ways including to power up an entire city and control a large number of puppets. If not stopp...
nodes.full_description:
By controlling the vast chakra flowing from the Ryūmyaku (龍脈, literally meaning: Dragon Veins), the user is able to convert the chakra and use it in various ways including to power up an entire city and control a large number of puppets. If not stopped, the user would have an unlimited source of energy to feed off of.
While anyone can control an open flow of the Ryūmyaku for their own purposes, only those of the royal bloodline can open or close the flow.

nodes.label: Runway Booster
nodes.description:
With their modified body, the user splits their legs open to expel chakra, granting them flight.

See Also[]

nodes.full_description:
With their modified body, the user splits their legs open to expel chakra, granting them flight.

nodes.label: Runt Ball Rasengan
nodes.description: The user creates a miniature-sized Rasengan through limited supplies of chakra. The full effect of the technique is unknown as Naruto collapsed before using it.
nodes.full_description: The user creates a miniature-sized Rasengan through limited supplies of chakra. The full effect of the technique is unknown as Naruto collapsed before using it.

nodes.label: Rumoured Endeavour Star

nodes.full_description: Might Guy opens several chakra gates, jumps high into the sky shaped like a star and crashes down onto the opponent, creating an explosion.

nodes.label: Ruining Sand Waterfall Burial
nodes.description: Gaara creates a zigzag fissure of sand under the opponent. The zigzag fissure then erupts into the face of Shukaku which devours and seals the opponent away in 200 metres of sand. Gaara will then place his hand on the ground and have the sand compact...
nodes.full_description: Gaara creates a zigzag fissure of sand under the opponent. The zigzag fissure then erupts into the face of Shukaku which devours and seals the opponent away in 200 metres of sand. Gaara will then place his hand on the ground and have the sand compacts itself with such a force that only a giant crater, 200 metres deep is left crushing the enemy into nothingness.

nodes.label: Round Moon

nodes.full_description: Sasuke jumps up in the air, lands a few fast spinning hits with his sword, and crashes down at his opponent with Chidori.

nodes.full_description: Yagura knocks the opponent underwater, before transforming into Isobu. While transformed as Isobu, he rams the opponent out of the water, and finishes them off by spitting a stream of water directly at them.

nodes.full_description: Obito absorbs his opponent and releases them in the middle of multiple detonating explosive tags.

nodes.label: Rotating Ferocious Wind
nodes.description: This is a technique used with the Weaknessless Soaring Shortswords, which creates a large gust of wind. When Seimei united the swords with the other three special weapons from Takumi Village, the gust of wind transformed into a very strong whirlwind.
nodes.full_description: This is a technique used with the Weaknessless Soaring Shortswords, which creates a large gust of wind. When Seimei united the swords with the other three special weapons from Takumi Village, the gust of wind transformed into a very strong whirlwind.

nodes.label: Roof Tile Shuriken
nodes.description: This technique allows Hiruzen to remotely control, levitate and hurl spinning tiles in the nearby area. In addition to being able to control the tiles remotely, he was able to pressurise them with chakra to make them far stronger than normal.
nodes.full_description: This technique allows Hiruzen to remotely control, levitate and hurl spinning tiles in the nearby area. In addition to being able to control the tiles remotely, he was able to pressurise them with chakra to make them far stronger than normal.

nodes.label: Rope Escape Technique
nodes.description: A tenet of shinobi is that they must escape any situation, no matter how difficult things may seem. Accordingly, this is the first jutsu taught in Konohagakure's Ninja Academy. When the user is bound, they do what they can to escape, such as by findi...
nodes.full_description:
A tenet of shinobi is that they must escape any situation, no matter how difficult things may seem. Accordingly, this is the first jutsu taught in Konohagakure's Ninja Academy. When the user is bound, they do what they can to escape, such as by finding a way to untie the knot or dislocating their joints in order to get free of the bindings. Although this is the most basic of the escape-based jutsu, it is still fairly complicated to perform.[1]

References[]

↑ 1.0 1.1 Rin no Sho, page 211
