nodes.full_description: Sasuke uses Banshō Ten'in to pull in any nearby opponents, with Sakura finishing with a strong punch.

nodes.label: Many Hidden Shadow Snake Hands
nodes.description: By increasing the amount of snakes summoned with the Hidden Shadow Snake Hands, the diversity of this ninjutsu is increased. The swarm of big snakes appear in an instant, each snake individually doing something like intimidating, diverting, or captur...
nodes.full_description:
By increasing the amount of snakes summoned with the Hidden Shadow Snake Hands, the diversity of this ninjutsu is increased. The swarm of big snakes appear in an instant, each snake individually doing something like intimidating, diverting, or capturing the enemy in a cooperative attack. Without giving them the time to react, the enemy is entangled.

References[]

↑ Sha no Sho, page 278

nodes.label: Manipulating Windmill Triple Blades
nodes.description: The user attaches one end of a wire string to a shuriken and the other end to a kunai. The user throws the shuriken at a target, expecting that the target will dodge it. The user then loops the kunai around a tree (or something similar) and throws th...
nodes.full_description:
The user attaches one end of a wire string to a shuriken and the other end to a kunai. The user throws the shuriken at a target, expecting that the target will dodge it. The user then loops the kunai around a tree (or something similar) and throws the kunai, which the target will also dodge. When the kunai reaches the end of the string's length, it pulls the shuriken back towards the target, striking them from behind; Rin no Sho compares the action to a yo-yo. Because the manoeuvre's effectiveness relies on anticipating the target's movements, having the Sharingan is invaluable to its success.[1]
When Sasuke Uchiha uses this technique against Orochimaru, Orochimaru is able to capture the returning shuriken. Sasuke planned for this, allowing him to send Fire Release: Dragon Fire Technique at Orochimaru along the shuriken's string.[2]

nodes.label: Manipulating Attack Blades Explosion
nodes.description: An identical technique to the Manipulating Attack Blades technique, but instead, the kunai thrown have explosive tags attached to them and as a result, the attack is more lethal, causing an explosion on contact.
nodes.full_description: An identical technique to the Manipulating Attack Blades technique, but instead, the kunai thrown have explosive tags attached to them and as a result, the attack is more lethal, causing an explosion on contact.

nodes.label: Manipulating Attack Blades
nodes.description: This technique allows the user to control multiple kunai - or a similar weapon - at once. By releasing chakra from the hand over an area, the user can freely manipulate any kunai within that area. This allows the user to either attack opponents from ...
nodes.full_description:
This technique allows the user to control multiple kunai - or a similar weapon - at once. By releasing chakra from the hand over an area, the user can freely manipulate any kunai within that area. This allows the user to either attack opponents from their blindside or surround them with kunai, preventing them from escaping.[1] If the Puppet Technique's chakra threads are attached to the manipulated kunai, the chakra threads can then be transferred to the kunai's target upon contact, giving users an easy (and potentially unnoticed) way of manipulating opponents outside their range.[3]
In Gaara Hiden, Amagi throws a volley of projectiles and then, as they near their target, uses chakra threads to manipulate them, steering the projectiles around the target's defenses and grouping them together for a more focused attack.

See Also[]
Chakra Levitation Technique
Wind Release: Verdant Mountain Gale
References[]

↑ 1.0 1.1 Tō no Sho, page 241

↑ Naruto Collectible Card Game

↑ Naruto chapter 266, page 5

nodes.label: Manipulated Tools: Thousand Blades Attack Performance

nodes.full_description: Tenten performs a back-flip and opens a scroll in the air, releasing a variety of bladed weapons that are then directed at her opponent.

nodes.label: Manipulated Tools: Ten Thousand Wild Heavenly Blades
nodes.description: Tenten summons multiple weapons connected with wire strings to her fingertips from one of her scrolls, directing them towards her opponent in a stream formation. After the final weapon hits the opponent, Tenten uses the strings to make the weapons fl...
nodes.full_description: Tenten summons multiple weapons connected with wire strings to her fingertips from one of her scrolls, directing them towards her opponent in a stream formation. After the final weapon hits the opponent, Tenten uses the strings to make the weapons fly above her opponent. Moving her fingers to make the weapons spin, she then directs the weapons downwards to hit the opponent down into the ground again.

nodes.label: Manipulated Tools: One Thousand Blades Attack
nodes.description: This technique is very similar to Twin Rising Dragons. But in this version, Tenten only summons countless kunai from her two scrolls, which are connected by strings on her fingers. She then throws all the kunai at the same time on the opponent.
nodes.full_description: This technique is very similar to Twin Rising Dragons. But in this version, Tenten only summons countless kunai from her two scrolls, which are connected by strings on her fingers. She then throws all the kunai at the same time on the opponent.

nodes.description: Tenten repeatedly hits her opponent with a pair of tonfa, then tosses a scroll in the air to summon a bō and continues hitting them with it, ultimately knocking them to the ground. When the opponent is lying on the ground, she then summons a huge spi...
nodes.full_description: Tenten repeatedly hits her opponent with a pair of tonfa, then tosses a scroll in the air to summon a bō and continues hitting them with it, ultimately knocking them to the ground. When the opponent is lying on the ground, she then summons a huge spiked club and crushes them with it.

nodes.label: Manipulated Tools: Heavenly Steel Disaster
nodes.description: Tenten tosses and unrolls her large scroll over the opponent, summoning countless kunai from the scroll to rain down on the opponent. She then summons four large chains that collapse on the opponent, forcing them down to the ground.
nodes.full_description: Tenten tosses and unrolls her large scroll over the opponent, summoning countless kunai from the scroll to rain down on the opponent. She then summons four large chains that collapse on the opponent, forcing them down to the ground.

nodes.label: Manipulated Tools: Heavenly Chain Disaster
nodes.description:
The Manipulated Tools: Heavenly Chain Disaster is a stronger version of Tenten's Twin Rising Dragons technique. 

Usage[]
Tenten tosses her large scroll into the air above her opponent, then unseals a myriad of different weapons to rain down with eno...
nodes.full_description:
The Manipulated Tools: Heavenly Chain Disaster is a stronger version of Tenten's Twin Rising Dragons technique. 

Usage[]
Tenten tosses her large scroll into the air above her opponent, then unseals a myriad of different weapons to rain down with enough force to impale anyone in the immediate vicinity and crater the ground. The weapons move so fast that they appear as white streaks, and due to the fact that the attack covers a large area, it makes this technique quite difficult to evade.

nodes.description: Tenten takes out a big scroll and waves it in a circle. It turns into a giant chain hammer with a huge metal ball at the end that she then crushes the opponent with. After crushing her opponent, the metal ball turns back into a scroll.
nodes.full_description: Tenten takes out a big scroll and waves it in a circle. It turns into a giant chain hammer with a huge metal ball at the end that she then crushes the opponent with. After crushing her opponent, the metal ball turns back into a scroll.

nodes.full_description: Tenten throws five spiked iron balls at her opponent, then she unrolls her giant scroll and summons a giant spiked iron ball connected by wire strings to her hand, which she then slams onto her opponent.

nodes.full_description: Tenten unrolls two scrolls under her opponent and summons a barrage of different weapons from them, launching the opponent into the air. She then wraps their legs with a chain and pulls them down, sending them crashing into the ground.

nodes.description: Tenten summons several weapons connected together by strings and jumps into the air, reeling them together to stack on top of each other. She then stands on the top weapon on one foot, and twirls backwards, rapidly shooting the ninja tools at the opp...

She then stands on the top weapon on one foot, and twirls backwards, rapidly shooting the ninja tools at the opponent like a machine gun.

nodes.label: Lightning Water Dragon Bullet
nodes.description:
This Lightning Water Dragon Bullet is a cooperation ninjutsu used by Mei Terumī and A.

Usage[]
After kneading chakra in her stomach and converting it into water, Mei expels it in the shape of a dragon. Taking advantage of the highly conductive natur...
nodes.full_description:
This Lightning Water Dragon Bullet is a cooperation ninjutsu used by Mei Terumī and A.

Usage[]
After kneading chakra in her stomach and converting it into water, Mei expels it in the shape of a dragon. Taking advantage of the highly conductive nature of water, A then imbues the water dragon with lightning-natured chakra. When this technique makes contact with a target, it numbs their body, thereby dulling their movements and leaving them susceptible to other attacks.

References[]

↑ Fourth Databook, page 328

nodes.label: Manipulated Shuriken Wire Binding
nodes.description: By using shuriken with wire strings attached to them, the user can set a trap for their target. Using the shuriken to spread and set the wires around, they can position them as to bind their target, requiring only to trigger a change of position of t...
nodes.full_description: By using shuriken with wire strings attached to them, the user can set a trap for their target. Using the shuriken to spread and set the wires around, they can position them as to bind their target, requiring only to trigger a change of position of the set wires, such as cutting one of them, causing the others to rearrange. If a shinobi is highly perceptive, such as a Sharingan user, it is possible to use one's own projectiles to change the course of the wired shuriken as the trap is set, making it so the one setting the trap is immobilised instead.

This article is about the game only technique. For the Uchiha clan dōjutsu, see Mangekyō Sharingan.




The user activates their Mangekyō Sharingan when in the Sharingan Mode and traps their target in an illusion that confuses them for a short period...
nodes.full_description:
This article is about the game only technique. For the Uchiha clan dōjutsu, see Mangekyō Sharingan.




The user activates their Mangekyō Sharingan when in the Sharingan Mode and traps their target in an illusion that confuses them for a short period of time as they drop to their knees.

nodes.label: Manipulated Shuriken Technique
nodes.description: With this technique a translucent string, both elastic and highly durable, is attached to a shuriken, making it possible to alter its path after having thrown it. An expert will have the ability to freely glide the shuriken in any direction with just...
nodes.full_description:
With this technique a translucent string, both elastic and highly durable, is attached to a shuriken, making it possible to alter its path after having thrown it. An expert will have the ability to freely glide the shuriken in any direction with just a single movement of their fingertip. The first attack, challenging the enemy, is avoided and after a time-lag of several seconds, it will come from behind. Depending on the performance, the possible tactics can be infinite. In the anime, this has also been applied to various other weapons, as  Tenten manipulated a myriad of pojectiles simultaneously.[2][3]

References[]

↑ Sha no Sho, page 282

↑ Naruto episode 43

↑ Boruto episode 230

nodes.label: Lightning Release: Thunder Binding
nodes.description: This technique lets the user create a three-sided wall of electricity to bind their opponent. The user must have three conductors to stick in the ground to create the points. Furthermore, once the enemy is inside, if they come into contact with the w...
nodes.full_description:
This technique lets the user create a three-sided wall of electricity to bind their opponent. The user must have three conductors to stick in the ground to create the points. Furthermore, once the enemy is inside, if they come into contact with the wall they will be electrocuted. The only way the technique can be broken is if an outside party were to strike one of the walls with a strong enough attack, which will then deactivate the other walls.

See Also[]
Lightning Release: Four Pillar Bind

nodes.full_description:
The Lightning Release: Snake Lightning technique allows the user to generate a discharge of yellow electricity from their hand, which can electrocute a target by either emitting it around the user's body while they're submerged in water,[1] thrusting it into a target,[2] or manifesting a snake from the concentrated chakra to attack from a distance.

See Also[]
Chidori
Hell Stab
References[]

↑ Boruto episode 6

↑ Boruto episode 37

nodes.label: Lightning Release: Purple Electricity
nodes.description: The user shoots a bolt of electricity from their hand to strike a target. It was invented by Kakashi Hatake as a replacement for the Lightning Cutter, which he could no longer safely use after the loss of his Sharingan. In Kakashi Hiden, Kakashi typi...
nodes.full_description:
The user shoots a bolt of electricity from their hand to strike a target. It was invented by Kakashi Hatake as a replacement for the Lightning Cutter, which he could no longer safely use after the loss of his Sharingan. In Kakashi Hiden, Kakashi typically uses Purple Electricity to strike targets from a distance, though he does sometimes use it through direct contact, as when he places his hand on spilled alcohol in order to transmit Purple Electricity throughout the surrounding area. He can modulate the intensity of the Purple Electricity, creating a blast strong enough to remove a target's explosive vest but without setting off the explosive or otherwise affecting the target. Conversely, he is later shown using all his chakra to perform a Purple Electricity powerful enough to induce the rain clouds he's falling through to start producing rain.
Purple Electricity has sometimes been shown used in ways reminiscent of the Lightning Cutter, with the user gathering lightning to their hand and quickly striking targets with it.[2][3] Kakashi could even use it similarly to the Chidori Current, sending bolts of purple lightning all around his body in a omni-directional attack.[4] After mastering Uchiha Style Kenjutsu under Sasuke’s tutelage, Boruto learns to channel his own Purple Electricity through his blade, similar to Chidori Katana.[5]

nodes.label: Lightning Release: Sixteen Pillar Bind
nodes.description: A more powerful version of Lightning Release: Four Pillar Bind, the user creates sixteen giant pillars, which then form a giant oven-like structure to trap the target. It is used after Earth Release: Sticky Earth Drop to cover them in mud and then fo...
nodes.full_description: A more powerful version of Lightning Release: Four Pillar Bind, the user creates sixteen giant pillars, which then form a giant oven-like structure to trap the target. It is used after Earth Release: Sticky Earth Drop to cover them in mud and then followed by Fire Release: Fired Pottery Technique, creating flames inside the oven to roast and harden the mud, immobilising them.

nodes.label: Lightning Release: Shadow Clone Technique
nodes.description: This technique allows the user to make a shadow clone infused with lightning. Because it is a shadow clone, it is able to perform techniques and interact with the environment. If the clone is injured, it will revert to its natural lightning-state, at...
nodes.full_description:
This technique allows the user to make a shadow clone infused with lightning. Because it is a shadow clone, it is able to perform techniques and interact with the environment. If the clone is injured, it will revert to its natural lightning-state, at the same time electrocuting whatever makes contact with it. Unlike a regular shadow clone, however, it does not send chakra back to the user upon reverting to lightning.

See Also[]
Earth Release: Shadow Clone
References[]

↑ Fourth Databook, page 304

nodes.label: Lightning Release: Reverse Lift
nodes.description: Darui lands a series of hits with his cleaver sword, followed by a lightning infused stab, which pushes his opponent back, and finishes it by sending a burst of lightning chakra through the ground with his sword, throwing his opponent up in the air.
nodes.full_description: Darui lands a series of hits with his cleaver sword, followed by a lightning infused stab, which pushes his opponent back, and finishes it by sending a burst of lightning chakra through the ground with his sword, throwing his opponent up in the air.

nodes.full_description: The user channels their lightning chakra around their club, enhancing the force of the strikes launched.

nodes.label: Lightning Release: Overdrive
nodes.description:
By utilising Lightning Release, the user can speed up the signals that are sent from the brain to the muscles to increase the user's striking speed. The technique also gives the user cutting capabilities from barehanded attacks.

Shinobi-Ware Usage[]...
nodes.full_description:
By utilising Lightning Release, the user can speed up the signals that are sent from the brain to the muscles to increase the user's striking speed. The technique also gives the user cutting capabilities from barehanded attacks.

Shinobi-Ware Usage[]
Using his Lightning Release Suit's Lightning Release generator, Denki can create electic pulses to stimulate all his body's muscles to greatly enhance his reflex speed, allowing him to use "Pseudo Lightning Release: Overdrive" (疑似雷遁・オーバードライブ, Giji Raiton: Ōbādoraibu).[1]

References[]

↑ Boruto episode 222


See Also[]

Lightning Strike Armour

nodes.description: The user releases a current of purplish lightning from their hands forward, damaging and knocking away opponents. This technique is similar to Chidori Current as they both have the effect of shooting lightning currents at their opponent. Its range, u...
nodes.full_description: The user releases a current of purplish lightning from their hands forward, damaging and knocking away opponents. This technique is similar to Chidori Current as they both have the effect of shooting lightning currents at their opponent. Its range, unlike that of Chidori Current, is much smaller. Unlike Lightning Cutter it has a smaller current of lightning so it will not completely kill them.

nodes.label: Lightning Release: Lightning Beast Tracking Fang
nodes.description: Kakashi forms a Lightning Cutter in his hand and launches it at the opponent in the form a hound. The hound is highly fast and its movements are unpredictable, making it is very difficult to avoid. As the Kakashi's hand remains connected to the hound...
nodes.full_description: Kakashi forms a Lightning Cutter in his hand and launches it at the opponent in the form a hound. The hound is highly fast and its movements are unpredictable, making it is very difficult to avoid. As the Kakashi's hand remains connected to the hound by a cord of lightning, adjusting the amount of chakra used for the technique allows him to freely manipulate its speed and range.

nodes.label: Lightning Release: Lightning Illusion Flash of Lightning Pillar
nodes.description:
The Lightning Release: Lightning Illusion Flash of Lightning Pillar is a genjutsu that utilises lightning-natured chakra.

Usage[]
The user discharges electricity through their entire body in the form of an extremely bright light to disorientate thei...
nodes.full_description:
The Lightning Release: Lightning Illusion Flash of Lightning Pillar is a genjutsu that utilises lightning-natured chakra.

Usage[]
The user discharges electricity through their entire body in the form of an extremely bright light to disorientate their target's vision. Once this is done, the user can implant images in their head, as seen when C made Jūgo see Sasuke getting smashed into the ground by the Fourth Raikage. This gives the user's allies the perfect opportunity to attack the unsuspecting victim.
This genjutsu can also be used collaboratively with other shinobi to completely overwhelm a target(s) sense of sight in the Fourth Shinobi World War against the Ten-Tails.[2]

nodes.label: Lightning Release: Lightning Eel
nodes.description: While standing in water, the user generates a burst of electricity, shocking anyone also in the water with them.
nodes.full_description: While standing in water, the user generates a burst of electricity, shocking anyone also in the water with them.

nodes.label: Lightning Release: Lariat
nodes.description: The Lightning Release: Lariat (雷遁・雷犂熱刀, Raiton: Rariatto) is a powerful taijutsu technique whereby the user charges at their opponent, striking them with a Lariat move, which can be coated in chakra. A successful strike can blow away a target's entir...
nodes.full_description:
The Lightning Release: Lariat (雷遁・雷犂熱刀, Raiton: Rariatto) is a powerful taijutsu technique whereby the user charges at their opponent, striking them with a Lariat move, which can be coated in chakra. A successful strike can blow away a target's entire chest with a direct hit, which may not kill them right away, but will ultimately kill them if they are not treated. The attack is rather straightforward, but very quick, powerful and is easily capable of knocking down an opponent.

Variants[]
When Killer B uses this attack, he creates either a chakra cloak or chakra bones, both in the form of bull horns. He refers to this as his "Eighth" (八本目, Happonme) sword, next to his seven conventional katana. In Killer B's Version 2, the Lariat gains an increase in power due to the ox-skull he creates. He was able to pierce Samehada while simultaneously blowing away Kisame Hoshigaki's chest.
When A uses it, he surrounds himself with his Lightning Release Chakra Mode, rather than tailed-beast chakra. His high-level chakra, which is comparable to that of a tailed beast's, would produce the same effect as Killer B's version. The two brothers can combine their efforts to perform a Lightning Release: Double Lariat, which is strong enough to decapitate the victim, even without chakra enhancements, due to the brothers' immense physical strength.[3]

nodes.label: Lightning Release: False Darkness
nodes.description: The user emits lightning  in the shape of a spear from its mouth, which then pierces the enemy. Its destructive power is great enough to even pierce through rock, meaning it has a high killing potential. The user can increase the number of spears to ...
nodes.full_description: The user emits lightning  in the shape of a spear from its mouth, which then pierces the enemy. Its destructive power is great enough to even pierce through rock, meaning it has a high killing potential. The user can increase the number of spears to attack multiple enemies. This, coupled with the sheer speed of the lightning, makes it a difficult technique to evade. This technique is capable of being focused into a straight beam, similar to a laser. Kakuzu is able to use this through his lightning-element mask.

nodes.label: Lightning Release: Electric Shock Needles
nodes.description: The user surrounds themselves with countless tiny lights. After the lights are shaped into needles, they are quickly fired at a target and pierce the skin. Because of how small the needles are, they do little to no actual damage on their own. As such...
nodes.full_description: The user surrounds themselves with countless tiny lights. After the lights are shaped into needles, they are quickly fired at a target and pierce the skin. Because of how small the needles are, they do little to no actual damage on their own. As such, this jutsu is more useful for hiding other fast-moving projectiles, such as bees.

nodes.label: Lightning Release: Double Lariat
nodes.description: The Lightning Release: Double Lariat (雷遁・絶牛雷犂熱刀, Raiton: Daburu Rariatto) is a stronger version of the Lightning Release: Lariat, whereby two users perform the technique from both behind and in front of the opponent, creating a scissor effect, up to ...
nodes.full_description: The Lightning Release: Double Lariat (雷遁・絶牛雷犂熱刀, Raiton: Daburu Rariatto) is a stronger version of the Lightning Release: Lariat, whereby two users perform the technique from both behind and in front of the opponent, creating a scissor effect, up to close to light-speed.[1] Both users must use the exact same amount of opposing strength or the target will merely bend.[2] When successfully done, the force of the technique will decapitate the target and send their head flying several metres into the air.

nodes.label: Lightning Release Wall
nodes.description: This technique is deployed by the bandits and shinobi from Yumegakure by creating a wall of lightning bolts that repels anyone who touches it and causes damage to them. The technique is used to block off advancement to the next area and the only way ...
nodes.full_description: This technique is deployed by the bandits and shinobi from Yumegakure by creating a wall of lightning bolts that repels anyone who touches it and causes damage to them. The technique is used to block off advancement to the next area and the only way to dispel the technique is by defeating the users or by stepping on certain switches on the ground near the wall.

Its quick movement allows it to be used to take out multiple opponents. By using this in a battle on water, it can be spread out to cover a wide range.

nodes.label: Lightning Release Chakra Mode
nodes.description: The user wraps their body in a layer of lightning chakra to increase their physical parameters, with more lightning causing greater increases. As users coat more lightning chakra around themselves, the more their hair sticks up.[2] The lightning augm...
nodes.full_description:
The user wraps their body in a layer of lightning chakra to increase their physical parameters, with more lightning causing greater increases. As users coat more lightning chakra around themselves, the more their hair sticks up.[2] The lightning augments the strength of the user's taijutsu, creating what is called nintaijutsu.[3] The lightning also defends the user from most attacks, deflecting them away on contact;[4] the Fourth Raikage is impressed when Chidori pierces through to him, however slightly.[5]
The lightning chakra stimulates the user's nervous system, enhancing their speed and their reaction time.[6] The user's reflexes are heightened enough to perform a Lightning Release Body Flicker (雷遁の瞬身, Raiton no Shunshin, English TV: Lightning Style: Teleportation), dodging attacks as fast as Amaterasu.[7] The user is so fast that not even the Sharingan can track their movements;[6] only Minato Namikaze's Flying Thunder God Technique and Naruto Uzumaki's Nine-Tails Chakra Mode have been shown to be faster.[8][9]

nodes.label: Lightning Release Bullet: Powerful Breath
nodes.description: The user creates a condensed surge of lightning in their fist. Upon doing so, the user thrusts it forward, unleashing a powerful lightning bolt. It can also be conducted by a water source to hit multiple targets.
nodes.full_description: The user creates a condensed surge of lightning in their fist. Upon doing so, the user thrusts it forward, unleashing a powerful lightning bolt. It can also be conducted by a water source to hit multiple targets.

nodes.label: Lightning Oppression Horizontal Chop
nodes.description: Covered in the Lightning Release Chakra Mode, A leaps from a high vantage point and performs a simple yet powerful horizontal chop on his opponent from above, seemingly using the momentum gained in the previous fall to increase the force behind his s...
nodes.full_description: Covered in the Lightning Release Chakra Mode, A leaps from a high vantage point and performs a simple yet powerful horizontal chop on his opponent from above, seemingly using the momentum gained in the previous fall to increase the force behind his strike. In the event the attack isn't powerful enough to penetrate an opponent's defence, the attack can be used to push an opponent well into the ground to prevent them from escaping from another incoming attack.

nodes.label: Lightning Oppression Horizontal

nodes.full_description: Sasuke knocks the opponent into the air with his sword and jumps after them. He then proceeds to punch, kick, and slash them while still in mid-air. Sasuke quickly lands on the floor, creates the Chidori, pointing it upwards to have the falling opponent land on it.

nodes.label: Lightning Dragon Tornado
nodes.description: Raiga will draw lightning down upon his body. The current will be contained within and around Raiga's form. He will then begin to spin in place forming a whirling vortex of wind and electricity. The vortex will take on the form of a dragon's head and...
nodes.full_description:
Raiga will draw lightning down upon his body. The current will be contained within and around Raiga's form. He will then begin to spin in place forming a whirling vortex of wind and electricity. The vortex will take on the form of a dragon's head and will cover the area in front of him. It will then strike out against his opponent and painfully trap them in the vortex. Even if the attack doesn't directly connect with his foe, the lightning can jump from the vortex to hit a nearby target.

References[]

↑ Naruto Collectible Card Game

He splits it in two, charges his opponent, leaving two streams of light, strikes them with one Lightning Cutter, sending them into the air, repeatedly hitting them with that one Lightning Cutter in a zig-zag formation into the air, back and forth, before coming above his opponent and finally slamming his second Lightning Cutter into his opponent, driving them into the ground.

He activates his Kamui to teleport some kunai to the hound, which turns into a shadow clone, where he throws the rest. The two waves of kunai clash while Kakashi charges the Lightning Cutter and attacks from the air.

He then charges at the enemy with one Lightning Cutter, uppercutting the enemy into the air. Then Kakashi appears above the enemy and releases all the lighting into the enemy, charging down with them in a giant cyclone of lightning.

This can only be performed with Kakashi's Sharingan active.

nodes.full_description:
This article is about Raiga's jutsu. For Indra's jutsu, see Destructive Jinrai.




The user creates spheres of electrical energy and launches them at the enemy. When they make contact with the enemy, the spheres electrocute them and throw them back. This technique can also be used in rapid succession or fire multiple balls at once.

nodes.label: Lightning Bolt
nodes.description: Killer B jumps in the air with his seven swords and tackles the opponent whilst coated in lightning chakra.
nodes.full_description: Killer B jumps in the air with his seven swords and tackles the opponent whilst coated in lightning chakra.

nodes.label: Liger Two Platoons Bomb
nodes.description: A (Third Raikage) and Bee start their combo by using Cross Lariat to launch the opponent. Bee grabs ahold of the opponent's arms and waist, while Ay takes the legs; the team then link arms from a back-to-back position and drive their foe into the gro...
nodes.full_description: A (Third Raikage) and Bee start their combo by using Cross Lariat to launch the opponent. Bee grabs ahold of the opponent's arms and waist, while Ay takes the legs; the team then link arms from a back-to-back position and drive their foe into the ground stomach-first.

nodes.label: Lightning Blade Kunai Cutter
nodes.description:
Lightning Blade Kunai Cutter is a technique developed by Kakashi Hatake. Kakashi channels his lightning chakra into a kunai, increasing its piercing power. Then he strikes his opponent several times.
This technique consumes less chakra than Lightning...
nodes.full_description:
Lightning Blade Kunai Cutter is a technique developed by Kakashi Hatake. Kakashi channels his lightning chakra into a kunai, increasing its piercing power. Then he strikes his opponent several times.
This technique consumes less chakra than Lightning Cutter and can be performed without the aid of Sharingan, but is also less effective.

nodes.label: Lightning Beast Running Technique: Twin
nodes.description: Kakashi sends out two lightning hounds at his opponent, which run and attack his target from their sides.
nodes.full_description: Kakashi sends out two lightning hounds at his opponent, which run and attack his target from their sides.

nodes.label: Lightning (jutsu)
nodes.description:
A smaller version of the Tailed Beast Ball that has been infused with lightning chakra which Killer B or the Eight-Tails can use to bring down a target's defences and inflict major damage. 
The attack also does not require time to be formed like the ...
nodes.full_description:
A smaller version of the Tailed Beast Ball that has been infused with lightning chakra which Killer B or the Eight-Tails can use to bring down a target's defences and inflict major damage. 
The attack also does not require time to be formed like the regular Tailed Beast Ball.

nodes.label: Liger Bomb
nodes.description:
The Liger Bomb (雷我爆弾, Raigā Bomu) is a certain-kill technique used by the Fourth Raikage.

Usage[]
After covering himself in his Lightning Release Chakra Mode, the Fourth Raikage grabs his opponent and lifts them high up into the air. Then, using his...
nodes.full_description:
The Liger Bomb (雷我爆弾, Raigā Bomu) is a certain-kill technique used by the Fourth Raikage.

Usage[]
After covering himself in his Lightning Release Chakra Mode, the Fourth Raikage grabs his opponent and lifts them high up into the air. Then, using his extreme strength, he smashes them head first onto the ground in what resembles a powerbomb manoeuvre. This is devastating enough to shatter a large area of the ground itself on impact. Darui noted that nobody has ever survived this attack before, and had Sasuke Uchiha not used his Susanoo to cushion the impact, he would have been killed by it. The impact of this technique was strong enough to snap the ribs of Sasuke's Susanoo.[3]

nodes.label: Legend's Portion
nodes.description: Tsunade punches the opponent towards Jiraiya, who summons a warrior toad to strike the opponent to the ground. The toad then crushes the opponent by falling on them.
nodes.full_description: Tsunade punches the opponent towards Jiraiya, who summons a warrior toad to strike the opponent to the ground. The toad then crushes the opponent by falling on them.

nodes.label: Leaping Bullet Shell Tower
nodes.description: Transformed as Isobu, Yagura curls himself into a ball and bounces, allowing himself to either crash down at an opponent, or to quickly move around.
nodes.full_description: Transformed as Isobu, Yagura curls himself into a ball and bounces, allowing himself to either crash down at an opponent, or to quickly move around.

nodes.label: Leaping Flame Blowing Step
nodes.description: Transformed as Matatabi, Yugito leaps above in the air, spews fire on her opponents, and finally lands on top of them.
nodes.full_description: Transformed as Matatabi, Yugito leaps above in the air, spews fire on her opponents, and finally lands on top of them.

nodes.label: Leech Gap
nodes.description: While in his transformed state, Utakata can ooze an extremely alkaline liquid, which burns upon contact. Killer B while in his full Eight-Tails form commented that the substance was strong enough to burn through his skin. In the anime, when he used t...
nodes.full_description:
While in his transformed state, Utakata can ooze an extremely alkaline liquid, which burns upon contact. Killer B while in his full Eight-Tails form commented that the substance was strong enough to burn through his skin. In the anime, when he used this technique in his Version 2 form, Utakata's chakra cloak turned blue.[2]

See Also[]
Tongue Tooth Sticky Acid
References[]

↑ Fourth Databook, page 325

↑ Naruto: Shippūden episode 324

nodes.label: Legend of the White Fang
nodes.description: Kakashi strikes down the opponent with the White Light Chakra Sabre and then attacks them with Chidori, causing a lightning explosion.
nodes.full_description: Kakashi strikes down the opponent with the White Light Chakra Sabre and then attacks them with Chidori, causing a lightning explosion.

nodes.label: Leaf-Style: Empty Cicada
nodes.description: After waving his hand seals, Rō disappears into thin air. Shortly afterwards, he reappears behind the opponent, and uses a kunai to strike their back.
nodes.full_description: After waving his hand seals, Rō disappears into thin air. Shortly afterwards, he reappears behind the opponent, and uses a kunai to strike their back.

nodes.label: Leaf Windstorm
nodes.description: Lee focuses for a moment, and launches a spinning kick. He covers a short distance while spinning on the ground, and then jumps while still spinning, hitting several opponents.
nodes.full_description: Lee focuses for a moment, and launches a spinning kick. He covers a short distance while spinning on the ground, and then jumps while still spinning, hitting several opponents.

nodes.label: Leaf-Style Willow
nodes.description:
This article is about the anime-only genjutsu used by Kosuke Maruboshi. For the taijutsu used by Kimimaro, see Dance of the Willow.




The user waves their sword back and forth, which when seen by the target locks them in a genjutsu which causes the...
nodes.full_description:
This article is about the anime-only genjutsu used by Kosuke Maruboshi. For the taijutsu used by Kimimaro, see Dance of the Willow.




The user waves their sword back and forth, which when seen by the target locks them in a genjutsu which causes them to hallucinate multiple waving arms out to slash them. The movement resembles that of a willow tree blowing in the wind. With the enemy off guard, the user is free to cut them down.

nodes.label: Leaf Whirlwind
nodes.description:
This article is about the technique used by Rock Lee in episode 123. For the technique used by Rock Lee in episode 22, see Leaf Gale.




The user delivers a series of high and low kicks, each of which is fast enough that even the Sharingan can't rea...
nodes.full_description:
This article is about the technique used by Rock Lee in episode 123. For the technique used by Rock Lee in episode 22, see Leaf Gale.




The user delivers a series of high and low kicks, each of which is fast enough that even the Sharingan can't react to them. When Rock Lee performs it against Sasuke Uchiha, he starts with a backwards high kick using his left foot, the motion of which then helps him deliver a low kick with his right. Although the first kick is damaging on its own, it's primarily intended as a distraction, forcing Sasuke to block it and thus rendering him vulnerable to the second kick.[1]
When Lee uses Leaf Whirlwind against Kimimaro, he performs it more akin to Dynamic Entry.[2]

nodes.label: Leaf Springtime of Life Lotus
nodes.description: After opening the First Gate, Guy punches the opponent into the air and grabs their arms, fracturing them and pile-drives the opponent into the ground.
nodes.full_description: After opening the First Gate, Guy punches the opponent into the air and grabs their arms, fracturing them and pile-drives the opponent into the ground.

nodes.label: Leaf Taijutsu: Whirlwind Furious Feet
nodes.description: Guy dashes a considerable distance and performs a powerful kick, sending the opponent flying.
nodes.full_description: Guy dashes a considerable distance and performs a powerful kick, sending the opponent flying.

nodes.label: Leaf Strong Whirlwind
nodes.description: Might Guy, using his great talent with taijutsu, concentrates all his skill into a spinning backwards kick. The kick is so fast that it cannot be seen, much less dodged, and it is delivered with such power that targets are unlikely to get up once the...
nodes.full_description: Might Guy, using his great talent with taijutsu, concentrates all his skill into a spinning backwards kick. The kick is so fast that it cannot be seen, much less dodged, and it is delivered with such power that targets are unlikely to get up once they're struck, much less block.[1] In the anime, this technique generates a powerful whirlwind around the user, which can be used to attack multiple opponents at once.[2]

nodes.label: Leaf Roaring Flame Hurricane
nodes.description: Rock Lee unlocks five of the Eight Gates and begins a kick so fast that his leg catches fire. Lee spins around into the air, creating a spiral of flame before bringing his leg down through the centre and into the ground. The fire bursts outwards, bla...
nodes.full_description:
Rock Lee unlocks five of the Eight Gates and begins a kick so fast that his leg catches fire. Lee spins around into the air, creating a spiral of flame before bringing his leg down through the centre and into the ground. The fire bursts outwards, blasting any enemy within close proximity.

See Also[]
Leaf Hot Wind
Morning Peacock

nodes.label: Leaf Sweet Riot Car
nodes.description: Anko kicks her opponent into the air then kicks again higher and jumps on their shoulders and spins them into the ground through rapid somersaults before getting off of them upon landing.
nodes.full_description: Anko kicks her opponent into the air then kicks again higher and jumps on their shoulders and spins them into the ground through rapid somersaults before getting off of them upon landing.

nodes.label: Leaf Rising Wind
nodes.description: This technique uses the entire body as a spring, by amassing power through taking a posture where the back of the body falls down. With this powerful taijutsu, the user kicks just above the head. Because the power of the kick from the ground is insta...
nodes.full_description:
This technique uses the entire body as a spring, by amassing power through taking a posture where the back of the body falls down. With this powerful taijutsu, the user kicks just above the head. Because the power of the kick from the ground is instantly converted into a blow, the enemy hit with this attack will be launched high into the sky. This technique can also be initiated while mid-air.

See Also[]
Ostrich Rising Dragon Bullet
References[]

↑ Sha no Sho, page 254

nodes.label: Leaf Rock-Destroying Rise
nodes.description: A taijutsu technique where the user smashes their elbow into their opponent using the other arm as support. It deals a powerful blow to the target and as the name suggests, it was even strong enough to destroy Yagura's coral.[2]
nodes.full_description: A taijutsu technique where the user smashes their elbow into their opponent using the other arm as support. It deals a powerful blow to the target and as the name suggests, it was even strong enough to destroy Yagura's coral.[2]

nodes.label: Leaf Shuriken
nodes.description: Metal attacks the enemy, sending him flying with a strong kick, and then finishes him off in the air using Fūma Shuriken.
nodes.full_description: Metal attacks the enemy, sending him flying with a strong kick, and then finishes him off in the air using Fūma Shuriken.

nodes.label: Leaf Gust
nodes.description: Using simple, yet effective strikes, the user begins to spin rapidly and with a strong rotative high kick to hit the opponent.
nodes.full_description: Using simple, yet effective strikes, the user begins to spin rapidly and with a strong rotative high kick to hit the opponent.

nodes.label: Leaf Revolving Light
nodes.description: Lee knocks his opponent off their feet, launching them into the air, after which he delivers a series of revolving kicks to their stomach and face, leading to a finishing kick that sends the opponent straight into the ground. This technique is very s...
nodes.full_description: Lee knocks his opponent off their feet, launching them into the air, after which he delivers a series of revolving kicks to their stomach and face, leading to a finishing kick that sends the opponent straight into the ground. This technique is very similar to Youth Full Power.

nodes.label: Leaf Great Whirlwind
nodes.description: While spinning, the user delivers a series of kicks. As they spin faster, they are lifted from the ground, allowing them to kick different areas of their target: first a low kick, then a middle kick, then a high kick. These are finished off with a he...
nodes.full_description:
While spinning, the user delivers a series of kicks. As they spin faster, they are lifted from the ground, allowing them to kick different areas of their target: first a low kick, then a middle kick, then a high kick. These are finished off with a heel drop. As a result of the spinning, targets cannot see the incoming kicks until just before they're struck.[1]

References[]

↑ 1.0 1.1 Tō no Sho, page 223

nodes.label: Leaf Hurricane Bullet
nodes.description: The user being airborne, delivers a powerful drop kick that sends the opponent flying.
nodes.full_description: The user being airborne, delivers a powerful drop kick that sends the opponent flying.

nodes.label: Leaf Hot Wind
nodes.description: After opening five of the Eight Gates, Lee swiftly kicks his opponent high into the air. He then jumps up and does a kick so powerful that his opponent is set on fire.
nodes.full_description: After opening five of the Eight Gates, Lee swiftly kicks his opponent high into the air. He then jumps up and does a kick so powerful that his opponent is set on fire.

nodes.label: Leaf Great Violent Sky
nodes.description: Rock Lee attacks the opponent and punch them to the sky, once on it, Lee performs a spinning attack head first and kicks his opponent into the ground. Finally, he poses by raising his arms and bringing his legs together.
nodes.full_description: Rock Lee attacks the opponent and punch them to the sky, once on it, Lee performs a spinning attack head first and kicks his opponent into the ground. Finally, he poses by raising his arms and bringing his legs together.

nodes.label: Leaf Great Flash
nodes.description: The user charges at their opponent and unleashes a powerful lateral kick aiming at the head that will send his opponent flying away.
nodes.full_description: The user charges at their opponent and unleashes a powerful lateral kick aiming at the head that will send his opponent flying away.

nodes.label: Leaf Gale
nodes.description:
This article is about the technique used by Rock Lee in episode 22 of the Naruto anime. For the technique used by Rock Lee in episode 123 of the Naruto anime, see Leaf Whirlwind.




The user delivers a spinning low kick from behind, throwing the tar...
nodes.full_description:
This article is about the technique used by Rock Lee in episode 22 of the Naruto anime. For the technique used by Rock Lee in episode 123 of the Naruto anime, see Leaf Whirlwind.




The user delivers a spinning low kick from behind, throwing the target off balance. Because of the kick's speed and how it's delivered, targets are unlikely to be able to defend against it. When performed by someone as strong as Rock Lee, this relatively simple kick has the added ability to propel targets away as they're knocked over.[1]

References[]

↑ 1.0 1.1 Rin no Sho, page 185

nodes.label: Leaf Great Combo Attack
nodes.description: The user strikes the opponent rapidly with Leaf Gale, Leaf Whirlwind, and Leaf Rising Wind.
nodes.full_description: The user strikes the opponent rapidly with Leaf Gale, Leaf Whirlwind, and Leaf Rising Wind.

nodes.label: Leaf Dragon God
nodes.description: This is the ultimate taijutsu technique created by the legendary taijutsu master Chen. It appears to be initiated by an upward spin kick at which point it quickly becomes a tornado. Forming into a dragon with long whiskers, it attacks the target aimi...
nodes.full_description:
This is the ultimate taijutsu technique created by the legendary taijutsu master Chen. It appears to be initiated by an upward spin kick at which point it quickly becomes a tornado. Forming into a dragon with long whiskers, it attacks the target aiming to swallow them, at which point they are cut by the razor sharp winds inside the attack. After initiating the attack, the user appears to remain shielded within the base of the tornado as the outward surface of the dragon seems to be solid enough for a person to impact and rebound off of, making the only way to enter the technique once it has been initiated is by being swallowed.
However, there is one distinct weakness to the technique. Since the Dragon God's true form is that of an ordinary tornado, its attack power is based on rotation. If one enters the attack's centre (Dragon's Eye) while rotating at high speed, such as Lee's One-Man Front Lotus, it can be dispersed without inflicting damage.

See Also[]
Daytime Tiger
Evening Elephant
Night Guy

nodes.label: Leaf Flash Kick
nodes.description: Rock Lee performs a technique similar to the Heavenly Foot of Pain, but without any chakra enhancement, to deliver a heel drop to the opponent using only sheer physical strength that causes small alteration to the ground on impact.
nodes.full_description: Rock Lee performs a technique similar to the Heavenly Foot of Pain, but without any chakra enhancement, to deliver a heel drop to the opponent using only sheer physical strength that causes small alteration to the ground on impact.

nodes.label: Leaf Drop
nodes.description:
The user delivers a falling kick, strong enough to bring the environment crumbling down.

See Also[]
Drop Kick
Heavenly Foot of Pain
Nadeshiko-Style Hardliner Revolving Cut
nodes.full_description:
The user delivers a falling kick, strong enough to bring the environment crumbling down.

See Also[]
Drop Kick
Heavenly Foot of Pain
Nadeshiko-Style Hardliner Revolving Cut

nodes.label: Leaf Concentration Practice
nodes.description:
This training method is done by placing a leaf over an individual's forehead and having them direct all their chakra onto the leaf, using it as a focal point. 
This exercise can be used by Academy teachers as a way to teach students how to control th...
nodes.full_description:
This training method is done by placing a leaf over an individual's forehead and having them direct all their chakra onto the leaf, using it as a focal point. 
This exercise can be used by Academy teachers as a way to teach students how to control their chakra more effectively. However, the true purpose of the exercise is actually to hone the individual's concentration and to keep their mind from becoming distracted. As explained by Iruka Umino, only those who have worked hard on their ability to concentrate can become excellent shinobi. For generations Konoha ninja have practised using this method in order to better their mental focus. The leaf emblem on the Konoha forehead protector is said to originate from this training.[1]

nodes.label: Leaf Coiling Wind
nodes.description: Guy spins while making a handstand with his legs outstretched. It creates enough wind to clear a small area of thick mist.
nodes.full_description: Guy spins while making a handstand with his legs outstretched. It creates enough wind to clear a small area of thick mist.

nodes.label: Leaf Coiling Whirlwind
nodes.description:
A variant of the Leaf Whirlwind where Guy and Lee attack a single target with a roundhouse kick.

References[]

↑ Fourth Databook, page 318
nodes.full_description:
A variant of the Leaf Whirlwind where Guy and Lee attack a single target with a roundhouse kick.

References[]

↑ Fourth Databook, page 318

nodes.label: Leaf Broadminded
nodes.description: Guy kicks his opponent twice — one overhead and one under, before slamming them into the ground.
nodes.full_description: Guy kicks his opponent twice — one overhead and one under, before slamming them into the ground.

nodes.label: Lava Release: Scorching Stream Rock Technique
nodes.description: The user expels a large amount of lava from their mouth, which quickly solidifies into multiple boulders of molten rock that are fired towards the target with tremendous force. Due to their composition, the boulders can melt through most objects with...
nodes.full_description:
The user expels a large amount of lava from their mouth, which quickly solidifies into multiple boulders of molten rock that are fired towards the target with tremendous force. Due to their composition, the boulders can melt through most objects with ease, and because a considerable number are dispersed over a wide range in quick succession, they are also difficult to avoid.

References[]

↑ Fourth Databook, page 327

nodes.label: Lava Release: Scorching Flower Great Crumbling
nodes.description: Rōshi coats one arm in molten rock to stop the opponent in their tracks, then coats the other arm with molten rock and punches them, which bursts upon contact, and sends the opponent flying back.
nodes.full_description: Rōshi coats one arm in molten rock to stop the opponent in their tracks, then coats the other arm with molten rock and punches them, which bursts upon contact, and sends the opponent flying back.

nodes.label: Lava Release: Scorching Kick
nodes.description: Rōshi covers his foot in lava and delivers an upwards kick to his opponent.
nodes.full_description: Rōshi covers his foot in lava and delivers an upwards kick to his opponent.

nodes.label: Lava Release: Scorching Flow Peak Rock
nodes.description: Rōshi creates circles of lava that erupt molten rock towards the opponent, sending them into the air.
nodes.full_description: Rōshi creates circles of lava that erupt molten rock towards the opponent, sending them into the air.

nodes.label: Lava Release: Scorching Armoured Fist
nodes.description: Rōshi coats himself in lava and punches the opponent. Even if the punch fails to connect, the intense heat from the lava can still burn his opponent if they're close enough.
nodes.full_description: Rōshi coats himself in lava and punches the opponent. Even if the punch fails to connect, the intense heat from the lava can still burn his opponent if they're close enough.

nodes.label: Lava Release: Rubber Wall
nodes.description: The user creates an enormous torrent of lava from the ground directly in front of them, which then forms into a wall possessing immense durability due to its rubbery consistency that allows the material to deform when attacked, meaning it can both ab...
nodes.full_description:
The user creates an enormous torrent of lava from the ground directly in front of them, which then forms into a wall possessing immense durability due to its rubbery consistency that allows the material to deform when attacked, meaning it can both absorb and dissipate the force behind a blow rather than just simply obstruct it. This technique can also be used to provide reinforcement to a pre-existing barrier.[2]

References[]

↑ Fourth Databook, page 327

↑ Naruto chapter 554, pages 11-12

nodes.label: Lava Release: Scorching Flow Fist
nodes.description: Rōshi jumps up in the air, covers his fist in lava, and delivers a punch, sending his opponent crashing down.
nodes.full_description: Rōshi jumps up in the air, covers his fist in lava, and delivers a punch, sending his opponent crashing down.

nodes.label: Lava Release: Rubber Defence
nodes.description: The user creates a short tube with lava converted into a rubber-like material which can be used to guard against enemy's attacks.
nodes.full_description: The user creates a short tube with lava converted into a rubber-like material which can be used to guard against enemy's attacks.

nodes.label: Lava Release: Rubber Rope
nodes.description: The user creates a rope with lava converted into a rubber-like material. It can be used to quickly withdraw an ally from the attack line, being more efficient when combined with a distraction.
nodes.full_description: The user creates a rope with lava converted into a rubber-like material. It can be used to quickly withdraw an ally from the attack line, being more efficient when combined with a distraction.

nodes.label: Lava Release: Quicklime Congealing Technique
nodes.description: This technique makes use of the Lava Release kekkei genkai where the user expels a large quantity of quicklime from their mouth, capable of inflicting damage to an opponent. This ability can also be manipulated in order to restrict the intended targe...
nodes.full_description: This technique makes use of the Lava Release kekkei genkai where the user expels a large quantity of quicklime from their mouth, capable of inflicting damage to an opponent. This ability can also be manipulated in order to restrict the intended target's movements, as after the initial blast the remnants of the substance can act in a similar manner to quick-drying cement. However, the technique requires the addition of water to set off the necessary reaction to make the substance harden. This can be easily achieved through the use of a Water Release technique, which can also serve to increase the area covered by the substance, thus further increasing the potential range of the technique.[2][3]

nodes.label: Lava Release: Rubber Ball
nodes.description: The user expels a large glob of lava from their mouth, which quickly solidifies into a hollow ball that can be used to protect an object by surrounding it with the durable rubber-like material. The properties of this substance mean that it can both a...
nodes.full_description:
The user expels a large glob of lava from their mouth, which quickly solidifies into a hollow ball that can be used to protect an object by surrounding it with the durable rubber-like material. The properties of this substance mean that it can both absorb and dissipate the force behind a blow when struck, resulting in it either deforming or bouncing upon impact.
A skilled user of this technique, such as Dodai, is capable of making it appear as if they were intending to protect an object or individual within the sphere, when in fact they merely use the ball as a distraction in order to occupy an enemy, while instead covertly withdrawing the item in question from the ball during its formation.[2]
Karyū's rubber balls, dubbed "Lava Release: Rubber Spheres" (熔遁・護謨鞠, Yōton: Gomumari), are darker in colour and far more solid. Used offensively for ranged attacks, Karyū's spheres can vary in size, from being hand held to rivalling the size of a house. As projectiles, he can control them remotely and they continuously gain momentum when bouncing off surfaces.[3] The damage each sphere can deal is proportionate to the amount of chakra put into the orbs.[4]

References[]

↑ Fourth Databook, page 327

↑ Naruto chapter 555, pages 5-6

↑ Sasuke Shinden: Book of Sunrise, Chapter 1

↑ Sasuke Shinden: Book of Sunrise

nodes.label: Lava Release: Melting Apparition Technique: Flowing Crest
nodes.description: Attacking the opponent with torrents of water initially, Mei finishes them off using lava release, spitting a small high force shot of lava from her mouth at a high speed.
nodes.full_description: Attacking the opponent with torrents of water initially, Mei finishes them off using lava release, spitting a small high force shot of lava from her mouth at a high speed.

nodes.label: Lava Release: Planet-Branding Blast
nodes.description: Using Lava Release, the user can either expel acid from their mouth as a projectile,[2] or create the substance from beneath the ground to erupt as a large explosion. The liquid is capable of melting objects.[3]
nodes.full_description: Using Lava Release, the user can either expel acid from their mouth as a projectile,[2] or create the substance from beneath the ground to erupt as a large explosion. The liquid is capable of melting objects.[3]

nodes.label: Lava Release: Melting Apparition Technique
nodes.description: The Lava Release: Melting Apparition Technique, utilised by Mei Terumī through her unique Lava Release, manipulates a strong acidic mud flow, even capable of corroding flesh. Mei changes chakra inside her body into a powerful acidic fluid that will m...
nodes.full_description: The Lava Release: Melting Apparition Technique, utilised by Mei Terumī through her unique Lava Release, manipulates a strong acidic mud flow, even capable of corroding flesh. Mei changes chakra inside her body into a powerful acidic fluid that will melt anything and spits out the viscous fluid from her mouth. Both the shape and the amount are determined by her. By spitting it out at short-range the technique's speed increases. By distributing the liquid across a vast range, she creates an acid wall. Anything that touches it will crumble and lose its shape. Should her initial attack miss, a great deal of smoke is created by the effects of the acid, so a follow-up attack can be conducted while the enemy's vision remains obscured. It can even melt chakra-based defences such as the Susanoo.[2]

nodes.label: Lava Release: Fiery Rock Bullet
nodes.description: Rōshi or Son Gokū expels a single lava boulder at the opponent.
nodes.full_description: Rōshi or Son Gokū expels a single lava boulder at the opponent.

nodes.label: Lava Release: Expanding Flame Rings
nodes.description: The user expands a ring of melting flames, which can be sealed inside a projectile to melt it and change it into a spiral shape. The sealed flames then cause a high-pressure shock wave that melts the projectile and explodes in a storm of flames.
nodes.full_description: The user expands a ring of melting flames, which can be sealed inside a projectile to melt it and change it into a spiral shape. The sealed flames then cause a high-pressure shock wave that melts the projectile and explodes in a storm of flames.

nodes.label: Lava Release Chakra Mode
nodes.description:
The Lava Release Chakra Mode is a heightened state utilised by Rōshi after manifesting one of Son Gokū's tails.

Usage[]
Rōshi envelops his entire body in a coating of lava that enhances the damage of his physical attacks. Due to the extreme heat gen...
nodes.full_description:
The Lava Release Chakra Mode is a heightened state utilised by Rōshi after manifesting one of Son Gokū's tails.

Usage[]
Rōshi envelops his entire body in a coating of lava that enhances the damage of his physical attacks. Due to the extreme heat generated by the lava, he is capable of burning the target without coming into direct contact with them.[2] In addition, it can also be used for defensive purposes, as it acts as a deterrent towards those who wish to attack the user physically.

See Also[]
Lightning Release Chakra Mode
Nine-Tails Chakra Mode
Fire Release Chakra Mode
References[]

↑ Fourth Databook, page 327

↑ Naruto chapter 565, page 7

nodes.label: Lava Release: Dissolving Exploding Acid
nodes.description: Mei surrounds her opponent with her acid mist, immobilising them, and then blows a kiss at the opponent, sending out a large lava sphere which creates a powerful explosion on contact.
nodes.full_description: Mei surrounds her opponent with her acid mist, immobilising them, and then blows a kiss at the opponent, sending out a large lava sphere which creates a powerful explosion on contact.

nodes.label: Lava Release: Ash Stone Seal Technique
nodes.description:
The user spews out a thick cloud of ash from their mouth, which wraps around their opponent to restrain them. By focusing their chakra, the user can maintain, as well as, enhance the binding properties of the technique.

References[]

↑ Boruto chapte...
nodes.full_description:
The user spews out a thick cloud of ash from their mouth, which wraps around their opponent to restrain them. By focusing their chakra, the user can maintain, as well as, enhance the binding properties of the technique.

References[]

nodes.label: Labyrinth Genjutsu
nodes.description:
This is a genjutsu used by Ōga, placing her victims in labyrinth like simulations with puzzles to solve for her experiments, with the assistance of the technology provided by Kara.

Usage[]
    The test subjects remain in suspended animation in the r...
nodes.full_description:
This is a genjutsu used by Ōga, placing her victims in labyrinth like simulations with puzzles to solve for her experiments, with the assistance of the technology provided by Kara.

Usage[]
    The test subjects remain in suspended animation in the real world despite their deaths in Ōga's genjutsu.  
Ōga can link herself and the multiple subjects she has captured together in the genjutsu. Ōga can use the genjutsu anyway she sees fit, creating multiple rooms and landscapes, even those that exist in the real world, such as Kara's hideout, with traps and hazards. She can operate as two individuals within the genjutsu; as an older man who guides them through the experiments she had conceived and as a kunoichi named Yatsume that is also one of the subjects to further study the others. 
Those who die within the genjutsu do not die in the real world, but they remain stasis in tanks until the genjutsu ends. There are two ways of ending the genjutsu: the captives must kill Ōga within it or the Illusion scroll that is keeping the genjutsu active must be removed. Should the former be chosen, Ōga would become comatose in the real world. 

Experiments[]
Ōga had gathered twenty-one subjects for her experiments. The following various genjutsu experiments test the subjects ability to survive. 

Nine Lives
Before the first experiment, Ōga provided a test for any one of the subjects to participate. She had ten cards, nine are "death" while one was "life", and if the participant picks the "life" card, they live. A Kirigakure shinobi participated in this test, randomly picking a "death" card which resulted in him being killed by Ōga.

Collapse
For the first experiment, Ōga placed the now twenty subjects on a crumbling platform in the middle of an abyss. The subjects are to reach a higher platform in order to survive. With the help of Kiseru, those who were not shinobi were able to reach it with ladders placed on the top.

Light
In the second experiment, Ōga warped the remaining subjects in a dark room with candles. The objective is to keep the candles from going out before they reach the goal, otherwise the one whose candle is extinguished will die, with their life force connected to it. The subjects must traverse into a desert with an active sandstorm, which makes it difficult to keep the candles from going out. To extend the flame and prevent their candles from melting, Boruto, Shamo, "Yatsume", Kiseru and Namua combined theirs, keeping them all alive. However, Rokuro, Batta and Fūgo, who instructed the latter, claimed theirs from the remaining subjects, stocking up their candles.

Pressure
In the third experiment, the subjects are sent to an empty room. There is a red button on one of the walls that needed to be pressed, which revealed spikes concealed in the ceiling. The objective is to find hidden hiding spots for the subjects to hide in to avoid being crushed. However, there is only one concealed spot for the subjects to hide in that is only room for one. Fugō claimed this spot, while Boruto and Batta located a weak point in the room's floor to expose in order for the subjects to hide. There was no casualties in this experiment and everyone proceeded to the next experiment.



Subjects
Outcome


Batta

Sum
In the fourth experiment, Ōga provided eight red envelopes to the subjects and warped them to a rocky terrain, where they are all separated from each other. Contained within the envelopes are numbers ranging from 1 to 8. The objective is to fight the subjects for their cards in order to have a passing score of 7 or more. Whoever possesses a 7 from the start simply needs to reach the goal without being targeted by others. The subjects must have the required score within two hours or they fail, regardless if they have the required number.



Subjects
Outcome

Boruto Uzumaki

Namua

Killed by Kiseru


"Yatsume"
Proceeded to the final experiment

Final Experiment
Being an Anbu working undercover as an Outer for Kara, Kiseru helped Boruto seemingly escape the labyrinth genjutsu. However, Ōga set up one final experiment for the remaining subjects. The goal was to supposedly escape Ōga's lair, which appeared reminiscent to Kara's hideout in the real world. "Yatsume" obtained a map and key card from the Kusa Outer that Rokuro killed in the previous genjutsu to help the remaining three navigate the labyrinth. There were also traps within the labyrinth, even puppets of Ōga's male persona. 
When Boruto and "Yatsume" went further, the latter dropped her disguise and revealed herself as the real Ōga. Impressed with Boruto navigating through all her experiments, Ōga provided the means to end the genjutsu by killing her and removing the Illusion scroll in the real world that kept the genjutsu active for the other subjects. With being given a reason to live by Boruto, they broke out of the genjutsu together and Ōga ended the genjutsu herself for the rest of the subjects.

nodes.label: Kāma Rift
nodes.description: This technique is a Space–Time Ninjutsu used by the Ōtsutsuki clan. The user creates a rift, which allows anyone enveloped to transfer to a chosen location including foreign dimensions. The rift's formation is fast enough to catch targets off guard a...
nodes.full_description:
This technique is a Space–Time Ninjutsu used by the Ōtsutsuki clan. The user creates a rift, which allows anyone enveloped to transfer to a chosen location including foreign dimensions. The rift's formation is fast enough to catch targets off guard and transport them alongside the user, as well as to evade attacks from enemies at the last moment.[1]
An Ōtsutsuki can synchronise the technique to a recipient of their Kāma, allowing the member to transport themselves to the host's location through the mark.[2] Two Kāma recipients can collaboratively manifest the rift from their marks to bypass fūinjutsu.[3] Even if the target recipient does not possess Kāma, if the user can track down the chakra of the target, it is possible for them to create the rift to drag said target to their location, as Isshiki teleported Kawaki via Naruto's chakra, which was being used to powerup the latter's artificial arm.[4]

nodes.label: Kāma
nodes.description:
This article is about the mark.  For other uses, see Kama (disambiguation).



Kāma (楔) is a seal that serves as a compressed backup of an Ōtsutsuki clan member's biological data that they can embed in the body of a compatible recipient known as a ve...
nodes.full_description:
This article is about the mark.  For other uses, see Kama (disambiguation).



Kāma (楔) is a seal that serves as a compressed backup of an Ōtsutsuki clan member's biological data that they can embed in the body of a compatible recipient known as a vessel (器, utsuwa). Over time, the Kāma will gradually overwrite the vessel's genetic profile until they transform into a perfect Ōtsutsuki. Should the Ōtsutsuki be slain, their soul will migrate to one of their vessels and become anchored to the world of the living, and when the Kāma completes will reincarnate (転生, tensei) through their body, completely replacing them.
In the interim, the vessel can learn to activate the Kāma and utilise a portion of the Ōtsutsuki's power and abilities, and if reincarnation has not yet been achieved, the soul of the slain Ōtsutsuki can even manifest and temporarily take control over their body.
Compatibility with an Ōtsutsuki is exceedingly rare and unpredictable, and if an individual is not a suitable recipient, the ritual will typically result in them suffering a fatal seizure. Occasionally, an unsuitable vessel will survive the ritual, however, producing a unique variant of the seal called the White Kāma (白き楔, Shiroki Kāma). Such individuals are unable to serve as a receptacle for the Ōtsutsuki's soul and thus cannot be used for the process of reincarnation, nor can use its absorption power nor space-time ninjutsu, but retain its other traits, gaining tremendous power and even being able to transform into a completely new Ōtsutsuki.

Contents

1 Appearance
2 Known bearers

2.1 Isshiki Ōtsutsuki
2.2 Momoshiki Ōtsutsuki


3 Abilities

3.1 Resonance
3.2 Manifestation
3.3 Resurrection

Hashirama detaches the statue from its countless hands, and lands a sequence of six chakra-enhanced punches with it, swiftly moving the statue in front of the opponent after each hit to land the next. nodes.full_description: Izumo uses Water Release: Starch Syrup Capturing Field to create a big pool of water, after which, he, alongside Asuma and Kotetsu, moulds with the water in order to get close to their opponent. The three then jump out of the water and strike the opponent behind their back, with Izumo and Kotetsu delivering an attack with a long kunai and a mace simultaneously, followed with Asuma striking the opponent with his Flying Swallow-enhanced Chakra Blade. After that, Shikamaru uses his Shadow Gathering Technique to pull his teammates in, allowing Kotetsu and Izumo to attack the opponent once more, creating a pillar of water, which hardens after the blow, followed with Asuma slashing through the pillar and the opponent.

nodes.full_description:
Katsuyu: Immense Network Healing is a cooperation ninjutsu used by Katsuyu and its summoner using the link shared via the Strength of a Hundred Seal.[4]

Usage[]
Firstly, Katsuyu divides its body into several smaller clones, and then each attaches itself to a person. The slug's summoner then channels their medical chakra through Katsuyu, who in turn transfers it to the wounded person, healing their wounds, restoring their stamina and chakra reserves.[1]
This technique allows the user to heal a great number of people simultaneously regardless of distance. While using this technique, the user is linked with Katsuyu, allowing them to communicate with the slug and sense what it encountered on the battlefield.[5][6]

References[]

↑ 1.0 1.1 Fourth Databook, page 238

↑ Naruto Collectible Card Game

↑ Naruto chapter 647, page 2

↑ Naruto chapter 635, page 4

↑ Naruto chapter 427, pages 6-7

↑ Naruto chapter 427, page 9

nodes.full_description:
While using Yamato as a medium, Tobi creates a massive statue, similar to Hashirama Senju's Sage Art Wood Release: True Several Thousand Hands technique. Unlike Hashirama's much larger variant however, this creation does not utilise senjutsu chakra. The wielder of this avatar is capable of using a multitude of hands to assault their opponents.
Unlike its counterpart, this avatar does not have the wood human or dragon atop its heads, however, Tobi displayed the ability to channel its ability to manipulate all five basic nature transformations from the miniature faces that encircle its head.

Influence[]
In Japan, "Kanzeon" (観世音) is a more formal name for the bodhisattva Kannon.

Isaribi was one of th...
nodes.full_description:
This technique, developed by Amachi due to Orochimaru's initial interest in creating the ultimate underwater shinobi, drastically changes the user's appearance, giving them green scale-like skin, fins, and gills. 

Development[]
Isaribi was one of the earliest Land of the Sea villagers abducted for the experiments, and became the only known surviving prototype. Eventually, Orochimaru cancelled the project out of disinterest, but Amachi managed to finalise it against his sponsor's abandonment, applying the process onto himself.
The experiment left parts of Isaribi's body permanently scaled, and Amachi falsely promised that he can return her to normal, but later confessed that he had no cure for her, and instead plotted to dissect her once he was finished using her. Shinobi sent by Konohagakure believe that Tsunade will be able to reverse Isaribi's modifications.

Usage[]
The Kaima (海魔, literally meaning: Ocean Demon) transformation can also change the user's eye colour, as seen in Amachi's case. This form gives them supreme fighting skills in the water, as they can move through the water much faster than normal, as well as giving them the ability to breathe underwater. Also the scales used in this form have a steel like quality that can stop a kunai. Amachi also demonstrates that he can shoot the scales as a weapon.
Amachi intended to use this technique's benefits to control the water routes of the world, which would restrict all the shipping businesses, effectively allowing Amachi to control the trading industries, similar to the functions of Gatō Company.

Anything pierced by this technique is instantly warped to Kamui's dimension. Combined with Kamui's intangibility, this technique allows for Kakashi to avoid an enemy's counter.

nodes.label: Kamira's Illusion
nodes.description: Kamira casts an illusion onto her opponent, causing the area around the target to be enveloped by darkness. Once inside the black space, the target will see grotesque figures, which are thought to be the previous victims of the technique: Kamira clai...
nodes.full_description: Kamira casts an illusion onto her opponent, causing the area around the target to be enveloped by darkness. Once inside the black space, the target will see grotesque figures, which are thought to be the previous victims of the technique: Kamira claims that these are people who betrayed Haido's faction, and became tortured criminals of the "Land of Death" (死の国, Shi no Kuni), being punished with the "power of time" (時間の力, jikan no chikara). These figures then grab the target and pull them into the void where they are at the mercy of a spectral dragon. The horrifying oni can even extend from the target's own body to attack them. All of these creatures can transfix the victim with fear and shock while Kamira will appear from above and personally choke and kill the opponent.

nodes.label: Jibakugan
nodes.description: This genjutsu brings out the victim's subconscious negative or hateful emotions. The caster can take advantage of these feelings and control the victim's actions. This technique can be cancelled by smelling the New Moon Flower Perfume, using the Shar...
nodes.full_description: This genjutsu brings out the victim's subconscious negative or hateful emotions. The caster can take advantage of these feelings and control the victim's actions. This technique can be cancelled by smelling the New Moon Flower Perfume, using the Sharingan, or killing the caster. Those who are being controlled by the Jibakugan gains several strange markings under their eyes and on their foreheads. For this technique to be effective, direct eye contact is needed, unless the user's power is sufficient enough to use it without the need of direct eye contact.
