nodes.label: Gentle Fist
nodes.description: The Gentle Fist (柔拳, Jūken) is a form of hand-to-hand combat used by members of the Hyūga clan. It inflicts internal damage through attacking the body's Chakra Pathway System, subsequently injuring organs which are closely intertwined with the area o...
nodes.full_description:
The Gentle Fist (柔拳, Jūken) is a form of hand-to-hand combat used by members of the Hyūga clan. It inflicts internal damage through attacking the body's Chakra Pathway System, subsequently injuring organs which are closely intertwined with the area of the network which has been struck. To do this, the user surgically injects a certain amount of their own chakra into the opponent's chakra pathway system, causing damage to surrounding organs due to their proximity to the chakra circulatory system. Even the slightest tap can cause severe internal damage, hence the name "gentle" fist.
By employing the use of the Byakugan, an experienced user[1] can target the tenketsu, thus enhancing the havoc and control a Gentle Fist practitioner can impose upon an opponent's chakra network. These 361 nodes are key gate-keeping interceptions in the chakra circulatory network, thus forcibly opening or sealing them in whatever manner the Gentle Fist user sees fit, is a powerful tactical option to have. The affected person's chakra flow can either be increased or disrupted completely, preventing them from using techniques as seen in Neji's fight with Hinata during the Chūnin Exams, rendering her own Gentle Fist manoeuvres ineffective.
Neji Hyūga noted that any chakra-based substance can be destroyed by this technique. As seen in his fight with Kidōmaru, it is done by leaking chakra from the chakra openings in one's hands and moulding it into a needle-like shape to slice through the chakra.[2] In the novel, it was shown that one can even use the Gentle Fist to counter enemy technique, carefully cutting an attack two so that it passes by harmlessly.[3] In contrast, Kidōmaru managed to devise a method that prevented the chakra from being injected into the body, thus negating the main impact of the Gentle Fist through physical contact. Because Gentle Fist is mostly taijutsu, some believed users can only emit chakra from their hands due to the hands being the most mobile limbs on the body. However, users can emit chakra from any tenketsu, making binding them with chakra-based substance impossible.
Being a close-quarter combat style, Gentle Fist practitioners have a disadvantage against long-range fighters, as Kidōmaru took full advantage of his distance weaponry to overwhelm Neji.
Because the chakra pathway system is invisible to the naked eye, the Byakugan is required for most techniques of this style. Since the Byakugan is unique to the Hyūga clan, it has become their signature style of combat. The ability to inflict severe internal trauma with minimal external force, combined with chakra network manipulation, makes the Gentle Fist the most reputable and fearsome taijutsu style known in all of Konohagakure.[4] In contrast to this, the technique can also be used for supplementary purposes displayed when Hinata used the technique to fix Naruto Uzumaki's dislocated shoulder joint during the Fourth Shinobi World War.[5]
Due to their possession of the Byakugan, the Ōtsutsuki clan also practices this taijutsu form, though far more aggressive than what the Hyūga clan practices. Momoshiki Ōtsutsuki demonstrated his while fighting Naruto Uzumaki, targeting Naruto's tenketsu and internal organs to try to incapacitate him.[6]

nodes.label: Genjutsu: Ketsuryūgan
nodes.description: By establishing direct skin or eye contact with a target, the user can lock them within a genjutsu for one of various purposes. They can brainwash them into mindless drones with a set order to follow, or trap them into a dream-like state. For more de...
nodes.full_description:
By establishing direct skin or eye contact with a target, the user can lock them within a genjutsu for one of various purposes. They can brainwash them into mindless drones with a set order to follow, or trap them into a dream-like state. For more defensive means, this technique can create a powerful barrier against mind reading, protecting information from being acquired. In the novel, it also allows the user to place genjutsu guards upon their mind and see through the target's memories.

See Also[]
Genjutsu: Sharingan

nodes.description:

Genjutsu: Sharingan broadly refers to a range of genjutsu performed with the Sharingan. It has also been shown to be performed through the Sharingan's higher evolutions: the Mange...
nodes.full_description:
This article is about the genjutsu. For the dōjutsu, see Sharingan.



Genjutsu: Sharingan broadly refers to a range of genjutsu performed with the Sharingan. It has also been shown to be performed through the Sharingan's higher evolutions: the Mangekyō Sharingan and the Rinnegan.

Usage[]
     The technique utilised through the Rinnegan.  
By establishing eye contact with a target, the Sharingan user traps them within a genjutsu which can be exploited for one of various purposes, such as: causing instantaneous — but temporary — loss of consciousness or paralysis in the target,[2][3] forceful extraction of information,[4][5] relaying memories,[6] erasing memories,[7] removing genjutsu placed on the target by others,[8] and controlling a target's actions.[9][10]
Members of the Uchiha clan are particularly famous for using their Sharingan to control the Nine-Tails, so much so that Konoha quickly came to suspect Uchiha involvement in the Nine-Tailed Demon Fox's Attack.[11] Sasuke Uchiha is noted to be able to use the technique through his Rinnegan, to trap all the tailed beasts in a genjutsu with a mere glance.[12]
The illusions created by Genjutsu: Sharingan do not appear to have any trademark form, appearing vastly different between the same functions and even the same users. For example, Sasuke typically uses it to render targets unconscious, yet on the first occasion the target's body is pierced with large feathers,[13] on another, the target is grasped and overwhelmed by a shadowy figure,[14] and on the third the target experiences Sasuke personally stabbing them.[15]

nodes.full_description: Using their flames, the user manipulates the flames into an illusion of a dog-cat hybrid.

nodes.description: The user utilises the ringing of bells to produce a sound wave that travels through the eardrum directly into the target's brain. This paralyses the victim while also causing them to hallucinate, seeing multiple images of the user, which makes it dif...
nodes.full_description: The user utilises the ringing of bells to produce a sound wave that travels through the eardrum directly into the target's brain. This paralyses the victim while also causing them to hallucinate, seeing multiple images of the user, which makes it difficult for them to tell the real one from the illusions. The user can then take advantage of this to easily attack the victim.

According to Inoichi Yamanaka, it is very effective against truth serums.

nodes.label: Genjutsu Cursed Seal
nodes.description: The user applies a spiral-shaped cursed seal that manifests a genjutsu on the victim's subconscious, allowing the user to alter selective memories from their mind and manipulate them under their subliminal control. The more powerful the genjutsu is a...
nodes.full_description:
The user applies a spiral-shaped cursed seal that manifests a genjutsu on the victim's subconscious, allowing the user to alter selective memories from their mind and manipulate them under their subliminal control. The more powerful the genjutsu is applied to the victim, the further the seal spreads across their body.
The technique apparently requires regular reapplications as gradually, the mark fades away, causing the victim's true memories to resurface in a migraine-inducing headache.

nodes.label: Four-Corner Sealing Barrier
nodes.description:
This article is about the technique. For the episode, see The Four-Corner Sealing Barrier.




This technique was designed by Tsunade for the purpose of sealing a tailed beast. The technique is performed with four separate scrolls and a sample of blo...
nodes.full_description:
This article is about the technique. For the episode, see The Four-Corner Sealing Barrier.




This technique was designed by Tsunade for the purpose of sealing a tailed beast. The technique is performed with four separate scrolls and a sample of blood similar to a Summoning Technique. Shizune mentioned that good chakra control and concentration are needed to perform the sealing technique. To use this technique, a scroll is needed to seal the numerous amounts of chakra. This technique was supposed to seal the Three-Tails in its own dimension, permanently. While sealing the users are vulnerable to enemy attacks. This technique has three stages: 

"Search": the barrier is erected to locate the target.
"Bind": the barrier is then stretched out above the target.
"Lock": the barrier is lowered and the sealing begins.

nodes.label: Freight Bundle Bubble
nodes.description: Transformed into Saiken, Utakata forms a purple-coloured Tailed Beast Ball, mixed with his Soap Bubble Ninjutsu that he launches at the opponent.
nodes.full_description: Transformed into Saiken, Utakata forms a purple-coloured Tailed Beast Ball, mixed with his Soap Bubble Ninjutsu that he launches at the opponent.

nodes.label: Four Symbols Seal
nodes.description: This technique requires a great deal of talent to perform. The user applies the seal's formula to an object or a human's body, sealing a large enemy or an evil spirit within them.[1] If two Four Symbols Seal are used, a stronger seal is created; this...
nodes.full_description:
This technique requires a great deal of talent to perform. The user applies the seal's formula to an object or a human's body, sealing a large enemy or an evil spirit within them.[1] If two Four Symbols Seal are used, a stronger seal is created; this is called the Eight Trigrams Sealing Style. If the Four Symbols Seals do not completely overlap with each other, this allows the enemy/spirit's chakra to merge with whoever they've been sealed into. This is how the Nine-Tails was sealed into the body of Naruto Uzumaki.[2]
The Four Symbols Seal is based on the fūinjutsu of Uzushiogakure's Uzumaki clan.[3] According to Killer B, it is stronger than the Iron Armour Seal used to seal the Eight-Tails within him.[4] The Four Symbols Seal is also left on the stomachs of those who perform the Dead Demon Consuming Seal.[5][6]

nodes.label: Four Violet Flames Formation
nodes.description: A team of four stands in a square formation and then performs this technique, erecting a solid barrier between them. The barrier is made of purple flames, which will instantly engulf those who come into contact with it, thus preventing anyone from en...
nodes.full_description: A team of four stands in a square formation and then performs this technique, erecting a solid barrier between them. The barrier is made of purple flames, which will instantly engulf those who come into contact with it, thus preventing anyone from entering or leaving the area. Because the barrier relies on all four users to maintain, attacking any one of them can bring down the barrier. To prevent this from happening, members of the Sound Four extend secondary barriers around themselves, making breaking out even more difficult.[1] When used by members of the First Division, the users position themselves outside the barrier rather than inside, at least ensuring their captive cannot harm them.[2]

nodes.label: Four Symbols Puppet Shinobi
nodes.description: Akatsuki members are given a special human-shaped seal created by Nagato that takes a physical form known as the Four Symbols Puppet Shinobi, to fight or stall the enemy. The Puppet Shinobi goes to a faraway location to create numerous copies of itse...
nodes.full_description: Akatsuki members are given a special human-shaped seal created by Nagato that takes a physical form known as the Four Symbols Puppet Shinobi, to fight or stall the enemy. The Puppet Shinobi goes to a faraway location to create numerous copies of itself. The only way to break the technique is to stop the Puppet Shinobi source.

nodes.label: Four Snakes Intimidating Thrust
nodes.description: Kabuto slashes his opponent with a chakra scalpel, and with three strikes from his navel snake. Three giant white snakes emerge from the ground in sequence, each biting his opponent, and in the end, four of those emerge behind Kabuto, raise themselve...
nodes.full_description: Kabuto slashes his opponent with a chakra scalpel, and with three strikes from his navel snake. Three giant white snakes emerge from the ground in sequence, each biting his opponent, and in the end, four of those emerge behind Kabuto, raise themselves high, and lunge at his opponent.

nodes.label: Four Legs Technique
nodes.description: One of the "Imitation Beast Ninja Arts" (擬獣忍法, Gijū Ninpō), this technique allows the user to move in the same way as an animal. By surrounding their body with chakra and moving about on all fours, the user's speed and accuracy are significantly enha...
nodes.full_description:
One of the "Imitation Beast Ninja Arts" (擬獣忍法, Gijū Ninpō), this technique allows the user to move in the same way as an animal. By surrounding their body with chakra and moving about on all fours, the user's speed and accuracy are significantly enhanced, which in turn makes their attacks more damaging. Hit-and-run tactics are the most effective form of attack while using this technique, as this ensures the user is constantly moving, thus making it difficult for opponents to follow their movements.[1]
The Four Legs Technique is a favourite of the Inuzuka clan, enabling its members to move in the same way as their ninken partners. Upon activating this technique, Inuzuka gain a more feral appearance: their canine teeth lengthen, their finger and toenails become claw-like, and their pupils turn to slits.[2] Inuzuka will often make using the Four Legs Technique their first priority in a fight, which in turn tends to make it a prerequisite for many of their other jutsu; Kiba Inuzuka refers to the encompassing fighting style as "Beast Human Taijutsu" (獣人体術, Jūjin Taijutsu, literally meaning: Beast Human Body Technique).[3]

nodes.label: Four Corner Seal Teleportation
nodes.description: The user places a sealing tag on the designated area. If anyone crosses it, whether it be an ally or an enemy, toads are summoned to stop them. This technique is useful to protect an object from falling into enemy hands, and it is said that only Jira...
nodes.full_description: The user places a sealing tag on the designated area. If anyone crosses it, whether it be an ally or an enemy, toads are summoned to stop them. This technique is useful to protect an object from falling into enemy hands, and it is said that only Jiraiya and Minato were able to remove it. Those wishing to release the seal must perform the required hand seals and then point at it, which will cause any summoned toad to depart.

nodes.label: Four Red Yang Formation
nodes.description: A powerful barrier formation noted to only be usable by those of Kage calibre, whereby four shinobi, standing in a square formation, erect a large barrier that is red in colour. It was stated to be several times stronger than the Four Violet Flames F...
nodes.full_description:
A powerful barrier formation noted to only be usable by those of Kage calibre, whereby four shinobi, standing in a square formation, erect a large barrier that is red in colour. It was stated to be several times stronger than the Four Violet Flames Formation, and is highly malleable and elastic. When assaulted by a Tailed Beast Ball from the Ten-Tails, the barrier simply distorted its shape, forcing the brunt of the attack upwards while it was left completely intact and reformed to its original position.[2] Its users can create openings within the barrier to allow passage.[3]
This barrier is apparently very chakra-taxing since at least two of its users are limited in the usage of other techniques, such as clone techniques, while maintaining the barrier at the same time.[4]

nodes.label: Four Black Snakes Formation
nodes.description: The four users stand in a square formation, erecting a large barrier between them. On command it incinerates its contents.
nodes.full_description: The four users stand in a square formation, erecting a large barrier between them. On command it incinerates its contents.

nodes.label: Formation Ino–Shika–Chō
nodes.description:
Formation Ino–Shika–Chō are formations used by the members of the Yamanaka, Nara, and Akimichi clan members designed as a result of their long history of working together. 

Usage[]
     The formation being applied in battle.  
These formations are d...
nodes.full_description:
Formation Ino–Shika–Chō are formations used by the members of the Yamanaka, Nara, and Akimichi clan members designed as a result of their long history of working together. 

Usage[]
     The formation being applied in battle.  
These formations are designed to use each member's abilities in the best way possible that complements the others'. This formation is usually done with flawless accuracy, which comes after working together — another testament of how close-knit the three clans are. This formation is not limited to any one specific technique of any of the clans but the respective clan members can use several of their respective clan's techniques in tandem to create different versions of this formation.

Variants[]
Formation #1: Mind Body Switch Technique + Shadow Imitation Technique + Multi-Size Technique
Formation #2: Mind Body Disturbance Technique + Shadow–Neck Binding Technique + Partial Multi-Size Technique
Formation #3: Mind Disturbance Dance Performance Technique + Black Spider Lily + Super Multi-Size Technique
Formation #4: Mind Clone Switch Technique + Shadow Sewing Technique + Butterfly Bullet Bombing
Formation E: Human Bullet Yo-Yo

nodes.label: Forward Trampling Jump
nodes.description: Transformed as Kokuō, Han tramples his opponent with his front legs three times, from his left, right, and centre.
nodes.full_description: Transformed as Kokuō, Han tramples his opponent with his front legs three times, from his left, right, and centre.

nodes.label: Formation of Ten Thousand Snakes
nodes.description: With this technique, a countless number of summoned snakes crawl out of Orochimaru's mouth and hunt down the enemy. With such overwhelming numbers, a true "wall of snakes" is formed, making defence and evasion meaningless. The enemy can do nothing bu...
nodes.full_description: With this technique, a countless number of summoned snakes crawl out of Orochimaru's mouth and hunt down the enemy. With such overwhelming numbers, a true "wall of snakes" is formed, making defence and evasion meaningless. The enemy can do nothing but become buried by the snakes. The snakes can bite the enemy with their poison fangs and open their mouths to extend Kusanagi-like blades, making them even more deadly. Furthermore, when the inexhaustibly crawling snakes gather together, they become a defensive wall, and can block any kind of attack.

nodes.label: Forbidden Technique: Gedō Seal
nodes.description: A kinjutsu developed by Orochimaru during the Second Shinobi World War. It combines the two powers of seal and confusion into one technique, giving them the names "Gedō Seal: Seal" (外道ノ印・封, Gedō no In: Fū, literally meaning: Outer Path Seal: Seal, En...
nodes.full_description:
A kinjutsu developed by Orochimaru during the Second Shinobi World War. It combines the two powers of seal and confusion into one technique, giving them the names "Gedō Seal: Seal" (外道ノ印・封, Gedō no In: Fū, literally meaning: Outer Path Seal: Seal, English Games "Gedō Mark: Seal") and "Gedō Seal: Confusion" (外道ノ印・乱, Gedō no In: Ran, literally meaning: Outer Path Seal: Confusion, English Games "Gedō Mark: Confusion") when using them separately.

Overview[]
Both techniques possess insidious effects on the target. The Gedō Seal: Seal is a juinjutsu that can seal a target's abilities, including the kekkei genkai, causing pain to the target, even when not using their ability. The Gedō Seal: Confusion causes blinding pain in the victim's head, which turns their body into a tool of the technique's caster. When used to fight another, they will feel no pain the victim's opponent has given them, and won't listen to what anyone says. This part of the technique can be cured without the use of a release command, if they defeat their inner self that is in their head. Hiruzen Sarutobi was troubled by the cruel effects of the Outer Path Seal, so he created a cure called the "Gedō Seal: Release" (外道ノ印・解, Gedō no In: Kai, literally meaning: Outer Path Seal: Release) which can heal the effects of this technique from the target. Hiruzen Sarutobi then hid the scrolls containing the Outer Path Seal under the Memorial Stone, which he said is to be protected by heroes.

nodes.label: Four Black Fogs Formation
nodes.description: The members of the Sound Four stand at four directions around their target as they, in unison, perform this technique. They create a dark, dense fog high in the air that descends on the target, engulfing them and creating a powerful barrier that seal...
nodes.full_description:
The members of the Sound Four stand at four directions around their target as they, in unison, perform this technique. They create a dark, dense fog high in the air that descends on the target, engulfing them and creating a powerful barrier that seals them off from all outside forces, even death. The Sound Four use this technique to counter the effects of the Mind Awakening Pill,[1] which kills those who ingest it in order to advance their cursed seal to its second level.[2] The Dark Sealing Method can be used to contain the fog within a confined space, such as a coffin.[3]

References[]

↑ 1.0 1.1 Tō no Sho, page 229

↑ Naruto chapter 184

↑ Tō no Sho, page 267

nodes.label: Forbidden Technique: Mud Golem
nodes.description:
Dōshin can make duplicates of his opponents using his Earth Release. This technique, however, costs a significant amount of chakra and makes the user tired from using it.

See Also[]
Mirrored Sudden Attacker Technique
Water Release: Water Mirror Tech...
nodes.full_description:
Dōshin can make duplicates of his opponents using his Earth Release. This technique, however, costs a significant amount of chakra and makes the user tired from using it.

nodes.label: Forbidden Technique: Impure World Seal Destruction
nodes.description: Orochimaru summons a coffin like the one used in the Summoning: Impure World Reincarnation technique. Ghostly hands come out of the coffin, extending through the body of the opponent, damaging them, until a larger hand grasps them, crushes them, and ...
nodes.full_description: Orochimaru summons a coffin like the one used in the Summoning: Impure World Reincarnation technique. Ghostly hands come out of the coffin, extending through the body of the opponent, damaging them, until a larger hand grasps them, crushes them, and pulls them into the ethereal dark void within the coffin. The lid closes on the coffin and begins to sink into the darkness surrounding it. Orochimaru laughs sinisterly, watching as it vanishes.

nodes.label: Forbidden Individual Curse Tag
nodes.description:
The Forbidden Individual Curse Tag is a juinjutsu utilised by Madara Uchiha.

Usage[]
The cursed seal is placed directly on the target's heart and by design, prevents the branded individual from taking their own lives or removing the cursed seal them...
nodes.full_description:
The Forbidden Individual Curse Tag is a juinjutsu utilised by Madara Uchiha.

Usage[]
The cursed seal is placed directly on the target's heart and by design, prevents the branded individual from taking their own lives or removing the cursed seal themselves. A direct strike to the heart appears to be able to remove the seal — albeit risking one's life in the process. According to Obito Uchiha, the cursed seal also interfered with him becoming the Ten-Tails' jinchūriki.[2]

nodes.label: Forbidden Technique: Dead Soul Technique
nodes.description:
This article is about the video game-only ninjutsu. For the original Dead Soul Technique, see Dead Soul Technique.




Kabuto summons two corpses in his image to attack his opponent with their chakra scalpel forward and backward and then he slashes h...
nodes.full_description:
This article is about the video game-only ninjutsu. For the original Dead Soul Technique, see Dead Soul Technique.




Kabuto summons two corpses in his image to attack his opponent with their chakra scalpel forward and backward and then he slashes his opponent with his chakra scalpel.

nodes.label: Forbidden Summoning Technique: Fire Rats Cometh
nodes.description:
Dōshin summons rats, immersed by fire, to burn any objects such as the forest or attack the opponents.

See Also[]
Mouse Hairball
nodes.full_description:
Dōshin summons rats, immersed by fire, to burn any objects such as the forest or attack the opponents.

nodes.label: Flying Thunder God: Sequential Steps
nodes.description:
This article is about the game-only ninjutsu used by Minato Namikaze. For the canon technique of a similar name, see Flying Thunder God — Second Step. For other uses, see Hiraishin.




Minato places his formula mark on the opponent and kicks them in...
nodes.full_description:
This article is about the game-only ninjutsu used by Minato Namikaze. For the canon technique of a similar name, see Flying Thunder God — Second Step. For other uses, see Hiraishin.




Minato places his formula mark on the opponent and kicks them in the air where he teleports behind the airborne opponent and hits the opponent with a Rasengan, knocking them down towards the ground, where he then teleports again to the falling opponent to use his charged Rasengan to slam them to the ground, creating an enormous explosion.

nodes.label: Flying Thunder God: Guiding Thunder
nodes.description:
The Flying Thunder God: Guiding Thunder is a space-time barrier (時空間結界, jikūkan kekkai) technique.

Usage[]
This barrier technique incorporates the use of the Flying Thunder God formula to erect a barrier space capable of warping away anything that c...
nodes.full_description:
The Flying Thunder God: Guiding Thunder is a space-time barrier (時空間結界, jikūkan kekkai) technique.

Usage[]
This barrier technique incorporates the use of the Flying Thunder God formula to erect a barrier space capable of warping away anything that comes into contact with it. The subject of the technique is then directed to another location marked by the user’s formula.[2][3] The barrier has proven to be powerful enough to warp away techniques as destructive as a Tailed Beast Ball.[4][5]

nodes.label: Flying Thunder God — Second Step
nodes.description: The Flying Thunder God — Second Step is a technique developed by Minato from the Flying Thunder God Technique. Minato first throws a Flying Thunder God Kunai, be it a direct attack at his opponent; once the kunai has reached close proximity to the ta...
nodes.full_description: The Flying Thunder God — Second Step is a technique developed by Minato from the Flying Thunder God Technique. Minato first throws a Flying Thunder God Kunai, be it a direct attack at his opponent; once the kunai has reached close proximity to the target, or even past them, he would then teleport to the said kunai, immediately attacking his target from their blind-spot. The speed at which this technique is executed along with the unpredicted secondary attack is such that even an individual who possesses the Sharingan is unable to react in time.

nodes.label: Flying Thunder God: Space–Time Hurricane Flash Sequential Steps: Style Zero
nodes.description: Minato throws several Flying Thunder God kunai at his opponent, teleports to one of them, and kicks the opponent, sending them flying back. While they are still in the air, he creates a shadow clone which teleports repeatedly to the Flying Thunder Go...
nodes.full_description: Minato throws several Flying Thunder God kunai at his opponent, teleports to one of them, and kicks the opponent, sending them flying back. While they are still in the air, he creates a shadow clone which teleports repeatedly to the Flying Thunder God kunai around the opponent, constantly slashing them. Minato then goes into Nine-Tails Chakra Mode, charging a Rasengan. The shadow clone catches the opponent and teleports them directly in front of Minato, who lands his Rasengan, sending the opponent a long way before the Rasengan expands.

nodes.label: Flying Thunder God Slash
nodes.description:
This article is about the bukijutsu technique used by Tobirama Senju. For the ninjutsu from which it is derived, see Flying Thunder God Technique. For other uses, see Hiraishin.




A technique combining the use of a bladed weapon and space–time ninj...
nodes.full_description:
This article is about the bukijutsu technique used by Tobirama Senju. For the ninjutsu from which it is derived, see Flying Thunder God Technique. For other uses, see Hiraishin.




A technique combining the use of a bladed weapon and space–time ninjutsu. The user teleports to a marked target, with weapon in hand, to instantaneously deliver a swift, devastating slash to his opponent. Because of the speed of the technique's execution, not even an individual wielding the Sharingan — a dōjutsu capable of predicting movement — has enough reaction time to defend themselves against this technique, especially if the user is already physically fast.
In the anime, Tobirama used a marked kunai hidden with other thrown kunai, allowing him to attack a target that dodged his projectile attack.

nodes.label: Flying Thunder Formation Technique
nodes.description:
This is a cooperation Space–Time Ninjutsu taught to the Hokage Guard Platoon by the Fourth Hokage to better aid in their duties of protecting the seated Hokage. 

Overview[]
All three members of the team are required to execute the technique. In doin...
nodes.full_description:
This is a cooperation Space–Time Ninjutsu taught to the Hokage Guard Platoon by the Fourth Hokage to better aid in their duties of protecting the seated Hokage. 

Overview[]
All three members of the team are required to execute the technique. In doing so, they encircle the target performing the seal of confrontation so that their thumbs, middle, and index fingers are touching one another's. This allows them to teleport both themselves, and anything within the confines of the ring, to a marked destination.
Since becoming the guards of the Fifth Hokage, they have marked her with the technique's formula so that they can teleport to her side at any time.[2]

References[]

↑ Fourth Databook, page 325

↑ Naruto chapter 562, pages 12-13

nodes.label: Flying Thunder God Technique
nodes.description:
This article is about the ninjutsu.  For other uses, see Hiraishin.

Contents

2

nodes.label: Flying Swallow
nodes.description: This is an "addition-line ninjutsu" that augments the cutting power of a bladed weapon by flowing chakra into it. A dense blade of chakra is formed around the physical blade, extending its reach. Because users can adjust the length of this chakra bla...
nodes.full_description:
This is an "addition-line ninjutsu" that augments the cutting power of a bladed weapon by flowing chakra into it. A dense blade of chakra is formed around the physical blade, extending its reach. Because users can adjust the length of this chakra blade at will, opponents can never fully anticipate the user's attacks.[1]
Asuma performs the Flying Swallow with his unique Chakra Blades. He furthermore prefers using wind chakra so that his blades become sharp enough to cut through stone or metal.[2]

nodes.label: Flying Thunder God Mutually Instantaneous Revolving Technique
nodes.description:
The Flying Thunder God Mutually Instantaneous Revolving Technique is a technique which can be utilised when at least two Flying Thunder God Technique users are present.

2

nodes.full_description: Asuma uses his Flying Swallow and start a sequence of slashes finishing with a falling slash.

nodes.description: Asuma punches the opponent a few times and finishes them with two final slashes.
nodes.full_description: Asuma punches the opponent a few times and finishes them with two final slashes.

nodes.full_description: Utakata jumps up into the air, delivers a strike with his bubble blower, followed by two empty-handed swipes, and finishes it with a spinning kick which sends his opponent crashing down.

nodes.description: The Flower-Fruit Mountain is a Lava Release technique utilised by Son Gokū and its jinchuriki Rōshi. While in his transformed state, Rōshi creates a volcano which then explodes violently, sending molten rock flying up in all directions the effects of...
nodes.full_description: The Flower-Fruit Mountain is a Lava Release technique utilised by Son Gokū and its jinchuriki Rōshi. While in his transformed state, Rōshi creates a volcano which then explodes violently, sending molten rock flying up in all directions the effects of which resemble a giant flower. The lava produced is said to be able to melt anything in its path.

nodes.label: Flowing Blade
nodes.description: Shizune gets in close and uses a spinning sweep kick before she spins back to her original position. She then slashes the opponent with a chakra scalpel.
nodes.full_description: Shizune gets in close and uses a spinning sweep kick before she spins back to her original position. She then slashes the opponent with a chakra scalpel.

nodes.description: This technique will make flowers hover in the air before hardening and spinning at high-speeds. The flowers will then be launched at the target. Their hardened state will allow them to cut targets as effectively as metal shuriken.
nodes.full_description: This technique will make flowers hover in the air before hardening and spinning at high-speeds. The flowers will then be launched at the target. Their hardened state will allow them to cut targets as effectively as metal shuriken.

nodes.full_description: The user casts an illusion which surrounds the target in flower petals and darkens the surroundings around them.

nodes.label: Flower Ninja Art
nodes.description: Flower Ninja Art (花忍法, Hana Ninpō) is a subset of ninjutsu and genjutsu involving secret flower-oriented techniques used by a clan in the Land of Vegetables. The two known users of flower ninja art are Kikunojō and Yurinojō.
nodes.full_description: Flower Ninja Art (花忍法, Hana Ninpō) is a subset of ninjutsu and genjutsu involving secret flower-oriented techniques used by a clan in the Land of Vegetables. The two known users of flower ninja art are Kikunojō and Yurinojō.

nodes.label: Flight of the Obliterating Water
nodes.description: Haku gathers a larger amount of water from the air and surrounding environment into more than a thousand needles. He then directs the needles to a specific opponent, and leaps back to avoid damage to himself.
nodes.full_description: Haku gathers a larger amount of water from the air and surrounding environment into more than a thousand needles. He then directs the needles to a specific opponent, and leaps back to avoid damage to himself.

nodes.label: Floating Bugs

nodes.full_description: Shino fires a cloud like projectile of destruction bugs at the opponent.

nodes.label: Flea Shuriken
nodes.description: The ninneko stretches its body and rolls the joint of its neck, launching its fleas at a target. The jutsu's effects after that vary depending on the target's tolerances: Kiba Inuzuka and Akamaru fall to the ground in painful itching; Shino Aburame f...
nodes.full_description: The ninneko stretches its body and rolls the joint of its neck, launching its fleas at a target. The jutsu's effects after that vary depending on the target's tolerances: Kiba Inuzuka and Akamaru fall to the ground in painful itching; Shino Aburame finds it curious, but otherwise isn't bothered.

nodes.label: Flight
nodes.description: While fully transformed with the Cursed Seal of Heaven, Sasuke attacks his opponent with punches, kicks, and a rotating wing attack, before swinging an electrified sword at them.
nodes.full_description: While fully transformed with the Cursed Seal of Heaven, Sasuke attacks his opponent with punches, kicks, and a rotating wing attack, before swinging an electrified sword at them.

nodes.label: Flashing Bell Beams
nodes.description: Shion's bell flashes and sends a ray of flashing pink light towards the enemy. It is powerful enough to cleanly slice through three of Mōryō's Ghost Army soldiers.
nodes.full_description: Shion's bell flashes and sends a ray of flashing pink light towards the enemy. It is powerful enough to cleanly slice through three of Mōryō's Ghost Army soldiers.

nodes.label: Flawless Three
nodes.description: Obito and Kakashi slash at their opponent, followed by Rin's back-flip kick. Rin cheers her teammates as they go forward. Emboldened by her support, Obito leapfrogs Kakashi, unleashed several small fireballs at the opponent. Kakashi slashes through t...
nodes.full_description: Obito and Kakashi slash at their opponent, followed by Rin's back-flip kick. Rin cheers her teammates as they go forward. Emboldened by her support, Obito leapfrogs Kakashi, unleashed several small fireballs at the opponent. Kakashi slashes through the flames and the opponent, and Rin finishes by jumping and stomping at the opponent, before cheering her teammates again.

nodes.label: Flash Swallow Dance: Heaven Step
nodes.description: Minato kicks his opponent upwards, and throws several Flying Thunder God Kunai at them. He teleports between the kunai, striking his opponent, before finishing above them, where he stabs them with one.
nodes.full_description: Minato kicks his opponent upwards, and throws several Flying Thunder God Kunai at them. He teleports between the kunai, striking his opponent, before finishing above them, where he stabs them with one.

nodes.label: Flash Slice
nodes.description: From above the opponent, the user strikes the enemy with a kunai, stabbing them.
nodes.full_description: From above the opponent, the user strikes the enemy with a kunai, stabbing them.

nodes.label: Flash Cross Sever
nodes.description: Asuma delivers multiple punches to the opponent before he slashes the opponent with his chakra blades in a cross-style.
nodes.full_description: Asuma delivers multiple punches to the opponent before he slashes the opponent with his chakra blades in a cross-style.

nodes.label: Flash Revolving Foot

nodes.full_description: The spiral flash kick is a series of punches and slashes finishing with a spinning kick, sending the opponent flying.

nodes.label: Flaming Arrow of Amazing Ability
nodes.description:
The Flaming Arrow of Amazing Ability is a technique used by Nagato through the Asura Path.

Overview[]

nodes.full_description:
The Flaming Arrow of Amazing Ability is a technique used by Nagato through the Asura Path.

Overview[]
Using the body modification ability of the Asura Path, the user compresses a high amount of chakra at the slit of its wrist before releasing it, causing its detachable hand to be fired with tremendous force. It has enough destructive power to easily break through thick bedrock. As the hand portion is protected with chakra, it allows it to remain unscathed. When the attack is complete, the hand is drawn back like a magnet by chakra in the wrist, reattaching itself.

nodes.label: Flash
nodes.description:
A swift ranged attack where the user swings their sword at a target after coating it in chakra, releasing a sharp crescent of chakra in the arc that the blade was swung.

See Also[]
Rupture

nodes.description:
The Flaming Arrow Warhead is a technique used by Nagato through the Asura Path.

Overview[]
Using the body modification ability of the Asura Path, the user detaches their hand, revealing a cluster of missiles. The further the hand is removed from the...
nodes.full_description:
The Flaming Arrow Warhead is a technique used by Nagato through the Asura Path.

Overview[]
Using the body modification ability of the Asura Path, the user detaches their hand, revealing a cluster of missiles. The further the hand is removed from the arm, the more missiles can be fired at once. These can fired to create widespread damage, or as homing devices seeking a single target. Even if the Asura Path has sustained significant damage, it can still produce missiles from its body, as it did when Pain attempted to kill Chōji.

nodes.label: Flame Circuit
nodes.description:
Indra surrounds himself with flames, protecting himself and damaging any enemy that enters his surrounding area.

See Also[]

Water Release: Water Formation Wall

nodes.label: Five-Seal Barrier Pass Technique
nodes.description: In order to enter the boundary created by the Five-Seal Barrier without dispelling the technique, Deidara used a technique which raised the rock blocking the entry to Akatsuki's hideout. It granted him and Sasori passage into the hideout, while keepi...
nodes.full_description:
In order to enter the boundary created by the Five-Seal Barrier without dispelling the technique, Deidara used a technique which raised the rock blocking the entry to Akatsuki's hideout. It granted him and Sasori passage into the hideout, while keeping the barrier intact.

See Also[]
Sensing Barrier Pass Technique

nodes.label: Five-Mountain Jump
nodes.description: Using the enhanced strength granted by his Steam Armour, Han delves a powerful punch to his opponent, sending them flying into the air. He jumps up after them and transforms into Kokuō, headbutts them, and using its hoof, smashes the opponent into th...
nodes.full_description: Using the enhanced strength granted by his Steam Armour, Han delves a powerful punch to his opponent, sending them flying into the air. He jumps up after them and transforms into Kokuō, headbutts them, and using its hoof, smashes the opponent into the ground, which ruptures the ground and generates a fiery shock wave.

nodes.label: Five-Seal Barrier
nodes.description: The user connects five "forbidden" (禁, kin) tags to each other using their own chakra. One of the tags is applied to a central location that the user wishes to shut access to, while the other four are applied to surfaces in the surrounding area. So l...
nodes.full_description:
The user connects five "forbidden" (禁, kin) tags to each other using their own chakra. One of the tags is applied to a central location that the user wishes to shut access to, while the other four are applied to surfaces in the surrounding area. So long as at least one of the tags remains in place, a barrier will be created over the central location that prevents it from being opened or in any way physically damaged. Those wishing to remove the barrier are advised to break into two small teams for maximum efficiency: one team focuses on removing the four surrounding tags, while the second team removes the central tag and immediately afterwards storms the stronghold.[1]
The Five-Seal Barrier erected over an Akatsuki lair in the Land of Rivers has tags spread across an incredibly wide area, with one tag being 500 meters northeast of the lair's entrance and another being 800 meters southwest of the entrance.[2] This means having a sensor among those intending to breach a Five-Seal Barrier can save a significant amount of time.[1] Because the tags, once located, are simple to remove, the Akatsuki leader pairs his Five-Seal Barrier with a booby trap.[3]

References[]

↑ 1.0 1.1 1.2 Sha no Sho, page 255

↑ Naruto chapter 263

↑ Sha no Sho, page 246

nodes.label: Five Release Great Combo Technique
nodes.description: The user creates four shadow clones and, alongside them, launch a different base-elemental attack at the target simultaneously.
nodes.full_description: The user creates four shadow clones and, alongside them, launch a different base-elemental attack at the target simultaneously.

nodes.label: Five Elements Unseal
nodes.description: This technique removes seals that are of similar power to itself. The user gathers chakra to their fingertips and hits the fingers against the seal that is to be removed, causing it to unravel and disappear. If the seal was applied to a person, the t...
nodes.full_description:
This technique removes seals that are of similar power to itself. The user gathers chakra to their fingertips and hits the fingers against the seal that is to be removed, causing it to unravel and disappear. If the seal was applied to a person, the thrust of the hand that accompanies this technique will likely be painful. When Jiraiya uses this technique to remove a Five Elements Seal, it appears to be quite easy for him. In truth, this is a very advanced technique that even jōnin would find difficult to perform.[1]
In the anime, Kazuma uses the Five Elements Unseal on Sora, thus increasing his access to the Nine-Tails' chakra sealed in his body.[2] In another episode, Orochimaru uses the Five Elements Unseal to break the Iron Armour Seal.[3]

nodes.label: Five Elements Seal
nodes.description: Orochimaru gathers "wicked" chakra to his five fingertips, which he forcefully applies over another seal. When this Five Elements Seal, being of an odd number, is applied over the Four Symbols Seal, being of an even number, the Four Symbols Seal is d...
nodes.full_description: Orochimaru gathers "wicked" chakra to his five fingertips, which he forcefully applies over another seal. When this Five Elements Seal, being of an odd number, is applied over the Four Symbols Seal, being of an even number, the Four Symbols Seal is disrupted because of the odd—even imbalance. In Naruto Uzumaki's case, he loses access to the chakra of the Nine-Tails - which the Four Symbols Seal keeps stored in his body - and furthermore makes it difficult for him to use his own.[1] When the Five Elements Seal is initially applied, Naruto is rendered unconscious.[2] When Jiraiya is later shown removing the Five Elements Seal from Naruto, he is able to correctly guess that Orochimaru applied it in the first place, describing its use as "coarse".[3]

nodes.label: Fire Release: Wind Release: Blazing Wind Wild Wave
nodes.description: While in his long-range form and in mid-air, Kakuzu sends a powerful torrent of wind and fire.
nodes.full_description: While in his long-range form and in mid-air, Kakuzu sends a powerful torrent of wind and fire.

nodes.label: Fire Whirlwind Vortex Technique

nodes.full_description: First, the user uses Fire Release: Flint Yagura to create a wall of fire in front of the enemy and then uses Wind Release: Whirlwind Fist to blow the flames into the enemy, creating a blazing firestorm that leaves the surrounding area scorched.

nodes.label: Fist Slam

nodes.full_description: A covers himself with electricity and slams both his fists on the opponent.

nodes.label: Fire Sealing Method
nodes.description: The user first readies a scroll that they've previously inscribed with a special sealing formula, which has a blank space left in its centre. They then activate this technique, quickly sucking any nearby Fire Release into the blank space and sealing ...
nodes.full_description:
The user first readies a scroll that they've previously inscribed with a special sealing formula, which has a blank space left in its centre. They then activate this technique, quickly sucking any nearby Fire Release into the blank space and sealing it there, signified by the appearance of the kanji for "seal" (封). Regardless of any special properties that the flames may have, such as those of Amaterasu, they will remain sealed until the user chooses to unseal them. Because this technique is designed for Fire Release, performing it requires expertise in not only using seals but ninjutsu as well.[1]

References[]

↑ 1.0 1.1 Tō no Sho, page 267

nodes.label: Fire Release: Water Mist
nodes.description: Kakashi creates a bird of flames under his complete control that quickly flies into a designated water source, burning hot enough to cause the water to evaporate. The bird disappears as soon as the water is gone. Alternatively, the bird can release s...
nodes.full_description: Kakashi creates a bird of flames under his complete control that quickly flies into a designated water source, burning hot enough to cause the water to evaporate. The bird disappears as soon as the water is gone. Alternatively, the bird can release streams of fire from its mouth for offensive purposes.

nodes.label: Fission Technique
nodes.description:
The Fission Technique is a highly advanced ninjutsu which allows Mū to literally split his own body into two identical — yet entirely independent — duplicates of himself. 
Unlike clone techniques that only appear to be similar, the ability is instead...
nodes.full_description:
The Fission Technique is a highly advanced ninjutsu which allows Mū to literally split his own body into two identical — yet entirely independent — duplicates of himself. 
Unlike clone techniques that only appear to be similar, the ability is instead a physical separation and so does not require hand seals to activate, making it faster in comparison as a result. This also means that even if one is incapacitated, the other remains completely unaffected as neither can truly be regarded as the original. 
Because the duplicates cannot be dispelled like normal clones, they will be unable to reunite if one is sealed. This poses a great risk to Mū as his chakra reserves are also halved in the process. In doing so, he is left unable to use more taxing techniques like his Dust Release kekkei tōta.[2][3]

See Also[]
Slug Great Division
Ten-Tails Fission
References[]

↑ Fourth Databook, page 292

↑ Naruto chapter 558, page 6

↑ Naruto chapter 560, page 7

nodes.label: Fire Release: Toad Oil Flame Bullet
nodes.description:
This article is about the fire technique. For the wind and fire technique, see Wind Release: Toad Oil Flame Bullet.




This is a cooperation ninjutsu performed by a toad and a fire user who have achieved mental and physical harmony with each other. ...
nodes.full_description:
This article is about the fire technique. For the wind and fire technique, see Wind Release: Toad Oil Flame Bullet.




This is a cooperation ninjutsu performed by a toad and a fire user who have achieved mental and physical harmony with each other. The toad (specifically a large toad such as Gamabunta) uses its large lung capacity to spray toad oil from its mouth at a target. The fire user then ignites the oil, increasing the attack's range and power; Jiraiya uses Fire Release: Flame Bullet for this purpose.[1] In the anime, Naruto Uzumaki instead sets flame to the oil with an exploding tag.[2] The resulting cloud of fire is great enough that it forces Manda to shed its skin to escape.[3]

See Also[]
Wind Release: Toad Oil Flame Bullet
References[]

↑ 1.0 1.1 Tō no Sho, page 204

↑ Naruto episode 173

↑ Naruto chapter 170

nodes.full_description: The user spits out a flaming tornado from their mouth, which was noted to be powerful enough to incinerate everything it comes into contact with like paper. When in contact with large volumes of water, the technique creates a dense cloud of steam.

nodes.label: Fire Release: Running Fire
nodes.description: This technique creates a stream of fire that can be manipulated into several forms (so far, rings of fire that runs on the ground or a circle of fire flying through the air) before striking the target. It can also be used in combination with Wind Rel...
nodes.full_description: This technique creates a stream of fire that can be manipulated into several forms (so far, rings of fire that runs on the ground or a circle of fire flying through the air) before striking the target. It can also be used in combination with Wind Release: Divine Wind to create a tornado of flames, or with Wind Release: Divine Mountain Wind to release a massive inferno, the latter which is made even more powerful when used in an enclosed space created by Earth Release: Earth Corridor.

nodes.full_description: While in his long-range form, Kakuzu unleashes a torrent of fireballs at his opponent which explode on impact.

nodes.label: Fire Release: Phoenix Sage Fire Technique
nodes.description: The user spits a volley of small fireballs into the air; at a glance, it can appear as though there was only one fireball that then burst into many. The many small flames move wildly through the area, potentially mesmerising targets as they're surrou...
nodes.full_description: The user spits a volley of small fireballs into the air; at a glance, it can appear as though there was only one fireball that then burst into many. The many small flames move wildly through the area, potentially mesmerising targets as they're surrounded. The user controls each individual flame with their chakra, allowing them to guide each at the target and, consequently, making this technique difficult to evade. Shuriken can be hidden within the flames, not only making them more deadly upon impact but also, by controlling the flames' movements, giving users a means of controlling the shuriken as well.[1]

nodes.label: Fire Release: Phoenix Sage Flower Nail Crimson
nodes.description: The user unleashes a volley of shuriken with one hand, and at the same time, exhales fire-infused chakra onto them in order to increase the weapons' destructive potential by making them capable of inflicting severe burns upon direct contact with eith...
nodes.full_description:
The user unleashes a volley of shuriken with one hand, and at the same time, exhales fire-infused chakra onto them in order to increase the weapons' destructive potential by making them capable of inflicting severe burns upon direct contact with either the intended victim, or any other object caught within their trajectories.
Due to the chakra-based nature of the flames that surround them, the shuriken will continue to burn after impact, regardless of the flammability of the object that they ultimately collide with.

nodes.label: Fire Release: Intelligent Hard Work
nodes.description: Kakuzu's fire-element mask fires a small fireball that erupts into a giant fire-storm after making contact with a surface, causing widespread destruction to the area. Since the flames travel along the ground, and cover such a wide area this is a diff...
nodes.full_description: Kakuzu's fire-element mask fires a small fireball that erupts into a giant fire-storm after making contact with a surface, causing widespread destruction to the area. Since the flames travel along the ground, and cover such a wide area this is a difficult technique to evade. When combined with Wind Release: Pressure Damage, this technique is amplified to the point of being able to evaporate a large amount of water in an instant.

nodes.label: Fire Release: Nail Crimson Crow Leap

nodes.full_description: Shisui delivers a series of swift strikes to his opponent, then proceeds to toss a volley of fire-infused kunai, from an aerial perspective, at the opponent, the flames of which spark a devastating explosion.

nodes.full_description: Using this technique, a user can hide themselves inside a flame. Upon leaving concealment, flames burn, revealing the user. A member of the Nokizaru Group made use of this technique during a mission to retrieve a stolen scroll from Kumogakure shinobi.

nodes.full_description: The user is able to create and blow a flammable gas from their lungs. Once it comes in contact with fire or spark, the gas ignites into a large fireball. Kagerō used this technique while disguised as Kabuto Yakushi.

nodes.label: Fire Release: Hiding in Ash and Dust Technique
nodes.description: The user expels chakra-infused ash that blanket a wide area, burning anyone who comes in contact with it. The technique can also be used as a powerful deterrent from attacks as well as a highly effective smokescreen. This technique is a far more effe...
nodes.full_description:
The user expels chakra-infused ash that blanket a wide area, burning anyone who comes in contact with it. The technique can also be used as a powerful deterrent from attacks as well as a highly effective smokescreen. This technique is a far more effective substitute for smoke bombs since the user doesn't need their hands to be free nor does this technique require hand seals.

References[]

↑ Fourth Databook, page 316

The Fire Release: Great Flame Technique is a hiden Fire Release technique utilised by the Sarutobi clan.[1]

Usage[]
The user kneads chakra in their stomach and expels a large stream of flames from their mouth that progressively widens with range. Th...
nodes.full_description:
The Fire Release: Great Flame Technique is a hiden Fire Release technique utilised by the Sarutobi clan.[1]

Usage[]
The user kneads chakra in their stomach and expels a large stream of flames from their mouth that progressively widens with range. This technique can also be used collaboratively to create an enormous vortex of rapidly expanding flames. The flames are hot enough to quickly evaporate large quantities of water within a relatively short amount of time.

References[]

↑ 1.0 1.1 Fourth Databook, page 316

nodes.description: Kneading his chakra and then converting it to fire, the user creates a multitude of fireballs at the same time which then rain down on the target causing severe, widespread damage around the field. These fireballs can easily destroy Earth Release-cre...
nodes.full_description: Kneading his chakra and then converting it to fire, the user creates a multitude of fireballs at the same time which then rain down on the target causing severe, widespread damage around the field. These fireballs can easily destroy Earth Release-created shelters and even overpower Water Release attacks.

nodes.description: Itachi attacks his opponent with a series of mixed methods, including kicks, punches, and stabs with kunai. During the attack string, he creates a shadow clone, which attacks with a flurry of shuriken, and the real Itachi finishes with a fireball att...
nodes.full_description: Itachi attacks his opponent with a series of mixed methods, including kicks, punches, and stabs with kunai. During the attack string, he creates a shadow clone, which attacks with a flurry of shuriken, and the real Itachi finishes with a fireball attack.

nodes.label: Fire Release: Great Fireball Technique: First Step
nodes.description: Obito lands a series of hits, finishing with an upwards double kick, sending his opponent up in the air. As they fall down, Obito shoots a burst of fire at them.
nodes.full_description: Obito lands a series of hits, finishing with an upwards double kick, sending his opponent up in the air. As they fall down, Obito shoots a burst of fire at them.

nodes.label: Fire Release: Great Fireball Technique
nodes.description: The user kneads chakra in their body and turns it into fire, which they then expel from their mouth; the more chakra they use, the more flames that are produced. Sometimes the flames lack a distinct shape, being only a stream, but more often than not...
nodes.full_description:
The user kneads chakra in their body and turns it into fire, which they then expel from their mouth; the more chakra they use, the more flames that are produced. Sometimes the flames lack a distinct shape, being only a stream, but more often than not they take the form of a giant orb that maintains its shape until hitting a target. Upon impact, the fireball is powerful enough to crater the ground and vaporise the surroundings.[1] Against living targets, the fireball can cause extensive burns.
The Great Fireball Technique was created by the Uchiha clan, and over time became one of their signature abilities.[2] The Uchiha in fact used the Great Fireball Technique as a coming of age rite, with members not being considered true adults until they learned to perform it.[3] In keeping with this, the manga has only ever shown Uchiha using this technique; the anime at times depicts non-Uchiha performing it.

If used upon a dense, combustible terrain, such as a forest, the confined area can greatly increase the possibility of the target's incineration.

This makes the technique extremely difficult to either avoid or contain, with it requiring the combined efforts of several Water Release users in order to extinguish the flames.

nodes.full_description: While in his level two cursed seal form, Sasuke exhales a stronger short-range version of the Fire Release: Great Fireball Technique.

nodes.label: Fire Release: Flint Yagura Technique
nodes.description: The user throws a lighter on the ground in front of his opponent and expands the flame into a wall of fire. It is noted to be a technique that "makes a small spark burst into a pillar of fire".[1]
nodes.full_description: The user throws a lighter on the ground in front of his opponent and expands the flame into a wall of fire. It is noted to be a technique that "makes a small spark burst into a pillar of fire".[1]

nodes.label: Fire Release: Great Dragon Fire Technique
nodes.description: The user compresses a large amount of chakra built up inside their body and changes it into a dragon head-shaped fireball. The user then skillfully manipulates that great fire, and attacks their opponent. Even outside of the attack range, its power a...
nodes.full_description:
The user compresses a large amount of chakra built up inside their body and changes it into a dragon head-shaped fireball. The user then skillfully manipulates that great fire, and attacks their opponent. Even outside of the attack range, its power and reliability are stressed. 
The flames have a high temperature, which can create an upward movement of air currents which in turn can give rise to thunder clouds. A master of this technique can fire off several flames in succession and anyone caught in the technique could potentially be reduced to ashes.

nodes.label: Fire Release: Great Blaze Ball
nodes.description: Itachi exhales a meteor-sized sphere of fire that carries the enemy away and causes a massive explosion on impact.[1] The impact causes the ground around Itachi to break apart while he remains unfazed. This is much like Fire Release: Great Fireball T...
nodes.full_description:
Itachi exhales a meteor-sized sphere of fire that carries the enemy away and causes a massive explosion on impact.[1] The impact causes the ground around Itachi to break apart while he remains unfazed. This is much like Fire Release: Great Fireball Technique, but a larger and more destructive version.

References[]

↑ Naruto gamebook, page 85

nodes.label: Fire Release: Flaming Hail
nodes.description: The user conjures a barrage of arrows made of fire. Any arrows that miss will spread fire around the surroundings.
nodes.full_description: The user conjures a barrage of arrows made of fire. Any arrows that miss will spread fire around the surroundings.

nodes.label: Fire Release: Flame Wrapping Sickle Dance
nodes.description: Madara covers his kama in flames and spins around, slashing any opponent in his reach, finally slamming down from above.
nodes.full_description: Madara covers his kama in flames and spins around, slashing any opponent in his reach, finally slamming down from above.

nodes.label: Fire Release: Flame Murdering Boundary
nodes.description: After the chakra kneaded inside his body is converted into fire, Obito jumps a considerable amount of height and spews a large orb of flames straight to the opponent.
nodes.full_description: After the chakra kneaded inside his body is converted into fire, Obito jumps a considerable amount of height and spews a large orb of flames straight to the opponent.

nodes.label: Fire Release: Flame Capture
nodes.description: The user creates a fire whip. It can knock an opponent a considerable distance, strong enough to damage rock.
nodes.full_description: The user creates a fire whip. It can knock an opponent a considerable distance, strong enough to damage rock.

nodes.label: Fire Release: Flame Whirlwind
nodes.description:
Fire erupts around the user's body in a spiralling manner which is then launched with his hands towards the target. Once the technique hits the target, the opponent is sent into the air in a spiralling manner and their body burns into ashes.

See Als...
nodes.full_description:
Fire erupts around the user's body in a spiralling manner which is then launched with his hands towards the target. Once the technique hits the target, the opponent is sent into the air in a spiralling manner and their body burns into ashes.

See Also[]
Fire Release: Blast Wave Wild Dance

nodes.label: Fire Release: Flame Tiger Bombing
nodes.description: Jakō Ryūdōin summons a tiger made of flames from the scroll on his back, inflicting massive damage to the player's team, additionally having the ability to attach to the opponent and explode with much impact. This technique is similar to Fire Release...
nodes.full_description: Jakō Ryūdōin summons a tiger made of flames from the scroll on his back, inflicting massive damage to the player's team, additionally having the ability to attach to the opponent and explode with much impact. This technique is similar to Fire Release: Great Dragon Fire Technique and Exploding Dragon Strike, except that it uses a tiger rather than a dragon. It is also somewhat similar to a explosive tag, but far stronger.

nodes.label: Fire Release: Flame Spear
nodes.description: The user creates a blade of fire, the flames of which spread horizontally ahead of them. The fire will go out if the user loses consciousness.
nodes.full_description: The user creates a blade of fire, the flames of which spread horizontally ahead of them. The fire will go out if the user loses consciousness.

nodes.label: Fire Release: Flame Bullet
nodes.description: This technique is executed by the user gathering oil in their mouth which is created by chakra, spitting it out, and igniting it. This technique simply shoots a flame bullet at the enemy. If the amount of oil that is prepared is kept down, the time i...
nodes.full_description: This technique is executed by the user gathering oil in their mouth which is created by chakra, spitting it out, and igniting it. This technique simply shoots a flame bullet at the enemy. If the amount of oil that is prepared is kept down, the time it takes to invoke the technique is reduced. This allows the enemy to be stricken unaware, allowing the oil-containing flame bullet to burn them up completely. It is also possible to shoot out a series of flame bullets by partitioning the oil, or a continuous flamethrower. If this technique is fired after covering the enemy with oil using the Toad Oil Bullet, it has the power to wound or kill. This also keeps down the consumption of chakra.

nodes.label: Fire Release: Flame Attack
nodes.description:
The user imbues their fists with Fire Release. Upon striking the target, they will be consumed by flames. Kiseru Gankubi is shown capable of throwing flames in the direction of his attacks, which was powerful enough to incinerate kunai.

See Also[]
E...
nodes.full_description:
The user imbues their fists with Fire Release. Upon striking the target, they will be consumed by flames. Kiseru Gankubi is shown capable of throwing flames in the direction of his attacks, which was powerful enough to incinerate kunai.

See Also[]
Explosion Release: Landmine Fist

nodes.label: Fire Release: Fired Pottery Technique
nodes.description: The user creates powerful flames inside the giant oven created by the Lightning Release: Sixteen Pillar Bind, cooking the opponent until they are burned. It's used together with Earth Release: Sticky Earth Drop to harden the mud covering the enemy's ...
nodes.full_description: The user creates powerful flames inside the giant oven created by the Lightning Release: Sixteen Pillar Bind, cooking the opponent until they are burned. It's used together with Earth Release: Sticky Earth Drop to harden the mud covering the enemy's body and subsequently immobilising them.

nodes.label: Fire Release: Fire Dragon Bullet
nodes.description: A basic Fire Release technique, where the user exhales a flame breath from their mouth. As shown by Hiruzen, this technique can be used in conjunction with Earth Release: Earth Dragon Bullet to ignite the projectiles fired by the latter technique, ma...
nodes.full_description:
A basic Fire Release technique, where the user exhales a flame breath from their mouth. As shown by Hiruzen, this technique can be used in conjunction with Earth Release: Earth Dragon Bullet to ignite the projectiles fired by the latter technique, making it more devastating.

References[]

↑ Boruto episode 187

nodes.label: Fire Release: Extinguishing Curtain Field
nodes.description: Jiraiya stomps the ground with his foot, creating a crack that goes under the opponent. He then sends fire into the crack, boiling the earth below the opponent and finishes by clapping his hands together, creating a large and fiery explosion where th...
nodes.full_description: Jiraiya stomps the ground with his foot, creating a crack that goes under the opponent. He then sends fire into the crack, boiling the earth below the opponent and finishes by clapping his hands together, creating a large and fiery explosion where the opponent is.

nodes.label: Fire Release: Fire Dragon Wall
nodes.description:
The user forms a circular wall of fire around themselves and their opponent, preventing them from escaping during their fight.

See Also[]
Fire Release: Crimson Earth Spider
nodes.full_description:
The user forms a circular wall of fire around themselves and their opponent, preventing them from escaping during their fight.

See Also[]
Fire Release: Crimson Earth Spider

nodes.label: Fire Release: Fire Wind Wild Blade
nodes.description:
Madara shoots a fireball and attacks the opponent with both his sickle and gunbai in the expelled flames.

See Also[]
Fanned Calamity Flames
nodes.full_description:
Madara shoots a fireball and attacks the opponent with both his sickle and gunbai in the expelled flames.

See Also[]
Fanned Calamity Flames

nodes.label: Fire Release: Fire Dragon Flame Bullet
nodes.description: After kneading chakra, the user breathes fire from their mouth. The flames are manipulated into the shape of a dragon and divided to strike the target from the left, right, and front all at once. Unlike the Great Fireball, which covers a wide area, t...
nodes.full_description: After kneading chakra, the user breathes fire from their mouth. The flames are manipulated into the shape of a dragon and divided to strike the target from the left, right, and front all at once. Unlike the Great Fireball, which covers a wide area, the Fire Dragon Flame Bullet makes focused strikes, quickly reducing targets to ash upon contact.[1] Alternately, the flames can coil around the target and form into a vortex, effectively keeping them trapped in place unless they can escape through the top.[2] Because of the power of this technique, as well as the amount of skill it takes to control the flames, there are very few ninja who can perform it, the Third Hokage being one such user.[1]

nodes.label: Fire Release: Dragon Flame Release Song Technique
nodes.description: This is an advanced version of its parent technique. This technique allows the user to expel several dragon-headed fireballs from their mouth to cover the frontal, left, and right sides of the opponent. As the dragon-heads move in an erratic manner, ...
nodes.full_description: This is an advanced version of its parent technique. This technique allows the user to expel several dragon-headed fireballs from their mouth to cover the frontal, left, and right sides of the opponent. As the dragon-heads move in an erratic manner, it makes the technique much more difficult to avoid.

nodes.label: Fire Release: Exploding Flame Formation
nodes.description:
Fire Release: Exploding Flame Formation is a technique that was a specialty of Hanzō.[1]

Contents

1 Usage
2

nodes.label: Fire Release: Deep Flame Explosion
nodes.description:
The user punches the ground, causing flames to erupt, exploding all around them. The flames are strong to dig through the ground, offering an option for escape.

See Also[]
Earth Release: Tunnelling Technique
Explosion Release: Landmine Fist
nodes.full_description:
The user punches the ground, causing flames to erupt, exploding all around them. The flames are strong to dig through the ground, offering an option for escape.

nodes.label: Fire Release: Dragon Fire Technique
nodes.description: The user spits flames from their mouth that, like a dragon's, quickly travel forward in a straight direction. Upon contact with a target, the affected area is engulfed in flames. Whereas the Great Fireball Technique will burn everything in the vicini...
nodes.full_description: The user spits flames from their mouth that, like a dragon's, quickly travel forward in a straight direction. Upon contact with a target, the affected area is engulfed in flames. Whereas the Great Fireball Technique will burn everything in the vicinity, the Dragon Fire Technique is more narrowly focused at its initial target, likened to a projectile.[1] When first used by Sasuke Uchiha, he uses wire strings to guide the Dragon Fire Technique to his target's face.[2] The anime later shows it burning through a line of enemies, with the flames moving from one enemy to the next.[3] Despite these two cases, the Dragon Fire Technique seemingly does not require a medium through which to be transmitted.

nodes.label: Fire Release: Demon Lantern
nodes.description: This technique releases many floating fireballs around the user, which take the shape of ghosts at the final stage of the technique. After performing the required hand seal, they attack the opponent in swarms. Each fireball creates a huge flame at th...
nodes.full_description: This technique releases many floating fireballs around the user, which take the shape of ghosts at the final stage of the technique. After performing the required hand seal, they attack the opponent in swarms. Each fireball creates a huge flame at the moment of impact.

nodes.label: Fire Release: Crimson Earth Spider
nodes.description:
The user spews out fire that both surrounds the enemy and then transforms into a spider that attacks the enemy. This technique effectively traps and attacks an opponent at the same time, and can be used to force them into another attack.

See Also[]
...
nodes.full_description:
The user spews out fire that both surrounds the enemy and then transforms into a spider that attacks the enemy. This technique effectively traps and attacks an opponent at the same time, and can be used to force them into another attack.

nodes.label: Fire Release: Chaotic Petals
nodes.description: The user focuses their blue flames into spiralling balls to be launched at the target.
nodes.full_description: The user focuses their blue flames into spiralling balls to be launched at the target.

nodes.label: Fire Release Cooperation Technique: Garuda
nodes.description:
This article is about the cooperation ninjutsu.  For other uses, see Garuda (disambiguation).




Three users each breathe a long stream of intense fire, which combine to form a flaming dragon.

nodes.description: The user creates a circle of fireballs around him, which revolve around him, protecting from attacks and striking the people attacking him with the flames.
nodes.full_description: The user creates a circle of fireballs around him, which revolve around him, protecting from attacks and striking the people attacking him with the flames.

nodes.label: Fire Release: Blast Wave Wild Dance
nodes.description:
The Fire Release: Blast Wave Wild Dance is a technique that combines the might of the Sharingan and Fire Release.[1]

Overview[]
The user kneads chakra inside their body and converts it into fire, which is then expelled from the mouth in a large stre...
nodes.full_description:
The Fire Release: Blast Wave Wild Dance is a technique that combines the might of the Sharingan and Fire Release.[1]

Overview[]
The user kneads chakra inside their body and converts it into fire, which is then expelled from the mouth in a large stream. The blaze is drawn into a spiral when the user expands their stomach,[1] which will engulf the opponent in a massive vortex, giving them no option to escape, leaving them to suffer and burn.[2] If needed, Kamui can be used to draw out a whirlwind, aiding the formation of the fiery spiral.[3]
As this technique combines the use of the Sharingan and Fire Release, common characteristics of the Uchiha clan, it is indeed a formidable ninjutsu.[1]

See Also[]
Daikokuten: Disaster
Fire Release: Flame Whirlwind
References[]

↑ 1.0 1.1 1.2 1.3 Fourth Databook, page 239

↑ Naruto chapter 628, page 2

↑ Naruto chapter 600, pages 17-18

nodes.label: Fire Release: Ash Pile Burning
nodes.description: The user spews a stream of chakra-infused gunpowder from their mouth, which surrounds the region. As the gunpowder is composed entirely of ash, it stays in the air around the victim like a cloud, which can be used like a smokescreen. After surroundin...
nodes.full_description:
The user spews a stream of chakra-infused gunpowder from their mouth, which surrounds the region. As the gunpowder is composed entirely of ash, it stays in the air around the victim like a cloud, which can be used like a smokescreen. After surrounding the enemy with the ash, the user can ignite it with a flint placed on their teeth beforehand to create a spark, resulting in a violent explosion, burning the enemy. However, this technique requires keen senses to read the air currents, the insight to read the movements of the enemy, the tactical experience to not also enfold one's allies in the flames, and careful attention for the timing of the ignition.

See Also[]
Scale Powder Blasting
References[]

↑ Sha no Sho, page 237

nodes.label: Fire Release: Big Flame Bullet
nodes.description: This technique is a senjutsu altered version of the Fire Release: Flame Bullet. The user fills their mouth cavity with oil, created inside his body with senjutsu chakra. This oil is expelled and at the same time ignited, creating a massive flame, equ...
nodes.full_description:
This technique is a senjutsu altered version of the Fire Release: Flame Bullet. The user fills their mouth cavity with oil, created inside his body with senjutsu chakra. This oil is expelled and at the same time ignited, creating a massive flame, equivalent in power to a multitude of Flame Bullets. The flames can be used as a single projectile or a continuous stream of flames. With a single bullet, Jiraiya was able to instantly incinerate Nagato's Giant Drill-Beaked Bird.
When used in a closed off area, the flames produced can completely cut off the front escape route of an enemy cornered in a hallway or room, while thoroughly engulfing each other routes.

References[]

↑ Sha no Sho, page 237

nodes.label: Fire Release Bullet: "Blaze"
nodes.description: The user launches a mass of fire at their opponent. When used through autonomous puppets, they can fire it in rapid succession, without hand seals.[2] However, continuous firing can lead them to overheat, and thus disable them until they have cooled ...
nodes.full_description: The user launches a mass of fire at their opponent. When used through autonomous puppets, they can fire it in rapid succession, without hand seals.[2] However, continuous firing can lead them to overheat, and thus disable them until they have cooled down.[3]
